```js
performance.mark('after-socket-init');
performance.measure('Shared Socket Module Initialization', 'before-socket-init', 'after-socket-init');

const registerShutdownHook = (hook) => {
  if (typeof hook === 'function') {
    shutdownHooks.push(hook);
  }
};

const runMaybeAsync = async (fn, label) => {
  try {
    await fn();
    console.log(`${label} completed.`);
  } catch (error) {
    await logAndReportError(`${label} failed:`, error, { label });
  }
};

const registerModuleShutdownHooks = (moduleRef, moduleLabel) => {
  if (!moduleRef) return;

  const candidateFns = [
    { key: 'stop', label: `${moduleLabel}.stop` },
    { key: 'shutdown', label: `${moduleLabel}.shutdown` },
    { key: 'close', label: `${moduleLabel}.close` },
    { key: 'dispose', label: `${moduleLabel}.dispose` },
  ];

  for (const candidate of candidateFns) {
    if (typeof moduleRef[candidate.key] === 'function') {
      registerShutdownHook(async () => {
        await moduleRef[candidate.key]();
        console.log(`${candidate.label} completed.`);
      });
    }
  }

  if (typeof moduleRef.default === 'function') {
    registerShutdownHook(async () => {
      await moduleRef.default();
      console.log(`${moduleLabel}.default completed.`);
    });
  }
};

// --- Load Background Services/Jobs (Dynamic Imports) ---
(async () => {
  try {
    const emailSyncModule = await import('#services/email/services/emailSync.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'emailSync', moduleRef: emailSyncModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(emailSyncModule, 'emailSync');
    console.log('Email sync service loaded.');

    const shiftCheckInReminderModule = await import('./jobs/shiftCheckInReminder.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'shiftCheckInReminder', moduleRef: shiftCheckInReminderModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(shiftCheckInReminderModule, 'shiftCheckInReminder');
    console.log('Shift check-in reminder job loaded.');

    const aiManagerCronModule = await import('./jobs/aiManagerCron.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'aiManagerCron', moduleRef: aiManagerCronModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(aiManagerCronModule, 'aiManagerCron');
    console.log('AI manager cron job loaded.');

    const taskReminderCronModule = await import('./jobs/taskReminderCron.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'taskReminderCron', moduleRef: taskReminderCronModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(taskReminderCronModule, 'taskReminderCron');

    console.log('Task reminder cron job loaded.');
  } catch (err) {
    await logAndReportError('Failed to load background services:', err);
  }
})();

console.log('Allowed Origins:', allowedOrigins);

app.use(
  cors({
    origin(origin, callback) {
      if (!origin) return callback(null, true);

      if (!allowedOrigins.includes(origin)) {
        const msg = `The CORS policy for this site does not allow access from the specified Origin: ${origin}`;
        return callback(new Error(msg), false);
      }

      return callback(null, true);
    },
    methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'],
    credentials: true,
    optionsSuccessStatus: 200,
  })
);

// --- Global Rate Limiter ---
const limiter = rateLimit({
  windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000,
  max: 1000,
  message: { error: 'Too many requests. Please try again later.' },
  standardHeaders: true,
  legacyHeaders: false,
});
app.use(limiter);

// --- Bot Rejector Middleware ---
app.use((req, res, next) => {
  const suspiciousKeywords = ['.env', '.yaml', '.php', '/debug', '.git', 'config.js'];

  if (suspiciousKeywords.some((keyword) => req.originalUrl.toLowerCase().includes(keyword))) {
    return res.status(403).end();
  }

  next();
});

// --- Logging Middleware ---
app.use((req, res, next) => {
  const start = process.hrtime();
  const startMemory = process.memoryUsage().heapUsed;
  console.log(`[${new Date().toISOString()}] --> ${req.method} ${req.originalUrl}`);

  res.on('finish', () => {
    const diff = process.hrtime(start);
    const duration = (diff[0] * 1000 + diff[1] / 1000000).toFixed(2);
    const endMemory = process.memoryUsage().heapUsed;
    const memoryDiff = ((endMemory - startMemory) / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(3);

    console.log(
      `[${new Date().toISOString()}] <-- ${req.method} ${req.originalUrl} ${res.statusCode} (${duration}ms, Mem: ${memoryDiff}MB)`
    );
  });

  next();
});

app.use('/ubereats', uberEatsRouter);

// --- Utility Routes ---
performance.mark('before-global-css');
app.get('/global.css', async (req, res) => {
  const clientDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), '../client');
  const cssDirs = [
    path.join(clientDir, 'dist', 'static', 'css'),
    path.join(clientDir, '.next', 'static', 'css'),
  ];

  try {
    const cssDir = cssDirs.find((dir) => fsExtra.pathExistsSync(dir));

    if (!cssDir) {
      return res.status(404).send('/* CSS directory not found */');
    }

    const files = await fsExtra.readdir(cssDir);
    let combinedCss = '';

    for (const file of files) {
      if (path.extname(file) === '.css') {
        const filePath = path.join(cssDir, file);
        const cssContent = await fsExtra.readFile(filePath, 'utf-8');
        combinedCss += `/* ${file} */\n${cssContent}\n\n`;
      }
    }

    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/css');
    res.send(combinedCss);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error combining CSS:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to combine CSS files.', details: error.message });
  }
});
performance.mark('after-global-css');
performance.measure('Global CSS Endpoint Setup', 'before-global-css', 'after-global-css');

// --- File serving endpoint by Organization Slug ---
app.get('/uploads/bySlug/:orgSlug/:filePath(*)', async (req, res, next) => {
  const { orgSlug, filePath } = req.params;

  if (!orgSlug || !filePath) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Required params missing.' });
  }

  try {
    const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { slug: orgSlug },
      select: { id: true },
    });

    if (!organization) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Organization not found.' });
    }

    const organizationId = organization.id;
    const baseUploadsDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'uploads');
    const orgUploadsDir = path.join(baseUploadsDir, organizationId);
    const fullPath = path.join(orgUploadsDir, filePath);
    const normalizedFullPath = path.normalize(fullPath);
    const normalizedOrgDir = path.normalize(orgUploadsDir);

    if (!normalizedFullPath.startsWith(normalizedOrgDir)) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Access forbidden: Invalid file path.' });
    }

    const fileExists = await fsExtra.pathExists(normalizedFullPath);
    if (!fileExists) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'File not found.' });
    }

    const stats = await fsExtra.stat(normalizedFullPath);
    if (!stats.isFile()) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Not a file.' });
    }

    return res.sendFile(normalizedFullPath, (err) => {
      if (err && !res.headersSent) next(err);
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error serving file by slug:', error);
    if (!res.headersSent) {
      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error.' });
    }
  }
});

// --- File serving endpoint by Organization ID ---
app.use('/uploads', async (req, res) => {
  const isInternal = req.headers['x-internal-request'] === 'true';
  let organizationId;

  let relativePath = req.path;
  const segments = relativePath.split('/').filter(Boolean);

  if (segments.length > 0) {
    relativePath = segments.slice(1).join('/');
    organizationId = segments[0];
  }

  if (!relativePath || relativePath === '/') {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'File path is missing.' });
  }

  const baseUploadsDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'uploads');
  let fullPath;

  if (isInternal) {
    fullPath = path.join(baseUploadsDir, organizationId, relativePath);
  } else {
    const orgUploadsDir = path.join(baseUploadsDir, organizationId);
    fullPath = path.join(orgUploadsDir, relativePath);
    const normalizedFullPath = path.normalize(fullPath);
    const normalizedOrgDir = path.normalize(orgUploadsDir);

    if (!normalizedFullPath.startsWith(normalizedOrgDir)) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Access forbidden.' });
    }
  }

  return res.sendFile(fullPath, (err) => {
    if (err && !res.headersSent) {
      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to send file.' });
    }
  });
});

// --- Seed Payment Providers ---
(async () => {
  try {
    const providers = [
      { name: 'square', displayName: 'Square', active: true, configSchema: JSON.stringify({ accessToken: 'string', locationId: 'string', applicationId: 'string' }) },
      { name: 'stripe', displayName: 'Stripe', active: true, configSchema: JSON.stringify({ secretKey: 'string', publishableKey: 'string' }) },
    ];

    for (const provider of providers) {
      await prisma.paymentProvider.upsert({
        where: { name: provider.name },
        create: provider,
        update: { displayName: provider.displayName, active: provider.active, configSchema: provider.configSchema },
      });
    }
    console.log('Payment providers seeded successfully.');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to seed payment providers:', error);
  }
})();

// --- Initialize Socket.IO Namespaces ---
performance.mark('before-sockets');
setupChatSockets();
setupPOSockets();
setupCallSockets();
setupEmailSockets();
setupAISockets();

const audioStreamSocketCleanup = setupAudioStreamSockets(server);
if (typeof audioStreamSocketCleanup === 'function') {
  registerShutdownHook(async () => {
    await audioStreamSocketCleanup();
    console.log('Audio stream sockets cleanup completed.');
  });
} else if (audioStreamSocketCleanup && typeof audioStreamSocketCleanup.close === 'function') {
  registerShutdownHook(async () => {
    await audioStreamSocketCleanup.close();
    console.log('Audio stream sockets close completed.');
  });
}

performance.mark('after-sockets');
performance.measure('Socket Namespaces Setup', 'before-sockets', 'after-sockets');

// --- 404 Handler ---
app.use((req, res) => {
  res.status(404).json({ error: `Endpoint not found: ${req.method} ${req.originalUrl}` });
});

app.use(errorHandler);

// --- Start Server ---
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3008;
performance.mark('before-server-listen');
server.listen(PORT, () => {
  performance.mark('server-listen');
  performance.measure('Server Listen Start', 'before-server-listen', 'server-listen');
  performance.measure('Total Initialization Time', 'start', 'server-listen');
  console.log(`🚀 Server is running on port ${PORT} in ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'not set'} mode.`);
});

const closeHttpServer = () =>
  new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    server.close((error) => {
      if (error) {
        reject(error);
        return;
      }

      resolve();
    });
  });

const closeSocketIoServer = () =>
  new Promise((resolve) => {
    io.close(() => {
      resolve();
    });
  });

const destroyOpenSockets = () => {
  for (const socket of openSockets) {
    try {
      socket.destroy();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to destroy socket:', error);
    }
  }
};

const logShutdownState = () => {
  server.getConnections((error, count) => {
    if (error) {
      console.error('Failed to get open HTTP connections:', error);
      return;
    }

    console.log(`Open HTTP connections during shutdown: ${count}`);
  });

  console.log(`Open raw sockets during shutdown: ${openSockets.size}`);
  console.log(`Socket.IO clients during shutdown: ${io.engine.clientsCount}`);
};

const gracefulShutdown = async (signal) => {
  if (isShuttingDown) {
    console.log(`Shutdown already in progress. Ignoring ${signal}.`);
    return;
  }

  isShuttingDown = true;
  console.log(`Signal received (${signal}): closing server...`);
  logShutdownState();

  forceShutdownTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
    console.error('Forced shutdown timeout reached. Destroying lingering sockets.');

    destroyOpenSockets();

    try {
      await prisma.$disconnect();
      console.log('Prisma disconnected during forced shutdown.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to disconnect Prisma during forced shutdown:', error);
    }

    await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
    process.exit(1);
  }, 10000);

  if (typeof forceShutdownTimer.unref === 'function') {
    forceShutdownTimer.unref();
  }

  try {
    await closeSocketIoServer();
    console.log('Socket.IO server closed');

    await runMaybeAsync(async () => {
      for (const hook of shutdownHooks) {
        await hook();
      }
    }, 'Registered shutdown hooks');

    await closeHttpServer();
    console.log('HTTP server closed');

    destroyOpenSockets();
    obs.disconnect();

    await prisma.$disconnect();
    console.log('Prisma disconnected');

    if (forceShutdownTimer) {
      clearTimeout(forceShutdownTimer);
      forceShutdownTimer = null;
    }

    await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
    process.exit(0);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error during graceful shutdown:', error);

    destroyOpenSockets();

    try {
      await prisma.$disconnect();
      console.log('Prisma disconnected after shutdown error');
    } catch (disconnectError) {
      console.error('Failed to disconnect Prisma after shutdown error:', disconnectError);
    }

    if (forceShutdownTimer) {
      clearTimeout(forceShutdownTimer);
      forceShutdownTimer = null;
    }

    await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
    process.exit(1);
  }
};

process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
  void gracefulShutdown('SIGTERM');
});

process.on('SIGINT', () => {
  void gracefulShutdown('SIGINT');
});

```

```js
    global.prisma = new PrismaClient();
```

```js
// server/src/shared/socket.js

let ioInstance;

export const initializeSocket = (serverIO) => {
  ioInstance = serverIO;
};

export const getIO = () => {
  if (!ioInstance) {
    throw new Error('Socket.io not initialized!');
  }
  return ioInstance;
};

export const getNamespace = (namespaceName) => {
  if (!ioInstance) {
    throw new Error('Socket.io not initialized!');
  }
  return ioInstance.of(namespaceName);
};
```

FILE: server/src/shared/utils/asyncHandler.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/shared/utils/asyncHandler.js
//--- File: server/src/shared/utils/asyncHandler.js ---
import { extractRequestContext, logAndReportError } from '../../utils/logError.js';

/**
 * A higher-order function to wrap asynchronous route handlers.
 * It catches any errors and passes them to the next middleware.
 *
 * @param {Function} fn - The asynchronous route handler function.
 * @returns {Function} A new function that wraps the original handler.
 */
const asyncHandler = (fn) => {
    // Ensure that fn is a function
    if (typeof fn !== 'function') {
      throw new TypeError('Expected a function as the argument');
    }
  
    // Return a new function that wraps the original handler
    return function asyncUtilWrap(req, res, next) {
      // Call the handler and catch any errors
      Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch((error) => {
        logAndReportError('Async route handler error:', error, extractRequestContext(req));
        next(error);
      });
    };
  };
  
  export default asyncHandler;
  

```

FILE: server/src/shared/utils/auth.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/shared/utils/auth.js
import { parse } from 'cookie';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import { verifyAuthToken } from './authToken.js';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your_jwt_secret_here';

export const getTokenFromRequest = (req) => {
  const cookies = req.headers.cookie ? parse(req.headers.cookie) : {};
  const cookieToken = cookies.token;

  if (cookieToken) {
    return cookieToken;
  }

  const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
  if (typeof authHeader === 'string' && authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
    const bearerToken = authHeader.slice('Bearer '.length).trim();
    return bearerToken || null;
  }

  return null;
};

export async function getSession(req) {
  try {
    const token = getTokenFromRequest(req);

    if (!token) {
      console.log('No auth token found in cookies or Authorization header.');
      return null;
    }

    const decoded = verifyAuthToken(token, JWT_SECRET);
    const normalizedUserId = decoded?.userId || decoded?.id || null;

    if (!normalizedUserId) {
      console.warn('Session token missing userId/id.', {
        sessionId: decoded?.sessionId || null,
        username: decoded?.username || null,
      });
      return null;
    }

    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id: normalizedUserId },
      include: {
        organization: {
          select: { id: true, name: true, phoneNumber: true, slug: true },
        },
        permissions: {
          select: { name: true },
        },
      },
    });

    if (!user) {
      console.log('User not found in database.');
      return null;
    }

    if (user.deletedAt || !user.active) {
      console.log('User account has been deactivated or deleted:', user.id);
      return null;
    }

    if (!user.organization) {
      console.log('Organization not found for user:', user.id);
      return null;
    }

    const sessionUser = {
      ...user,
      id: user.id,
      userId: user.id,
      organizationId: user.organization.id,
      organizationName: user.organization.name,
      organizationSlug: user.organization.slug,
      permissions: user.permissions.map((p) => p.name),
      sessionId: decoded?.sessionId || null,
    };

    return { user: sessionUser };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Session Error:', error);
    return null;
  }
}

```

FILE: server/src/shared/utils/bearerToken.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/shared/utils/bearerToken.js
export function extractBearerToken(authHeader = "") {
  const rawHeader = String(authHeader || "").trim();
  const match = rawHeader.match(/^Bearer\s+([\s\S]+)$/i);
  if (!match) return "";

  let token = match[1].trim();
  token = token.replace(/^["'`]+|["'`]+$/g, "");

  if (token.startsWith("<") && token.endsWith(">")) {
    token = token.slice(1, -1).trim();
  }

  return token;
}

export function isLikelyJwt(value = "") {
  return /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$/.test(String(value || "").trim());
}

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/shared/utils/clientPlatform.js
export const IOS_BLOCKED_ERROR_CODE = 'NEW_ORGANIZATION_NOT_AVAILABLE_ON_IOS';
export const IOS_PURCHASE_BLOCKED_ERROR_CODE = 'PURCHASE_NOT_AVAILABLE_ON_IOS';
export const IOS_UNKNOWN_OAUTH_ERROR_CODE = 'NO_WORKSMRT_ACCOUNT_FOR_OAUTH_ON_IOS';

export const isNativeIOSRequest = (req) => {
  const platform = String(req.headers?.['x-worksmrt-client-platform'] || '').toLowerCase();
  return platform === 'native-ios';
};

export const rejectNativeIOSAction = (req, res, {
  code = IOS_BLOCKED_ERROR_CODE,
  message = 'This action is not available in the WorkSmrt iOS app.',
} = {}) => {
  if (!isNativeIOSRequest(req)) return false;

  res.status(403).json({
    error: message,
    code,
  });
  return true;
};
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/shared/utils/permissionManager.js
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';

export const hasPermission = async (userId, requiredPermission) => {
  if (!userId || !requiredPermission) {
    return false;
  }

  // This query efficiently checks if the user has EITHER the specific permission
  // OR the global 'permission:editAll' override.
  const count = await prisma.user.count({
    where: {
      id: userId,
      permissions: {
        some: {
          name: {
            in: [requiredPermission, 'permission:editAll'],
          },
        },
      },
    },
  });

  return count > 0;
};
```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/shared/utils/withHandler.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/shared/utils/withHandler.js
import { getSession } from './auth.js';
import { extractBearerToken } from './bearerToken.js';
import { sendErrorResponse } from '#middleware/errorHandler.js';
import { extractRequestContext, logAndReportError } from '../../utils/logError.js';
import { verifyAuthToken } from './authToken.js';

/**
 * Higher-Order Function to handle API route common logic.
 * Updated to support Bearer Token authentication for M2M communication.
 *
 * @param {Object} options - Configuration options.
 * @param {Function} options.handler - The main handler function for the route.
 * @param {Array} options.allowedMethods - List of allowed HTTP methods.
 * @param {Array} [options.requiredRoles=[]] - List of roles required to access the route.
 * @param {Object} [options.schema={}] - Object containing Zod schemas for different methods.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredBodyParams={}] - Required body parameters per method.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredQueryParams={}] - Required query parameters per method.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredBodyParamTypes={}] - Expected types for body parameters per method.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredQueryParamTypes={}] - Expected types for query parameters per method.
 * @param {boolean} [options.requiresAuth=true] - Whether authentication is required.
 * @param {Function|null} [options.onUnauthorized=null] - Optional response handler when authentication fails.
 *
 * @returns {Function} - Wrapped API route handler.
 */
const withHandler = ({
  handler,
  allowedMethods = [],
  requiredRoles = [],
  schema = {},
  requiredBodyParams = {},
  requiredQueryParams = {},
  requiredBodyParamTypes = {},
  requiredQueryParamTypes = {},
  requiresAuth = true,
  onUnauthorized = null,
}) => {
  return async (req, res) => {
    try {
      const { method } = req;

      // **1. Method Validation**
      if (!allowedMethods.includes(method)) {
        res.setHeader('Allow', allowedMethods);
        return res.status(405).end(`Method ${method} Not Allowed`);
      }

      // **2. Authentication (Session OR Bearer Token)**
      if (requiresAuth) {
        let user = null;

        // A. Check for Bearer Token (API/M2M Access)
        const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
        if (authHeader && /^Bearer\s+/i.test(authHeader)) {
          const token = extractBearerToken(authHeader);
          try {
            const secret = process.env.JWT_SECRET;
            if (!secret) throw new Error('JWT_SECRET not configured');
            
            const decoded = verifyAuthToken(token, secret);
            const normalizedUserId = decoded?.id || decoded?.userId || null;
            user = {
              ...decoded,
              ...(normalizedUserId ? { id: normalizedUserId, userId: normalizedUserId } : {}),
            };
          } catch (err) {
            console.warn(`[Auth] Invalid Bearer token: ${err.message}`);
            // We continue to check session as a fallback, or fail here.
          }
        }

        // B. Check for Cookie Session (Browser Access)
        if (!user) {
          const session = await getSession(req);
          if (session && session.user) {
            user = session.user;
          }
        }

        // C. Final Auth Check
        if (!user) {
          if (typeof onUnauthorized === 'function') {
            return onUnauthorized(req, res);
          }
          return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized: No valid session or token found.' });
        }

        req.user = user;
        
        // Implement permissions check here if needed based on requiredRoles
        if (requiredRoles.length > 0) {
            // Example simple role check
            if (!req.user.role || !requiredRoles.includes(req.user.role)) {
                return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Forbidden: Insufficient permissions' });
            }
        }
      }

      // **3. Schema Validation with Zod**
      const methodSchema = schema[method];
      if (methodSchema) {
        // Determine which part to validate based on HTTP method
        let validationTarget = method === 'GET' ? req.query : req.body;
        const validation = methodSchema.safeParse(validationTarget);

        if (!validation.success) {
          // Extract and format Zod validation errors
          const errorMessages = validation.error.errors.map(err => ({
            path: err.path.join('.'),
            message: err.message,
          }));
          console.log('Validation Errors:', errorMessages);
          return res.status(400).json({ error: errorMessages });
        }

        // Attach validated data to the request object for use in the handler
        req.validated = validation.data;
      } else {
        // **4. Existing Manual Validation (Legacy support)**
        // Validate required body parameters
        const bodyParams = requiredBodyParams[method] || [];
        if (bodyParams.length > 0) {
          const missingParams = bodyParams.filter(
            (param) => !(param in req.body)
          );
          if (missingParams.length > 0) {
            return res.status(400).json({
              error: `Missing required fields: ${missingParams.join(', ')}`,
            });
          }
        }

        // Validate required query parameters
        const queryParams = requiredQueryParams[method] || [];
        if (queryParams.length > 0) {
          const missingParams = queryParams.filter(
            (param) => !(param in req.query)
          );
          if (missingParams.length > 0) {
            return res.status(400).json({
              error: `Missing required query parameters: ${missingParams.join(
                ', '
              )}`,
            });
          }
        }

        // **Type Validation for Body Params**
        const bodyTypes = requiredBodyParamTypes[method] || {};
        for (const [param, type] of Object.entries(bodyTypes)) {
          if (type === 'string' && typeof req.body[param] !== 'string') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a string.` });
          }
          if (type === 'number' && typeof req.body[param] !== 'number') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a number.` });
          }
          if (type === 'boolean' && typeof req.body[param] !== 'boolean') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a boolean.` });
          }
        }

        // **Type Validation for Query Params**
        const queryTypes = requiredQueryParamTypes[method] || {};
        for (const [param, type] of Object.entries(queryTypes)) {
          if (type === 'string' && typeof req.query[param] !== 'string') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a string.` });
          }
          if (type === 'number' && isNaN(Number(req.query[param]))) {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a number.` });
          }
          if (type === 'boolean') {
            const val = req.query[param].toLowerCase();
            if (val !== 'true' && val !== 'false') {
              return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a boolean.` });
            }
          }
        }
      }

      // **5. Execute the Main Handler**
      return await handler(req, res);
    } catch (error) {
      logAndReportError('withHandler error:', error, extractRequestContext(req));
      sendErrorResponse(res, error, extractRequestContext(req));
    }
  };
};

export default withHandler;

```

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/pages/calls/index.jsx
// pages/calls/index.js
import React, { useEffect } from 'react';
import IntegratedDashboard from '@/services/calls/IntegratedDashboard';
import withAuth from '@/shared/hocs/withAuth';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
import { useSharedHeader } from '@/shared/context/SharedHeaderContext';
import { Menu } from 'lucide-react';

const CallsPage = () => {
  const { setExtraContent } = useSharedHeader();
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    // Only inject this button on the Calls page:
    if (router.pathname === '/calls') {
      setExtraContent(
        <button
          onClick={() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('toggleSidebar'))}
          className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-circle"
          aria-label="Toggle Sidebar"
        >
          <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
        </button>
      );
    }

    // Clean up the extra content on unmount
    return () => setExtraContent(null);
  }, [router.pathname, setExtraContent]);

  return <IntegratedDashboard />;
};

export default withAuth(CallsPage);
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/CallsService.js
// client/services/calls/CallsService.js
import { getPlivoClientInstance } from '@/services/calls/PlivoClient';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';

const normalizePhoneNumber = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = String(phone).replace(/\D/g, '');
  return digits.startsWith('1') ? digits : `1${digits}`;
};

const normalizeExtraHeaders = (extraHeaders) => {
  if (!extraHeaders || typeof extraHeaders !== 'object') return {};

  return Object.keys(extraHeaders).reduce((result, key) => {
    result[String(key || '').toLowerCase()] = extraHeaders[key];
    return result;
  }, {});
};

class CallsService {
  constructor() {
    this.plivoClient = null;
    this.incomingCall = null;
    this.pendingOutboundCall = null;
    this.eventHandlers = {};
    this.customHandlers = {};
    this.initializePromise = null;
    this.isInitialized = false;
    this.hasAttachedPlivoHandlers = false;
  }

  onCustom(event, handler) {
    if (!this.customHandlers[event]) {
      this.customHandlers[event] = [];
    }
    this.customHandlers[event].push(handler);
  }

  offCustom(event, handler) {
    if (this.customHandlers[event]) {
      this.customHandlers[event] = this.customHandlers[event].filter(h => h !== handler);
    }
  }

  emitCustom(event, data) {
    if (this.customHandlers[event]) {
      this.customHandlers[event].forEach(h => h(data));
    }
  }

  async initialize({ showToast = true } = {}) {
    if (this.isInitialized && this.plivoClient) {
      return this.plivoClient;
    }

    if (this.initializePromise) {
      return this.initializePromise;
    }

    this.initializePromise = this.initializeCallService({ showToast });

    try {
      return await this.initializePromise;
    } finally {
      this.initializePromise = null;
    }
  }

  async initializeCallService({ showToast = true } = {}) {
    try {
      this.plivoClient = await getPlivoClientInstance();
      if (!this.plivoClient) {
        return null;
      }

      const sipUsername = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PLIVO_SIP_USERNAME;
      const sipPassword = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PLIVO_SIP_PASSWORD;

      if (!sipUsername || !sipPassword) {
        console.warn('Plivo SIP credentials are not configured.');
        return null;
      }

      await this.login(sipUsername, sipPassword);

      if (this.hasAttachedPlivoHandlers) {
        this.isInitialized = true;
        return this.plivoClient;
      }

      this.plivoClient.on('onIncomingCall', (callerID, extraHeaders, callInfo = {}) => {
        const normalizedCallerID = normalizePhoneNumber(callerID);
        const normalizedHeaders = normalizeExtraHeaders(extraHeaders);
        const callUUID = callInfo.callUUID || callInfo.CallUUID || callInfo.call_uuid || '';
        const headerCallId =
          normalizedHeaders['x-ph-callid'] ||
          normalizedHeaders['x-ph-call-id'] ||
          normalizedHeaders.callid ||
          normalizedHeaders['call-id'] ||
          '';
        const isWorksmrtOutbound =
          normalizedHeaders['x-ph-worksmrtoutbound'] === 'true' ||
          normalizedHeaders['x-ph-worksmrt-outbound'] === 'true';

        this.incomingCall = {
          callerID: normalizedCallerID,
          callUUID,
          callId:
            callInfo.callId ||
            callInfo.call_id ||
            headerCallId ||
            '',
          organizationId:
            callInfo.organizationId ||
            callInfo.orgId ||
            normalizedHeaders.orgid ||
            normalizedHeaders['x-ph-orgid'] ||
            normalizedHeaders['x-ph-org-id'] ||
            normalizedHeaders['org-id'] ||
            '',
          direction: isWorksmrtOutbound ? 'outbound' : '',
          outboundTo:
            normalizedHeaders['x-ph-outboundto'] ||
            normalizedHeaders['x-ph-outbound-to'] ||
            '',
          extraHeaders: normalizedHeaders,
          rawCallInfo: callInfo,
        };

        if (!callUUID) {
          console.error('No call UUID found in incoming call payload:', callInfo, extraHeaders);
        }

        const pendingMatches =
          this.pendingOutboundCall &&
          (
            (this.pendingOutboundCall.callId && this.pendingOutboundCall.callId === this.incomingCall.callId) ||
            (isWorksmrtOutbound && this.pendingOutboundCall.createdAt > Date.now() - 30000)
          );

        if (callUUID && pendingMatches) {
          try {
            const answered = this.plivoClient.answer(callUUID, 'reject');
            if (answered === false) {
              throw new Error('Plivo could not answer the incoming call.');
            }
            this.pendingOutboundCall = null;
            this.emitCustom('call:outbound-connected', {
              callUUID,
              callId: this.incomingCall.callId || '',
              to: this.incomingCall.outboundTo || '',
              callerID: this.incomingCall.callerID || '',
            });
            return;
          } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to auto-answer outbound setup call:', error);
            this.pendingOutboundCall = null;
            return;
          }
        }

        if (this.eventHandlers.onIncomingCall) {
          this.eventHandlers.onIncomingCall.forEach((handler) => handler(this.incomingCall));
        }
      });

      this.hasAttachedPlivoHandlers = true;

      this.plivoClient.on('onCallEnded', () => {
        this.emitCustom('call:ended', {});
      });

      this.isInitialized = true;
      return this.plivoClient;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to initialize Plivo Client:', error);
      if (showToast) {
        toast.error('Failed to initialize call service.');
      }
      throw error;
    }
  }

  login(sipUsername, sipPassword) {
    if (!this.plivoClient) {
      console.error('Plivo Client not initialized. Call initialize() first.');
      return;
    }

    return this.plivoClient.login(sipUsername, sipPassword);
  }

  getIncomingCall() {
    return this.incomingCall;
  }

  getIncomingSipCall(callerNumber = '') {
    if (!this.plivoClient?.getIncomingCalls) return null;

    const incomingCalls = this.plivoClient.getIncomingCalls() || [];
    if (!Array.isArray(incomingCalls) || incomingCalls.length === 0) return null;

    const callerDigits = normalizePhoneNumber(callerNumber).slice(-10);
    if (callerDigits) {
      const matchingCall = incomingCalls.find((call) => {
        const sourceDigits = normalizePhoneNumber(call?.src || call?.callerID || '').slice(-10);
        return sourceDigits && sourceDigits === callerDigits;
      });
      if (matchingCall?.callUUID) return matchingCall;
    }

    return incomingCalls.length === 1 ? incomingCalls[0] : null;
  }

  async makeCall(destination, callerId) {
    try {
      const normalizedDestination = normalizePhoneNumber(destination);
      const normalizedCallerId = normalizePhoneNumber(callerId);

      this.pendingOutboundCall = {
        callId: '',
        to: normalizedDestination,
        createdAt: Date.now(),
      };

      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/make-call`,
        {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            from: normalizedCallerId,
            to: normalizedDestination,
          }),
        }
      );

      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to make call');
      }

      this.pendingOutboundCall = {
        ...this.pendingOutboundCall,
        callId: data?.call?.id || data?.callId || this.pendingOutboundCall?.callId || '',
        to: normalizedDestination,
        createdAt: this.pendingOutboundCall?.createdAt || Date.now(),
      };

      this.emitCustom('call:outbound-initiated', {
        callId: data?.call?.id || data?.callId || '',
        to: normalizedDestination,
        callerID: normalizedCallerId,
        direction: 'outbound',
      });

      toast.success('Call initiated successfully');
      return data;
    } catch (error) {
      this.pendingOutboundCall = null;
      console.error('Error initiating call:', error);
      toast.error(`Call initiation failed: ${error.message}`);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  answerIncomingCall(callUUID, callerNumber = '') {
    if (this.plivoClient) {
      const resolvedCallUUID = callUUID || this.getIncomingSipCall(callerNumber)?.callUUID || '';
      if (!resolvedCallUUID) {
        throw new Error('The SIP invitation has not reached this device yet.');
      }
      const answered = this.plivoClient.answer(resolvedCallUUID, 'reject');
      if (answered === false) {
        throw new Error('Plivo could not answer the incoming call.');
      }
      return true;
    }

    throw new Error('Plivo Client not initialized.');
  }

  rejectIncomingCall(callUUID) {
    this.pendingOutboundCall = null;
    if (this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.reject(callUUID);
      return;
    }

    throw new Error('Plivo Client not initialized.');
  }

  async sendIncomingCallToVoicemail(callId, sipCallUUID = '') {
    if (!callId) {
      throw new Error('Missing call ID.');
    }

    const response = await fetchWithAuth(
      `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/${encodeURIComponent(callId)}/send-to-voicemail`,
      {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
    const data = await response.json();
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to send call to voicemail.');
    }

    if (sipCallUUID && this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.reject(sipCallUUID);
    }
    return data;
  }

  hangup() {
    this.pendingOutboundCall = null;
    if (this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.hangup();
      this.emitCustom('call:ended', {});
      return;
    }

    this.emitCustom('call:ended', {});
    throw new Error('Plivo Client not initialized.');
  }

  mute() {
    if (this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.mute();
      return;
    }

    throw new Error('Plivo Client not initialized.');
  }

  unmute() {
    if (this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.unmute();
      return;
    }

    throw new Error('Plivo Client not initialized.');
  }

  sendDtmf(digit) {
    if (this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.sendDtmf(digit);
      return;
    }

    throw new Error('Plivo Client not initialized.');
  }

  getPeerConnection() {
    return this.plivoClient ? this.plivoClient.getPeerConnection() : null;
  }

  on(eventName, handler) {
    if (!this.eventHandlers[eventName]) {
      this.eventHandlers[eventName] = [];
    }

    this.eventHandlers[eventName].push(handler);

    if (this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.on(eventName, handler);
    }
  }

  off(eventName, handler) {
    if (this.eventHandlers[eventName]) {
      this.eventHandlers[eventName] = this.eventHandlers[eventName].filter(
        (registeredHandler) => registeredHandler !== handler
      );
    }

    if (this.plivoClient) {
      this.plivoClient.off(eventName, handler);
    }
  }

  async sendAudioForTranscription(audioBlob) {
    try {
      const formData = new FormData();
      formData.append('audio', audioBlob, 'call_recording.webm');

      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/transcribe/audio`,
        {
          method: 'POST',
          body: formData,
        }
      );

      if (!response.ok) {
        const errorData = await response.json();
        throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Transcription failed.');
      }

      const data = await response.json();
      return data.transcription;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Transcription Error:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async sendMessage({ to, text, from, type = 'sms', mediaUrls = [] }) {
    try {
      const payload = {
        to: normalizePhoneNumber(to),
        from: normalizePhoneNumber(from),
        text,
        type,
        mediaUrls,
      };

      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/message/send`,
        {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          },
          body: JSON.stringify(payload),
        }
      );

      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Sending message failed.');
      }

      return data;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('sendMessage Error:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }
}

const callsService = new CallsService();

export default callsService;

```

FILE: client/services/calls/components/BeginnerTipsCard.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/BeginnerTipsCard.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { ChevronDown, ChevronRight, Lightbulb, Sparkles, X } from 'lucide-react';

const buildStorageKey = (storageKey) => `calls-ui-tip-${storageKey}`;

const BeginnerTipsCard = ({
  storageKey,
  title,
  subtitle,
  steps,
  compactLabel = 'Quick start',
  defaultExpanded = true,
  tone = 'primary',
  className = '',
}) => {
  const resolvedStorageKey = useMemo(() => buildStorageKey(storageKey), [storageKey]);
  const [hidden, setHidden] = useState(false);
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(defaultExpanded);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return;

    const dismissed = window.localStorage.getItem(`${resolvedStorageKey}-dismissed`) === 'true';
    const storedExpanded = window.localStorage.getItem(`${resolvedStorageKey}-expanded`);

    setHidden(dismissed);
    if (storedExpanded != null) {
      setExpanded(storedExpanded === 'true');
    }
  }, [resolvedStorageKey]);

  const handleToggleExpanded = () => {
    const next = !expanded;
    setExpanded(next);
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      window.localStorage.setItem(`${resolvedStorageKey}-expanded`, String(next));
    }
  };

  const handleDismiss = () => {
    setHidden(true);
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      window.localStorage.setItem(`${resolvedStorageKey}-dismissed`, 'true');
    }
  };

  if (hidden) {
    return null;
  }

  const toneClasses =
    tone === 'secondary'
      ? 'border-secondary/25 bg-secondary/10'
      : tone === 'accent'
        ? 'border-accent/25 bg-accent/10'
        : 'border-primary/20 bg-primary/10';

  return (
    <div className={`rounded-3xl border ${toneClasses} ${className}`}>
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 px-4 py-4 sm:px-5">
        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
          <div className="mb-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/60">
            <Sparkles className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            <span>{compactLabel}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <div className="mt-0.5 rounded-2xl bg-base-100/80 p-2 text-primary shadow-sm">
              <Lightbulb className="h-4 w-4" />
            </div>
            <div className="min-w-0">
              <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-base-content sm:text-base">{title}</div>
              {subtitle ? (
                <p className="mt-1 text-sm leading-6 text-base-content/70">{subtitle}</p>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-circle"
            onClick={handleToggleExpanded}
            aria-label={expanded ? 'Collapse tips' : 'Expand tips'}
          >
            {expanded ? <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4" /> : <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />}
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-circle"
            onClick={handleDismiss}
            aria-label="Dismiss tips"
          >
            <X className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {expanded ? (
        <div className="border-t border-base-content/10 px-4 py-4 sm:px-5">
          <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3">
            {steps.map((step, index) => (
              <div key={`${storageKey}-${index}`} className="rounded-2xl bg-base-100/75 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-base-content/5">
                <div className="mb-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-base-content/50">
                  Step {index + 1}
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm font-medium text-base-content">{step.title}</div>
                {step.description ? (
                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm leading-6 text-base-content/70">{step.description}</p>
                ) : null}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
};

BeginnerTipsCard.propTypes = {
  storageKey: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  title: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  subtitle: PropTypes.string,
  steps: PropTypes.arrayOf(
    PropTypes.shape({
      title: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
      description: PropTypes.string,
    })
  ).isRequired,
  compactLabel: PropTypes.string,
  defaultExpanded: PropTypes.bool,
  tone: PropTypes.oneOf(['primary', 'secondary', 'accent']),
  className: PropTypes.string,
};

export default BeginnerTipsCard;

```

FILE: client/services/calls/components/CallDetailsPanel.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/CallDetailsPanel.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { FileAudio, Mic, Phone, User } from 'lucide-react';

const normalizePhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = String(phone).replace(/\D/g, '');
  if (digits.length >= 11) {
    const last11 = digits.slice(-11);
    if (last11.startsWith('1')) return last11;
  }
  if (digits.length >= 10) return `1${digits.slice(-10)}`;
  return digits;
};

const phonesMatch = (a, b) => {
  const na = normalizePhone(a);
  const nb = normalizePhone(b);
  return Boolean(na && nb && na === nb);
};

const formatDisplayPhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = normalizePhone(phone);
  if (digits.length === 11 && digits.startsWith('1')) {
    return `+1 (${digits.slice(1, 4)}) ${digits.slice(4, 7)}-${digits.slice(7, 11)}`;
  }
  return String(phone);
};

const CallDetailsPanel = ({ phone, orgPhoneNumber, contactName, onCall }) => {
  const [callLogs, setCallLogs] = useState([]);
  const [processingCallId, setProcessingCallId] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (phone) fetchCallLogs();
  }, [phone]);

  const fetchCallLogs = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/logs?search=${encodeURIComponent(phone)}&page=1&limit=50`
      );
      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to fetch calls');
      setCallLogs(
        (data.callLogs || []).filter(
          (entry) => phonesMatch(entry.from, phone) || phonesMatch(entry.to, phone)
        )
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('CallDetailsPanel fetchCallLogs error:', error);
      setCallLogs([]);
    }
  };

  const triggerTranscribe = async (callId) => {
    setProcessingCallId(callId);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/transcribeAndSummarize`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ callId }),
      });
      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || 'Transcription failed');
      await fetchCallLogs();
      toast.success('Transcription ready');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to transcribe');
    } finally {
      setProcessingCallId(null);
    }
  };

  const displayName = contactName || formatDisplayPhone(phone);
  const hasAlternateLine = contactName && contactName !== formatDisplayPhone(phone);

  return (
    <div className="flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden">
      {/* Contact info */}
      <div className="border-b border-base-300 px-4 py-5">
        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
          <div className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-base font-bold text-primary">
            {displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
          </div>
          <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
            <div className="truncate text-base font-bold text-base-content">{displayName}</div>
            {hasAlternateLine && (
              <div className="text-sm text-base-content/55">{formatDisplayPhone(phone)}</div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => onCall?.(phone)}
          className="btn btn-success btn-sm mt-4 w-full"
        >
          <Phone className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
          Call back
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Calls & recordings */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4">
        <div className="mb-3 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-base-content/45">
          Calls &amp; recordings ({callLogs.length})
        </div>

        {callLogs.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-base-300 px-4 py-8 text-center text-sm text-base-content/50">
            No call records yet
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {callLogs.map((entry) => {
              const created = entry.createdAt ? new Date(entry.createdAt).toLocaleString() : '';
              const isVoicemail = entry.status === 'voicemail';

              return (
                <div key={entry.id} className="rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <FileAudio className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-primary" />
                      <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">
                        {isVoicemail ? 'Voicemail' : 'Call'}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      {entry.recordingUrl ? (
                        <a
                          href={entry.recordingUrl}
                          target="_blank"
                          rel="noreferrer"
                          className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                        >
                          Play
                        </a>
                      ) : null}
                      {!entry.transcription && entry.recordingUrl ? (
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                          disabled={processingCallId === entry.id}
                          onClick={() => triggerTranscribe(entry.id)}
                        >
                          {processingCallId === entry.id ? (
                            <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" />
                          ) : (
                            <Mic className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                          )}
                        </button>
                      ) : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mt-1 text-[11px] text-base-content/50">{created}</div>

                  {entry.summary ? (
                    <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl bg-primary/5 px-3 py-2">
                      <div className="mb-1 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-primary/60">
                        AI Summary
                      </div>
                      <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm leading-5 text-base-content/80">
                        {entry.summary}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}

                  {entry.transcription ? (
                    <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 px-3 py-2">
                      <div className="mb-1 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-base-content/45">
                        Transcript
                      </div>
                      <div className="max-h-36 overflow-auto whitespace-pre-wrap text-xs leading-5 text-base-content/70">
                        {entry.transcription}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}

                  {!entry.recordingUrl ? (
                    <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-warning">Recording not yet available.</div>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

CallDetailsPanel.propTypes = {
  phone: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  orgPhoneNumber: PropTypes.string,
  contactName: PropTypes.string,
  onCall: PropTypes.func,
};

export default CallDetailsPanel;

```

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/CallWidget.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import BaseWidget from '@/shared/components/BaseWidget';
import { ArrowRight, ChartArea, MessageSquare, PhoneCall, SquareChartGantt } from 'lucide-react';
import useConversations from '@/services/calls/hooks/useConversations';

const CallWidget = () => {
  const { conversations, loading, error } = useConversations({ page: 1, limit: 10, search: '' });
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState('simple');

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      const savedMode = window.localStorage.getItem('callWidgetViewMode');
      if (savedMode) {
        setViewMode(savedMode);
      }
    }
  }, []);

  const toggleViewMode = () => {
    const newMode = viewMode === 'advanced' ? 'simple' : 'advanced';
    setViewMode(newMode);
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      window.localStorage.setItem('callWidgetViewMode', newMode);
    }
  };

  const stats = useMemo(() => {
    const callCount = conversations.filter((conversation) => conversation.type === 'call').length;
    const messageCount = conversations.filter((conversation) => conversation.type !== 'call').length;
    return { callCount, messageCount };
  }, [conversations]);

  const headerActions = (
    <div className="flex space-x-2">
      <button onClick={toggleViewMode} className="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" title={viewMode === 'advanced' ? 'Switch to simple view' : 'Switch to advanced view'}>
        {viewMode === 'advanced' ? <ChartArea size={16} /> : <SquareChartGantt size={16} />}
      </button>
    </div>
  );

  const emptyState = (
    <div className="rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-8 text-center text-sm text-base-content/60">
      No recent calls or messages found.
    </div>
  );

  const simpleView = (
    <div className="space-y-3 p-4">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
        <div className="rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-4 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">
            <PhoneCall className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" /> Calls
          </div>
          <div className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-base-content">{stats.callCount}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-4 shadow-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">
            <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-secondary" /> Messages
          </div>
          <div className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-base-content">{stats.messageCount}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {loading ? <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60">Loading calls…</p> : null}
      {error ? <p className="text-sm text-error">Error: {error}</p> : null}
      {!loading && !error && conversations.length === 0 ? emptyState : null}
      {!loading && !error && conversations[0] ? (
        <div className="rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-4 shadow-sm">
          <div className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/45">Latest activity</div>
          <div className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">{conversations[0].displayName || conversations[0].phoneFrom || conversations[0].phoneTo}</div>
          <div className="mt-1 line-clamp-2 text-sm text-base-content/65">{conversations[0].text || (conversations[0].type === 'call' ? 'Call activity' : 'No text available')}</div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );

  const advancedView = (
    <div className="space-y-3 p-4">
      {loading ? <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60">Loading calls…</p> : null}
      {error ? <p className="text-sm text-error">Error: {error}</p> : null}
      {!loading && !error && conversations.length === 0 ? emptyState : null}
      {!loading && !error && conversations.length > 0 ? (
        <ul className="space-y-3">
          {conversations.map((conversation) => (
            <li key={conversation.id} className="rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-4 shadow-sm">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">
                    {conversation.displayName || conversation.phoneFrom || conversation.phoneTo}
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-1 line-clamp-2 text-sm text-base-content/65">
                    {conversation.text || (conversation.type === 'call' ? 'Call activity' : 'No content')}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-xs text-base-content/45">
                  {new Date(conversation.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}
                </div>
              </div>
            </li>
          ))}
        </ul>
      ) : null}

      <div className="flex items-center justify-end text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-primary">
        <span>Open full calls dashboard</span>
        <ArrowRight className="ml-2 h-3.5 w-3.5" />
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <BaseWidget title="Calls & Messages" path="/calls" icon={<PhoneCall />} headerActions={headerActions} viewMode={viewMode}>
      {viewMode === 'simple' ? simpleView : advancedView}
    </BaseWidget>
  );
};

export default CallWidget;

```

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/ContactsList.jsx
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { Search, Users, Phone, Mail, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Plus, Pencil, Trash2, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';

const emptyForm = { name: '', phone: '', email: '', address: '' };

const ContactsList = ({ onSelectContact }) => {
  const [contacts, setContacts] = useState([]);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false);
  const [editingContact, setEditingContact] = useState(null);
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState(emptyForm);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const itemsPerPage = 10;

  const fetchContacts = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/contacts?search=${encodeURIComponent(searchTerm)}&page=${currentPage}&limit=${itemsPerPage}`
      );
      const data = await response.json();
      if (response.ok && data.contacts) {
        setContacts(data.contacts);
        setTotalPages(data.totalPages || 1);
      } else {
        throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to load contacts');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch contacts:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to fetch contacts');
      setContacts([]);
      setTotalPages(1);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [searchTerm, currentPage]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchContacts();
  }, [fetchContacts]);

  const handlePageChange = (newPage) => {
    if (newPage >= 1 && newPage <= totalPages) {
      setCurrentPage(newPage);
    }
  };

  const contactCountLabel = useMemo(() => {
    if (loading) return 'Loading contacts…';
    if (!contacts.length) return 'No contacts found';
    return `${contacts.length} contact${contacts.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} on this page`;
  }, [contacts.length, loading]);

  const openAddModal = () => {
    setEditingContact(null);
    setFormData(emptyForm);
    setShowModal(true);
  };

  const openEditModal = (contact) => {
    setEditingContact(contact);
    setFormData({
      name: contact.name || '',
      phone: contact.phone || '',
      email: contact.email || '',
      address: contact.address || '',
    });
    setShowModal(true);
  };

  const closeModal = () => {
    setShowModal(false);
    setEditingContact(null);
    setFormData(emptyForm);
  };

  const handleFormChange = (e) => {
    const { name, value } = e.target;
    setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
  };

  const handleSave = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!formData.name.trim()) {
      toast.error('Name is required');
      return;
    }
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      if (editingContact) {
        const response = await fetchWithAuth(
          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/contacts/${editingContact.id}`,
          {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify(formData),
          }
        );
        const data = await response.json();
        if (response.ok) {
          toast.success('Contact updated');
          closeModal();
          fetchContacts();
        } else {
          toast.error(data.error || 'Failed to update contact');
        }
      } else {
        const response = await fetchWithAuth(
          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/contacts`,
          {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify(formData),
          }
        );
        const data = await response.json();
        if (response.ok) {
          toast.success('Contact created');
          closeModal();
          fetchContacts();
        } else {
          toast.error(data.error || 'Failed to create contact');
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to save contact:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to save contact');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (contact) => {
    if (!window.confirm(`Delete "${contact.name || 'Unnamed contact'}"? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/contacts/${contact.id}`,
        { method: 'DELETE' }
      );
      if (response.status === 204) {
        toast.success('Contact deleted');
        fetchContacts();
      } else {
        const data = await response.json();
        toast.error(data.error || 'Failed to delete contact');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to delete contact:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to delete contact');
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="rounded-[28px] border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4 shadow-lg">
      <div className="mb-4 flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <div>
          <div className="mb-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-secondary/10 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-secondary">
            <Users className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            Contacts
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-base-content">Browse and select a caller</h2>
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/65">Pick any contact to open the full thread in the main workspace.</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div className="rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/70 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-base-content/60">
            {contactCountLabel}
          </div>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={openAddModal}
            className="btn btn-primary btn-sm gap-1 rounded-2xl"
          >
            <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
            Add
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <label className="input input-bordered flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl bg-base-100">
        <Search className="h-4 w-4 text-base-content/45" />
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search contacts by name, phone, or email"
          value={searchTerm}
          onChange={(event) => {
            setSearchTerm(event.target.value);
            setCurrentPage(1);
          }}
          className="grow"
        />
      </label>

      <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex min-h-[220px] items-center justify-center rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 text-sm text-base-content/60">
            <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md" />
          </div>
        ) : contacts.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 px-4 py-8 text-center text-sm text-base-content/60">
            No contacts available.
          </div>
        ) : (
          contacts.map((contact) => (
            <div
              key={contact.id}
              className="w-full rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4 shadow-sm transition hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-primary/5 hover:shadow-md"
            >
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => onSelectContact && onSelectContact(contact.phone)}
                  className="min-w-0 flex-1 text-left"
                >
                  <div className="text-base font-semibold text-base-content">
                    {contact.name || 'Unnamed contact'}{' '}
                    {contact.type === 'user' ? (
                      <span className="ml-2 rounded-full bg-base-200 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-base-content/60">
                        User
                      </span>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-sm text-base-content/70">
                    {contact.phone ? (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Phone className="h-4 w-4 text-base-content/45" />
                        <span>{contact.phone}</span>
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                    {contact.email ? (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Mail className="h-4 w-4 text-base-content/45" />
                        <span className="truncate">{contact.email}</span>
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </button>
                <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-1">
                  {contact.type !== 'user' ? (
                    <>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditModal(contact); }}
                        className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs btn-square rounded-xl"
                        title="Edit contact"
                      >
                        <Pencil className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      </button>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(contact); }}
                        className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs btn-square rounded-xl text-error hover:bg-error/10"
                        title="Delete contact"
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      </button>
                    </>
                  ) : null}
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => onSelectContact && onSelectContact(contact.phone)}
                    className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs rounded-xl"
                  >
                    Open
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))
        )}
      </div>

      <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 px-3 py-2">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => handlePageChange(currentPage - 1)}
          disabled={currentPage === 1}
          className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"
        >
          <ChevronLeft className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" />
          Previous
        </button>
        <span className="text-sm text-base-content/65">Page {currentPage} of {totalPages}</span>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => handlePageChange(currentPage + 1)}
          disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
          className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"
        >
          Next
          <ChevronRight className="ml-1 h-4 w-4" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {showModal ? (
        <div
          className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"
          onClick={closeModal}
        >
          <div
            className="w-full max-w-md rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-6 shadow-2xl"
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-base-content">
                {editingContact ? 'Edit Contact' : 'Add Contact'}
              </h3>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={closeModal}
                className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square rounded-xl"
              >
                <X className="h-4 w-4" />
              </button>
            </div>
            <form onSubmit={handleSave} className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-base-content/80">Name *</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="name"
                  value={formData.name}
                  onChange={handleFormChange}
                  required
                  className="input input-bordered w-full rounded-xl"
                  placeholder="Contact name"
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-base-content/80">Phone</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="phone"
                  value={formData.phone}
                  onChange={handleFormChange}
                  className="input input-bordered w-full rounded-xl"
                  placeholder="+1 (555) 000-0000"
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-base-content/80">Email</label>
                <input
                  type="email"
                  name="email"
                  value={formData.email}
                  onChange={handleFormChange}
                  className="input input-bordered w-full rounded-xl"
                  placeholder="email@example.com"
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-base-content/80">Address</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  name="address"
                  value={formData.address}
                  onChange={handleFormChange}
                  className="input input-bordered w-full rounded-xl"
                  placeholder="123 Main St"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-2">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={closeModal}
                  className="btn btn-ghost rounded-xl"
                  disabled={saving}
                >
                  Cancel
                </button>
                <button
                  type="submit"
                  className="btn btn-primary rounded-xl"
                  disabled={saving}
                >
                  {saving ? (
                    <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" />
                  ) : editingContact ? (
                    'Update'
                  ) : (
                    'Create'
                  )}
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
};

ContactsList.propTypes = {
  onSelectContact: PropTypes.func,
};

export default ContactsList;
```
