FILE: client/services/calls/components/ConversationView.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/ConversationView.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { useGenericSocket } from '@/shared/hooks/useGenericSocket';
import { ExternalLink, Info, Mic, Phone, PhoneCall, Search, X } from 'lucide-react';
import SmsInputBar from '@/services/calls/components/SmsInputBar';
import CallsService from '../CallsService';

const normalizePhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = String(phone).replace(/\D/g, '');
  if (digits.length >= 11) {
    const last11 = digits.slice(-11);
    if (last11.startsWith('1')) return last11;
  }
  if (digits.length >= 10) return `1${digits.slice(-10)}`;
  return digits;
};

const phonesMatch = (a, b) => {
  const na = normalizePhone(a);
  const nb = normalizePhone(b);
  return Boolean(na && nb && na === nb);
};

const formatDisplayPhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = normalizePhone(phone);
  if (digits.length === 11 && digits.startsWith('1')) {
    return `+1 (${digits.slice(1, 4)}) ${digits.slice(4, 7)}-${digits.slice(7, 11)}`;
  }
  return String(phone);
};

const resolveMediaUrl = (url) => {
  if (!url) return '';
  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(url)) return url;
  return `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}${String(url).startsWith('/') ? '' : '/'}${url}`;
};

const normalizeMediaUrls = (mediaUrls) => {
  if (Array.isArray(mediaUrls)) return mediaUrls.filter(Boolean);
  if (typeof mediaUrls === 'string') {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(mediaUrls);
      return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.filter(Boolean) : [];
    } catch {
      return mediaUrls ? [mediaUrls] : [];
    }
  }
  return [];
};

const isHumanHandoffStatus = (status = '') =>
  ['transferring-to-human', 'transfer-failed', 'operator-answering'].includes(String(status || '').trim());

const SmsMediaGrid = ({ mediaUrls }) => {
  const urls = normalizeMediaUrls(mediaUrls);
  const [openImage, setOpenImage] = useState(null);
  if (urls.length === 0) return null;

  return (
    <>
      <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-1.5">
        {urls.map((url, index) => {
          const fullUrl = resolveMediaUrl(url);
          return (
            <button
              key={`${url}-${index}`}
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setOpenImage({ url: fullUrl, label: `SMS image ${index + 1}` })}
              className="group block overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200 text-left transition hover:brightness-95 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/60"
              aria-label={`Open SMS image ${index + 1}`}
            >
              <img src={fullUrl} alt={`SMS image ${index + 1}`} className="h-28 w-full object-cover" />
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {openImage ? (
        <div
          className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 p-4"
          role="dialog"
          aria-modal="true"
          aria-label={openImage.label}
          onClick={() => setOpenImage(null)}
        >
          <div className="flex max-h-full w-full max-w-5xl flex-col gap-3" onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
              <a
                href={openImage.url}
                target="_blank"
                rel="noreferrer"
                className="btn btn-sm btn-ghost bg-base-100/10 text-white hover:bg-base-100/20"
                title="Open image in new tab"
              >
                <ExternalLink className="h-4 w-4" />
                Open
              </a>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => setOpenImage(null)}
                className="btn btn-sm btn-circle btn-ghost bg-base-100/10 text-white hover:bg-base-100/20"
                aria-label="Close image preview"
              >
                <X className="h-4 w-4" />
              </button>
            </div>
            <img
              src={openImage.url}
              alt={openImage.label}
              className="max-h-[82vh] w-full rounded-xl object-contain"
            />
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </>
  );
};

SmsMediaGrid.propTypes = { mediaUrls: PropTypes.oneOfType([PropTypes.array, PropTypes.string]) };

const ConversationView = ({ phone, orgPhoneNumber, contactName, onCall, onOpenDetails }) => {
  const [conversationLogs, setConversationLogs] = useState([]);
  const [callLogs, setCallLogs] = useState([]);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);
  const [processingCallId, setProcessingCallId] = useState(null);
  const [showSearch, setShowSearch] = useState(false);
  const [editingMessageId, setEditingMessageId] = useState(null);
  const [editTags, setEditTags] = useState('');
  const [editCategory, setEditCategory] = useState('');
  const bottomRef = useRef(null);
  const { socket } = useGenericSocket('calls');

  const handleStartEdit = (entry) => {
    setEditingMessageId(entry.id);
    setEditTags(entry.tags || '');
    setEditCategory(entry.category || '');
  };

  const handleSaveTags = async (entryId) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/message/${entryId}`,
        {
          method: 'PATCH',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ tags: editTags, category: editCategory }),
        }
      );
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to update message tags');
      
      setConversationLogs((prev) =>
        prev.map((msg) =>
          msg.id === entryId ? { ...msg, tags: editTags, category: editCategory } : msg
        )
      );
      setEditingMessageId(null);
      toast.success('SMS tagged and categorized');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to update tags');
    }
  };

  const parseResponseSafely = async (response) => {
    const rawText = await response.text();
    if (!rawText) return null;
    try { return JSON.parse(rawText); } catch { return { rawText }; }
  };

  const fetchConversationLogs = async (page = 1, prepend = false) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/conversation?phone=${encodeURIComponent(phone)}&search=${encodeURIComponent(searchTerm)}&page=${page}&limit=50`
      );
      const data = await parseResponseSafely(response);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || data?.message || `Failed to fetch (${response.status})`);
      const logs = Array.isArray(data?.logs) ? data.logs : [];
      setConversationLogs((prev) => prepend ? [...logs, ...prev] : logs);
      setTotalPages(Number(data?.totalPages) || 1);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('fetchConversationLogs error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to fetch conversation');
      if (!prepend) setConversationLogs([]);
    }
  };

  const fetchCallLogs = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/logs?search=${encodeURIComponent(phone)}&page=1&limit=50`
      );
      const data = await parseResponseSafely(response);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to fetch call logs');
      setCallLogs(
        (data.callLogs || []).filter(
          (entry) => phonesMatch(entry.from, phone) || phonesMatch(entry.to, phone)
        )
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('fetchCallLogs error:', error);
      setCallLogs([]);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (phone) {
      setCurrentPage(1);
      setConversationLogs([]);
      fetchConversationLogs(1, false);
      fetchCallLogs();
    }
  }, [phone, searchTerm]);

  // Scroll to bottom on initial load / new messages
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!searchTerm) {
      bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
  }, [conversationLogs.length, searchTerm]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!socket || !phone) return;
    const currentNormalized = normalizePhone(phone);

    const handleNewSms = (message) => {
      const msgFrom = normalizePhone(message.from);
      const msgTo = normalizePhone(message.to);
      if (msgFrom !== currentNormalized && msgTo !== currentNormalized) return;

      const isInbound = message.direction === 'inbound';
      setConversationLogs((prev) => [
        ...prev,
        {
          id: message.id,
          phoneFrom: message.from,
          phoneTo: message.to,
          timestamp: message.createdAt,
          text: message.text,
          mediaUrls: message.mediaUrls || [],
          type: 'sms',
          senderName: isInbound ? message.contact?.name || 'Them' : 'You',
          tags: message.tags || null,
          category: message.category || null,
        },
      ]);
    };

    const handleNewVoicemail = (call) => {
      const callFrom = normalizePhone(call.from);
      const callTo = normalizePhone(call.to);
      if (callFrom !== currentNormalized && callTo !== currentNormalized) return;

      setConversationLogs((prev) => [
        ...prev,
        {
          id: call.id,
          phoneFrom: call.from,
          phoneTo: call.to,
          timestamp: call.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
          text: 'New voicemail',
          type: 'call',
          recordingUrl: call.recordingUrl,
          senderName: 'Call',
        },
      ]);
      setCallLogs((prev) => [call, ...prev]);
    };

    const handleVoicemailTranscribed = (call) => {
      const callFrom = normalizePhone(call.from);
      const callTo = normalizePhone(call.to);
      if (callFrom !== currentNormalized && callTo !== currentNormalized) return;
      setCallLogs((prev) => {
        const exists = prev.some((item) => item.id === call.id);
        return exists
          ? prev.map((item) => item.id === call.id ? { ...item, ...call } : item)
          : [call, ...prev];
      });
      setConversationLogs((prev) => prev.map((entry) => (
        entry.id === call.id
          ? { ...entry, text: call.transcription || entry.text, transcription: call.transcription }
          : entry
      )));
    };

    socket.on('newSms', handleNewSms);
    socket.on('newVoicemail', handleNewVoicemail);
    socket.on('voicemailTranscribed', handleVoicemailTranscribed);
    return () => {
      socket.off('newSms', handleNewSms);
      socket.off('newVoicemail', handleNewVoicemail);
      socket.off('voicemailTranscribed', handleVoicemailTranscribed);
    };
  }, [socket, phone]);

  const triggerTranscribe = async (callId) => {
    setProcessingCallId(callId);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/transcribeAndSummarize`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ callId }),
      });
      const data = await parseResponseSafely(response);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || 'Transcription failed');
      await fetchCallLogs();
      toast.success('Transcription ready');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to transcribe');
    } finally {
      setProcessingCallId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleCall = () => {
    if (!phone) return;
    try {
      if (onCall) {
        onCall(phone);
      } else {
        CallsService.makeCall(phone, orgPhoneNumber);
        toast.info(`Calling ${formatDisplayPhone(phone)}…`);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to place call');
    }
  };

  const handleLoadOlder = () => {
    const nextPage = currentPage + 1;
    setCurrentPage(nextPage);
    fetchConversationLogs(nextPage, true);
  };

  // Build unified timeline: sort ascending (oldest first), enrich calls with callLog details
  const timeline = useMemo(() => {
    const callMap = new Map(callLogs.map((log) => [log.id, log]));
    return [...conversationLogs]
      .sort((a, b) => new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp))
      .map((entry) => ({
        ...entry,
        callDetail: entry.type === 'call' ? (callMap.get(entry.id) || null) : null,
      }));
  }, [conversationLogs, callLogs]);

  const formattedPhone = useMemo(() => formatDisplayPhone(phone), [phone]);
  const displayName = contactName && contactName !== formattedPhone ? contactName : null;

  const renderTimelineEntry = (entry, index) => {
    const timestamp = entry.timestamp ? new Date(entry.timestamp) : new Date();
    const formattedTime = Number.isNaN(timestamp.getTime())
      ? ''
      : timestamp.toLocaleString([], { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });

    if (entry.type === 'call') {
      const detail = entry.callDetail;
      const callStatus = detail?.status || entry.status || '';
      const isVoicemail = detail?.status === 'voicemail' || entry.text === 'New voicemail';
      const canTranscribe = detail?.recordingUrl && !detail?.transcription;
      const showHandoffContext = isHumanHandoffStatus(callStatus) || /caller intent:|handoff|human/i.test(detail?.summary || entry.text || '');

      return (
        <div key={entry.id || index} className="flex justify-center px-2">
          <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 px-4 py-3">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <div className="mt-0.5 flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10">
                <PhoneCall className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              </div>
              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                  <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">
                    {isVoicemail ? 'Voicemail' : 'Call'}
                  </span>
                  {showHandoffContext ? (
                    <span className="rounded-full bg-warning/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-warning">
                      Human handoff
                    </span>
                  ) : null}
                  <span className="text-[11px] text-base-content/45">{formattedTime}</span>
                </div>

                {entry.text && entry.text !== 'New voicemail' && entry.text !== 'No message' ? (
                  <div className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/70">{entry.text}</div>
                ) : null}

                {showHandoffContext && (detail?.summary || entry.text) ? (
                  <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl border border-warning/20 bg-warning/5 px-3 py-2">
                    <div className="mb-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-warning/70">
                      Caller intent before handoff
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-sm leading-5 text-base-content/80">
                      {detail?.summary || entry.text}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                {detail?.summary && !showHandoffContext ? (
                  <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl bg-primary/5 px-3 py-2">
                    <div className="mb-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-primary/60">
                      AI Summary
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-sm leading-5 text-base-content/80">{detail.summary}</div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                {detail?.transcription ? (
                  <div className="mt-2 rounded-xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-3 py-2">
                    <div className="mb-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-base-content/45">
                      Transcript
                    </div>
                    <div className="max-h-32 overflow-auto whitespace-pre-wrap text-xs leading-5 text-base-content/65">
                      {detail.transcription}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}

                <div className="mt-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                  {detail?.recordingUrl ? (
                    <a href={detail.recordingUrl} target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs">
                      Play recording
                    </a>
                  ) : null}
                  {canTranscribe ? (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                      disabled={processingCallId === detail.id}
                      onClick={() => triggerTranscribe(detail.id)}
                    >
                      {processingCallId === detail.id ? (
                        <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" />
                      ) : (
                        <>
                          <Mic className="mr-1 h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                          Transcribe
                        </>
                      )}
                    </button>
                  ) : null}
                  {!detail?.recordingUrl ? (
                    <span className="text-xs text-warning">Recording pending…</span>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }

    // SMS entry
    const direction = orgPhoneNumber && phonesMatch(entry.phoneFrom, orgPhoneNumber) ? 'outbound' : 'inbound';
    const isOutbound = direction === 'outbound';
    const isEditing = editingMessageId === entry.id;

    return (
      <div key={entry.id || index} className={`flex px-2 ${isOutbound ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
        <div
          className={`group relative max-w-[78%] rounded-[20px] px-4 py-3 ${
            isOutbound
              ? 'bg-primary text-primary-content'
              : 'border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content'
          }`}
        >
          {/* Tags & Category badges */}
          {(entry.tags || entry.category) && (
            <div className="mb-1.5 flex flex-wrap gap-1">
              {entry.category && (
                <span className={`rounded-full px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide ${
                  isOutbound ? 'bg-white/20 text-white' : 'bg-primary/10 text-primary'
                }`}>
                  {entry.category}
                </span>
              )}
              {entry.tags && entry.tags.split(',').map((t, idx) => {
                const cleanTag = t.trim();
                if (!cleanTag) return null;
                return (
                  <span key={idx} className={`rounded-full px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[9px] ${
                    isOutbound ? 'bg-black/15 text-white/90' : 'bg-base-200 text-base-content/70'
                  }`}>
                    #{cleanTag}
                  </span>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          )}

          {isEditing ? (
            <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-end justify-center sm:items-center" onClick={() => setEditingMessageId(null)}>
              <div
                className="mx-4 mb-20 w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4 shadow-xl sm:mb-0"
                onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
              >
                <div className="text-xs font-bold mb-3 text-base-content">Tag &amp; Categorize</div>

                <label className="label py-1 text-[9px] uppercase font-bold text-base-content/50">Category</label>
                <select
                  value={editCategory}
                  onChange={(e) => setEditCategory(e.target.value)}
                  className="select select-bordered select-xs w-full rounded-lg bg-base-100 mb-2"
                >
                  <option value="">-- No Category --</option>
                  <option value="Inquiry">Inquiry</option>
                  <option value="Booking">Booking</option>
                  <option value="Receipt">Receipt</option>
                  <option value="Support">Support</option>
                  <option value="Feedback">Feedback</option>
                  <option value="Personal">Personal</option>
                  <option value="Other">Other</option>
                </select>

                <label className="label py-1 text-[9px] uppercase font-bold text-base-content/50">Tags (comma separated)</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder="e.g. urgent, follow-up"
                  value={editTags}
                  onChange={(e) => setEditTags(e.target.value)}
                  className="input input-bordered input-xs w-full rounded-lg bg-base-100 mb-3"
                />

                <div className="flex justify-end gap-1.5">
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => setEditingMessageId(null)} className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs rounded-lg">
                    Cancel
                  </button>
                  <button type="button" onClick={() => handleSaveTags(entry.id)} className="btn btn-primary btn-xs rounded-lg">
                    Save
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm leading-relaxed">
                {entry.text || (normalizeMediaUrls(entry.mediaUrls).length ? 'Image message' : '')}
              </div>
              <SmsMediaGrid mediaUrls={entry.mediaUrls} />
              
              <div className="mt-1.5 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                <div className={`text-[11px] ${isOutbound ? 'text-primary-content/60' : 'text-base-content/45'}`}>
                  {formattedTime}
                </div>
                
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => handleStartEdit(entry)}
                  className={`rounded p-0.5 transition-opacity opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 ${
                    isOutbound 
                      ? 'text-white/60 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10' 
                      : 'text-base-content/40 hover:text-base-content hover:bg-base-200'
                  }`}
                  title="Tag and categorize SMS"
                >
                  <svg className="h-3 w-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}>
                    <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M7 7h.01M6 20h12a2 2 0 002-2V6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2z" />
                  </svg>
                </button>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden bg-base-100">
      {/* Thread header */}
      <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-base-300 px-3 py-2.5 sm:px-5 sm:py-3">
        <div className="min-w-0 flex items-center gap-2">
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => window.dispatchEvent(new Event('toggleSidebar'))}
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square xl:hidden"
            aria-label="Back to inbox"
          >
            <svg className="h-5 w-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}>
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
            </svg>
          </button>
          <div>
            <div className="truncate text-sm font-bold text-base-content sm:text-base">
              {displayName || formattedPhone}
            </div>
            {displayName ? (
              <div className="text-xs text-base-content/55 sm:text-sm">{formattedPhone}</div>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-1 sm:gap-2">
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setShowSearch((v) => !v)}
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square"
            title="Search thread"
          >
            <Search className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
          {onOpenDetails ? (
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={onOpenDetails}
              className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square xl:hidden"
              title="Contact details"
            >
              <Info className="h-4 w-4" />
            </button>
          ) : null}
          <button type="button" onClick={handleCall} className="btn btn-success btn-sm btn-square sm:btn-wide" title="Call back">
            <Phone className="h-4 w-4 sm:mr-1.5" />
            <span className="hidden sm:inline">Call back</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Inline search */}
      {showSearch ? (
        <div className="shrink-0 border-b border-base-300 px-4 py-2">
          <label className="input input-bordered input-sm flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-base-100">
            <Search className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-base-content/45" />
            <input
              autoFocus
              type="text"
              placeholder="Search this thread…"
              value={searchTerm}
              onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
              className="grow"
            />
          </label>
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {/* Unified timeline */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-4">
        {currentPage < totalPages ? (
          <div className="mb-4 flex justify-center">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleLoadOlder}
              className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm text-xs text-base-content/55"
            >
              Load older messages
            </button>
          </div>
        ) : null}

        {timeline.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex h-full items-center justify-center">
            <div className="text-center text-sm text-base-content/50">
              <PhoneCall className="mx-auto mb-2 h-8 w-8 opacity-30" />
              No messages or calls yet
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2.5">
            {timeline.map((entry, index) => renderTimelineEntry(entry, index))}
          </div>
        )}
        <div ref={bottomRef} className="h-1" />
      </div>

      {/* SMS composer */}
      <div className="shrink-0 border-t border-base-300">
        <SmsInputBar
          contactPhone={phone}
          orgPhoneNumber={orgPhoneNumber}
          placeholder="Type a message…"
          className="p-3"
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

ConversationView.propTypes = {
  phone: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  orgPhoneNumber: PropTypes.string,
  contactName: PropTypes.string,
  onCall: PropTypes.func,
  onOpenDetails: PropTypes.func,
};

export default ConversationView;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/calls/components/IncomingCallModal.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/IncomingCallModal.jsx
// client/services/calls/components/IncomingCallModal.js
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import CallsService from '../CallsService';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import {
  Bot,
  Mic,
  Phone,
  PhoneForwarded,
  PhoneOff,
  Send,
  UserRound,
  Volume2,
  VolumeX,
  X,
} from 'lucide-react';
import io from 'socket.io-client';

const getPartialTranscriptText = (value) => {
  if (value == null) return '';

  if (typeof value === 'object') {
    return value.partial || value.text || JSON.stringify(value);
  }

  if (typeof value !== 'string') {
    return String(value);
  }

  const trimmed = value.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return '';

  const looksLikeJson =
    (trimmed.startsWith('{') && trimmed.endsWith('}')) ||
    (trimmed.startsWith('[') && trimmed.endsWith(']'));

  if (looksLikeJson) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(trimmed);
      if (typeof parsed === 'string') return parsed;
      return parsed?.partial || parsed?.text || trimmed;
    } catch {
      return trimmed;
    }
  }

  return trimmed;
};

const normalizeTranscriptText = (value = '') =>
  String(value || '')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();

const humanizeIntentLabel = (value = '') => {
  const normalized = normalizeTranscriptText(value).replace(/[_-]+/g, ' ');
  if (!normalized) return 'Not enough information yet';
  return normalized.replace(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase());
};

const buildCallerTurnText = (data = {}) => {
  if (Array.isArray(data.segments) && data.segments.length > 0) {
    const joined = data.segments
      .map((segment) => normalizeTranscriptText(segment?.text || ''))
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join(' ')
      .trim();

    if (joined) return joined;
  }

  return normalizeTranscriptText(data.text || '');
};

const buildEntryKey = (role, text, suffix = '') => `${role}:${text}:${suffix}`;

const IncomingCallModal = ({ incomingCall, onClear }) => {
  const ringtoneRef = useRef(null);
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);
  const socketRef = useRef(null);
  const seenEntriesRef = useRef(new Set());
  const operatorOverrideRef = useRef(false);

  const [audioError, setAudioError] = useState(false);
  const [isAnswered, setIsAnswered] = useState(false);
  const [isRingtoneMuted, setIsRingtoneMuted] = useState(false);
  const [transcriptEntries, setTranscriptEntries] = useState([]);
  const [partialTranscript, setPartialTranscript] = useState('');
  const [assistantStatus, setAssistantStatus] = useState('AI is handling the call.');
  const [callMeta, setCallMeta] = useState({
    callId: incomingCall?.callId || '',
    transferStarted: false,
    lastAction: '',
    lastIntent: '',
    summary: incomingCall?.summary || '',
    callerNumber: incomingCall?.callerID || incomingCall?.from || incomingCall?.phone || '',
  });
  const [isOperatorOverride, setIsOperatorOverride] = useState(false);
  const [operatorText, setOperatorText] = useState('');
  const [operatorSending, setOperatorSending] = useState(false);

  const callerID = incomingCall?.callerID || incomingCall?.from || incomingCall?.phone || '';
  const incomingCallUUID =
    incomingCall?.callUUID ||
    incomingCall?.CallUUID ||
    incomingCall?.call_uuid ||
    '';
  const incomingCallId =
    incomingCall?.callId ||
    incomingCall?.id ||
    incomingCall?.call_id ||
    '';
  const callUUID = incomingCallUUID;
  const isSipCall = incomingCall?.direction === 'sip' || incomingCall?.direction === 'outbound';
  const isOutbound = incomingCall?.direction === 'outbound';
  const partialTranscriptText = getPartialTranscriptText(partialTranscript);
  const callerBadge = useMemo(() => callerID?.charAt(0)?.toUpperCase() || '?', [callerID]);

  const appendTranscriptEntry = (role, text, suffix = '') => {
    const normalizedText = normalizeTranscriptText(text);
    if (!normalizedText) return;

    const entryKey = buildEntryKey(role, normalizedText, suffix);
    if (seenEntriesRef.current.has(entryKey)) {
      return;
    }

    seenEntriesRef.current.add(entryKey);
    setTranscriptEntries((current) => [
      ...current,
      {
        role,
        text: normalizedText,
        id: entryKey,
      },
    ]);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    setCallMeta((current) => ({
      ...current,
      callId: incomingCallId || current.callId || '',
    }));
  }, [incomingCallId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isSipCall) {
      setAssistantStatus(isOutbound ? 'Calling…' : 'SIP call is ringing in Worksmrt.');
    }
  }, [isSipCall, isOutbound]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOutbound && callUUID) {
      setIsAnswered(true);
      setAssistantStatus('Call connected.');
    }
  }, [isOutbound, callUUID]);

  useEffect(() => {
    operatorOverrideRef.current = isOperatorOverride;
  }, [isOperatorOverride]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const expectedCallId = callMeta.callId || incomingCallId || '';
    const expectedCallUUID = callUUID || '';
    if (!expectedCallId && !expectedCallUUID) return undefined;

    const matchesIncomingCall = (data = {}) => {
      const eventCallId = String(data?.callId || data?.id || '').trim();
      const eventCallUUID = String(
        data?.callUUID ||
        data?.CallUUID ||
        data?.call_uuid ||
        ''
      ).trim();

      if (expectedCallUUID && eventCallUUID && eventCallUUID === expectedCallUUID) {
        return true;
      }

      if (expectedCallId && eventCallId && eventCallId === expectedCallId) {
        return true;
      }

      return false;
    };

    const socket = io(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls`, {
      withCredentials: true,
      transports: ['websocket'],
    });

    socketRef.current = socket;

    socket.on('callTranscription', (data = {}) => {
      if (!matchesIncomingCall(data)) return;

      if (data.callId) {
        setCallMeta((current) => ({ ...current, callId: data.callId || data.id || current.callId || '' }));
      }

      if (data.isFinal) {
        const callerText = buildCallerTurnText(data);
        appendTranscriptEntry('caller', callerText, data.segmentId || data.sequence || data.timestamp || data.callId || 'caller-final');
        setPartialTranscript('');
        return;
      }

      setPartialTranscript(data.text || '');
    });

    socket.on('callReceptionistResponse', (data = {}) => {
      if (!matchesIncomingCall(data)) return;

      if (data.callId) {
        setCallMeta((current) => ({
          ...current,
          callId: data.callId || data.id || current.callId || '',
          lastAction: data.action || current.lastAction || '',
          lastIntent: data.intent || current.lastIntent || '',
          summary: data.summary || current.summary || '',
          callerNumber: data.callerNumber || current.callerNumber || callerID || '',
        }));
      }

      if (data.action !== 'operator_speak') {
        appendTranscriptEntry('assistant', data.replyText || '', data.callId || data.intent || data.action || 'assistant');
      }

      if (data.action === 'operator_takeover') {
        setIsOperatorOverride(true);
        setAssistantStatus('Operator override is on. Caller turns will not go to the AI.');
      } else if (data.action === 'operator_resume_ai') {
        setIsOperatorOverride(false);
        setAssistantStatus('AI is handling the call.');
      } else if (data.action === 'operator_waiting') {
        setAssistantStatus('Operator override is on. Waiting for your reply.');
      } else if (data.action === 'operator_speak') {
        setAssistantStatus(operatorOverrideRef.current ? 'Your message was spoken. Waiting for the caller.' : 'Your message was spoken. AI will resume.');
      } else if (data.action === 'reservation_pending_details') {
        setAssistantStatus('AI is collecting reservation details.');
      } else if (data.action === 'reservation_ready') {
        setAssistantStatus('AI has enough information to create the reservation.');
      } else if (data.action === 'escalate_to_human') {
        setAssistantStatus('AI is asking for a human handoff.');
      } else {
        setAssistantStatus('AI is handling the call.');
      }
    });

    socket.on('callReceptionistTransferStarted', (data = {}) => {
      if (!matchesIncomingCall(data)) return;
      setCallMeta((current) => ({
        ...current,
        callId: data.callId || data.id || current.callId || '',
        transferStarted: true,
        lastAction: data.action || current.lastAction || '',
        lastIntent: data.intent || current.lastIntent || '',
        summary: data.summary || current.summary || '',
        callerNumber: data.callerNumber || current.callerNumber || callerID || '',
      }));
      setAssistantStatus('Call is being forwarded to a human.');
      appendTranscriptEntry('system', 'Call is being forwarded to a human.', `transfer-started-${data.callId || callUUID}`);
    });

    socket.on('callReceptionistTransferFailed', (data = {}) => {
      if (!matchesIncomingCall(data)) return;
      setCallMeta((current) => ({
        ...current,
        callId: data.callId || data.id || current.callId || '',
        transferStarted: false,
      }));
      setAssistantStatus('Human transfer failed. AI is still handling the call.');
      appendTranscriptEntry('system', 'Human transfer failed. AI is still handling the call.', `transfer-failed-${data.callId || callUUID}`);
    });

    return () => {
      socket.disconnect();
      socketRef.current = null;
    };
  }, [callMeta.callId, callUUID, incomingCallId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, [transcriptEntries, partialTranscriptText, assistantStatus]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const ringtone = ringtoneRef.current;
    if (!ringtone) return undefined;

    if (!isAnswered && !isRingtoneMuted && !isOutbound) {
      ringtone
        .play()
        .then(() => setAudioError(false))
        .catch((error) => {
          console.error('Ringtone play error:', error);
          setAudioError(true);
        });
    } else {
      ringtone.pause();
      ringtone.currentTime = 0;
    }

    return () => {
      ringtone.pause();
      ringtone.currentTime = 0;
    };
  }, [isAnswered, isRingtoneMuted, isOutbound]);

  const emitReceptionistControl = async (action, extra = {}) => {
    if (!socketRef.current) return;

    socketRef.current.emit('callReceptionistControl', {
      action,
      callUUID,
      callId: callMeta.callId || incomingCallId || '',
      ...extra,
    });
  };

  const handleOperatorSpeak = async (e) => {
    e?.preventDefault();
    const text = operatorText.trim();
    if (!text || operatorSending) return;

    setOperatorSending(true);
    try {
      await emitReceptionistControl('operator_speak', { text });
      appendTranscriptEntry('operator', text, Date.now());
      setOperatorText('');
    } finally {
      setOperatorSending(false);
    }
  };

  const handleToggleOperatorOverride = async () => {
    if (!callMeta.callId && !incomingCallId) return;

    const nextOverride = !isOperatorOverride;
    setIsOperatorOverride(nextOverride);
    setAssistantStatus(nextOverride
      ? 'Operator override is on. Caller turns will not go to the AI.'
      : 'Returning future caller turns to the AI.');

    try {
      await emitReceptionistControl(nextOverride ? 'operator_takeover' : 'operator_resume_ai');
      toast.info(nextOverride ? 'Operator override enabled.' : 'AI receptionist resumed.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error toggling operator override:', error);
      setIsOperatorOverride(!nextOverride);
      toast.error('Failed to update operator override.');
    }
  };

  const handleToggleRingtoneMute = () => {
    setIsRingtoneMuted((current) => !current);
  };

  const handleAnswer = async () => {
    if (!callUUID) return;

    try {
      if (!isSipCall) {
        await emitReceptionistControl('interrupt_and_answer');
      }
      CallsService.answerIncomingCall(callUUID);
      setIsAnswered(true);
      setAssistantStatus(isSipCall ? 'You are connected in Worksmrt.' : 'You answered the call in Worksmrt.');
      toast.success('Call connected.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error answering:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to answer call.');
    }
  };

  const handleForwardToHuman = async () => {
    if (!callUUID && !(callMeta.callId || incomingCallId)) return;

    try {
      await emitReceptionistControl('interrupt_and_transfer');
      setAssistantStatus('Forwarding the call to a human.');
      toast.info('Requested human transfer.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error forwarding to human:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to request human transfer.');
    }
  };

  const handleCloseKeepAi = () => {
    if (ringtoneRef.current) {
      ringtoneRef.current.pause();
      ringtoneRef.current.currentTime = 0;
    }
    onClear();
  };

  const handleTerminate = (actionType) => {
    try {
      if (actionType === 'reject') {
        if (callUUID) {
          CallsService.rejectIncomingCall(callUUID);
        } else {
          CallsService.hangup();
        }
        toast.info(isSipCall ? 'Call ended' : 'Call rejected');
      } else {
        CallsService.hangup();
        toast.info('Call ended');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Error during ${actionType}:`, error);
      toast.error(`Failed to ${actionType === 'reject' ? 'reject' : 'end'} the call.`);
    } finally {
      onClear();
    }
  };

  const renderTranscriptEntry = (entry) => {
    const isCaller = entry.role === 'caller';
    const isAssistant = entry.role === 'assistant';
    const isOperator = entry.role === 'operator';

    const alignment = isCaller ? 'chat-start' : 'chat-end';
    const bubbleClass = isCaller
      ? 'chat-bubble-secondary'
      : isOperator
        ? 'chat-bubble-warning'
        : 'chat-bubble-primary';

    return (
      <div key={entry.id} className={`chat ${alignment}`}>
        <div className="chat-image avatar placeholder">
          <div className="w-8 rounded-full bg-base-300 text-base-content">
            {isCaller ? <UserRound className="mx-auto h-4 w-4" /> : isOperator ? <Mic className="mx-auto h-4 w-4" /> : <Bot className="mx-auto h-4 w-4" />}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="chat-header mb-1 text-xs opacity-60">
          {isCaller ? 'Caller' : isOperator ? 'You (operator)' : 'AI receptionist'}
        </div>
        <div className={`chat-bubble text-sm ${bubbleClass}`}>{entry.text}</div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const callerIntentLabel = humanizeIntentLabel(callMeta.lastIntent);
  const callerIntentSummary = normalizeTranscriptText(callMeta.summary);
  const isAskingForHandoffPurpose = callMeta.lastAction === 'human_transfer_needs_purpose';

  return (
    <div className="modal modal-open z-[1000]">
      <audio ref={ringtoneRef} src="/sounds/ringtone.mp3" loop preload="auto" />

      <div className="modal-box max-w-5xl rounded-[28px] border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-0 shadow-2xl">
        <div className="border-b border-base-300 px-6 py-5">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="avatar placeholder">
                <div className="w-14 rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-primary">
                  <span className="text-lg font-semibold">{callerBadge}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/45">
                  {isOutbound ? 'Outgoing call' : isSipCall ? 'SIP call' : 'Incoming call'}
                </div>
                <h2 className="mt-1 text-2xl font-semibold text-base-content">
                  {callerID || 'Unknown caller'}
                </h2>
                <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/65">
                  {assistantStatus}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleCloseKeepAi}
              className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm rounded-xl"
              title={isSipCall ? 'Close this window' : 'Close this window and keep the AI on the call'}
            >
              <X className="h-4 w-4" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid gap-0 lg:grid-cols-[1.45fr_0.75fr]">
          <div className="min-h-[520px] border-b border-base-300 p-6 lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r">
            <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
              <div>
                <div className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/45">
                  Live transcript
                </div>
                <div className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/65">
                  {isOutbound
                    ? 'Live transcription will appear once the call connects.'
                    : isSipCall
                      ? 'Use this window to answer or hang up the SIP call.'
                      : 'This now stays live even while the AI is still talking to the caller.'}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/60 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-base-content/65">
                {callMeta.callId ? `Call ID: ${callMeta.callId}` : 'Waiting for call metadata'}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="h-[400px] overflow-y-auto rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 p-4 shadow-inner">
              {transcriptEntries.length === 0 && !partialTranscriptText ? (
                <div className="mt-24 text-center text-sm italic text-base-content/45">
                  Waiting for live transcript…
                </div>
              ) : null}

              <div className="space-y-2">
                {transcriptEntries.map(renderTranscriptEntry)}

                {partialTranscriptText ? (
                  <div className="chat chat-start opacity-70">
                    <div className="chat-image avatar placeholder">
                      <div className="w-8 rounded-full bg-base-300 text-base-content">
                        <UserRound className="mx-auto h-4 w-4" />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="chat-header mb-1 text-xs opacity-60">Caller</div>
                    <div className="chat-bubble chat-bubble-ghost text-sm italic animate-pulse">
                      {partialTranscriptText}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>

              <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-4 p-6">
            <div className="grid gap-3">
              <div className="rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-4">
                <div className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/50">Call handling</div>
                <div className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-base-content">
                  {isOutbound
                    ? isAnswered
                      ? 'You are connected.'
                      : 'Calling the destination…'
                    : isAnswered
                      ? 'You are connected through SIP in Worksmrt.'
                      : isOperatorOverride
                        ? 'You are controlling the conversation by typed TTS.'
                    : callMeta.transferStarted
                      ? 'A human transfer is in progress.'
                      : isSipCall
                        ? 'The SIP call is ringing in Worksmrt.'
                        : 'The AI receptionist is currently handling the call.'}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="rounded-3xl border border-warning/30 bg-warning/5 p-4">
                <div className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-warning/70">Caller intent</div>
                <div className="mt-2 text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">
                  {isAskingForHandoffPurpose ? 'AI is asking for the reason' : callerIntentLabel}
                </div>
                <div className="mt-1 text-sm leading-5 text-base-content/70">
                  {callerIntentSummary || (isAskingForHandoffPurpose
                    ? "The caller asked for a human, but has not said what the team should know yet."
                    : "The AI has not captured a specific reason yet.")}
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-4">
                <div className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/50">Ringtone</div>
                <div className="mt-2 text-sm text-base-content/70">
                  {isRingtoneMuted ? 'Muted in this modal' : 'Audible in this modal'}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {!isAnswered && !isSipCall ? (
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={handleToggleOperatorOverride}
                className={`btn btn-lg rounded-2xl ${isOperatorOverride ? 'btn-warning' : 'btn-outline btn-warning'}`}
                title={isOperatorOverride ? 'Let the AI process future caller turns again' : 'Stop sending caller turns to the AI and reply by typed TTS'}
              >
                <Mic className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                {isOperatorOverride ? 'Operator override on' : 'Override AI'}
              </button>
            ) : null}

            {!isAnswered && !isSipCall && isOperatorOverride ? (
              <form onSubmit={handleOperatorSpeak} className="rounded-3xl border border-warning/40 bg-warning/5 p-3">
                <div className="mb-2 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-warning/80">
                  <Mic size={12} /> Type TTS reply
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <input
                    className="input input-bordered input-sm flex-1 rounded-xl"
                    placeholder="Type what should be said to the caller..."
                    value={operatorText}
                    onChange={(e) => setOperatorText(e.target.value)}
                    disabled={operatorSending}
                  />
                  <button
                    type="submit"
                    className={`btn btn-warning btn-sm rounded-xl ${operatorSending ? 'loading' : ''}`}
                    disabled={!operatorText.trim() || operatorSending}
                    title="Interrupt AI and speak this to the caller"
                  >
                    {!operatorSending ? <Send size={14} /> : null}
                  </button>
                </div>
                <p className="mt-1.5 text-[11px] text-base-content/50">
                  Caller transcripts stay live here. Their turns are held for you, not sent to the LLM.
                </p>
              </form>
            ) : null}

            {isOutbound ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
                <button onClick={() => handleTerminate('hangup')} className="btn btn-error btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                  <PhoneOff className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  Hang up
                </button>
                <button onClick={handleCloseKeepAi} className="btn btn-ghost btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                  <X className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  Close modal
                </button>
              </div>
            ) : !isAnswered ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
                <button onClick={handleAnswer} className="btn btn-success btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                  <Phone className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  {isSipCall ? 'Answer call' : 'Interrupt AI and answer now'}
                </button>

                {!isSipCall ? (
                  <button onClick={handleForwardToHuman} className="btn btn-warning btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                    <PhoneForwarded className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                    Interrupt AI and forward to human
                  </button>
                ) : null}

                <button onClick={handleToggleRingtoneMute} className="btn btn-outline btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                  {isRingtoneMuted ? (
                    <>
                      <Volume2 className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                      Unmute ringtone
                    </>
                  ) : (
                    <>
                      <VolumeX className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                      Mute ringtone
                    </>
                  )}
                </button>

                <button onClick={handleCloseKeepAi} className="btn btn-ghost btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                  <X className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  {isSipCall ? 'Close modal' : 'Close modal and keep AI talking'}
                </button>

                <button onClick={() => handleTerminate('reject')} className="btn btn-error btn-outline btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                  <PhoneOff className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  {isSipCall ? 'Hang up' : 'Reject call'}
                </button>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
                <button onClick={() => handleTerminate('hangup')} className="btn btn-error btn-lg rounded-2xl">
                  <PhoneOff className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  Hang up
                </button>
              </div>
            )}

            {audioError ? (
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-warning/30 bg-warning/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-warning-content">
                The ringtone could not autoplay in your browser. You can still mute or close the modal.
              </div>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="modal-backdrop bg-black/60" />
    </div>
  );
};

IncomingCallModal.propTypes = {
  incomingCall: PropTypes.shape({
    callerID: PropTypes.string,
    callUUID: PropTypes.string,
    callId: PropTypes.string,
    direction: PropTypes.string,
    summary: PropTypes.string,
  }),
  onClear: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};

export default IncomingCallModal;

```

FILE: client/services/calls/components/IvrManager.jsx
