```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/PhoneUI.jsx
// client/services/calls/components/PhoneUI.js
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import CallsService from '../CallsService';
import { MessageSquare, Phone, Settings2, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';
import NumberPad from '@/services/calls/components/NumberPad';
import SmsInputBar from '@/services/calls/components/SmsInputBar';
import BeginnerTipsCard from '@/services/calls/components/BeginnerTipsCard';

const formatDisplayNumber = (value = '') => {
  const digits = String(value || '').replace(/\D/g, '');

  if (digits.length === 11 && digits.startsWith('1')) {
    return `+1 (${digits.slice(1, 4)}) ${digits.slice(4, 7)}-${digits.slice(7, 11)}`;
  }

  if (digits.length === 10) {
    return `(${digits.slice(0, 3)}) ${digits.slice(3, 6)}-${digits.slice(6, 10)}`;
  }

  return value;
};

const PhoneUI = ({ initialNumber, orgPhoneNumber, onOpenSettings, onOpenThread }) => {
  const [destination, setDestination] = useState(initialNumber || '');
  const [callStatus, setCallStatus] = useState('');
  const [showDialPad, setShowDialPad] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    setDestination(initialNumber || '');
  }, [initialNumber]);

  const formattedDestination = useMemo(() => formatDisplayNumber(destination), [destination]);

  const handleCall = () => {
    if (!destination) {
      toast.error('Enter a destination number');
      return;
    }

    try {
      CallsService.makeCall(destination, orgPhoneNumber);
      const nextStatus = `Calling ${formattedDestination || destination} from ${formatDisplayNumber(orgPhoneNumber)}…`;
      setCallStatus(nextStatus);
      toast.info(nextStatus);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to place call');
    }
  };

  const handleOpenThread = () => {
    if (!destination) {
      toast.error('Enter a destination number');
      return;
    }

    if (typeof onOpenThread === 'function') {
      onOpenThread(destination);
      toast.success(`Opened thread for ${formattedDestination || destination}`);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <BeginnerTipsCard
        storageKey="workspace-overview"
        compactLabel="Beginner mode"
        title="Start here without getting lost"
        subtitle="The core workflow stays visible, but you can dismiss this as soon as you know the flow."
        steps={[
          { title: 'Pick a number', description: 'Use the contact list or type a number manually.' },
          { title: 'Choose your action', description: 'Call right away, open the thread, or send an SMS from this top panel.' },
          { title: 'Keep the thread clean', description: 'The conversation panel below is for reading history, not composing.' },
        ]}
      />

      <div className="rounded-[28px] border border-base-300 bg-base-100 shadow-xl">
        <div className="border-b border-base-300/80 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6">
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
            <div>
              <div className="mb-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full bg-primary/10 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-primary">
                <Sparkles className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                Call workspace
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-base-content">Call and message from one control area</h2>
              
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/70 px-4 py-3">
                <div className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/50">Sending from</div>
                <div className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">
                  {orgPhoneNumber ? formatDisplayNumber(orgPhoneNumber) : 'No org number set'}
                </div>
              </div>
              {onOpenSettings ? (
                <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={onOpenSettings}>
                  <Settings2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                  Settings
                </button>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid gap-5 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
          <div className="rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 p-4 sm:p-5">
            <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-base-content">Destination</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">Paste a number, pick a contact, or use the dial pad.</div>
              </div>
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"
                onClick={() => setShowDialPad((current) => !current)}
              >
                {showDialPad ? 'Hide dial pad' : 'Show dial pad'}
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
              <input
                type="text"
                value={destination}
                onChange={(event) => setDestination(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Enter phone number"
                className="input input-bordered input-lg w-full rounded-2xl bg-base-100 text-lg font-medium"
              />

              <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 xl:flex-row">
                <button onClick={handleCall} className="btn btn-success btn-lg rounded-2xl px-6 xl:flex-1">
                  <Phone className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  Call now
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handleOpenThread}
                  className="btn btn-primary btn-lg rounded-2xl px-6 xl:flex-1"
                >
                  <MessageSquare className="mr-2 h-5 w-5" />
                  Open message thread
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 text-sm">
              <span className="rounded-full bg-base-100 px-3 py-1.5 text-base-content/70 ring-1 ring-base-300">
                Active number: {formattedDestination || 'No destination selected'}
              </span>
              {callStatus ? <span className="font-medium text-success">{callStatus}</span> : null}
            </div>
          </div>

          {destination ? (
            <SmsInputBar
              contactPhone={destination}
              orgPhoneNumber={orgPhoneNumber}
              placeholder="Send an SMS from the phone panel…"
            />
          ) : (
            <div className="h-full rounded-3xl border border-dashed border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-6 text-sm text-base-content/60">
              Enter or select a number above to send an SMS from this panel.
            </div>
          )}

          {showDialPad ? (
            <div className="lg:col-span-2">
              <NumberPad destination={destination} setDestination={setDestination} />
            </div>
          ) : null}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default PhoneUI;

```

FILE: client/services/calls/components/RegularIncomingCallModal.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/RegularIncomingCallModal.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { Phone, PhoneOff, Voicemail, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import io from 'socket.io-client';
import CallsService from '../CallsService';
import SmsInputBar from './SmsInputBar';

const transcriptText = (value = '') => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

const RegularIncomingCallModal = ({ incomingCall, onClear }) => {
  const ringtoneRef = useRef(null);
  const transcriptEndRef = useRef(null);
  const [isAnswered, setIsAnswered] = useState(false);
  const [resolvedSipCallUUID, setResolvedSipCallUUID] = useState(() => incomingCall?.sipCallUUID || (
    incomingCall?.direction === 'sip' ? incomingCall?.callUUID : ''
  ));
  const [isSendingToVoicemail, setIsSendingToVoicemail] = useState(false);
  const [partialTranscript, setPartialTranscript] = useState('');
  const [transcriptEntries, setTranscriptEntries] = useState(() => {
    const initial = transcriptText(incomingCall?.transcription);
    return initial ? [initial] : [];
  });

  const caller = incomingCall?.callerID || incomingCall?.from || 'Unknown caller';
  const organizationPhoneNumber = incomingCall?.to || incomingCall?.businessNumber || '';
  const callId = incomingCall?.callId || incomingCall?.id || '';
  const sipCallUUID = resolvedSipCallUUID;
  const callerBadge = useMemo(() => String(caller).charAt(0).toUpperCase() || '?', [caller]);
  const ivrPath = Array.isArray(incomingCall?.ivrPath) ? incomingCall.ivrPath : [];

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;
    let intervalId;

    const resolveSipInvitation = async () => {
      if (resolvedSipCallUUID) return;
      try {
        await CallsService.initialize({ showToast: false });
        const activeCall = CallsService.getIncomingSipCall(caller);
        if (!cancelled && activeCall?.callUUID) {
          setResolvedSipCallUUID(activeCall.callUUID);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        if (!cancelled) console.error('Unable to initialize SIP answering:', error);
      }
    };

    resolveSipInvitation();
    if (!resolvedSipCallUUID) intervalId = window.setInterval(resolveSipInvitation, 500);
    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
      if (intervalId) window.clearInterval(intervalId);
    };
  }, [caller, resolvedSipCallUUID]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const incomingSipCallUUID = incomingCall?.sipCallUUID || (
      incomingCall?.direction === 'sip' ? incomingCall?.callUUID : ''
    );
    if (incomingSipCallUUID) setResolvedSipCallUUID(incomingSipCallUUID);
  }, [incomingCall?.callUUID, incomingCall?.direction, incomingCall?.sipCallUUID]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const ringtone = ringtoneRef.current;
    if (!ringtone) return undefined;
    if (!isAnswered) {
      const playback = ringtone.play();
      playback?.catch?.(() => {});
    } else {
      ringtone.pause();
      ringtone.currentTime = 0;
    }
    return () => {
      ringtone.pause();
      ringtone.currentTime = 0;
    };
  }, [isAnswered]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!callId) return undefined;
    const socket = io(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls`, {
      withCredentials: true,
      transports: ['websocket'],
    });
    socket.on('callTranscription', (data = {}) => {
      if (String(data.callId || data.id || '') !== String(callId)) return;
      const text = transcriptText(data.text);
      if (data.isFinal) {
        if (text) {
          setTranscriptEntries((current) => current[current.length - 1] === text ? current : [...current, text]);
        }
        setPartialTranscript('');
      } else {
        setPartialTranscript(text);
      }
    });
    return () => socket.disconnect();
  }, [callId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    transcriptEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, [transcriptEntries, partialTranscript]);

  const answer = () => {
    if (!sipCallUUID) {
      toast.error('The SIP call is not ready to answer yet.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      CallsService.answerIncomingCall(sipCallUUID, caller);
      setIsAnswered(true);
      toast.success('Call connected.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error answering:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to answer call.');
    }
  };

  const reject = () => {
    try {
      if (sipCallUUID) CallsService.rejectIncomingCall(sipCallUUID);
      toast.info('Call rejected.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error rejecting call:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to reject call.');
    } finally {
      onClear();
    }
  };

  const sendToVoicemail = async () => {
    if (!callId || isSendingToVoicemail) return;
    setIsSendingToVoicemail(true);
    try {
      await CallsService.sendIncomingCallToVoicemail(callId, sipCallUUID);
      toast.success('Caller sent to voicemail.');
      onClear();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error sending call to voicemail:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to send call to voicemail.');
      setIsSendingToVoicemail(false);
    }
  };

  const hangup = () => {
    try {
      CallsService.hangup();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error ending call:', error);
    } finally {
      onClear();
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="modal modal-open z-[1000]">
      <audio ref={ringtoneRef} src="/sounds/ringtone.mp3" loop preload="auto" />
      <div className="modal-box max-h-[calc(100dvh-1.5rem)] w-[calc(100vw-1.5rem)] max-w-2xl overflow-y-auto rounded-[28px] border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-0 shadow-2xl">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 border-b border-base-300 px-5 py-5 sm:px-6">
          <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-4">
            <div className="avatar placeholder shrink-0">
              <div className="w-14 rounded-full bg-success/10 text-success"><span className="text-lg font-semibold">{callerBadge}</span></div>
            </div>
            <div className="min-w-0">
              <div className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-success/70">{isAnswered ? 'Call connected' : 'Incoming call'}</div>
              <h2 className="truncate text-xl font-bold">{caller}</h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60">Regular phone call</p>
              {ivrPath.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-base-content/70" aria-label="IVR selection">
                  <span className="font-semibold">IVR:</span>
                  {ivrPath.map((step, index) => (
                    <React.Fragment key={`${step.nodeId}-${index}-${step.digit}`}>
                      {index > 0 ? <span aria-hidden="true">→</span> : null}
                      <span className="rounded-lg bg-base-200 px-2 py-1">
                        {step.nodeName}{step.digit ? ` · ${step.digit}: ${step.optionLabel}` : ` · ${step.optionLabel}`}
                      </span>
                    </React.Fragment>
                  ))}
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm rounded-xl" onClick={onClear} title="Close call window"><X size={18} /></button>
        </div>

        {isAnswered ? (
          <div className="p-5 sm:p-6">
            <div className="mb-3 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-base-content/50">Live transcript</div>
            <div className="h-64 overflow-y-auto rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 p-4">
              {!transcriptEntries.length && !partialTranscript ? <p className="mt-20 text-center text-sm italic text-base-content/45">Listening for speech…</p> : null}
              <div className="space-y-3">
                {transcriptEntries.map((entry, index) => <div key={`${index}-${entry}`} className="rounded-xl bg-base-100 px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm">{entry}</div>)}
                {partialTranscript ? <div className="rounded-xl bg-base-100/70 px-3 py-2 text-sm italic opacity-70">{partialTranscript}</div> : null}
              </div>
              <div ref={transcriptEndRef} />
            </div>
            <button type="button" onClick={hangup} className="btn btn-error mt-5 w-full rounded-2xl"><PhoneOff size={18} /> Hang up</button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-5 p-5 sm:p-6">
            <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3">
              <button type="button" onClick={answer} disabled={!sipCallUUID} className="btn btn-success h-auto min-h-20 flex-col rounded-2xl"><Phone size={22} /><span>{sipCallUUID ? 'Answer' : 'Connecting…'}</span></button>
              <button type="button" onClick={reject} className="btn btn-error btn-outline h-auto min-h-20 flex-col rounded-2xl"><PhoneOff size={22} /><span>Reject</span></button>
              <button type="button" onClick={sendToVoicemail} disabled={!callId || isSendingToVoicemail} className={`btn btn-outline h-auto min-h-20 flex-col rounded-2xl ${isSendingToVoicemail ? 'loading' : ''}`}>
                {!isSendingToVoicemail ? <Voicemail size={22} /> : null}<span>Send to voicemail</span>
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="border-t border-base-300 pt-5">
              <div className="mb-2">
                <div className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-base-content/50">Send a text</div>
                <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/60">Write a message or choose one of the same preset replies available in the Calls dashboard.</p>
              </div>
              {organizationPhoneNumber ? (
                <SmsInputBar
                  contactPhone={caller}
                  orgPhoneNumber={organizationPhoneNumber}
                  placeholder="Text the caller…"
                  className="rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/30 p-3"
                />
              ) : (
                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-base-content/55">Preparing text messaging…</div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <div className="modal-backdrop bg-black/60" />
    </div>
  );
};

RegularIncomingCallModal.propTypes = {
  incomingCall: PropTypes.object.isRequired,
  onClear: PropTypes.func.isRequired,
};

export default RegularIncomingCallModal;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/calls/components/SmsInputBar.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/SmsInputBar.jsx
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { Image, Languages, Plus, Save, Send, Sparkles, Trash2, X, MoreHorizontal } from 'lucide-react';
import CallsService from '../CallsService';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { translateMessageToEnglish } from '@/shared/utils/translateMessage';

const QUICK_REPLIES_SETTING_NAME = 'callSmsQuickReplies';
const DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES = [
  'Thanks — we received this and will get back to you shortly.',
  'Got it. Could you share the best date and time?',
  'Thanks for reaching out. A team member will follow up soon.',
];
const MAX_IMAGE_COUNT = 5;
const MAX_IMAGE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024;
const SUPPORTED_IMAGE_PATTERN = /^image\/(jpeg|png|gif|webp)$/i;

const getClipboardImageExtension = (mimeType = '') => {
  const subtype = String(mimeType).split('/')[1] || 'png';
  if (subtype === 'jpeg') return 'jpg';
  return ['jpg', 'png', 'gif', 'webp'].includes(subtype) ? subtype : 'png';
};

const parseQuickRepliesSetting = (value) => {
  if (!value) return DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES;

  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
    if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) return DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES;

    const replies = parsed
      .map((reply) => String(reply || '').trim())
      .filter(Boolean);

    return replies.length ? replies : DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES;
  } catch {
    return DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES;
  }
};

const SmsInputBar = ({ contactPhone, orgPhoneNumber, placeholder = 'Write a message…', className = 'h-full rounded-3xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3 shadow-sm sm:p-4' }) => {
  const [message, setMessage] = useState('');
  const [images, setImages] = useState([]);
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [rephrasing, setRephrasing] = useState(false);
  const [translating, setTranslating] = useState(false);
  const [quickReplies, setQuickReplies] = useState(DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES);
  const [draftQuickReplies, setDraftQuickReplies] = useState(DEFAULT_QUICK_REPLIES);
  const [editingPresets, setEditingPresets] = useState(false);
  const [savingPresets, setSavingPresets] = useState(false);
  const messageLength = useMemo(() => String(message || '').length, [message]);
  const imagePreviews = useMemo(
    () => images.map((file) => ({ file, url: URL.createObjectURL(file) })),
    [images]
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    let isCancelled = false;

    const loadQuickReplies = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await fetchWithAuth(
          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/settings/organization/${QUICK_REPLIES_SETTING_NAME}`,
          {
            suppressErrorToast: true,
            suppressErrorLog: true,
            suppressThrow: true,
          }
        );

        if (!response?.ok) return;

        const data = await response.json();
        if (isCancelled) return;

        const replies = parseQuickRepliesSetting(data?.settingValue);
        setQuickReplies(replies);
        setDraftQuickReplies(replies);
      } catch (error) {
        if (!isCancelled) {
          console.error('Failed to load SMS quick replies:', error);
        }
      }
    };

    loadQuickReplies();

    return () => {
      isCancelled = true;
    };
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      imagePreviews.forEach((preview) => URL.revokeObjectURL(preview.url));
    };
  }, [imagePreviews]);

  const handleSend = async () => {
    if (sending || rephrasing || translating) return;

    if (!message.trim() && images.length === 0) {
      toast.error('Please enter a message or attach an image');
      return;
    }

    setSending(true);
    try {
      let mediaUrls = [];
      if (images.length > 0) {
        const formData = new FormData();
        images.forEach((file) => formData.append('images', file));

        const uploadResponse = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/message/media`, {
          method: 'POST',
          body: formData,
        });
        const uploadData = await uploadResponse.json().catch(() => ({}));
        if (!uploadResponse.ok) {
          throw new Error(uploadData?.error || 'Failed to upload image');
        }
        mediaUrls = Array.isArray(uploadData.mediaUrls) ? uploadData.mediaUrls : [];
      }

      await CallsService.sendMessage({
        to: contactPhone,
        text: message,
        from: orgPhoneNumber,
        type: mediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'mms' : 'sms',
        mediaUrls,
      });
      toast.success(mediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'MMS sent successfully' : 'SMS sent successfully');
      setMessage('');
      setImages([]);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error sending SMS:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to send SMS');
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  };

  const addImages = useCallback((files) => {
    const incomingFiles = Array.from(files || []);
    if (incomingFiles.length === 0) return 0;

    const remainingSlots = MAX_IMAGE_COUNT - images.length;
    if (remainingSlots <= 0) {
      toast.error(`You can attach up to ${MAX_IMAGE_COUNT} images.`);
      return 0;
    }

    const validImages = incomingFiles.filter((file) => {
      const name = file.name || 'Pasted image';
      if (!SUPPORTED_IMAGE_PATTERN.test(file.type || '')) {
        toast.error(`${name} is not a supported image.`);
        return false;
      }
      if (file.size > MAX_IMAGE_SIZE) {
        toast.error(`${name} is larger than 5 MB.`);
        return false;
      }
      return true;
    });

    if (validImages.length > remainingSlots) {
      toast.warning(`Only ${remainingSlots} more image${remainingSlots === 1 ? '' : 's'} can be attached.`);
    }

    const imagesToAdd = validImages.slice(0, remainingSlots);
    setImages((current) => [...current, ...imagesToAdd].slice(0, MAX_IMAGE_COUNT));
    return imagesToAdd.length;
  }, [images.length]);

  const handleImageChange = (event) => {
    addImages(event.target.files || []);
    event.target.value = '';
  };

  const handlePaste = useCallback((event) => {
    const items = Array.from(event.clipboardData?.items || []);
    const pastedImages = items
      .filter((item) => item.kind === 'file' && item.type.startsWith('image/'))
      .map((item, index) => {
        const file = item.getAsFile();
        if (!file) return null;

        const extension = getClipboardImageExtension(file.type);
        return new File([file], `pasted-sms-image-${Date.now()}-${index + 1}.${extension}`, {
          type: file.type || 'image/png',
        });
      })
      .filter(Boolean);

    if (pastedImages.length === 0) return;

    event.preventDefault();
    const addedCount = addImages(pastedImages);
    if (addedCount > 0) {
      toast.success(addedCount === 1 ? 'Pasted image attached.' : `${addedCount} pasted images attached.`);
    }
  }, [addImages]);

  const removeImage = (indexToRemove) => {
    setImages((current) => current.filter((_, index) => index !== indexToRemove));
  };

  const handleMessageKeyDown = (event) => {
    if (event.key !== 'Enter' || !event.shiftKey) return;

    event.preventDefault();
    handleSend();
  };

  const handleRephrase = async () => {
    if (!message.trim()) {
      toast.error('Write a message to rephrase');
      return;
    }

    setRephrasing(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/rephrase`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ text: message, tone: 'concise_friendly' }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to rephrase');
      }
      setMessage(data.rephrased || message);
      toast.success('Message polished');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Rephrase error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to rephrase');
    } finally {
      setRephrasing(false);
    }
  };

  const handleTranslateToEnglish = async () => {
    if (!message.trim()) {
      toast.error('Write a message to translate');
      return;
    }

    setTranslating(true);
    try {
      const translated = await translateMessageToEnglish({
        text: message,
        surface: 'sms',
        format: 'plain',
      });
      setMessage(translated || message);
      toast.success('Message translated to English');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Translate SMS error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to translate message');
    } finally {
      setTranslating(false);
    }
  };

  const handleStartEditingPresets = () => {
    setDraftQuickReplies(quickReplies);
    setEditingPresets(true);
  };

  const handleCancelEditingPresets = () => {
    setDraftQuickReplies(quickReplies);
    setEditingPresets(false);
  };

  const handlePresetChange = (index, value) => {
    setDraftQuickReplies((current) =>
      current.map((reply, replyIndex) => (replyIndex === index ? value : reply))
    );
  };

  const handleAddPreset = () => {
    setDraftQuickReplies((current) => [...current, '']);
  };

  const handleRemovePreset = (index) => {
    setDraftQuickReplies((current) => current.filter((_, replyIndex) => replyIndex !== index));
  };

  const handleSavePresets = async () => {
    const replies = draftQuickReplies
      .map((reply) => String(reply || '').trim())
      .filter(Boolean);

    if (!replies.length) {
      toast.error('Add at least one preset reply.');
      return;
    }

    setSavingPresets(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/settings/organization`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify([
          {
            settingName: QUICK_REPLIES_SETTING_NAME,
            settingValue: JSON.stringify(replies),
            description: 'Preset SMS replies for the calls panel.',
          },
        ]),
      });

      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to save preset replies.');
      }

      setQuickReplies(replies);
      setDraftQuickReplies(replies);
      setEditingPresets(false);
      toast.success('Preset replies saved.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to save SMS quick replies:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save preset replies.');
    } finally {
      setSavingPresets(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className={className}>
      {/* Image previews */}
      {imagePreviews.length > 0 ? (
        <div className="mb-2 grid grid-cols-3 gap-1.5 sm:grid-cols-4">
          {imagePreviews.map(({ file, url }, index) => (
            <div key={`${file.name}-${index}`} className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200">
              <img src={url} alt={file.name} className="h-16 w-full object-cover" />
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => removeImage(index)}
                disabled={sending}
                className="btn btn-circle btn-xs absolute right-0.5 top-0.5"
                aria-label={`Remove ${file.name}`}
              >
                <X className="h-3 w-3" />
              </button>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {/* Presets editor (inline, shown when editing) */}
      {editingPresets ? (
        <div className="mb-2 space-y-1.5 rounded-xl border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-2.5">
          {draftQuickReplies.map((reply, index) => (
            <div key={`preset-${index}`} className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <input
                type="text"
                value={reply}
                onChange={(event) => handlePresetChange(index, event.target.value)}
                placeholder={`Preset reply ${index + 1}`}
                className="input input-bordered input-xs min-w-0 flex-1 rounded-lg bg-base-100"
              />
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => handleRemovePreset(index)}
                className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs btn-square"
                aria-label="Remove"
              >
                <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              </button>
            </div>
          ))}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-1">
            <button type="button" onClick={handleAddPreset} className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs gap-1">
              <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Add
            </button>
            <div className="flex gap-1">
              <button type="button" onClick={handleCancelEditingPresets} className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs">Cancel</button>
              <button type="button" onClick={handleSavePresets} disabled={savingPresets} className="btn btn-primary btn-xs gap-1">
                <Save className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                {savingPresets ? 'Saving…' : 'Save'}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {/* Composer row */}
      <div className="flex items-end gap-1.5 sm:gap-2">
        {/* Image upload - always visible */}
        <label className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square mb-1 shrink-0" title="Attach image">
          <Image className="h-4 w-4" />
          <input
            type="file"
            accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,image/webp"
            multiple
            className="hidden"
            onChange={handleImageChange}
            disabled={sending || rephrasing || translating || images.length >= MAX_IMAGE_COUNT}
          />
        </label>

        {/* Overflow menu (mobile only) */}
        <div className="dropdown dropdown-top mb-1 sm:hidden">
          <button
            tabIndex={0}
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square shrink-0"
            title="More options"
          >
            <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
          {/* eslint-disable-next-line jsx-a11y/no-noninteractive-tabindex */}
          <div tabIndex={0} className="dropdown-content z-[10] mb-1 w-56 rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-2 shadow-xl">
            <div className="space-y-1">
              {/* Quick replies */}
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => {
                  const dropdown = document.activeElement;
                  if (dropdown) dropdown.blur();
                }}
                className="w-full rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs font-medium text-base-content"
              >
                <Sparkles className="mr-2 inline h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                Quick replies
              </button>
              <div className="border-t border-base-200 my-1" />
              {quickReplies.map((reply) => (
                <button
                  key={reply}
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => { setMessage(reply); const dd = document.activeElement; if (dd) dd.blur(); }}
                  className="w-full rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs text-base-content/75 transition hover:bg-base-200"
                >
                  {reply}
                </button>
              ))}
              <div className="border-t border-base-200 my-1" />
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={handleStartEditingPresets}
                className="w-full rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs text-base-content/55"
              >
                Edit presets
              </button>
              <div className="border-t border-base-200 my-1" />
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => { handleTranslateToEnglish(); const dd = document.activeElement; if (dd) dd.blur(); }}
                disabled={translating || rephrasing || sending}
                className="w-full rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs text-base-content"
              >
                <Languages className="mr-2 inline h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                {translating ? 'Translating…' : 'Translate to English'}
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={() => { handleRephrase(); const dd = document.activeElement; if (dd) dd.blur(); }}
                disabled={rephrasing || translating || sending}
                className="w-full rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs text-base-content"
              >
                <Sparkles className="mr-2 inline h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                {rephrasing ? 'Polishing…' : 'Polish with AI'}
              </button>
              <div className="border-t border-base-200 my-1" />
              <span className="block px-3 py-1 text-[11px] text-base-content/40">
                {messageLength} characters
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
          <textarea
            value={message}
            onChange={(event) => setMessage(event.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={handleMessageKeyDown}
            onPaste={handlePaste}
            placeholder={placeholder}
            rows={1}
            className="textarea textarea-bordered min-h-11 w-full resize-none rounded-2xl bg-base-100 text-sm leading-5"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Desktop-only actions */}
        <div className="mb-1 hidden sm:flex sm:items-center sm:gap-1.5">
          {/* Quick replies dropdown */}
          <div className="dropdown dropdown-top">
            <button
              tabIndex={0}
              type="button"
              className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm shrink-0 gap-1 text-xs"
              title="Quick replies"
            >
              <Sparkles className="h-3.5 w-3.5 opacity-60" />
              Presets
            </button>
            {/* eslint-disable-next-line jsx-a11y/no-noninteractive-tabindex */}
            <div tabIndex={0} className="dropdown-content z-[10] mb-1 w-64 rounded-2xl border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-2 shadow-xl">
              <div className="mb-2 flex items-center justify-between px-1">
                <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-base-content/60">Quick replies</span>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={handleStartEditingPresets}
                  className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                >
                  Edit
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-1">
                {quickReplies.map((reply) => (
                  <button
                    key={reply}
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => setMessage(reply)}
                    className="w-full rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs text-base-content/75 transition hover:bg-base-200 hover:text-base-content"
                  >
                    {reply}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex-1" />

          {/* Char count */}
          <span className="shrink-0 text-[11px] text-base-content/40">{messageLength}</span>

          {/* English translate */}
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={handleTranslateToEnglish}
            disabled={translating || rephrasing || sending}
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm shrink-0 gap-1"
            title="Translate to English with AI"
          >
            <Languages className="h-4 w-4" />
            {translating ? 'Translating…' : 'English'}
          </button>

          {/* Polish */}
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={handleRephrase}
            disabled={rephrasing || translating || sending}
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm shrink-0 gap-1"
            title="Polish wording with AI"
          >
            <Sparkles className="h-4 w-4" />
            {rephrasing ? 'Polishing…' : 'Polish'}
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Send - always visible */}
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={handleSend}
          disabled={sending || rephrasing || translating}
          className="btn btn-primary btn-sm mb-1 shrink-0 gap-1.5 px-3 sm:px-4"
        >
          <Send className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="hidden min-[360px]:inline">{sending ? 'Sending…' : 'Send'}</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

SmsInputBar.propTypes = {
  contactPhone: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  orgPhoneNumber: PropTypes.string.isRequired,
  placeholder: PropTypes.string,
  className: PropTypes.string,
};

export default SmsInputBar;

```

```jsx
describe('IVR ActionEditor', () => {
  it('offers an action that rings everyone on SIP', () => {
    const onChange = vi.fn();

      <ActionEditor
        action={{ type: 'repeat' }}
        users={[]}
        nodes={[]}
```

FILE: client/services/calls/components/tests/RegularIncomingCallModal.test.jsx

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/tests/RegularIncomingCallModal.test.jsx
import React from 'react';
import { fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/react';
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import RegularIncomingCallModal from '../RegularIncomingCallModal';
import CallsService from '../../CallsService';

vi.mock('socket.io-client', () => ({
  default: vi.fn(() => ({ on: vi.fn(), disconnect: vi.fn() })),
}));

vi.mock('../../CallsService', () => ({
  default: {
    initialize: vi.fn(() => Promise.resolve({})),
    getIncomingSipCall: vi.fn(() => null),
    answerIncomingCall: vi.fn(),
    rejectIncomingCall: vi.fn(),
    sendIncomingCallToVoicemail: vi.fn(),
    hangup: vi.fn(),
  },
}));

vi.mock('../SmsInputBar', () => ({
  default: ({ contactPhone, orgPhoneNumber }) => (
    <div data-testid="sms-input">{contactPhone}|{orgPhoneNumber}</div>
  ),
}));

describe('RegularIncomingCallModal', () => {
  beforeEach(() => vi.clearAllMocks());

  it('shows regular call actions and answers the SIP call with its SIP UUID', () => {
    render(<RegularIncomingCallModal incomingCall={{
      callerID: '+14165550111',
      callId: 'call-1',
      sipCallUUID: 'sip-call-1',
      direction: 'sip',
      to: '+14165550000',
    }} onClear={vi.fn()} />);

    expect(screen.getByText('Regular phone call')).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Reject' })).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Send to voicemail' })).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByText('Send a text')).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByTestId('sms-input')).toHaveTextContent('+14165550111|+14165550000');

    fireEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Answer' }));
    expect(CallsService.answerIncomingCall).toHaveBeenCalledWith('sip-call-1', '+14165550111');
    expect(screen.getByText('Live transcript')).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('recovers a missed SIP event and enables answering', async () => {
    CallsService.getIncomingSipCall.mockReturnValue({ callUUID: 'recovered-sip-call' });
    render(<RegularIncomingCallModal incomingCall={{
      callerID: '+14165550111',
      callId: 'call-1',
      direction: 'inbound',
      to: '+14165550000',
    }} onClear={vi.fn()} />);

    expect(screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Connecting…' })).toBeDisabled();
    await waitFor(() => expect(screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Answer' })).toBeEnabled());
    fireEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Answer' }));
    expect(CallsService.answerIncomingCall).toHaveBeenCalledWith('recovered-sip-call', '+14165550111');
  });

  it('shows the IVR path selected by the caller', () => {
    render(<RegularIncomingCallModal incomingCall={{
      callerID: '+14165550111',
      callId: 'call-1',
      sipCallUUID: 'sip-call-1',
      direction: 'sip',
      to: '+14165550000',
      ivrPath: [
        { nodeId: 'main', nodeName: 'Main menu', digit: '1', optionLabel: 'Sales' },
        { nodeId: 'region', nodeName: 'Region', digit: '2', optionLabel: 'Toronto' },
      ],
    }} onClear={vi.fn()} />);

    expect(screen.getByLabelText('IVR selection')).toHaveTextContent('Main menu · 1: Sales');
    expect(screen.getByLabelText('IVR selection')).toHaveTextContent('Region · 2: Toronto');
  });
});
```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/calls/components/TransferSmsModal.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/components/TransferSmsModal.jsx
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { ArrowDownLeft, CheckCheck, Download, MessageSquare, Phone, Smartphone, Sparkles, X } from 'lucide-react';
import {
  isWorksmrtNative,
  checkNativeSmsPermission,
  requestNativeSmsPermission,
  getNativeSmsThreads,
  getNativeSmsConversation,
} from '@/shared/utils/nativeBridge';

const formatDisplayPhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = String(phone).replace(/\D/g, '');
  if (digits.length === 11 && digits.startsWith('1')) {
    return `+1 (${digits.slice(1, 4)}) ${digits.slice(4, 7)}-${digits.slice(7, 11)}`;
  }
  if (digits.length === 10) {
    return `+1 (${digits.slice(0, 3)}) ${digits.slice(3, 6)}-${digits.slice(6, 10)}`;
  }
  return phone;
};

const formatRelativeDate = (ts) => {
  const date = new Date(Number(ts));
  if (isNaN(date.getTime())) return '';
  const now = new Date();
  const diff = now.getTime() - date.getTime();
  const days = Math.floor(diff / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  if (days === 0) return 'Today';
  if (days === 1) return 'Yesterday';
  if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`;
  return date.toLocaleDateString([], { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
};

const TransferSmsModal = ({ onClose, orgPhoneNumber, onImported }) => {
  const [step, setStep] = useState('permission');
  const [permissionGranted, setPermissionGranted] = useState(false);
  const [threads, setThreads] = useState([]);
  const [selectedThreadIds, setSelectedThreadIds] = useState(new Set());
  const [orgPhoneOptions, setOrgPhoneOptions] = useState([]);
  const [selectedOrgPhone, setSelectedOrgPhone] = useState(orgPhoneNumber || '');
  const [importing, setImporting] = useState(false);
  const [importProgress, setImportProgress] = useState({ done: 0, total: 0 });
  const [result, setResult] = useState(null);

  const isNative = isWorksmrtNative();

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isNative) {
      setStep('unsupported');
      return;
    }
    checkPermission();
    fetchOrgPhones();
  }, []);

  const checkPermission = async () => {
    try {
      const result = await checkNativeSmsPermission();
      setPermissionGranted(result?.granted || false);
      setStep(result?.granted ? 'threads' : 'permission');
    } catch {
      setPermissionGranted(false);
      setStep('permission');
    }
  };

  const fetchOrgPhones = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/organization/phoneNumbers`);
      const data = await res.json();
      if (res.ok && data.phoneNumbers?.length > 0) {
        setOrgPhoneOptions(data.phoneNumbers);
        if (!selectedOrgPhone && data.phoneNumbers[0]?.phoneNumber) {
          setSelectedOrgPhone(data.phoneNumbers[0].phoneNumber);
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch org phones:', err);
    }
  };

  const handleRequestPermission = async () => {
    try {
      await requestNativeSmsPermission();
      const check = await checkNativeSmsPermission();
      if (check?.granted) {
        setPermissionGranted(true);
        loadThreads();
      } else {
        toast.info('SMS permission is required to transfer conversations.');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Permission request failed:', err);
      toast.error('Failed to request SMS permission');
    }
  };

  const loadThreads = async () => {
    setStep('loading');
    try {
      const result = await getNativeSmsThreads();
      const list = (result?.threads || [])
        .filter((t) => t.phoneNumber && t.phoneNumber !== selectedOrgPhone)
        .sort((a, b) => (b.lastMessageDate || 0) - (a.lastMessageDate || 0));
      setThreads(list);
      setStep('threads');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to load SMS threads:', err);
      toast.error('Failed to load SMS threads from device');
      setStep('threads');
    }
  };

  const toggleThread = (threadId) => {
    setSelectedThreadIds((prev) => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(threadId)) next.delete(threadId);
      else next.add(threadId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const handleImport = async () => {
    if (selectedThreadIds.size === 0) return;
    if (!selectedOrgPhone) {
      toast.error('Select an organization phone number');
      return;
    }

    setImporting(true);
    setStep('importing');

    const selectedThreads = threads.filter((t) => selectedThreadIds.has(t.threadId));
    setImportProgress({ done: 0, total: selectedThreads.length });
    const results = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < selectedThreads.length; i++) {
      const thread = selectedThreads[i];
      try {
        const conv = await getNativeSmsConversation({
          threadId: thread.threadId,
          offset: 0,
          limit: 5000,
        });

        if (conv?.messages?.length > 0) {
          const res = await fetchWithAuth(
            `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/message/import-sms-thread`,
            {
              method: 'POST',
              headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
              body: JSON.stringify({
                threadId: String(thread.threadId),
                phoneNumber: thread.phoneNumber,
                orgPhoneNumber: selectedOrgPhone,
                messages: conv.messages,
              }),
            }
          );

          const data = await res.json();
          if (res.ok) {
            results.push({ phone: thread.phoneNumber, imported: data.imported, skipped: data.skipped });
          } else {
            results.push({ phone: thread.phoneNumber, error: data.error || 'Import failed' });
          }
        }
      } catch (err) {
        results.push({ phone: thread.phoneNumber, error: err.message || 'Import failed' });
      }
      setImportProgress({ done: i + 1, total: selectedThreads.length });
    }

    setImporting(false);
    setResult(results);
    setStep('result');

    const totalImported = results.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.imported || 0), 0);
    if (totalImported > 0) {
      toast.success(`Imported ${totalImported} messages from ${results.length} conversation(s)`);
      if (onImported) onImported();
    }
  };

  const handleDone = () => {
    setSelectedThreadIds(new Set());
    setResult(null);
    setImportProgress({ done: 0, total: 0 });
    onClose();
  };

  if (!isNative) {
    return (
      <div className="modal modal-open">
        <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-lg">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg">Transfer SMS Conversations</h3>
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-circle" onClick={onClose}>
              <X size={18} />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="text-sm text-base-content/70 p-4 bg-base-200 rounded-lg">
            This feature is only available on the Worksmrt Android app.
          </div>
          <div className="modal-action">
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={onClose}>Close</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="modal modal-open">
      <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-lg">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg flex items-center gap-2">
            <Smartphone size={18} className="text-primary" />
            Transfer SMS Conversations
          </h3>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-circle" onClick={onClose} disabled={importing}>
            <X size={18} />
          </button>
        </div>

        {step === 'permission' && (
          <div>
            <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70 mb-4">
              Worksmrt needs access to read SMS messages on your device so you can
              select which conversations to transfer.
            </p>
            <div className="bg-info/10 p-4 rounded-lg text-sm text-info mb-4">
              <p className="font-medium mb-1">What happens?</p>
              <ul className="list-disc list-inside space-y-1 text-base-content/70">
                <li>Your SMS messages are read from your device only</li>
                <li>Nothing is deleted from your phone</li>
                <li>Only conversations you select are imported</li>
                <li>After import, Worksmrt takes over via its own SMS provider</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
            <button type="button" onClick={handleRequestPermission} className="btn btn-primary w-full">
              <Sparkles size={16} />
              Grant SMS Access
            </button>
          </div>
        )}

        {step === 'loading' && (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center py-8 gap-3">
            <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md text-primary" />
            <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60">Loading SMS threads from your device...</p>
          </div>
        )}

        {step === 'threads' && (
          <div>
            <div className="mb-3">
              <label className="text-xs font-semibold text-base-content/60 uppercase tracking-wide">
                Associate with Worksmrt number
              </label>
              {orgPhoneOptions.length > 0 ? (
                <select
                  value={selectedOrgPhone}
                  onChange={(e) => setSelectedOrgPhone(e.target.value)}
                  className="select select-bordered select-sm w-full mt-1"
                >
                  {orgPhoneOptions.map((opt) => (
                    <option key={opt.id} value={opt.phoneNumber}>
                      {opt.label ? `${opt.label} (${formatDisplayPhone(opt.phoneNumber)})` : formatDisplayPhone(opt.phoneNumber)}
                    </option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-sm text-base-content/50 mt-1">{formatDisplayPhone(orgPhoneNumber) || 'No phone number configured'}</div>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
              <span className="text-xs text-base-content/50">
                {threads.length} thread{threads.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} found · {selectedThreadIds.size} selected
              </span>
              <div className="flex gap-1">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setSelectedThreadIds(new Set(threads.map((t) => t.threadId)))}
                  className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                  disabled={threads.length === 0}
                >
                  Select all
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  onClick={() => setSelectedThreadIds(new Set())}
                  className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                  disabled={selectedThreadIds.size === 0}
                >
                  Clear
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-1 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto border border-base-300 rounded-lg p-1">
              {threads.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="p-4 text-center text-sm text-base-content/50">No SMS conversations found on this device.</div>
              ) : (
                threads.map((thread) => (
                  <div
                    key={thread.threadId}
                    role="button"
                    tabIndex={0}
                    onClick={() => toggleThread(thread.threadId)}
                    onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); toggleThread(thread.threadId); } }}
                    className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-2 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                      selectedThreadIds.has(thread.threadId) ? 'bg-primary/10 border border-primary/30' : 'hover:bg-base-200 border border-transparent'
                    }`}
                  >
                    <input
                      type="checkbox"
                      checked={selectedThreadIds.has(thread.threadId)}
                      onChange={() => toggleThread(thread.threadId)}
                      className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
                    />
                    <div className="flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-base-200 text-xs font-bold text-base-content/60">
                      <MessageSquare size={14} />
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                        <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{formatDisplayPhone(thread.phoneNumber)}</span>
                        <span className="text-[11px] text-base-content/40 shrink-0">
                          {formatRelativeDate(thread.lastMessageDate)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-base-content/50">
                        <span>{thread.messageCount} message{thread.messageCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
                        {thread.lastMessagePreview ? (
                          <>
                            <span>·</span>
                            <span className="truncate">{thread.lastMessagePreview}</span>
                          </>
                        ) : null}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="modal-action">
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={onClose} disabled={importing}>Cancel</button>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={handleImport}
                className="btn btn-primary"
                disabled={selectedThreadIds.size === 0 || !selectedOrgPhone || importing}
              >
                <Download size={16} />
                Import {selectedThreadIds.size} thread{selectedThreadIds.size !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {step === 'importing' && (
          <div className="py-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
              <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm text-primary" />
              <span className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
                Importing conversation {importProgress.done} of {importProgress.total}...
              </span>
            </div>
            <progress
              className="progress progress-primary w-full"
              value={importProgress.done}
              max={importProgress.total}
            />
          </div>
        )}

        {step === 'result' && result && (
          <div>
            <div className="space-y-2 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
              {result.map((r, idx) => (
                <div key={idx} className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border ${
                  r.error ? 'border-error/30 bg-error/5' : 'border-success/30 bg-success/5'
                }`}>
                  <Phone size={14} className={r.error ? 'text-error' : 'text-success'} />
                  <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <div className="text-sm font-medium">{formatDisplayPhone(r.phone)}</div>
                    {r.error ? (
                      <div className="text-xs text-error">{r.error}</div>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="text-xs text-success">
                        {r.imported > 0 ? `Imported ${r.imported} new message${r.imported !== 1 ? 's' : ''}` : 'No new messages'}
                        {r.skipped > 0 ? ` (${r.skipped} already imported)` : ''}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {!r.error && r.imported > 0 && <CheckCheck size={16} className="text-success shrink-0" />}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div className="modal-action">
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary w-full" onClick={handleDone}>
                <CheckCheck size={16} />
                Done
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default TransferSmsModal;
```
