FILE: client/services/calls/hooks/useConversations.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/hooks/useConversations.jsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';

const useConversations = ({ page = 1, limit = 10, search = '' } = {}) => {
  const [conversations, setConversations] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);

  const fetchConversations = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/conversations?search=${encodeURIComponent(
        search
      )}&page=${page}&limit=${limit}`;
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(url);
      const data = await response.json();
      if (response.ok) {
        setConversations(data.conversations || []);
      } else {
        setError(data.error || 'Failed to fetch conversations');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message || 'Failed to fetch conversations');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchConversations();
  }, [page, limit, search]);

  return { conversations, loading, error, refetch: fetchConversations };
};

export default useConversations;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/calls/IntegratedDashboard.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/IntegratedDashboard.jsx
import React, { useCallback, useContext, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import ConversationView from '@/services/calls/components/ConversationView';
import ContactsList from '@/services/calls/components/ContactsList';
import CallDetailsPanel from '@/services/calls/components/CallDetailsPanel';
import PhoneSettingsModal from '@/services/calls/components/PhoneSettingsModal';
import TransferSmsModal from '@/services/calls/components/TransferSmsModal';
import {
  Grid3x3, MessageSquare, Phone, Pin, PinOff, Search, Settings, Smartphone, Trash2, Users,
  MoreVertical, Plus,
} from 'lucide-react';
import NumberPad from '@/services/calls/components/NumberPad';
import { AuthContext } from '@/shared/context/AuthContext';
import { useGenericSocket } from '@/shared/hooks/useGenericSocket';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';
import CallsService from './CallsService';
import { isWorksmrtNative } from '@/shared/utils/nativeBridge';
import BottomSheet from '@/shared/components/BottomSheet';
import MobileActionSheet from '@/services/calls/components/MobileActionSheet';
import MobileNewCallSheet from '@/services/calls/components/MobileNewCallSheet';

// ─── phone utils ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const normalizePhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = String(phone).replace(/\D/g, '');
  if (digits.length >= 11) {
    const last11 = digits.slice(-11);
    if (last11.startsWith('1')) return last11;
  }
  if (digits.length >= 10) return `1${digits.slice(-10)}`;
  return digits;
};

const phonesMatch = (a, b) => {
  const na = normalizePhone(a);
  const nb = normalizePhone(b);
  return Boolean(na && nb && na === nb);
};

const formatDisplayPhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = normalizePhone(phone);
  if (digits.length === 11 && digits.startsWith('1')) {
    return `+1 (${digits.slice(1, 4)}) ${digits.slice(4, 7)}-${digits.slice(7, 11)}`;
  }
  return String(phone);
};

// ─── timestamp helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const getTimestampValue = (value) => {
  const parsed = new Date(value).getTime();
  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : 0;
};

const getDayBucketLabel = (timestamp) => {
  const entryDate = new Date(timestamp);
  if (Number.isNaN(entryDate.getTime())) return 'Older';
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  const entryDay = new Date(entryDate);
  entryDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  const diffInDays = Math.round((today.getTime() - entryDay.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  if (diffInDays <= 0) return 'Today';
  if (diffInDays === 1) return 'Yesterday';
  if (diffInDays < 7) return 'Earlier this week';
  return 'Older';
};

const formatThreadTimestamp = (timestamp) => {
  const date = new Date(timestamp);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return '';
  const bucket = getDayBucketLabel(timestamp);
  if (bucket === 'Today') return date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
  if (bucket === 'Yesterday' || bucket === 'Earlier this week') return date.toLocaleDateString([], { weekday: 'short' });
  return date.toLocaleDateString([], { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
};

// ─── thread grouping ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const buildThreadFromConversation = (c) => ({
  id: normalizePhone(c.phone) || c.id,
  phone: c.phone,
  normalizedPhone: normalizePhone(c.phone),
  contactName: c.contactName,
  displayPhone: c.displayPhone,
  lastMessage: c.lastMessage,
  timestamp: c.timestamp,
  lastActivityType: c.type,
  interactionCount: 1,
  callCount: c.type === 'call' ? 1 : 0,
  messageCount: c.type === 'call' ? 0 : 1,
  latestCallId: c.type === 'call' ? c.id : null,
  latestCallTimestamp: c.type === 'call' ? c.timestamp : null,
});

const mergeConversationIntoThread = (thread, c) => {
  const cTs = getTimestampValue(c.timestamp);
  const tTs = getTimestampValue(thread.timestamp);
  const lcTs = getTimestampValue(thread.latestCallTimestamp);
  const isNewer = cTs >= tTs;
  const isNewerCall = c.type === 'call' && cTs >= lcTs;
  return {
    ...thread,
    phone: thread.phone || c.phone,
    normalizedPhone: thread.normalizedPhone || normalizePhone(c.phone),
    contactName:
      thread.contactName && thread.contactName !== thread.displayPhone
        ? thread.contactName
        : c.contactName || thread.contactName,
    displayPhone: thread.displayPhone || c.displayPhone,
    lastMessage: isNewer ? c.lastMessage : thread.lastMessage,
    timestamp: isNewer ? c.timestamp : thread.timestamp,
    lastActivityType: isNewer ? c.type : thread.lastActivityType,
    interactionCount: (thread.interactionCount || 0) + 1,
    callCount: (thread.callCount || 0) + (c.type === 'call' ? 1 : 0),
    messageCount: (thread.messageCount || 0) + (c.type === 'call' ? 0 : 1),
    latestCallId: isNewerCall ? c.id : thread.latestCallId,
    latestCallTimestamp: isNewerCall ? c.timestamp : thread.latestCallTimestamp,
  };
};

const groupConversationsByPhone = (entries = []) => {
  const threadMap = new Map();
  [...entries]
    .sort((a, b) => getTimestampValue(b.timestamp) - getTimestampValue(a.timestamp))
    .forEach((c) => {
      const key = normalizePhone(c.phone) || c.id;
      const existing = threadMap.get(key);
      threadMap.set(key, existing ? mergeConversationIntoThread(existing, c) : buildThreadFromConversation(c));
    });
  return [...threadMap.values()].sort((a, b) => getTimestampValue(b.timestamp) - getTimestampValue(a.timestamp));
};

const mergeConversationIntoThreads = (threads = [], c) => {
  const key = normalizePhone(c.phone) || c.id;
  const existing = threads.find((t) => (t.normalizedPhone || t.id) === key);
  if (!existing) return groupConversationsByPhone([c, ...threads]);
  return threads
    .map((t) => ((t.normalizedPhone || t.id) === key ? mergeConversationIntoThread(t, c) : t))
    .sort((a, b) => getTimestampValue(b.timestamp) - getTimestampValue(a.timestamp));
};

const buildConversationSections = (threads = []) => {
  const order = ['Today', 'Yesterday', 'Earlier this week', 'Older'];
  const grouped = order.reduce((acc, label) => ({ ...acc, [label]: [] }), {});
  const pinned = [];

  threads.forEach((thread) => {
    if (thread.isPinned) {
      pinned.push(thread);
      return;
    }
    grouped[getDayBucketLabel(thread.timestamp)].push(thread);
  });

  const sections = order.map((label) => ({ label, items: grouped[label] })).filter((s) => s.items.length > 0);
  return pinned.length > 0 ? [{ label: 'Pinned', items: pinned }, ...sections] : sections;
};

const getThreadPreview = (thread) => {
  if (thread.lastActivityType === 'call') {
    if (thread.lastMessage && thread.lastMessage !== 'New voicemail' && thread.lastMessage !== 'No message') {
      return thread.lastMessage;
    }
    return thread.callCount > 1 ? `${thread.callCount} call activities` : 'Call activity';
  }
  return thread.lastMessage || 'No message';
};

// ─── component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const IntegratedDashboard = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('log');
  const [selectedContact, setSelectedContact] = useState(null);
  const [showSettingsModal, setShowSettingsModal] = useState(false);
  const [conversations, setConversations] = useState([]);
  const [searchLog, setSearchLog] = useState('');
  const [showUnrepliedSmsOnly, setShowUnrepliedSmsOnly] = useState(false);
  const [currentLogPage, setCurrentLogPage] = useState(1);
  const [totalLogPages, setTotalLogPages] = useState(1);
  const [orgPhoneNumber, setOrgPhoneNumber] = useState('');
  const [contactsMapping, setContactsMapping] = useState({});
  const [mobilePanel, setMobilePanel] = useState('list');
  const [showNewCall, setShowNewCall] = useState(false);
  const [newCallNumber, setNewCallNumber] = useState('');
  const [showDialPad, setShowDialPad] = useState(false);
  const [pinnedPhones, setPinnedPhones] = useState([]);
  const [showTransferModal, setShowTransferModal] = useState(false);
  const [deletingConversationPhone, setDeletingConversationPhone] = useState('');
  const itemsPerLogPage = 20;
  const { user } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const { socket } = useGenericSocket('calls');
  const router = useRouter();
  const mountedRef = useRef(false);
  const pinnedStorageKey = useMemo(
    () => `worksmrt.calls.pinnedConversations.${user?.organizationId || 'org'}.${user?.id || 'user'}`,
    [user?.id, user?.organizationId]
  );
  const mobileStateKey = useMemo(
    () => `worksmrt.calls.mobileState.${user?.organizationId || 'org'}.${user?.id || 'user'}`,
    [user?.id, user?.organizationId]
  );
  const [actionSheetThread, setActionSheetThread] = useState(null);
  const [showDetailsSheet, setShowDetailsSheet] = useState(false);
  const [showNewCallSheet, setShowNewCallSheet] = useState(false);

  // ── data fetching ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const fetchContactsMapping = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/contacts?limit=1000`);
      const data = await response.json();
      if (response.ok && data.contacts) {
        const mapping = {};
        data.contacts.forEach((entry) => {
          const normalized = normalizePhone(entry.phone);
          if (normalized && !mapping[normalized]) mapping[normalized] = entry.name;
        });
        setContactsMapping(mapping);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('fetchContactsMapping error:', error);
    }
  };

  const fetchConversations = async () => {
    try {
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/conversations?search=${encodeURIComponent(searchLog)}&page=${currentLogPage}&limit=${itemsPerLogPage}${showUnrepliedSmsOnly ? '&unrepliedSms=true' : ''}&pinned=${encodeURIComponent(pinnedPhones.join(','))}`;
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(url);
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to fetch conversations');

      const mapped = (data.conversations || []).map((c) => {
        const phone = orgPhoneNumber
          ? phonesMatch(c.phoneFrom, orgPhoneNumber) ? c.phoneTo : c.phoneFrom
          : c.phoneFrom || c.phoneTo;
        const normalizedPhone = normalizePhone(phone);
        const contactName = c.displayName || contactsMapping[normalizedPhone] || formatDisplayPhone(phone);
        return {
          id: c.id,
          contactName,
          phone,
          displayPhone: formatDisplayPhone(phone),
          lastMessage: c.text || 'No message',
          timestamp: c.timestamp,
          type: c.type,
        };
      });

      setConversations(groupConversationsByPhone(mapped));
      setTotalLogPages(data.totalPages || 1);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('fetchConversations error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to fetch conversations');
    }
  };

  // ── socket updates ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!socket || !orgPhoneNumber) return;

    const handleNewSms = (message) => {
      const isOutbound = message.direction === 'outbound' || phonesMatch(message.from, orgPhoneNumber);
      const phone = isOutbound ? message.to : message.from;
      const normalizedPhone = normalizePhone(phone);
      setConversations((prev) =>
        mergeConversationIntoThreads(prev, {
          id: message.id,
          contactName: contactsMapping[normalizedPhone] || formatDisplayPhone(phone),
          phone,
          displayPhone: formatDisplayPhone(phone),
          lastMessage: message.text || 'No message',
          timestamp: message.createdAt,
          type: 'sms',
        })
      );
    };

    const handleNewVoicemail = (call) => {
      const isOutbound = call.direction === 'outbound' || phonesMatch(call.from, orgPhoneNumber);
      const phone = isOutbound ? call.to : call.from;
      const normalizedPhone = normalizePhone(phone);
      setConversations((prev) =>
        mergeConversationIntoThreads(prev, {
          id: call.id,
          contactName: contactsMapping[normalizedPhone] || formatDisplayPhone(phone),
          phone,
          displayPhone: formatDisplayPhone(phone),
          lastMessage: 'New voicemail',
          timestamp: call.updatedAt || Date.now(),
          type: 'call',
        })
      );
    };

    const handleVoicemailTranscribed = (call) => {
      const isOutbound = call.direction === 'outbound' || phonesMatch(call.from, orgPhoneNumber);
      const phone = isOutbound ? call.to : call.from;
      const normalizedPhone = normalizePhone(phone);
      setConversations((prev) =>
        mergeConversationIntoThreads(prev, {
          id: call.id,
          contactName: contactsMapping[normalizedPhone] || formatDisplayPhone(phone),
          phone,
          displayPhone: formatDisplayPhone(phone),
          lastMessage: call.transcription || 'Voicemail transcript ready',
          timestamp: call.updatedAt || Date.now(),
          type: 'call',
        })
      );
    };

    const handleSmsConversationDeleted = (payload = {}) => {
      const deletedPhone = payload.normalizedPhone || normalizePhone(payload.phone);
      if (!deletedPhone) return;

      setConversations((prev) =>
        prev
          .map((thread) => {
            const threadPhone = thread.normalizedPhone || normalizePhone(thread.phone);
            if (threadPhone !== deletedPhone) return thread;
            if ((thread.callCount || 0) > 0) {
              return {
                ...thread,
                messageCount: 0,
                lastMessage: thread.lastActivityType === 'call' ? thread.lastMessage : 'Call activity',
                lastActivityType: 'call',
              };
            }
            return null;
          })
          .filter(Boolean)
      );
    };

    socket.on('newSms', handleNewSms);
    socket.on('newVoicemail', handleNewVoicemail);
    socket.on('voicemailTranscribed', handleVoicemailTranscribed);
    socket.on('smsConversationDeleted', handleSmsConversationDeleted);
    return () => {
      socket.off('newSms', handleNewSms);
      socket.off('newVoicemail', handleNewVoicemail);
      socket.off('voicemailTranscribed', handleVoicemailTranscribed);
      socket.off('smsConversationDeleted', handleSmsConversationDeleted);
    };
  }, [socket, orgPhoneNumber, contactsMapping]);

  // ── init effects ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  useEffect(() => { fetchContactsMapping(); }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const stored = window.localStorage.getItem(pinnedStorageKey);
      const parsed = stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : [];
      setPinnedPhones(Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.filter(Boolean) : []);
    } catch {
      setPinnedPhones([]);
    }
  }, [pinnedStorageKey]);

  // ── mobile state persistence ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!router.isReady || mountedRef.current) return;
    mountedRef.current = true;
    try {
      const stored = window.localStorage.getItem(mobileStateKey);
      if (stored) {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(stored);
        if (parsed.mobilePanel) setMobilePanel(parsed.mobilePanel);
        if (parsed.selectedContact) setSelectedContact(parsed.selectedContact);
        if (parsed.searchLog !== undefined) setSearchLog(parsed.searchLog);
        if (parsed.showUnrepliedSmsOnly !== undefined) setShowUnrepliedSmsOnly(parsed.showUnrepliedSmsOnly);
      }
    } catch {}
  }, [router.isReady, mobileStateKey]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!mountedRef.current) return;
    try {
      window.localStorage.setItem(mobileStateKey, JSON.stringify({
        mobilePanel,
        selectedContact,
        searchLog,
        showUnrepliedSmsOnly,
      }));
    } catch {}
  }, [mobilePanel, selectedContact, searchLog, showUnrepliedSmsOnly, mobileStateKey]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!router.isReady) return;
    const queryPhoneRaw = router.query.phone || router.query.number;
    const queryPhone = Array.isArray(queryPhoneRaw) ? queryPhoneRaw[0] : queryPhoneRaw;
    const queryTab = Array.isArray(router.query.tab) ? router.query.tab[0] : router.query.tab;
    const queryCallId = Array.isArray(router.query.callId) ? router.query.callId[0] : router.query.callId;

    if (queryPhone) {
      setSelectedContact(queryPhone);
      setActiveTab('log');
      setMobilePanel('workspace');
      if (queryTab === 'sms') {
        setSearchLog('');
      }
      return;
    }

    if (!queryCallId) return;

    const resolveCallerPhone = async () => {
      try {
        const response = await fetchWithAuth(
          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/logs?callId=${encodeURIComponent(queryCallId)}`
        );
        const data = await response.json();
        const log = (data.callLogs || [])[0];
        if (log && (log.from || log.to)) {
          const phone = log.from || log.to;
          setSelectedContact(phone);
          setActiveTab('log');
          setMobilePanel('workspace');
        }
      } catch {}
    };
    resolveCallerPhone();
  }, [router.isReady, router.query.phone, router.query.number, router.query.tab, router.query.callId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = () => setMobilePanel('list');
    window.addEventListener('toggleSidebar', handler);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('toggleSidebar', handler);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchOrgDetails = async () => {
      try {
        if (user?.organizationId) {
          const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/organization/${user.organizationId}`);
          const data = await response.json();
          if (response.ok && data.organization) setOrgPhoneNumber(data.organization.phoneNumber || '');
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(error);
      }
    };
    fetchOrgDetails();
  }, [user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab === 'log') fetchConversations();
  }, [activeTab, searchLog, currentLogPage, orgPhoneNumber, contactsMapping, showUnrepliedSmsOnly, pinnedPhones]);

  // ── actions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const handleSelectContact = (phone) => {
    setSelectedContact(phone);
    setMobilePanel('workspace');
  };

  const handleQuickCall = useCallback((phone) => {
    if (!phone) return;
    try {
      CallsService.makeCall(phone, orgPhoneNumber);
      toast.info(`Calling ${formatDisplayPhone(phone)}…`);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to place call');
    }
  }, [orgPhoneNumber]);

  const handleTogglePinned = useCallback((phone) => {
    const normalized = normalizePhone(phone);
    if (!normalized) return;

    setPinnedPhones((prev) => {
      const next = prev.includes(normalized)
        ? prev.filter((entry) => entry !== normalized)
        : [normalized, ...prev];

      try {
        window.localStorage.setItem(pinnedStorageKey, JSON.stringify(next));
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to save pinned calls conversation:', error);
      }

      return next;
    });
  }, [pinnedStorageKey]);

  const handleDeleteSmsConversation = useCallback(async (thread) => {
    if (!thread?.phone || deletingConversationPhone) return;

    const label = thread.contactName && thread.contactName !== thread.displayPhone
      ? `${thread.contactName} (${thread.displayPhone})`
      : thread.displayPhone || formatDisplayPhone(thread.phone);

    const confirmed = window.confirm(`Delete all SMS messages in the conversation with ${label}? Call history will stay.`);
    if (!confirmed) return;

    const normalized = normalizePhone(thread.phone);
    setDeletingConversationPhone(normalized);

    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/calls/message/conversation?phone=${encodeURIComponent(thread.phone)}`,
        { method: 'DELETE' }
      );
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to delete SMS conversation');

      setConversations((prev) => prev.filter((entry) => !phonesMatch(entry.phone, thread.phone)));
      if (selectedContact && phonesMatch(selectedContact, thread.phone)) {
        setSelectedContact(null);
        setMobilePanel('list');
      }
      toast.success(data.deletedCount > 0 ? 'SMS conversation deleted' : 'No SMS messages found to delete');
      fetchConversations();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete SMS conversation');
    } finally {
      setDeletingConversationPhone('');
    }
  }, [deletingConversationPhone, selectedContact]);

  const handleSmsImported = useCallback(() => {
    fetchConversations();
  }, []);

  const handleNewCallDial = () => {
    if (!newCallNumber.trim()) { toast.error('Enter a phone number'); return; }
    handleQuickCall(newCallNumber.trim());
    setNewCallNumber('');
    setShowNewCall(false);
    setShowDialPad(false);
  };

  const handleNewCallOpenThread = () => {
    if (!newCallNumber.trim()) { toast.error('Enter a phone number'); return; }
    handleSelectContact(newCallNumber.trim());
    setNewCallNumber('');
    setShowNewCall(false);
    setShowDialPad(false);
  };

  const getContactName = useCallback((phone) => {
    if (!phone) return '';
    const normalized = normalizePhone(phone);
    if (contactsMapping[normalized]) return contactsMapping[normalized];
    const thread = conversations.find((c) => phonesMatch(c.phone, phone));
    if (thread?.contactName && thread.contactName !== thread.displayPhone) return thread.contactName;
    return '';
  }, [conversations, contactsMapping]);

  // ── derived data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const counts = useMemo(
    () =>
      conversations.reduce(
        (acc, c) => ({ callCount: acc.callCount + (c.callCount || 0), messageCount: acc.messageCount + (c.messageCount || 0) }),
        { callCount: 0, messageCount: 0 }
      ),
    [conversations]
  );

  const pinnedPhoneSet = useMemo(() => new Set(pinnedPhones), [pinnedPhones]);

  const decoratedConversations = useMemo(
    () =>
      conversations
        .map((thread) => ({
          ...thread,
          isPinned: pinnedPhoneSet.has(thread.normalizedPhone || normalizePhone(thread.phone)),
        }))
        .sort((a, b) => {
          if (a.isPinned !== b.isPinned) return a.isPinned ? -1 : 1;
          return getTimestampValue(b.timestamp) - getTimestampValue(a.timestamp);
        }),
    [conversations, pinnedPhoneSet]
  );

  const conversationSections = useMemo(() => buildConversationSections(decoratedConversations), [decoratedConversations]);

  // ── conversation list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const renderLogList = () => (
    <>
      {/* Search + New call button row */}
      <div className="shrink-0 border-b border-base-300 px-2 py-1">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <label className="input input-bordered input-sm flex h-9 flex-1 items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-base-100">
            <Search className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0 text-base-content/45" />
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Search…"
              value={searchLog}
              onChange={(e) => { setSearchLog(e.target.value); setCurrentLogPage(1); }}
              className="min-w-0 grow"
            />
          </label>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => { setShowUnrepliedSmsOnly((v) => !v); setCurrentLogPage(1); }}
            className={`btn btn-sm btn-square h-9 min-h-9 shrink-0 ${showUnrepliedSmsOnly ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-outline'}`}
            title="Show only unreplied SMS"
          >
            <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => { setShowNewCall((v) => !v); setShowDialPad(false); }}
            className={`btn btn-sm btn-square hidden h-9 min-h-9 shrink-0 xl:inline-flex ${showNewCall ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-outline'}`}
            title="New call"
          >
            <Phone className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Expanded new call panel */}
      {showNewCall ? (
        <div className="shrink-0 space-y-2 border-b border-base-300 bg-base-200/40 px-2 py-2">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <input
              type="text"
              autoFocus
              value={newCallNumber}
              onChange={(e) => setNewCallNumber(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleNewCallDial(); }}
              placeholder="Phone number…"
              className="input input-bordered input-sm min-w-0 flex-1 rounded-xl bg-base-100"
            />
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setShowDialPad((v) => !v)}
              className={`btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square shrink-0 ${showDialPad ? 'bg-base-300' : ''}`}
              title="Dial pad"
            >
              <Grid3x3 className="h-4 w-4" />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleNewCallDial}
              className="btn btn-success btn-sm flex-1 gap-1.5"
            >
              <Phone className="h-4 w-4" />
              Call now
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleNewCallOpenThread}
              className="btn btn-primary btn-sm flex-1 gap-1.5"
            >
              <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
              Open thread
            </button>
          </div>
          {showDialPad ? (
            <NumberPad destination={newCallNumber} setDestination={setNewCallNumber} />
          ) : null}
        </div>
      ) : null}

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {decoratedConversations.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="px-4 py-10 text-center text-sm text-base-content/50">No conversations found.</div>
        ) : (
          <div>
            {conversationSections.map((section) => (
              <div key={section.label}>
                <div className="px-4 py-2 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-base-content/40">
                  {section.label}
                </div>
                {section.items.map((thread) => {
                  const isSelected = selectedContact && phonesMatch(selectedContact, thread.phone);
                  const preview = getThreadPreview(thread);

                  return (
                    <div
                      key={thread.id}
                      role="button"
                      tabIndex={0}
                      onClick={() => handleSelectContact(thread.phone)}
                      onKeyDown={(event) => {
                        if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
                          event.preventDefault();
                          handleSelectContact(thread.phone);
                        }
                      }}
                      className={`group w-full px-3 py-2 text-left transition-colors ${
                        isSelected 
                          ? 'border-l-2 border-primary bg-primary/5 hover:bg-primary/10' 
                          : thread.hasUnrepliedSms
                            ? 'border-l-2 border-error bg-error/5 hover:bg-error/10'
                            : 'border-l-2 border-transparent hover:bg-base-200/60'
                      }`}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                        {/* Avatar initial */}
                        <div className={`mt-0.5 flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-sm font-bold ${
                          thread.hasUnrepliedSms 
                            ? 'bg-error/20 text-error ring-2 ring-error/30' 
                            : 'bg-base-200 text-base-content/60'
                        }`}>
                          {(thread.contactName || '?').charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                        </div>

                        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                            <div className="min-w-0">
                              <div className={`truncate text-sm text-base-content ${
                                thread.hasUnrepliedSms ? 'font-bold' : 'font-semibold'
                              }`}>
                                {thread.contactName}
                              </div>
                              {thread.contactName !== thread.displayPhone ? (
                                <div className="text-xs text-base-content/50">{thread.displayPhone}</div>
                              ) : null}
                            </div>
                            <div className="shrink-0 text-[11px] text-base-content/40">
                              {formatThreadTimestamp(thread.timestamp)}
                            </div>
                          </div>

                          <div className="mt-1 flex items-center gap-1.5">
                            {thread.lastActivityType === 'call'
                              ? <Phone className="h-3 w-3 shrink-0 text-base-content/35" />
                              : <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 shrink-0 text-base-content/35" />
                            }
                            <div className={`line-clamp-1 text-xs ${
                              thread.hasUnrepliedSms ? 'font-medium text-base-content/85' : 'text-base-content/55'
                            }`}>{preview}</div>
                          </div>

                          <div className="mt-1.5 flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                              {thread.callCount > 0 ? (
                                <span className="rounded-full bg-warning/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-warning/80">
                                  {thread.callCount} call{thread.callCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
                                </span>
                              ) : null}
                              {thread.messageCount > 0 ? (
                                <span className="rounded-full bg-info/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-info/80">
                                  {thread.messageCount} SMS
                                </span>
                              ) : null}
                              {thread.hasUnrepliedSms ? (
                                <span className="rounded-full bg-error/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-error/80">
                                  Unreplied
                                </span>
                              ) : null}
                              {thread.isPinned ? (
                                <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-primary/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-primary/80">
                                  <Pin className="h-2.5 w-2.5 fill-current" />
                                  Pinned
                                </span>
                              ) : null}
                            </div>
                            {/* Quick actions: desktop hover, mobile kebab */}
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                              {/* Desktop hover actions */}
                              <div className="hidden items-center gap-1 transition-opacity sm:flex group-hover:opacity-100 focus-within:opacity-100 opacity-0">
                                <button
                                  type="button"
                                  title={thread.isPinned ? 'Unpin conversation' : 'Pin conversation'}
                                  onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleTogglePinned(thread.phone); }}
                                  className={`btn btn-xs rounded-full ${thread.isPinned ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-ghost'}`}
                                >
                                  {thread.isPinned ? <PinOff className="h-3 w-3" /> : <Pin className="h-3 w-3" />}
                                </button>
                                <button
                                  type="button"
                                  title="Call"
                                  onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleQuickCall(thread.phone); }}
                                  className="btn btn-success btn-xs rounded-full"
                                >
                                  <Phone className="h-3 w-3" />
                                </button>
                                {thread.messageCount > 0 ? (
                                  <button
                                    type="button"
                                    title="Delete SMS conversation"
                                    onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDeleteSmsConversation(thread); }}
                                    disabled={deletingConversationPhone === (thread.normalizedPhone || normalizePhone(thread.phone))}
                                    className="btn btn-error btn-xs rounded-full"
                                  >
                                    {deletingConversationPhone === (thread.normalizedPhone || normalizePhone(thread.phone)) ? (
                                      <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" />
                                    ) : (
                                      <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3" />
                                    )}
                                  </button>
                                ) : null}
                                <button
                                  type="button"
                                  title="Open thread"
                                  onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleSelectContact(thread.phone); }}
                                  className="btn btn-primary btn-xs rounded-full"
                                >
                                  <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3" />
                                </button>
                              </div>
                              {/* Mobile kebab menu */}
                              <button
                                type="button"
                                onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setActionSheetThread(thread); }}
                                className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs btn-square sm:hidden"
                                aria-label="More actions"
                              >
                                <MoreVertical className="h-4 w-4" />
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Pagination */}
      <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-t border-base-300 px-3 py-2">
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => currentLogPage > 1 && setCurrentLogPage(currentLogPage - 1)}
          disabled={currentLogPage === 1}
          className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
        >
          Prev
        </button>
        <span className="text-xs text-base-content/50">{currentLogPage}/{totalLogPages}</span>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => currentLogPage < totalLogPages && setCurrentLogPage(currentLogPage + 1)}
          disabled={currentLogPage === totalLogPages}
          className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
        >
          Next
        </button>
      </div>
    </>
  );

  // ── render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  return (
    <div className="flex h-[calc(100vh-64px)] flex-col bg-base-100">
      {/* ── compact header ── */}
      <header className="hidden shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-b border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-4 py-2 xl:flex">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
          <span className="truncate text-base font-bold text-base-content">
            Calls
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs text-base-content/45">
            {conversations.length} thread{conversations.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} · {counts.callCount} calls · {counts.messageCount} SMS
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          {isWorksmrtNative() ? (
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setShowTransferModal(true)}
              className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square"
              title="Transfer SMS from phone"
            >
              <Smartphone className="h-4 w-4" />
            </button>
          ) : null}
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setShowSettingsModal(true)}
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square"
            title="Call settings"
          >
            <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* ── 3-column body ── */}
      <div className="flex min-h-0 flex-1 overflow-hidden">

        {/* Left: inbox */}
          <aside
          className={`${
            mobilePanel !== 'list' ? 'hidden xl:flex' : 'flex'
          } w-full flex-col border-r border-base-300 bg-base-100 xl:w-[300px] 2xl:w-[340px] xl:shrink-0`}
        >
          {/* Tab toggle */}
          <div className="flex shrink-0 gap-1 border-b border-base-300 px-2 py-1 xl:p-1.5">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('log')}
              className={`flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-lg py-1 text-sm font-medium transition xl:rounded-xl xl:py-1.5 ${
                activeTab === 'log' ? 'bg-primary text-primary-content' : 'text-base-content/60 hover:bg-base-200'
              }`}
            >
              <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Inbox
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('contacts')}
              className={`flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-lg py-1 text-sm font-medium transition xl:rounded-xl xl:py-1.5 ${
                activeTab === 'contacts' ? 'bg-primary text-primary-content' : 'text-base-content/60 hover:bg-base-200'
              }`}
            >
              <Users className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Contacts
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setShowSettingsModal(true)}
              className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square h-8 min-h-8 shrink-0 xl:hidden"
              title="Call settings"
              aria-label="Call settings"
            >
              <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
            </button>
          </div>

          {activeTab === 'log' ? (
            renderLogList()
          ) : (
            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
              <ContactsList onSelectContact={handleSelectContact} />
            </div>
          )}
        </aside>

        {/* Middle: thread */}
        <main
          className={`${
            mobilePanel !== 'workspace' ? 'hidden xl:flex' : 'flex'
          } min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col overflow-hidden`}
        >
          {selectedContact ? (
            <ConversationView
              phone={selectedContact}
              orgPhoneNumber={orgPhoneNumber}
              contactName={getContactName(selectedContact)}
              onCall={handleQuickCall}
              onOpenDetails={() => setShowDetailsSheet(true)}
            />
          ) : (
            <div className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center px-8 text-center">
              <div>
                <div className="mb-3 flex justify-center">
                  <div className="rounded-full bg-base-200 p-5">
                    <Phone className="h-8 w-8 text-base-content/30" />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-base font-semibold text-base-content/60">No conversation selected</div>
                <div className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/40">Pick a thread from the inbox to get started</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </main>

        {/* Right: details (desktop only) */}
        <aside className="hidden w-[240px] shrink-0 flex-col border-l border-base-300 bg-base-100 xl:flex">
          {selectedContact ? (
            <CallDetailsPanel
              phone={selectedContact}
              orgPhoneNumber={orgPhoneNumber}
              contactName={getContactName(selectedContact)}
              onCall={handleQuickCall}
            />
          ) : (
            <div className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center p-6 text-center text-sm text-base-content/40">
              Select a conversation to see details
            </div>
          )}
        </aside>
      </div>

      {/* ── mobile FAB: new call ── */}
      <div className={mobilePanel === 'list' ? 'xl:hidden' : 'hidden'}>
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => setShowNewCallSheet(true)}
          className="btn btn-primary fixed bottom-[calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px)+1.5rem)] right-6 z-30 h-14 w-14 rounded-full shadow-lg shadow-primary/30"
          aria-label="New call"
        >
          <Phone className="h-5 w-5" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* ── modals & sheets ── */}
      {showSettingsModal ? <PhoneSettingsModal onClose={() => setShowSettingsModal(false)} /> : null}
      {showTransferModal ? (
        <TransferSmsModal
          onClose={() => setShowTransferModal(false)}
          orgPhoneNumber={orgPhoneNumber}
          onImported={handleSmsImported}
        />
      ) : null}

      {/* Mobile details bottom sheet */}
      <BottomSheet
        open={showDetailsSheet}
        onClose={() => setShowDetailsSheet(false)}
        title="Contact details"
      >
        {selectedContact ? (
          <CallDetailsPanel
            phone={selectedContact}
            orgPhoneNumber={orgPhoneNumber}
            contactName={getContactName(selectedContact)}
            onCall={handleQuickCall}
          />
        ) : null}
      </BottomSheet>

      {/* Mobile action sheet for inbox rows */}
      <MobileActionSheet
        open={!!actionSheetThread}
        thread={actionSheetThread}
        onClose={() => setActionSheetThread(null)}
        onCall={handleQuickCall}
        onPin={handleTogglePinned}
        onDelete={handleDeleteSmsConversation}
        onOpenThread={handleSelectContact}
      />

      {/* Mobile new-call bottom sheet */}
      <MobileNewCallSheet
        open={showNewCallSheet}
        onClose={() => setShowNewCallSheet(false)}
        onCall={handleQuickCall}
        onOpenThread={handleSelectContact}
        orgPhoneNumber={orgPhoneNumber}
      />
    </div>
  );
};

export default IntegratedDashboard;

// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/PlivoClient.js
// PlivoClient.js
let plivoBrowserSdk = null;

export async function getPlivoClientInstance() {
  if (typeof window === 'undefined' || !navigator.mediaDevices || !navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices) {
    console.error("MediaDevices API not available");
    return null;
  }



  if (!plivoBrowserSdk) {
    const { default: PlivoSDK } = await import('plivo-browser-sdk');
    const options = {
      debug: 'DEBUG',
      permOnClick: true,
      enableQualityTracking: 'all',
      closeProtection: false,
      maxAverageBitrate: 48000,
    };
    plivoBrowserSdk = new PlivoSDK(options);
  }

  return plivoBrowserSdk.client;
}

```

FILE: client/services/calls/tests/CallsService.test.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/services/calls/tests/CallsService.test.js
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import CallsService from '../CallsService';

describe('CallsService incoming calls', () => {
  afterEach(() => {
    CallsService.plivoClient = null;
  });

  it('passes a supported action when answering with the Plivo Browser SDK', () => {
    const answer = vi.fn(() => true);
    CallsService.plivoClient = { answer };

    expect(CallsService.answerIncomingCall('sip-call-uuid')).toBe(true);
    expect(answer).toHaveBeenCalledWith('sip-call-uuid', 'reject');
  });

  it('recovers an incoming SIP UUID from the active invitation list', () => {
    const answer = vi.fn(() => true);
    CallsService.plivoClient = {
      answer,
      getIncomingCalls: vi.fn(() => [{ callUUID: 'recovered-uuid', src: '14165550111@phone.plivo.com' }]),
    };

    expect(CallsService.answerIncomingCall('', '+14165550111')).toBe(true);
    expect(answer).toHaveBeenCalledWith('recovered-uuid', 'reject');
  });

  it('reports when Plivo cannot answer the selected incoming call', () => {
    CallsService.plivoClient = { answer: vi.fn(() => false) };
    expect(() => CallsService.answerIncomingCall('missing-call')).toThrow(
      'Plivo could not answer the incoming call.'
    );
  });
});

import React, { createContext, useState } from 'react';

export const IncomingCallContext = createContext();

export const IncomingCallProvider = ({ children }) => {
  const [incomingCall, setIncomingCall] = useState(null);

  return (
    <IncomingCallContext.Provider value={{ incomingCall, setIncomingCall }}>
      {children}
    </IncomingCallContext.Provider>
  );
};

// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/shared/context/SmsContext.jsx
// src/shared/context/SmsContext.js
import React, { createContext, useState } from 'react';

export const SmsContext = createContext();

export const SmsProvider = ({ children }) => {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
  const addSms = (sms) => {
    setMessages((prev) => [sms, ...prev]);
  };
  return (
    <SmsContext.Provider value={{ messages, setMessages,addSms  }}>
      {children}
    </SmsContext.Provider>
  );
};

```

FILE: client/shared/hooks/useIncomingCall.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/shared/hooks/useIncomingCall.jsx
// client/shared/hooks/useIncomingCall.js
import { useEffect, useContext } from 'react';
import { IncomingCallContext } from '@/shared/context/IncomingCallContext';
import CallsService from '@/services/calls/CallsService';

const useIncomingCall = () => {
  const { setIncomingCall } = useContext(IncomingCallContext);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleIncomingCall = (incomingCallData) => {
      // incomingCallData is an object: { callerID, callUUID }
      setIncomingCall(incomingCallData);
    };

    CallsService.on('onIncomingCall', handleIncomingCall);

    return () => {
      CallsService.off('onIncomingCall', handleIncomingCall);
    };
  }, [setIncomingCall]);

  return;
};

export default useIncomingCall;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/shared/hooks/useIncomingSms.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/client/shared/hooks/useIncomingSms.jsx
//--- File: client/shared/hooks/useIncomingSms.js ---

import { useEffect, useContext } from 'react';
import { SmsContext } from '@/shared/context/SmsContext';

const useIncomingSms = () => {
  const { addSms } = useContext(SmsContext);

  useEffect(() => {
    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
      const messageHandler = (event) => {
        if (event.data.type === 'SMS_RECEIVED') {
          addSms({
            from: event.data.from,
            text: event.data.text,
            id: event.data.messageId,
            direction: 'inbound',
            createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          });
        }
      };

      navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('message', messageHandler);

      // Cleanup the event listener on component unmount
      return () => {
        navigator.serviceWorker.removeEventListener('message', messageHandler);
      };
    }
  }, [addSms]);
};

export default useIncomingSms;

```
