FILE: server/src/routes/api/calls/audioStreamSockets.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/audioStreamSockets.js
// server/src/routes/api/calls/audioStreamSockets.js
// Reconstructed full file based on the uploaded snippets. The key fixes are:
// 1) prevent automatic human transfer while the AI is still collecting normal table-reservation details
// 2) expose live receptionist-control actions from the dashboard so the modal can interrupt AI playback
// 3) keep emitting live transcript / assistant events for the incoming-call modal

import { WebSocketServer, WebSocket } from 'ws';
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { spawn } from 'child_process';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import callLLMService from '#services/calls/LLMService.js';
import ExperimentalReceptionistSession from '#services/calls/ExperimentalReceptionistSession.js';
import ExperimentalReceptionistService from '#services/calls/ExperimentalReceptionistService.js';
import elevenLabsTTSService from '#services/calls/ElevenLabsTTSService.js';
import callService from '#services/calls/services/CallService.js';
import { getNamespace } from '#shared/socket.js';

const LEGACY_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'legacy';
const EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'experimental_ai';
const DEFAULT_RECEPTIONIST_MAX_TOKENS = 8096;
const PHONE_PLAYBACK_CONTENT_TYPE = 'audio/x-mulaw';
const PHONE_PLAYBACK_SAMPLE_RATE = 8000;
const AI_THINK_INTERVAL_MS = 5000;
const AI_THINK_AUDIO_PATH = path.resolve(
  path.dirname(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname),
  '../../../services/calls/aithink.mp3'
);

let aiThinkMulawBase64 = null;

const DEFAULT_STT_PROVIDER = (
  process.env.RECEPTIONIST_STT_PROVIDER ||
  process.env.CALL_RECEPTIONIST_STT_PROVIDER ||
  (process.env.ASSEMBLYAI_KEY ? 'assemblyai' : 'vosk')
);

const RECEPTIONIST_DETAIL_COLLECTION_RE =
  /(what\s+name\s+should\s+we\s+book\s+it\s+under|how\s+many\s+people|party\s+size|what\s+name\s+should\s+i\s+put\s+it\s+under|what\s+name\s+is\s+the\s+reservation\s+under|can\s+i\s+get\s+your\s+name|can\s+i\s+have\s+your\s+name|phone\s+number|email\s+address)/i;

const activeReceptionistControllers = globalThis.__activeReceptionistControllers || new Map();
globalThis.__activeReceptionistControllers = activeReceptionistControllers;
const activeReceptionistCallSnapshots = globalThis.__activeReceptionistCallSnapshots || new Map();
globalThis.__activeReceptionistCallSnapshots = activeReceptionistCallSnapshots;

function logSocket(scope, message, payload = {}) {
  console.log(`[${scope}] ${message}`, payload);
}

function normalizeTranscriptText(value = '') {
  return String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
}

export function getActiveReceptionistCallSnapshots({ organizationId } = {}) {
  return [...activeReceptionistCallSnapshots.values()]
    .filter((snapshot) => !organizationId || snapshot.organizationId === organizationId)
    .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.updatedAt || b.startedAt || 0) - new Date(a.updatedAt || a.startedAt || 0));
}

function isExperimentalReceptionistEnabled(mode = '') {
  return String(mode || '').trim().toLowerCase() === EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
}

function parseExtraHeaders(requestUrl = '') {
  const qsPart = String(requestUrl || '').split('?')[1] || '';
  const qs = new URLSearchParams(qsPart);
  const extras = decodeURIComponent(qs.get('extra_headers') || '');

  return Object.fromEntries(
    extras
      .split(';')
      .map((part) => part.trim())
      .filter(Boolean)
      .map((part) => {
        const [key, ...rest] = part.split(':');
        return [key.trim(), rest.join(':').trim()];
      })
  );
}

function sendPlivoPlaybackAudio(ws, playbackAudio) {
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN || !playbackAudio?.base64) {
    return false;
  }

  ws.send(
    JSON.stringify({
      event: 'playAudio',
      media: {
        payload: playbackAudio.base64,
        contentType: PHONE_PLAYBACK_CONTENT_TYPE,
        sampleRate: PHONE_PLAYBACK_SAMPLE_RATE,
      },
    })
  );

  return true;
}

function sendPlivoCheckpoint(ws, streamId, name) {
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN || !streamId || !name) {
    return false;
  }

  ws.send(
    JSON.stringify({
      event: 'checkpoint',
      streamId,
      name,
    })
  );

  return true;
}

function sendPlivoClearAudio(ws, streamId) {
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN || !streamId) {
    return false;
  }

  ws.send(
    JSON.stringify({
      event: 'clearAudio',
      streamId,
    })
  );

  return true;
}

function createRawMulawRecorder(outputFile) {
  return spawn('ffmpeg', [
    '-hide_banner',
    '-loglevel', 'error',
    '-f', 'mulaw',
    '-ar', String(PHONE_PLAYBACK_SAMPLE_RATE),
    '-ac', '1',
    '-i', 'pipe:0',
    '-y',
    outputFile,
  ]);
}

function createRealtimeDecoder(onDecodedChunk) {
  const decoder = spawn('ffmpeg', [
    '-hide_banner',
    '-loglevel', 'error',
    '-f', 'mulaw',
    '-ar', String(PHONE_PLAYBACK_SAMPLE_RATE),
    '-ac', '1',
    '-i', 'pipe:0',
    '-f', 's16le',
    '-ar', '16000',
    '-ac', '1',
    'pipe:1',
  ]);

  decoder.stdout.on('data', (chunk) => {
    if (typeof onDecodedChunk === 'function') {
      onDecodedChunk(chunk);
    }
  });

  return decoder;
}

function deleteFileIfExists(filePath) {
  if (!filePath) return;

  try {
    if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
      fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
    }
  } catch (error) {
    logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Failed to delete file', {
      filePath,
      error: error?.message || String(error),
    });
  }
}

function hasMeaningfulCallerSpeech({ transcript = '', conversation = [] } = {}) {
  if (normalizeTranscriptText(transcript)) {
    return true;
  }

  return Array.isArray(conversation) && conversation.some((entry) => (
    entry?.role === 'caller' && normalizeTranscriptText(entry?.text)
  ));
}

function transcodeBufferToPhonePlayback(inputBuffer) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const ffmpeg = spawn('ffmpeg', [
      '-hide_banner',
      '-loglevel', 'error',
      '-i', 'pipe:0',
      '-f', 'mulaw',
      '-ar', String(PHONE_PLAYBACK_SAMPLE_RATE),
      '-ac', '1',
      'pipe:1',
    ]);

    const stdout = [];
    const stderr = [];

    ffmpeg.stdout.on('data', (chunk) => stdout.push(chunk));
    ffmpeg.stderr.on('data', (chunk) => stderr.push(chunk));
    ffmpeg.on('error', reject);
    ffmpeg.on('close', (code) => {
      if (code !== 0) {
        reject(new Error(Buffer.concat(stderr).toString('utf8') || `ffmpeg exited with code ${code}`));
        return;
      }

      resolve(Buffer.concat(stdout));
    });

    ffmpeg.stdin.on('error', () => {});
    ffmpeg.stdin.end(inputBuffer);
  });
}

// Transcode aithink.mp3 to mulaw once at startup so we don't do it per-call
try {
  transcodeBufferToPhonePlayback(fs.readFileSync(AI_THINK_AUDIO_PATH))
    .then((buf) => { aiThinkMulawBase64 = buf.toString('base64'); })
    .catch((err) => { console.error('[AudioSocket] Failed to transcode aithink.mp3:', err.message); });
} catch (err) {
  console.error('[AudioSocket] aithink.mp3 not found, AI thinking audio will be silent:', err.message);
}

async function synthesizePhonePlaybackAudio(text = '', metadata = {}) {
  const cleanText = String(text || '').trim();
  if (!cleanText) {
    return null;
  }

  const result = await elevenLabsTTSService.synthesize(cleanText, {
    metadata: {
      source: metadata?.source || 'experimental_receptionist',
      callId: metadata?.callId || '',
    },
  });

  const rawMulaw = await transcodeBufferToPhonePlayback(result.audioBuffer);
  return {
    base64: rawMulaw.toString('base64'),
    durationMs: result.durationMs || 0,
    latencyMs: result.latencyMs || 0,
    requestId: result.requestId || '',
  };
}

function shouldTreatAsReservationDetailCollection(payload = {}) {
  const intent = String(payload?.intent || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  if (intent !== 'table_reservation') {
    return false;
  }

  if (payload?.action === 'reservation_pending_details') {
    return true;
  }

  const replyText = normalizeTranscriptText(payload?.replyText || '');
  if (RECEPTIONIST_DETAIL_COLLECTION_RE.test(replyText)) {
    return true;
  }

  const extracted = payload?.extracted || {};
  const callerName = normalizeTranscriptText(extracted?.callerName || '');
  const partySize = normalizeTranscriptText(extracted?.partySize || extracted?.requestedPartySize || '');
  const callerPhone = normalizeTranscriptText(extracted?.callerPhone || '');
  const callerEmail = normalizeTranscriptText(extracted?.callerEmail || '');

  return !callerName || !partySize || (!callerPhone && !callerEmail);
}

function shouldAutoTransferToHuman(payload = {}) {
  const action = String(payload?.action || '').trim();
  if (action !== 'escalate_to_human') {
    return false;
  }

  const intent = String(payload?.intent || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  const bookingCategory = String(payload?.bookingCategory || payload?.meta?.bookingCategory || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  const requestType = String(payload?.meta?.requestType || payload?.requestType || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  const callbackRequested = Boolean(payload?.extracted?.callbackRequested);
  const explicitlyAskedForHuman = intent === 'speak_to_human';

  if (explicitlyAskedForHuman) {
    return true;
  }

  if (bookingCategory === 'private_event') {
    return true;
  }

  if (shouldTreatAsReservationDetailCollection(payload)) {
    return false;
  }

  if (intent === 'table_reservation' && requestType !== 'business_information' && !callbackRequested) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

function registerReceptionistControlHandlers(io) {
  if (io.__receptionistControlHandlersRegistered) {
    return;
  }

  io.__receptionistControlHandlersRegistered = true;

  io.on('connection', (socket) => {
    socket.on('callReceptionistControl', async (payload = {}) => {
      const callId = String(payload?.callId || '').trim();
      const callUUID = String(payload?.callUUID || '').trim();
      const action = String(payload?.action || '').trim();

      if (!callId || !action) {
        return;
      }

      const controller = activeReceptionistControllers.get(callId);
      if (!controller) {
        return;
      }

      try {
        await controller({ action, callId, callUUID, socket, payload });
      } catch (error) {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Failed to run receptionist control action', {
          callId,
          callUUID,
          action,
          error: error?.message || String(error),
        });
      }
    });
  });
}

async function getAudioDuration() {
  return 0;
}

export default function setupAudioStreamSockets(httpServer) {
  const io = getNamespace('/calls');
  registerReceptionistControlHandlers(io);

  const wss = new WebSocketServer({ noServer: true });
  const testWss = new WebSocketServer({ noServer: true });

  httpServer.on('upgrade', (request, socket, head) => {
    const url = String(request.url || '');

    if (url.startsWith('/receptionist-test')) {
      testWss.handleUpgrade(request, socket, head, (ws) => {
        testWss.emit('connection', ws, request);
      });
      return;
    }

    if (!url.startsWith('/recording')) {
      return;
    }

    wss.handleUpgrade(request, socket, head, (ws) => {
      wss.emit('connection', ws, request);
    });
  });

  wss.on('connection', async (ws, request) => {
    const extras = parseExtraHeaders(request.url || '');
    const callId = extras.callId || '';
    const callUUID = extras.callUUID || extras.uuid || '';
    const organizationId = extras.orgId || '';
    const incomingPhone = extras.phone || '';
    const receptionistMode = extras.mode || LEGACY_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
    const sttProvider = extras.sttProvider || DEFAULT_STT_PROVIDER;
    const speechProvider = extras.speechProvider || 'default';
    const moshiVoice = extras.moshiVoice || '';
    const maxTokens = Number(extras.maxTokens || DEFAULT_RECEPTIONIST_MAX_TOKENS);
    const experimentalMode = isExperimentalReceptionistEnabled(receptionistMode);

    const outputDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'uploads', organizationId || 'unknown', 'calls');
    fs.mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true });
    const outputFile = path.join(outputDir, `${callId || Date.now()}.wav`);

    let receptionistSession = null;
    let accumulatedTranscript = '';
    let finalized = false;
    let currentStreamId = '';
    let assistantAudioQueued = false;
    let playbackSequence = 0;
    let latestCheckpointName = '';
    let humanTransferRequested = false;
    let humanTransferStarted = false;
    let humanTransferStarting = false;
    let humanTransferFallbackTimer = null;
    let humanTransferPendingPayload = null;
    let humanTransferNotificationSent = false;
    let lastExperimentalPayload = null;
    let aiThinkInterval = null;

    logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Phone stream mode selected', {
      callId,
      mode: receptionistMode,
      sttProvider,
      speechProvider,
      moshiVoice,
      maxTokens,
    });

    const recorder = createRawMulawRecorder(outputFile);
    const decoder = createRealtimeDecoder((chunk) => {
      if (!receptionistSession) {
        return;
      }

      receptionistSession.pushAudioChunk(chunk).catch((error) => {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Failed to push decoded audio chunk', {
          callId,
          error: error?.message || String(error),
        });
      });
    });

    const interruptAssistantPlayback = (reason = 'caller_interrupt') => {
      if (!assistantAudioQueued || !currentStreamId) {
        return false;
      }

      const sent = sendPlivoClearAudio(ws, currentStreamId);
      logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Interrupting assistant playback', {
        callId,
        reason,
        sent,
        streamId: currentStreamId,
      });

      assistantAudioQueued = false;
      latestCheckpointName = '';
      return sent;
    };

    const clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer = () => {
      if (humanTransferFallbackTimer) {
        clearTimeout(humanTransferFallbackTimer);
        humanTransferFallbackTimer = null;
      }
    };

    const maybeStartHumanTransfer = async (reason = 'assistant_complete') => {
      if (!humanTransferRequested || humanTransferStarted || humanTransferStarting) {
        return false;
      }

      humanTransferStarting = true;
      clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();

      try {
        let handoffNotification = null;
        if (!humanTransferNotificationSent) {
          humanTransferNotificationSent = true;
          handoffNotification = await callService.notifyExperimentalHumanTransferRequested({
            callId,
            callUUID,
            organizationId,
            callerNumber: incomingPhone,
            intent: humanTransferPendingPayload?.intent || 'speak_to_human',
            action: humanTransferPendingPayload?.action || 'escalate_to_human',
            summary: humanTransferPendingPayload?.summary || '',
          }).catch((error) => {
            logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental receptionist human transfer notification failed', {
              callId,
              error: error?.message || String(error),
            });
            return null;
          });
        }

        const transferResult = await callService.transferExperimentalCallToHuman({ callId, callUUID });

        humanTransferStarted = true;
        humanTransferRequested = false;
        assistantAudioQueued = false;
        latestCheckpointName = '';

        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental receptionist human transfer started', {
          callId,
          reason,
          callUUID,
          result: transferResult,
        });

        io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistTransferStarted', {
          callId,
          callUUID,
          action: humanTransferPendingPayload?.action || 'escalate_to_human',
          intent: humanTransferPendingPayload?.intent || 'speak_to_human',
          summary: handoffNotification?.summary || humanTransferPendingPayload?.summary || '',
          callerNumber: incomingPhone,
          reason,
        });

        await prisma.phoneCall.update({
          where: { id: callId },
          data: {
            status: 'transferring-to-human',
            ...(handoffNotification?.summary ? { summary: handoffNotification.summary } : {}),
          },
        }).catch(() => null);

        try {
          if (recorder.stdin.writable) recorder.stdin.end();
        } catch {}

        try {
          if (decoder.stdin.writable) decoder.stdin.end();
        } catch {}

        try {
          ws.close();
        } catch {}

        return true;
      } catch (error) {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental receptionist human transfer failed', {
          callId,
          reason,
          error: error?.message || String(error),
        });

        io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistTransferFailed', {
          callId,
          callUUID,
          action: humanTransferPendingPayload?.action || 'escalate_to_human',
          intent: humanTransferPendingPayload?.intent || 'speak_to_human',
          summary: humanTransferPendingPayload?.summary || '',
          callerNumber: incomingPhone,
          reason,
          error: error?.message || String(error),
        });

        await prisma.phoneCall.update({
          where: { id: callId },
          data: { status: 'transfer-failed' },
        }).catch(() => null);

        return false;
      } finally {
        humanTransferStarting = false;
      }
    };

    const unregisterActiveController = () => {
      if (callId) {
        activeReceptionistControllers.delete(callId);
      }
    };

    if (experimentalMode) {
      receptionistSession = new ExperimentalReceptionistSession({
        sessionId: callId,
        organizationId,
        organizationName: '',
        callerName: '',
        callerPhone: incomingPhone,
        source: 'phone_call',
        sttProvider,
        speechProvider,
        maxTokens,
        speechOptions: { moshiVoice },
        onPartialTranscript: ({ text }) => {
          if (normalizeTranscriptText(text)) {
            interruptAssistantPlayback('partial_transcript');
          }

          io.to(organizationId).emit('callTranscription', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            text,
            isFinal: false,
            source: 'experimental_ai',
            sttProvider: receptionistSession?.sttProvider || sttProvider || '',
          });
        },
        onFinalTranscript: async ({ text, segments }) => {
          if (normalizeTranscriptText(text)) {
            interruptAssistantPlayback('final_transcript');
          }

          accumulatedTranscript += `${text}\n`;

          io.to(organizationId).emit('callTranscription', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            text: accumulatedTranscript,
            isFinal: true,
            segments,
            source: 'experimental_ai',
            sttProvider: receptionistSession?.sttProvider || sttProvider || '',
          });

          await prisma.phoneCall.update({
            where: { id: callId },
            data: { transcription: accumulatedTranscript },
          }).catch(() => null);
        },
        onProcessingStarted: ({ turn, reason, timings }) => {
          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental receptionist processing started', {
            callId,
            turn,
            reason,
            timings,
          });

          if (aiThinkMulawBase64) {
            const sendThinkAudio = () => {
              if (aiThinkMulawBase64) {
                sendPlivoPlaybackAudio(ws, { base64: aiThinkMulawBase64 });
              }
            };
            sendThinkAudio();
            aiThinkInterval = setInterval(sendThinkAudio, AI_THINK_INTERVAL_MS);
          }
        },
        onAssistantResponse: async (payload) => {
          if (aiThinkInterval) {
            clearInterval(aiThinkInterval);
            aiThinkInterval = null;
          }
          lastExperimentalPayload = payload;

          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental receptionist response ready', {
            callId,
            intent: payload.intent,
            action: payload.action,
            timings: payload.timings,
            availability: payload.availability,
            sttProvider: payload.sttProvider,
            maxTokens: payload.maxTokens || maxTokens,
          });

          const autoTransfer = shouldAutoTransferToHuman(payload);
          if (payload.action === 'escalate_to_human' && !autoTransfer) {
            logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Suppressing automatic human transfer during reservation detail collection', {
              callId,
              intent: payload.intent,
              action: payload.action,
              replyText: payload.replyText,
            });
          }

          let playbackAudio = null;
          try {
            playbackAudio = await synthesizePhonePlaybackAudio(payload.replyText, {
              callId,
              source: 'experimental_receptionist',
            });
          } catch (error) {
            logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Failed to synthesize phone playback audio', {
              callId,
              error: error?.message || String(error),
            });
          }

          humanTransferRequested = autoTransfer;
          humanTransferPendingPayload = autoTransfer ? payload : null;

          if (playbackAudio) {
            const sent = sendPlivoPlaybackAudio(ws, playbackAudio);
            if (sent && currentStreamId) {
              assistantAudioQueued = true;
              playbackSequence += 1;
              latestCheckpointName = `assistant-${callId}-${playbackSequence}`;
              sendPlivoCheckpoint(ws, currentStreamId, latestCheckpointName);

              if (autoTransfer) {
                clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();
                humanTransferFallbackTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                  void maybeStartHumanTransfer('tts_duration_fallback');
                }, Math.max(500, (playbackAudio.durationMs || 0) + 350));
              }
            } else if (autoTransfer) {
              await maybeStartHumanTransfer('no_checkpoint_after_tts');
            }
          } else if (autoTransfer) {
            await maybeStartHumanTransfer('no_tts_audio');
          }

          io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistResponse', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            replyText: payload.replyText,
            intent: payload.intent,
            action: autoTransfer ? payload.action : (payload.action === 'escalate_to_human' ? 'reservation_pending_details' : payload.action),
            summary: payload.summary,
            callerNumber: incomingPhone,
            availability: payload.availability || null,
            timings: {
              ...payload.timings,
              ttsMs: playbackAudio?.latencyMs || 0,
            },
            speechProvider: payload.speechProvider || receptionistSession?.speechProvider || speechProvider || '',
            sttProvider: payload.sttProvider || receptionistSession?.sttProvider || sttProvider || '',
            maxTokens: payload.maxTokens || maxTokens,
          });

          await prisma.phoneCall.update({
            where: { id: callId },
            data: {
              transcription: accumulatedTranscript.trim() || null,
              summary: payload.summary || null,
            },
          }).catch(() => null);
        },
        onError: ({ error }) => {
          if (aiThinkInterval) {
            clearInterval(aiThinkInterval);
            aiThinkInterval = null;
          }
          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental receptionist error', { callId, error });
        },
      });

      receptionistSession.connectStt().catch((error) => {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Initial experimental STT connection failed', {
          callId,
          error: error?.message || String(error),
        });
      });

      activeReceptionistControllers.set(callId, async ({ action, payload: controlPayload }) => {
        if (action === 'operator_takeover') {
          clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();
          humanTransferRequested = false;
          humanTransferPendingPayload = null;
          if (aiThinkInterval) {
            clearInterval(aiThinkInterval);
            aiThinkInterval = null;
          }
          interruptAssistantPlayback('operator_takeover');

          if (receptionistSession) {
            receptionistSession.setOperatorOverrideActive(true);
          }

          io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistResponse', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            replyText: '',
            intent: 'operator_override',
            action: 'operator_takeover',
            summary: 'Operator override enabled. Caller turns will not be sent to the receptionist LLM.',
          });

          await prisma.phoneCall.update({
            where: { id: callId },
            data: { status: 'operator-override' },
          }).catch(() => null);

          return;
        }

        if (action === 'operator_resume_ai') {
          if (receptionistSession) {
            receptionistSession.setOperatorOverrideActive(false);
          }

          io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistResponse', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            replyText: '',
            intent: 'ai_resumed',
            action: 'operator_resume_ai',
            summary: 'Operator override disabled. AI receptionist will process future caller turns.',
          });

          await prisma.phoneCall.update({
            where: { id: callId },
            data: { status: 'in-progress' },
          }).catch(() => null);

          return;
        }

        if (action === 'interrupt_and_answer') {
          clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();
          humanTransferRequested = false;
          humanTransferPendingPayload = null;
          interruptAssistantPlayback('dashboard_interrupt_and_answer');

          io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistResponse', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            replyText: '',
            intent: 'operator_takeover',
            action: 'interrupt_and_answer',
            summary: 'Operator interrupted the AI and answered the call in Worksmrt.',
          });

          await prisma.phoneCall.update({
            where: { id: callId },
            data: { status: 'operator-answering' },
          }).catch(() => null);

          return;
        }

        if (action === 'interrupt_and_transfer') {
          clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();
          interruptAssistantPlayback('dashboard_interrupt_and_transfer');
          humanTransferRequested = true;
          humanTransferPendingPayload = lastExperimentalPayload || {
            action: 'escalate_to_human',
            intent: 'speak_to_human',
          };

          await maybeStartHumanTransfer('dashboard_interrupt_and_transfer');
          return;
        }

        if (action === 'operator_speak') {
          const operatorText = String(controlPayload?.text || '').trim();
          if (!operatorText || !receptionistSession) return;

          interruptAssistantPlayback('operator_speak');

          let audio = null;
          try {
            audio = await receptionistSession.buildAudioPayload(operatorText);
          } catch (ttsError) {
            logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Operator speak TTS failed', { callId, error: ttsError?.message });
          }

          if (audio) {
            const sent = sendPlivoPlaybackAudio(ws, audio);
            if (sent && currentStreamId) {
              assistantAudioQueued = true;
              playbackSequence += 1;
              latestCheckpointName = `operator-${callId}-${playbackSequence}`;
              sendPlivoCheckpoint(ws, currentStreamId, latestCheckpointName);
            }
          }

          receptionistSession.addConversationEntry({
            role: 'assistant',
            text: operatorText,
            source: 'operator_override',
            speechProvider: receptionistSession.speechProvider,
          });

          io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistResponse', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            replyText: operatorText,
            intent: 'operator_override',
            action: 'operator_speak',
            summary: `Operator spoke: "${operatorText}"`,
          });

          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Operator override spoken', { callId, text: operatorText });
          return;
        }
      });
    } else {
      receptionistSession = new ExperimentalReceptionistSession({
        sessionId: callId,
        organizationId,
        organizationName: '',
        callerName: '',
        callerPhone: incomingPhone,
        source: 'phone_call',
        sttProvider,
        speechProvider,
        maxTokens,
        onPartialTranscript: ({ text }) => {
          io.to(organizationId).emit('callTranscription', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            text,
            isFinal: false,
            source: 'regular_call',
            sttProvider: receptionistSession?.sttProvider || sttProvider || '',
          });
        },
        onFinalTranscript: async ({ text, segments }) => {
          const normalized = normalizeTranscriptText(text);
          if (!normalized) return;
          accumulatedTranscript += `${normalized}\n`;
          io.to(organizationId).emit('callTranscription', {
            callId,
            callUUID,
            text: normalized,
            isFinal: true,
            segments,
            source: 'regular_call',
            sttProvider: receptionistSession?.sttProvider || sttProvider || '',
          });
          await prisma.phoneCall.update({
            where: { id: callId },
            data: { transcription: accumulatedTranscript.trim() },
          }).catch(() => null);
        },
        onError: ({ error }) => {
          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Regular call transcription error', { callId, error });
        },
      });
      receptionistSession.setOperatorOverrideActive(true);
      receptionistSession.connectStt().catch((error) => {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Initial regular-call STT connection failed', {
          callId,
          error: error?.message || String(error),
        });
      });
    }

    const finalizeCall = async () => {
      if (finalized) return;
      finalized = true;
      unregisterActiveController();

      if (humanTransferStarted) {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Skipping experimental finalization because human transfer already started', {
          callId,
          callUUID,
        });
        return;
      }

      const conversation = receptionistSession?.getConversationLog?.() || [];
      const finalTranscript = normalizeTranscriptText(
        accumulatedTranscript.trim() || receptionistSession?.getCallerTranscript?.() || ''
      );
      const duration = await getAudioDuration(outputFile);
      const callerSpoke = hasMeaningfulCallerSpeech({
        transcript: finalTranscript,
        conversation,
      });

      if (!callerSpoke) {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Skipping transcript and LLM for silent or abandoned call', {
          callId,
          duration,
          experimentalMode,
        });

        await prisma.phoneCall.update({
          where: { id: callId },
          data: {
            recordingUrl: null,
            status: 'completed',
            transcription: null,
            summary: null,
          },
        }).catch(() => null);

        deleteFileIfExists(outputFile);
        return;
      }

      if (experimentalMode && finalTranscript) {
        try {
          const finalResult = await ExperimentalReceptionistService.finalizeAndPersistCall({
            callId,
            organizationId,
            callerNumber: incomingPhone,
            transcript: finalTranscript,
            messages: conversation,
            maxTokens,
          });

          await prisma.phoneCall.update({
            where: { id: callId },
            data: {
              transcription: finalTranscript || null,
              summary: finalResult?.summary || null,
              status: 'completed',
            },
          }).catch(() => null);
        } catch (error) {
          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental finalization failed', {
            callId,
            error: error?.message || String(error),
          });

          try {
            const fallbackResult = await ExperimentalReceptionistService.finalizeCall({
              callId,
              organizationId,
              callerNumber: incomingPhone,
              transcript: finalTranscript,
              maxTokens,
            });

            await prisma.phoneCall.update({
              where: { id: callId },
              data: {
                transcription: finalTranscript || null,
                summary: fallbackResult?.summary || null,
                status: 'completed',
              },
            }).catch(() => null);
          } catch (fallbackError) {
            logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Experimental finalization fallback failed', {
              callId,
              error: fallbackError?.message || String(fallbackError),
            });
          }
        }

        return;
      }

      if (duration > 5 && finalTranscript) {
        const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({ where: { id: organizationId } });
        const mainReceiverId = organization?.mainReceiverId;

        if (mainReceiverId) {
          callLLMService
            .transcribeAndSummarize(callId, mainReceiverId, null, accumulatedTranscript)
            .catch((error) => logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Legacy summary failed', {
              callId,
              error: error?.message || String(error),
            }));
        }
      }
    };

    ws.on('message', (msg) => {
      try {
        const pkt = JSON.parse(msg.toString());

        if (pkt.event === 'start') {
          currentStreamId = pkt?.start?.streamId || pkt?.streamId || '';
          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Plivo stream started', {
            callId,
            streamId: currentStreamId,
            tracks: pkt?.start?.tracks || [],
            mediaFormat: pkt?.start?.mediaFormat || null,
          });
          return;
        }

        if (pkt.event === 'media' && pkt.media?.payload) {
          const audioBuffer = Buffer.from(pkt.media.payload, 'base64');
          if (recorder.stdin.writable) recorder.stdin.write(audioBuffer);
          if (decoder.stdin.writable) decoder.stdin.write(audioBuffer);
          return;
        }

        if (pkt.event === 'dtmf') {
          const digit = String(pkt?.dtmf?.digit || '').trim();
          logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Received Plivo DTMF event', {
            callId,
            streamId: pkt.streamId || currentStreamId,
            digit,
          });

          if (experimentalMode && digit === '0') {
            clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();
            interruptAssistantPlayback('dtmf_0_human_transfer');
            humanTransferRequested = false;
            humanTransferPendingPayload = {
              action: 'human_transfer_needs_purpose',
              intent: 'speak_to_human',
              summary: 'Caller pressed 0 to reach a human but has not provided the purpose yet.',
            };
            if (receptionistSession?.knownState) {
              receptionistSession.knownState.lastIntent = 'speak_to_human';
            }

            const purposePrompt = "Of course. What can I tell the team you're calling about?";

            io.to(organizationId).emit('callReceptionistResponse', {
              callId,
              callUUID,
              replyText: purposePrompt,
              intent: 'speak_to_human',
              action: 'human_transfer_needs_purpose',
              summary: 'Caller pressed 0 to reach a human but has not provided the purpose yet.',
            });

            void (async () => {
              const playbackAudio = await synthesizePhonePlaybackAudio(purposePrompt, {
                callId,
                source: 'experimental_receptionist',
              }).catch((error) => {
                logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Failed to synthesize DTMF human-purpose prompt', {
                  callId,
                  error: error?.message || String(error),
                });
                return null;
              });

              if (playbackAudio) {
                const sent = sendPlivoPlaybackAudio(ws, playbackAudio);
                if (sent && currentStreamId) {
                  assistantAudioQueued = true;
                  playbackSequence += 1;
                  latestCheckpointName = `assistant-${callId}-${playbackSequence}`;
                  sendPlivoCheckpoint(ws, currentStreamId, latestCheckpointName);
                }
              }
            })();
          }

          return;
        }

        if (pkt.event === 'playedStream') {
          const completedLatestAssistantAudio = !latestCheckpointName || pkt.name === latestCheckpointName;
          if (completedLatestAssistantAudio) {
            assistantAudioQueued = false;
            latestCheckpointName = '';
          }
          if (completedLatestAssistantAudio && humanTransferRequested) {
            void maybeStartHumanTransfer('played_stream');
          }
          return;
        }

        if (pkt.event === 'clearedAudio') {
          assistantAudioQueued = false;
          latestCheckpointName = '';
          clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();
          return;
        }

        if (pkt.event === 'stop') {
          ws.close();
        }
      } catch (error) {
        logSocket('AudioSocket', 'Error parsing inbound media packet', {
          callId,
          error: error?.message || String(error),
        });
      }
    });

    ws.on('close', async () => {
      clearHumanTransferFallbackTimer();
      if (aiThinkInterval) {
        clearInterval(aiThinkInterval);
        aiThinkInterval = null;
      }
      unregisterActiveController();

      try {
        if (recorder.stdin.writable) recorder.stdin.end();
      } catch {}

      try {
        if (decoder.stdin.writable) decoder.stdin.end();
      } catch {}

      if (receptionistSession) {
        await receptionistSession.close();
      }
    });

    recorder.on('close', async (code) => {
      logSocket('AudioSocket', 'ffmpeg exited', { callId, code });
      await finalizeCall();
    });
  });

  testWss.on('connection', (ws, request) => {
    let session = null;
    let sessionId = '';

    const sendJson = (payload) => {
      if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
        ws.send(JSON.stringify(payload));
      }
    };

    ws.on('message', async (raw) => {
      try {
        const data = Buffer.isBuffer(raw) ? raw.toString('utf8') : String(raw);
        let msg;
        try {
          msg = JSON.parse(data);
        } catch {
          if (session) {
            session.pushAudioChunk(Buffer.isBuffer(raw) ? raw : Buffer.from(raw));
          }
          return;
        }


        if (msg.type === 'start_session') {
          sessionId = msg.sessionId || `receptionist-test-${Date.now()}`;

          session = new ExperimentalReceptionistSession({
            sessionId,
            organizationId: msg.organizationId || '',
            organizationName: msg.organizationName || '',
            callerPhone: msg.callerPhone || '',
            callerEmail: msg.callerEmail || '',
            source: 'browser_test',
            sttProvider: msg.sttProvider || '',
            autoFlushSilenceMs: msg.inputMode === 'typing' ? 500 : 1300,
            onPartialTranscript: ({ text }) => {
              sendJson({ type: 'transcript_partial', text });
            },
            onFinalTranscript: ({ text }) => {
              sendJson({ type: 'transcript_final', text });
            },
            onProcessingStarted: (payload) => {
              sendJson({
                type: 'processing_started',
                timings: payload.timings || {},
              });
            },
            onAssistantResponse: (payload) => {
              sendJson({
                type: 'assistant_response',
                replyText: payload.replyText || '',
                intent: payload.intent || '',
                action: payload.action || '',
                summary: payload.summary || '',
                smsPreview: payload.smsPreview || '',
                extracted: payload.extracted || {},
                timings: payload.timings || {},
                audio: payload.audio || null,
              });
            },
            onError: ({ error }) => {
              sendJson({ type: 'error', error });
            },
          });

          const greeting = session.getGreeting();
          sendJson({ type: 'session_ready', greeting });
          return;
        }

        if (msg.type === 'end_session') {
          if (session) {
            await session.close().catch(() => {});
            session = null;
          }
          sendJson({ type: 'session_closed' });
          return;
        }

        if (msg.type === 'text_turn') {
          if (!session) {
            sendJson({ type: 'error', error: 'No active session. Start a session first.' });
            return;
          }

          const text = String(msg.text || '').trim();
          if (!text) {
            sendJson({ type: 'error', error: 'Empty text turn.' });
            return;
          }

          session.addConversationEntry({
            role: 'caller',
            text,
            source: 'typed_input',
            sttProvider: 'typed',
          });

          await session.flushUserTurn({
            reason: 'typed_turn',
            transcriptOverride: text,
          }).catch((error) => {
            sendJson({
              type: 'error',
              error: error?.message || 'Failed to process typed turn.',
            });
          });

          return;
        }
      } catch (error) {
        sendJson({
          type: 'error',
          error: error?.message || 'Failed to process message.',
        });
      }
    });

    ws.on('close', async () => {
      if (session) {
        await session.close().catch(() => {});
        session = null;
      }
    });

    ws.on('error', () => {
      if (session) {
        session.close().catch(() => {});
        session = null;
      }
    });
  });
}

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/routes/api/calls/conversations.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/conversations.js
// server/src/routes/api/calls/conversations.js

import express from 'express';
import withHandler from '#shared/utils/withHandler.js';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';

const router = express.Router();

const normalizePhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const raw = String(phone).trim();
  const digits = raw.replace(/\D/g, '');

  if (!digits) return '';

  if (digits.length >= 11) {
    const last11 = digits.slice(-11);
    if (last11.startsWith('1')) return last11;
  }

  if (digits.length >= 10) {
    return `1${digits.slice(-10)}`;
  }

  return digits;
};

const formatPhoneE164 = (phone) => {
  const normalized = normalizePhone(phone);
  if (normalized.length === 11 && normalized.startsWith('1')) {
    return `+${normalized}`;
  }
  return phone || '';
};

const phonesMatch = (a, b) => {
  const normalizedA = normalizePhone(a);
  const normalizedB = normalizePhone(b);
  return Boolean(normalizedA && normalizedB && normalizedA === normalizedB);
};

const buildPhoneVariants = (phone) => {
  const normalized = normalizePhone(phone);
  const variants = new Set();

  if (phone) variants.add(String(phone).trim());
  if (normalized) {
    variants.add(normalized);
    variants.add(`+${normalized}`);
    if (normalized.length === 11 && normalized.startsWith('1')) {
      variants.add(normalized.slice(1));
      variants.add(`+${normalized.slice(1)}`);
    }
  }

  return [...variants].filter(Boolean);
};

const isBadAiPlaceholder = (text) => {
  if (!text || !String(text).trim()) return true;

  const value = String(text).trim();

  return [
    /please provide the transcript/i,
    /i didn['’]t receive the call transcript/i,
    /i['’]m ready to help summarize the call/i,
    /looks like the transcript you provided/i,
    /could you please provide the transcript/i,
    /could you please paste the full conversation transcript/i,
    /^the call$/i,
  ].some((pattern) => pattern.test(value));
};

const getCallPreviewText = (call) => {
  if (call.summary && !isBadAiPlaceholder(call.summary)) {
    return call.summary;
  }

  if (call.transcription && !isBadAiPlaceholder(call.transcription)) {
    const trimmed = String(call.transcription).trim();
    return trimmed.length > 180 ? `${trimmed.slice(0, 177)}...` : trimmed;
  }

  if (call.recordingUrl) {
    return 'Call recording available';
  }

  return 'No message';
};

const matchesSearch = (search, values) => {
  if (!search) return true;
  const lowered = String(search).toLowerCase();

  return values.some((value) =>
    String(value || '').toLowerCase().includes(lowered)
  );
};

const getConversationsHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const orgId = req.user.organizationId;
  const search = String(req.query.search || '').trim();
  const unrepliedSms = String(req.query.unrepliedSms || '').toLowerCase() === 'true';
  const page = parseInt(req.query.page, 10) || 1;
  const limit = parseInt(req.query.limit, 10) || 10;
  const skip = (page - 1) * limit;

  try {
    const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: orgId },
      select: { phoneNumber: true },
    });

    const orgPhone = organization?.phoneNumber || '';

    const orgContacts = await prisma.contact.findMany({
      where: { organizationId: orgId },
      select: { phone: true, name: true },
    });

    const phoneMap = {};
    orgContacts.forEach((contact) => {
      if (!contact.phone) return;
      const normalizedPhone = normalizePhone(contact.phone);
      if (normalizedPhone && !phoneMap[normalizedPhone]) {
        phoneMap[normalizedPhone] = contact.name;
      }
    });

    const calls = await prisma.phoneCall.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId: orgId,
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      select: {
        id: true,
        from: true,
        to: true,
        createdAt: true,
        updatedAt: true,
        transcription: true,
        summary: true,
        recordingUrl: true,
        direction: true,
        status: true,
        contact: { select: { name: true } },
      },
    });

    const messages = await prisma.phoneMessage.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId: orgId,
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      select: {
        id: true,
        from: true,
        to: true,
        createdAt: true,
        text: true,
        mediaUrls: true,
        direction: true,
        contact: { select: { name: true } },
      },
    });

    const timeline = [
      ...calls.map((call) => {
        const normalizedFrom = normalizePhone(call.from);
        const normalizedTo = normalizePhone(call.to);
        const counterparty =
          phonesMatch(normalizedFrom, orgPhone) ? normalizedTo : normalizedFrom;

        return {
          id: call.id,
          phoneFrom: formatPhoneE164(call.from),
          phoneTo: formatPhoneE164(call.to),
          counterparty,
          displayName:
            call.contact?.name ||
            phoneMap[counterparty] ||
            formatPhoneE164(counterparty),
          text: getCallPreviewText(call),
          timestamp: call.updatedAt || call.createdAt,
          type: 'call',
          status: call.status || '',
        };
      }),
      ...messages.map((msg) => {
        const normalizedFrom = normalizePhone(msg.from);
        const normalizedTo = normalizePhone(msg.to);
        const counterparty =
          phonesMatch(normalizedFrom, orgPhone) ? normalizedTo : normalizedFrom;

        return {
          id: msg.id,
          phoneFrom: formatPhoneE164(msg.from),
          phoneTo: formatPhoneE164(msg.to),
          counterparty,
          displayName:
            msg.contact?.name ||
            phoneMap[counterparty] ||
            formatPhoneE164(counterparty),
          text: msg.text || (Array.isArray(msg.mediaUrls) && msg.mediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'Image message' : 'No message'),
          mediaUrls: Array.isArray(msg.mediaUrls) ? msg.mediaUrls : [],
          timestamp: msg.createdAt,
          type: 'sms',
          direction: msg.direction,
        };
      }),
    ];

    const grouped = new Map();

    for (const record of timeline.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp) - new Date(a.timestamp))) {
      if (!record.counterparty) continue;

      if (
        !matchesSearch(search, [
          record.displayName,
          record.text,
          record.phoneFrom,
          record.phoneTo,
          record.counterparty,
        ])
      ) {
        continue;
      }

      const existing = grouped.get(record.counterparty);
      const latestInboundSmsTimestamp =
        record.type === 'sms' && record.direction === 'inbound'
          ? record.timestamp
          : existing?.latestInboundSmsTimestamp;
      const latestOutboundSmsTimestamp =
        record.type === 'sms' && record.direction === 'outbound'
          ? record.timestamp
          : existing?.latestOutboundSmsTimestamp;

      const hasUnrepliedSms = Boolean(
        latestInboundSmsTimestamp &&
          (!latestOutboundSmsTimestamp || new Date(latestOutboundSmsTimestamp) < new Date(latestInboundSmsTimestamp))
      );

      if (!existing) {
        grouped.set(record.counterparty, {
          id: record.id,
          phoneFrom: record.phoneFrom,
          phoneTo: record.phoneTo,
          displayName: record.displayName,
          text: record.text,
          mediaUrls: record.mediaUrls || [],
          timestamp: record.timestamp,
          type: record.type,
          status: record.status || '',
          latestInboundSmsTimestamp,
          latestOutboundSmsTimestamp,
          hasUnrepliedSms,
        });
      } else {
        grouped.set(record.counterparty, {
          ...existing,
          latestInboundSmsTimestamp,
          latestOutboundSmsTimestamp,
          hasUnrepliedSms,
        });
      }
    }

    let filtered = Array.from(grouped.values());
    if (unrepliedSms) {
      filtered = filtered.filter((thread) => thread.hasUnrepliedSms);
    }

    const pinnedParam = String(req.query.pinned || '').trim();
    const pinnedPhones = pinnedParam ? pinnedParam.split(',').filter(Boolean).map(normalizePhone) : [];

    let pinnedConversations = [];
    let unpinnedConversations = [];

    if (pinnedPhones.length > 0) {
      filtered.forEach((c) => {
        const phone = phonesMatch(c.phoneFrom, orgPhone) ? c.phoneTo : c.phoneFrom;
        const normalized = normalizePhone(phone);
        if (pinnedPhones.includes(normalized)) {
          pinnedConversations.push(c);
        } else {
          unpinnedConversations.push(c);
        }
      });
    } else {
      unpinnedConversations = filtered;
    }

    const totalCount = unpinnedConversations.length;
    const paginatedUnpinned = unpinnedConversations.slice(skip, skip + limit);
    const finalConversations = [...pinnedConversations, ...paginatedUnpinned];

    res.status(200).json({
      conversations: finalConversations,
      totalCount,
      page,
      totalPages: Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalCount / limit)),
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in getConversationsHandler:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch conversations' });
  }
};

const getConversationDetailsHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const orgId = req.user.organizationId;
  const phone = req.query.phone;
  const normalizedPhone = normalizePhone(phone);

  if (!normalizedPhone) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing phone query parameter' });
  }

  const page = parseInt(req.query.page, 10) || 1;
  const limit = parseInt(req.query.limit, 10) || 10;
  const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
  const search = String(req.query.search || '').trim();

  try {
    const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: orgId },
      select: { phoneNumber: true },
    });

    const orgPhone = organization?.phoneNumber || '';
    const phoneVariants = buildPhoneVariants(normalizedPhone);

    const startDateParam = req.query.startDate || req.query.timeMin;
    const endDateParam = req.query.endDate || req.query.timeMax;

    let dateFilter = {};
    if (startDateParam) {
      const parsedStart = new Date(startDateParam);
      if (!isNaN(parsedStart.getTime())) {
        dateFilter.gte = parsedStart;
      }
    }
    if (endDateParam) {
      const parsedEnd = new Date(endDateParam);
      if (!isNaN(parsedEnd.getTime())) {
        dateFilter.lte = parsedEnd;
      }
    }

    const calls = await prisma.phoneCall.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId: orgId,
        OR: [
          { from: { in: phoneVariants } },
          { to: { in: phoneVariants } },
        ],
        ...(Object.keys(dateFilter).length > 0 ? { createdAt: dateFilter } : {}),
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      select: {
        id: true,
        from: true,
        to: true,
        createdAt: true,
        updatedAt: true,
        transcription: true,
        summary: true,
        direction: true,
        recordingUrl: true,
        status: true,
        contact: { select: { name: true } },
      },
    });

    const messages = await prisma.phoneMessage.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId: orgId,
        OR: [
          { from: { in: phoneVariants } },
          { to: { in: phoneVariants } },
        ],
        ...(Object.keys(dateFilter).length > 0 ? { createdAt: dateFilter } : {}),
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      select: {
        id: true,
        from: true,
        to: true,
        createdAt: true,
        text: true,
        mediaUrls: true,
        direction: true,
        tags: true,
        category: true,
        contact: { select: { name: true } },
      },
    });

    const combined = [
      ...calls.map((call) => {
        const formattedFrom = formatPhoneE164(call.from);
        const formattedTo = formatPhoneE164(call.to);
        const senderName = phonesMatch(call.from, orgPhone)
          ? 'You'
          : call.contact?.name || formattedFrom;

        return {
          id: call.id,
          phoneFrom: formattedFrom,
          phoneTo: formattedTo,
          timestamp: call.updatedAt || call.createdAt,
          text: getCallPreviewText(call),
          type: 'call',
          recordingUrl: call.recordingUrl || null,
          status: call.status || '',
          senderName,
        };
      }),
      ...messages.map((msg) => {
        const formattedFrom = formatPhoneE164(msg.from);
        const formattedTo = formatPhoneE164(msg.to);
        const senderName = phonesMatch(msg.from, orgPhone)
          ? 'You'
          : msg.contact?.name || formattedFrom;

        return {
          id: msg.id,
          phoneFrom: formattedFrom,
          phoneTo: formattedTo,
          timestamp: msg.createdAt,
          text: msg.text || (Array.isArray(msg.mediaUrls) && msg.mediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'Image message' : 'No message'),
          mediaUrls: Array.isArray(msg.mediaUrls) ? msg.mediaUrls : [],
          type: 'sms',
          senderName,
          tags: msg.tags || null,
          category: msg.category || null,
        };
      }),
    ]
      .filter((record) =>
        matchesSearch(search, [
          record.senderName,
          record.text,
          record.phoneFrom,
          record.phoneTo,
        ])
      )
      .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp) - new Date(a.timestamp));

    const totalCount = combined.length;
    const paginated = combined.slice(skip, skip + limit);

    res.status(200).json({
      logs: paginated,
      totalCount,
      page,
      totalPages: Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalCount / limit)),
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in getConversationDetailsHandler:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch conversation details' });
  }
};

router.get(
  '/conversations',
  withHandler({
    handler: getConversationsHandler,
    allowedMethods: ['GET'],
    requiresAuth: true,
  })
);

router.get(
  '/conversation',
  withHandler({
    handler: getConversationDetailsHandler,
    allowedMethods: ['GET'],
    requiresAuth: true,
  })
);

export default router;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/index.js
// server/src/routes/api/calls/index.js
import express from 'express';
import withHandler from '#shared/utils/withHandler.js';
import pkg from 'plivo';
import multer from 'multer';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import { getNamespace } from '#shared/socket.js';
import callService from '#services/calls/services/CallService.js';
import callLLMService from '#services/calls/LLMService.js';
import transcribeRoute from './transcribe.js';
import transcribeAndSummarizeRoute from './transcribeAndSummarize.js';
import conversationsRoute from './conversations.js';
import ivrRoute from './ivr.js';
import { getActiveReceptionistCallSnapshots } from './audioStreamSockets.js';
import { sendPushNotificationToUser, sendPushNotificationToOrg } from '#shared/utils/pushNotifications.js';
import experimentalReceptionistService from '#services/calls/ExperimentalReceptionistService.js';
import { validatePlivoWebhookRequest } from '#services/calls/PlivoWebhookService.js';
import {
  ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME,
  getPublishedIvrMenu,
  renderIvrVoicemailPromptXml,
} from '#services/calls/IvrService.js';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs/promises';

const { Response: PlivoResponse, Client: PlivoClient } = pkg;
const router = express.Router();

const smsMediaStorage = multer.diskStorage({
  destination: async (req, file, cb) => {
    try {
      const organizationId = req.user?.organizationId || 'defaultOrg';
      const uploadDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'uploads', organizationId, 'messages', 'media');
      await fs.mkdir(uploadDir, { recursive: true });
      cb(null, uploadDir);
    } catch (error) {
      cb(error);
    }
  },
  filename: (req, file, cb) => {
    const safeExtension = path.extname(file.originalname || '').toLowerCase();
    const uniqueName = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}${safeExtension}`;
    cb(null, uniqueName);
  },
});

const smsMediaUpload = multer({
  storage: smsMediaStorage,
  fileFilter: (req, file, cb) => {
    if (/^image\/(jpeg|png|gif|webp)$/i.test(file.mimetype || '')) {
      cb(null, true);
      return;
    }

    cb(new Error('Only JPG, PNG, GIF, and WebP images can be sent by MMS.'));
  },
  limits: {
    fileSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024,
    files: 5,
  },
});

const getPublicBaseUrl = (req) =>
  String(process.env.API_URL || process.env.PUBLIC_API_URL || `${req.protocol}://${req.get('host')}`)
    .replace(/\/$/, '');

const encodeSipHeaderValue = (value = '') =>
  encodeURIComponent(String(value || '').trim()).replace(/%20/g, '+');

const runSmsMediaUpload = (req, res) =>
  new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    smsMediaUpload.array('images', 5)(req, res, (error) => {
      if (error) {
        reject(error);
        return;
      }
      resolve();
    });
  });

let plivoClient;
try {
  plivoClient = new PlivoClient(
    process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_ID,
    process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_TOKEN
  );
} catch (e) {
  console.warn('[CallsRoute] Plivo client initialization failed:', e.message);
  plivoClient = null;
}

const buildSpokenCallErrorXml = (
  message = 'We ran into an error handling your call. Please try again shortly.'
) => {
  const response = new PlivoResponse();
  response.addSpeak(message);
  response.addHangup({ reason: 'error' });
  return response.toXML();
};

const normalizePhone = (phone) => {
  if (!phone) return '';
  const digits = String(phone).replace(/\D/g, '');
  if (!digits) return '';
  if (digits.length >= 11) {
    const last11 = digits.slice(-11);
    if (last11.startsWith('1')) return last11;
  }
  if (digits.length >= 10) return `1${digits.slice(-10)}`;
  return digits;
};

const phonesMatch = (a, b) => {
  const normalizedA = normalizePhone(a);
  const normalizedB = normalizePhone(b);
  return Boolean(normalizedA && normalizedB && normalizedA === normalizedB);
};

const buildPhoneVariants = (phone) => {
  const normalized = normalizePhone(phone);
  const variants = new Set();

  if (phone) variants.add(String(phone).trim());
  if (normalized) {
    variants.add(normalized);
    variants.add(`+${normalized}`);
    if (normalized.length === 11 && normalized.startsWith('1')) {
      variants.add(normalized.slice(1));
      variants.add(`+${normalized.slice(1)}`);
    }
  }

  return [...variants].filter(Boolean);
};

const ACTIVE_CALL_STATUSES = [
  'experimental-ai',
  'in-progress',
  'operator-answering',
  'transferring-to-human',
  'transfer-failed',
];

const getActiveCallHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
  const activeSince = new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 60 * 60 * 1000);

  const memorySnapshots = getActiveReceptionistCallSnapshots({ organizationId });

  const databaseCalls = await prisma.phoneCall.findMany({
    where: {
      organizationId,
      status: { in: ACTIVE_CALL_STATUSES },
      updatedAt: { gte: activeSince },
    },
    orderBy: { updatedAt: 'desc' },
    take: 5,
  });

  const snapshotsById = new Map(
    memorySnapshots.map((snapshot) => [snapshot.callId || snapshot.id, snapshot])
  );

  const activeCalls = databaseCalls.map((call) => {
    const snapshot = snapshotsById.get(call.id) || {};

    return {
      id: call.id,
      callId: call.id,
      callUUID: call.callUUID,
      callerID: call.from,
      from: call.from,
      to: call.to,
      organizationId: call.organizationId,
      status: call.status,
      transcription: call.transcription || '',
      summary: call.summary || '',
      createdAt: call.createdAt,
      updatedAt: call.updatedAt,
      ...snapshot,
      transcriptEntries: Array.isArray(snapshot.transcriptEntries)
        ? snapshot.transcriptEntries
        : [],
      partialTranscript: snapshot.partialTranscript || '',
    };
  });

  const databaseCallIds = new Set(activeCalls.map((call) => call.callId || call.id));
  for (const snapshot of memorySnapshots) {
    const snapshotId = snapshot.callId || snapshot.id;
    if (!databaseCallIds.has(snapshotId)) {
      activeCalls.push(snapshot);
    }
  }

  // Only surface a live active call when there is an in-memory snapshot for it,
  // which means the call is genuinely in-flight right now. DB records without a
  // matching snapshot are stale entries that were never cleaned up.
  const liveSnapshotIds = new Set(memorySnapshots.map((s) => s.callId || s.id).filter(Boolean));
  const liveActiveCall = activeCalls.find((call) => liveSnapshotIds.has(call.callId || call.id)) || null;

  return res.status(200).json({ activeCall: liveActiveCall, activeCalls });
};


const serveGeneratedGreetingHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const rawFileName = String(req.params.fileName || '').trim();
    if (!rawFileName || rawFileName.includes('/') || rawFileName.includes('\\')) {
      return res.status(400).send('Invalid file name');
    }

    const filePath = path.join(
      experimentalReceptionistService.getGreetingAudioPublicDir(),
      rawFileName,
    );

    await fs.access(filePath);
    return res.sendFile(filePath);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error serving generated receptionist greeting:', error);
    return res.status(404).send('Not Found');
  }
};

const sendSmsMessageHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const { to, text, type = 'sms', mediaUrls = [], bookingId } = req.body;
  const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;;
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

  try {
    const result = await callService.sendSmsMessage({
      to,
      text,
      type,
      mediaUrls,
      userId,
      organizationId,
      bookingId,
    });
    return res.status(200).json({ success: true, ...result });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Send SMS Message Error:', error);
    const statusCode = error.status && typeof error.status === 'number' ? error.status : 500;
    return res.status(statusCode).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to send message' });
  }
};

const uploadSmsMediaHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    await runSmsMediaUpload(req, res);

    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const files = Array.isArray(req.files) ? req.files : [];

    if (files.length === 0) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Add at least one image.' });
    }

    const baseUrl = getPublicBaseUrl(req);
    const media = files.map((file) => {
      const relativeUrl = `/uploads/${organizationId}/messages/media/${file.filename}`;
      return {
        url: `${baseUrl}${relativeUrl}`,
        relativeUrl,
        filename: file.originalname,
        mimetype: file.mimetype,
        size: file.size,
      };
    });

    return res.status(201).json({
      media,
      mediaUrls: media.map((item) => item.url),
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Upload SMS Media Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to upload image.' });
  }
};

  }
};
```
