```js
const dialEventsHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { callId } = req.query;
    console.log('Dial Event:', { callId, body: req.body });

    const {
      DialAction,
      DialBLegStatus,
      DialALegUUID,
      DialBLegUUID,
      DialBLegTo,
      DialBLegFrom,
      DialBLegHangupCauseName,
      DialBLegHangupCauseCode,
      DialBLegHangupSource,
    } = req.body;

    if (callId) {
      await prisma.phoneCall.update({
        where: { id: callId },
        data: {
          status:
            DialAction === 'connected'
              ? 'connected'
              : DialAction === 'answer'
                ? 'destination-answered'
                : DialAction === 'hangup'
                  ? 'destination-hangup'
                  : DialBLegStatus || 'dialing-destination',
        },
      });

      const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
      socket.emit('callDialEvent', {
        callId,
        DialAction,
        DialBLegStatus,
        DialALegUUID,
        DialBLegUUID,
        DialBLegTo,
        DialBLegFrom,
        DialBLegHangupCauseName,
        DialBLegHangupCauseCode,
        DialBLegHangupSource,
      });
    }

    return res.status(200).send('OK');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in dialEventsHandler:', error);
    return res.status(500).send('Server Error');
  }
};

const dialStatusHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { callId } = req.query;
    console.log('Dial Status:', { callId, body: req.body });

    const {
      DialStatus,
      DialRingStatus,
      DialHangupCause,
      DialALegUUID,
      DialBLegUUID,
    } = req.body;

    if (callId) {
      await prisma.phoneCall.update({
        where: { id: callId },
        data: {
          status:
            DialStatus === 'completed'
              ? 'completed'
              : DialStatus === 'busy'
                ? 'busy'
                : DialStatus === 'failed'
                  ? 'failed'
                  : DialStatus === 'timeout'
                    ? 'timeout'
                    : DialStatus === 'no-answer'
                      ? 'no-answer'
                      : DialStatus || 'dial-complete',
        },
      });

      const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
      socket.emit('callDialStatus', {
        callId,
        DialStatus,
        DialRingStatus,
        DialHangupCause,
        DialALegUUID,
        DialBLegUUID,
      });
    }

    return res
      .set('Content-Type', 'text/xml')
      .send(`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response></Response>`);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in dialStatusHandler:', error);
    return res.status(500).send('Server Error');
  }
};

const getCallLogsHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const page = parseInt(req.query.page) || 1;
    const limit = parseInt(req.query.limit) || 10;
    const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
    const search = req.query.search || '';
    const callId = req.query.callId || '';

    const filter = {
      AND: [
        { organizationId },
        ...(callId
          ? [{ id: callId }]
          : []),
        ...(search
          ? [{
              OR: [
                { from: { contains: search } },
                { to: { contains: search } },
                { transcription: { contains: search } },
                { summary: { contains: search } },
              ],
            }]
          : []),
      ],
    };

    const totalCount = await prisma.phoneCall.count({ where: filter });
    const callLogs = await prisma.phoneCall.findMany({
      where: filter,
      include: {
        contact: true,
        user: { select: { firstName: true, lastName: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      skip,
      take: limit,
    });

    res.status(200).json({
      callLogs,
      totalCount,
      page,
      totalPages: Math.ceil(totalCount / limit),
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in getCallLogsHandler:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch call logs' });
  }
};

const getMessagesHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const page = parseInt(req.query.page) || 1;
    const limit = parseInt(req.query.limit) || 10;
    const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
    const search = req.query.search || '';
    const direction = String(req.query.direction || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    const unreplied = String(req.query.unreplied || '').toLowerCase() === 'true';

    const startDateParam = req.query.startDate || req.query.timeMin;
    const endDateParam = req.query.endDate || req.query.timeMax;

    let dateFilter = {};
    if (startDateParam) {
      const parsedStart = new Date(startDateParam);
      if (!isNaN(parsedStart.getTime())) {
        dateFilter.gte = parsedStart;
      }
    }
    if (endDateParam) {
      const parsedEnd = new Date(endDateParam);
      if (!isNaN(parsedEnd.getTime())) {
        dateFilter.lte = parsedEnd;
      }
    }

    const baseFilter = {
      organizationId,
      ...(search
        ? {
            OR: [
              { from: { contains: search } },
              { to: { contains: search } },
              { text: { contains: search } },
            ],
          }
        : {}),
    };

    const messageFilter = {
      ...baseFilter,
      ...(direction === 'inbound' || direction === 'outbound' ? { direction } : {}),
      ...(Object.keys(dateFilter).length > 0 ? { createdAt: dateFilter } : {}),
    };

    let messages = await prisma.phoneMessage.findMany({
      where: messageFilter,
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
    });

    if (unreplied) {
      const allMessages = await prisma.phoneMessage.findMany({
        where: baseFilter,
        orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      });

      const threadMap = new Map();
      allMessages.forEach((msg) => {
        const counterparty = normalizePhone(msg.direction === 'inbound' ? msg.from : msg.to);
        if (!counterparty) return;

        const entry = threadMap.get(counterparty) || {
          latestInbound: null,
          latestOutbound: null,
        };

        if (msg.direction === 'inbound' && (!entry.latestInbound || new Date(msg.createdAt) > new Date(entry.latestInbound))) {
          entry.latestInbound = msg.createdAt;
        }
        if (msg.direction === 'outbound' && (!entry.latestOutbound || new Date(msg.createdAt) > new Date(entry.latestOutbound))) {
          entry.latestOutbound = msg.createdAt;
        }

        threadMap.set(counterparty, entry);
      });

      const unrepliedThreads = new Set(
        Array.from(threadMap.entries()).filter(
          ([, entry]) =>
            entry.latestInbound &&
            (!entry.latestOutbound || new Date(entry.latestOutbound) < new Date(entry.latestInbound))
        ).map(([counterparty]) => counterparty)
      );

      messages = messages.filter((msg) => {
        const counterparty = normalizePhone(msg.direction === 'inbound' ? msg.from : msg.to);
        return counterparty && unrepliedThreads.has(counterparty);
      });
    }

    const totalCount = messages.length;
    const paginated = messages.slice(skip, skip + limit);

    res.status(200).json({
      messages: paginated,
      totalCount,
      page,
      totalPages: Math.ceil(totalCount / limit),
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching messages:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch messages' });
  }
};

const callStatusHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { CallUUID, CallStatus, RecordingUrl } = req.body;
    console.log('Call Status Update:', req.body);

    await prisma.phoneCall.updateMany({
      where: { callUUID: CallUUID },
      data: {
        status: CallStatus,
        ...(RecordingUrl ? { recordingUrl: RecordingUrl } : {}),
      },
    });

    if (CallStatus === 'completed') {
      const callRecord = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({
        where: { callUUID: CallUUID },
      });

      const receptionistMode = await callService.getOrganizationCallReceptionistMode(
        callRecord?.organizationId
      );

      const effectiveRecordingUrl = RecordingUrl || callRecord?.recordingUrl || null;

      if (callRecord && effectiveRecordingUrl && receptionistMode !== 'experimental_ai') {
        const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
          where: { id: callRecord.organizationId },
        });
        const mainReceiverId = organization?.mainReceiverId;

        if (mainReceiverId) {
          callLLMService
            .transcribeAndSummarize(callRecord.id, mainReceiverId)
            .catch((err) => console.error('Error in background transcribe and summarize:', err));
        } else {
          console.warn('No main receiver found for organization, skipping transcription.');
        }
      } else if (callRecord && receptionistMode === 'experimental_ai') {
        console.log(
          'Experimental call completed without a recording URL. Waiting for ExperimentalReceptionistSession finalization to persist the transcript and summary.'
        );
      }
    }

    res.status(200).send('OK');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in callStatusHandler:', error);
    return res.status(500).send('Server Error');
  }
};

const hangupCallHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { CallUUID } = req.body;
    if (!CallUUID) return res.status(400).send('Missing CallUUID');

    await prisma.phoneCall.updateMany({
      where: { callUUID: CallUUID },
      data: { status: 'completed' },
    });

    res.status(200).send('OK');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in hangupCallHandler:', error);
    return res.status(500).send('Server Error');
  }
};

const makeCallHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { to } = req.body;
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;;

    if (!to) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing destination phone number' });
    }

    const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: organizationId },
      select: { phoneNumber: true },
    });

    if (!organization || !organization.phoneNumber) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Organization phone number not found' });
    }

    const from = callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(organization.phoneNumber);
    const destination = callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(to);
    const sipEndpoint = callService.getSipEndpoint();

    if (!from || !destination) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid source or destination phone number' });
    }

    const tempCallUuid = `outbound-pending-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()
      .toString(36)
      .slice(2, 10)}`;

    const callRecord = await prisma.phoneCall.create({
      data: {
        from,
        to: destination,
        callUUID: tempCallUuid,
        direction: 'outbound',
        status: 'dialing-device',
        organizationId,
        userId,
      },
    });

    const answerUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/answer/outbound?callId=${encodeURIComponent(
      callRecord.id
    )}`;

    const response = await plivoClient.calls.create(
      from,
      sipEndpoint,
      answerUrl,
      {
        answerMethod: 'POST',
        sipHeaders: [
          `X-PH-callId=${encodeSipHeaderValue(callRecord.id)}`,
          `X-PH-orgId=${encodeSipHeaderValue(organizationId)}`,
          `X-PH-outboundTo=${encodeSipHeaderValue(destination)}`,
          'X-PH-worksmrtOutbound=true',
        ].join(','),
      }
    );

    console.log('Outbound call to SIP endpoint initiated:', response);

    return res.status(200).json({
      success: true,
      message: 'Calling your app device first. Once you answer there, the destination number will be dialed.',
      call: callRecord,
      plivo: response,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error making outbound call:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({
      error: error.message || 'Failed to make outbound call',
    });
  }
};

const rejectCallHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const { callUUID } = req.body;
  if (!callUUID) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing callUUID' });

  try {
    await prisma.phoneCall.updateMany({
      where: { callUUID },
      data: { status: 'rejected' },
    });
    res.status(200).json({ success: true });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error rejecting call:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to reject call' });
  }
};

const voicemailStartHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = String(req.query?.organizationId || '').trim();
  const completionUrl = `${getPublicBaseUrl(req)}/calls/voicemail/complete${organizationId ? `?organizationId=${encodeURIComponent(organizationId)}` : ''}`;
  let voicemailPrompt = '<Speak>Nobody is available to answer right now. Please leave a message after the beep.</Speak>';
  if (organizationId) {
    const activeMenuSetting = await prisma.settings.findUnique({
      where: {
        orgSetting_unique: {
          organizationId,
          settingName: ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME,
        },
      },
      select: { settingValue: true },
    });
    const menu = await getPublishedIvrMenu({
      organizationId,
      menuId: activeMenuSetting?.settingValue || '',
    });
    if (menu?.publishedDefinition) {
      voicemailPrompt = renderIvrVoicemailPromptXml(menu.publishedDefinition);
    }
  }
  res.type('text/xml');
  return res.send(`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Response>
  ${voicemailPrompt}
  <Record action="${completionUrl.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}" method="POST" maxLength="120" timeout="5" playBeep="true"/>
  <Speak>Thank you. Goodbye.</Speak>
  <Hangup/>
</Response>`);
};

const sendCallToVoicemailHandler = async (req, res) => {
  if (!plivoClient) return res.status(503).json({ error: 'Plivo is not configured.' });

  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
  const call = await prisma.phoneCall.findFirst({
    where: { id: req.params.id, organizationId },
    select: { id: true, callUUID: true },
  });
  if (!call) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Call not found.' });
  if (!call.callUUID) return res.status(409).json({ error: 'This call cannot be sent to voicemail.' });

  const voicemailUrl = `${getPublicBaseUrl(req)}/calls/voicemail/start?organizationId=${encodeURIComponent(organizationId)}`;
  await plivoClient.calls.transfer(call.callUUID, {
    legs: 'aleg',
    alegUrl: voicemailUrl,
    alegMethod: 'POST',
  });
  await prisma.phoneCall.update({
    where: { id: call.id },
    data: { status: 'voicemail-routing' },
  });
  return res.json({ success: true });
};

const getRecordingUrlFromBody = (body) => {
  return (
    body.RecordUrl ||
    body.RecordingUrl ||
    body.record_url ||
    body.recording_url ||
    body.recordUrl ||
    body.recordingUrl ||
    null
  );
};

const fetchRecordingUrlByCallUuid = async (callUuid) => {
  try {
    const result = await plivoClient.recordings.list({
      call_uuid: callUuid,
      limit: 1,
      offset: 0,
    });

    if (Array.isArray(result) && result.length > 0 && result[0].recording_url) {
      return result[0].recording_url;
    }

    if (result?.objects?.length && result.objects[0].recording_url) {
      return result.objects[0].recording_url;
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.error('fetchRecordingUrlByCallUuid error:', e);
  }
  return null;
};

const voicemailCompleteHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { From, To, CallUUID, RecordingDuration } = req.body;

    let recordingUrl = getRecordingUrlFromBody(req.body);
    if (!recordingUrl && CallUUID) {
      recordingUrl = await fetchRecordingUrlByCallUuid(CallUUID);
    }

    let call = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({ where: { callUUID: CallUUID } });
    const explicitOrganizationId = String(req.query?.organizationId || '').trim();
    const org = explicitOrganizationId
      ? await prisma.organization.findUnique({
        where: { id: explicitOrganizationId },
        include: { settings: { where: { settingName: 'callReceiver' } } },
      })
      : await callService.findOrganizationByPhoneNumber(To, {
        settings: { where: { settingName: 'callReceiver' } },
      });

    const organizationId = org?.id || (call?.organizationId ?? 'defaultOrg');

    if (!call) {
      call = await prisma.phoneCall.create({
        data: {
          from: callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(From || ''),
          to: callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(To || ''),
          callUUID: CallUUID || `voicemail-${Date.now()}`,
          direction: 'inbound',
          status: 'voicemail',
          recordingUrl: recordingUrl || null,
          organizationId,
        },
      });
    } else {
      call = await prisma.phoneCall.update({
        where: { id: call.id },
        data: {
          status: 'voicemail',
          recordingUrl: recordingUrl || call.recordingUrl || null,
        },
      });
    }

    let receiverUserIds = [];
    const setting = org?.settings?.[0];
    if (setting?.settingValue) {
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(setting.settingValue);
        if (Array.isArray(parsed)) receiverUserIds = parsed;
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('Error parsing callReceiver setting:', e);
      }
    }

    if (receiverUserIds.length === 0 && org?.mainReceiverId) {
      receiverUserIds.push(org.mainReceiverId);
    }

    const pushPayload = {
      title: 'New Voicemail',
      body: `From: ${From || 'Unknown'}${RecordingDuration ? ` • ${RecordingDuration}s` : ''} • Transcribing…`,
      type: 'VOICEMAIL',
      callId: call.id,
      recordingUrl: recordingUrl || null,
      callerNumber: call.from || From || '',
      businessNumber: call.to || To || '',
      priority: 'high',
    };

    for (const uid of receiverUserIds) {
      await sendPushNotificationToUser(uid, pushPayload);
    }

    const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
    socket.to(organizationId).emit('newVoicemail', {
      ...call,
      recordingUrl: recordingUrl || null,
    });

    if (recordingUrl || call.recordingUrl) {
      const effectiveUrl = recordingUrl || call.recordingUrl;
      callLLMService
        .transcribeOnly(call.id, effectiveUrl)
        .then(async ({ transcription }) => {
          const updatedCall = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({ where: { id: call.id } });
          if (!updatedCall) return;
          socket.to(organizationId).emit('voicemailTranscribed', updatedCall);

          const preview = String(transcription || '').trim().slice(0, 900);
          const transcriptPayload = {
            title: `Voicemail from ${updatedCall.from || From || 'Unknown'}`,
            body: preview || 'The voicemail transcript is ready.',
            type: 'VOICEMAIL_TRANSCRIBED',
            callId: updatedCall.id,
            recordingUrl: updatedCall.recordingUrl || effectiveUrl,
            transcription: preview,
            callerNumber: updatedCall.from || From || '',
            businessNumber: updatedCall.to || To || '',
            quickReply: true,
            category: 'WORKSMRT_VOICEMAIL',
            priority: 'high',
          };
          await Promise.all(receiverUserIds.map((uid) => sendPushNotificationToUser(uid, transcriptPayload)));
        })
        .catch((err) => console.error('Error in voicemail transcription:', err));
    }

    res.set('Content-Type', 'text/xml');
    return res.send(`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response></Response>`);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in voicemailCompleteHandler:', error);
    return res.status(500).send('Server Error');
  }
};

const rephraseMessageHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { text, tone = 'concise_friendly' } = req.body;
    if (!text || !text.trim()) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing text' });

    const userId = req.user?.id || req.user?.userId || null;
    const sessionId = req.headers['x-session-id'] || null;

    const rephrased = await callLLMService.rephraseText({
      text,
      tone,
      userId,
      sessionId,
    });

    return res.status(200).json({ rephrased });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error rephrasing message:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to rephrase message' });
  }
};

const updateMessageTagsHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { id } = req.params;
    const { tags, category } = req.body;
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

    const updated = await prisma.phoneMessage.updateMany({
      where: {
        id,
        organizationId,
      },
      data: {
        tags,
        category,
      },
    });

    if (updated.count === 0) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Message not found' });
    }

    const message = await prisma.phoneMessage.findUnique({
      where: { id },
    });

    return res.status(200).json({
      success: true,
      message,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error updating message tags/category:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to update message' });
  }
};

const deleteSmsConversationHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
  const phone = String(req.query.phone || '').trim();
  const phoneVariants = buildPhoneVariants(phone);

  if (!phoneVariants.length) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Phone number is required' });
  }

  try {
    const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: organizationId },
      select: { phoneNumber: true },
    });

    if (phonesMatch(phone, organization?.phoneNumber)) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Cannot delete the organization phone thread' });
    }

    const result = await prisma.phoneMessage.deleteMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        OR: [
          { from: { in: phoneVariants } },
          { to: { in: phoneVariants } },
        ],
      },
    });

    const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
    socket.to(organizationId).emit('smsConversationDeleted', {
      phone,
      normalizedPhone: normalizePhone(phone),
      deletedCount: result.count,
    });

    return res.status(200).json({
      success: true,
      deletedCount: result.count,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error deleting SMS conversation:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to delete SMS conversation' });
  }
};

const importSmsThreadHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const { messages, phoneNumber, orgPhoneNumber, threadId } = req.body;
  const userId = req.user?.id || req.user?.userId;
  const organizationId = req.user?.organizationId;

  try {
    if (!organizationId) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Organization ID is required' });
    }
    if (!Array.isArray(messages) || messages.length === 0) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Messages array is required' });
    }
    if (!phoneNumber) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Customer phone number is required' });
    }

    const orgPhone = orgPhoneNumber;
    if (!orgPhone) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Organization phone number is required' });
    }

    const formattedOrgPhone = callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(orgPhone);
    const formattedCustomerPhone = callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(phoneNumber);

    if (!formattedOrgPhone || !formattedCustomerPhone) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid phone numbers' });
    }

    const importKey = threadId || `${formattedCustomerPhone}-${Date.now()}`;

    const existingMessages = await prisma.phoneMessage.findMany({
      where: { importThreadId: importKey, organizationId },
      select: { id: true, createdAt: true, direction: true },
    });

    const existingSet = new Set(
      existingMessages.map((m) => `${m.createdAt.getTime()}-${m.direction}`)
    );

    const toCreate = [];
    let skipped = 0;

    for (const msg of messages) {
      const msgDate = msg.date ? new Date(Number(msg.date)) : new Date();
      const dedupKey = `${msgDate.getTime()}-${msg.type}`;

      if (existingSet.has(dedupKey)) {
        skipped++;
        continue;
      }

      toCreate.push({
        from: msg.type === 'inbound' ? formattedCustomerPhone : formattedOrgPhone,
        to: msg.type === 'inbound' ? formattedOrgPhone : formattedCustomerPhone,
        text: msg.body || '',
        type: 'sms',
        direction: msg.type === 'inbound' ? 'inbound' : 'outbound',
        userId,
        organizationId,
        importThreadId: importKey,
        createdAt: msgDate,
      });
    }

    let created = [];
    if (toCreate.length > 0) {
      await prisma.phoneMessage.createMany({ data: toCreate });
      created = await prisma.phoneMessage.findMany({
        where: { importThreadId: importKey, organizationId },
        orderBy: { createdAt: 'asc' },
        take: toCreate.length,
      });
    }

    const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
    for (const msg of created) {
      socket.to(organizationId).emit('newSms', msg);
    }

    const contact = await prisma.contact.findFirst({
      where: { organizationId, phone: { contains: phoneNumber.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(-10) } },
    });

    if (created.length > 0 && contact) {
      await sendPushNotificationToOrg(organizationId, {
        type: 'SMS_RECEIVED',
        title: `Imported SMS from ${contact.name || phoneNumber}`,
        body: `${created.length} messages imported from phone SMS`,
        url: '/calls',
        phoneFrom: formattedCustomerPhone,
        phoneTo: formattedOrgPhone,
        contactName: contact.name || null,
      }, { requiredPermissions: ['calls:view'] }).catch(() => {});
    }

    return res.status(200).json({
      imported: created.length,
      skipped,
      total: messages.length,
      threadId: importKey,
      phoneNumber: formattedCustomerPhone,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error importing SMS thread:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to import SMS thread' });
  }
};

router.get('/generated/receptionist-greetings/:fileName', withHandler({ handler: serveGeneratedGreetingHandler, allowedMethods: ['GET'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.get('/active', withHandler({ handler: getActiveCallHandler, allowedMethods: ['GET'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/message/send', withHandler({ handler: sendSmsMessageHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/message/media', withHandler({ handler: uploadSmsMediaHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/message/inbound', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: inboundSmsMessageHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.delete('/message/conversation', withHandler({ handler: deleteSmsConversationHandler, allowedMethods: ['DELETE'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.patch('/message/:id', withHandler({ handler: updateMessageTagsHandler, allowedMethods: ['PATCH'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/message/import-sms-thread', withHandler({ handler: importSmsThreadHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));

router.get('/messages', withHandler({ handler: getMessagesHandler, allowedMethods: ['GET'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.get('/logs', withHandler({ handler: getCallLogsHandler, allowedMethods: ['GET'], requiresAuth: true }));

router.post('/make-call', withHandler({ handler: makeCallHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/reject', withHandler({ handler: rejectCallHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/:id/send-to-voicemail', withHandler({ handler: sendCallToVoicemailHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));

router.post('/answer', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: answerCallHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.post('/answer/outbound', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: outboundAnswerCallHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.post('/answer/human', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: humanTransferAnswerHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.post('/handle-ivr', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: handleIvrInputHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));

router.post('/dial-events', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: dialEventsHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.post('/dial-status', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: dialStatusHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));

router.post('/status', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: callStatusHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.post('/hangup', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: hangupCallHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));

router.post('/voicemail/complete', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: voicemailCompleteHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.post('/voicemail/start', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: voicemailStartHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));

router.post('/rephrase', withHandler({ handler: rephraseMessageHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));

router.use('/', conversationsRoute);
router.use('/ivr', ivrRoute);
router.use('/transcribe', transcribeRoute);
router.use('/transcribeAndSummarize', transcribeAndSummarizeRoute);

export default router;

```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/calls/ivr.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/ivr.js
import express from 'express';
import multer from 'multer';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs/promises';
import crypto from 'crypto';
import { Client as PlivoClient } from 'plivo';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import withHandler from '#shared/utils/withHandler.js';
import callService from '#services/calls/services/CallService.js';
import { validatePlivoWebhookRequest } from '#services/calls/PlivoWebhookService.js';
import {
  ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME,
  createDefaultIvrDefinition,
  normalizeIvrDefinition,
  renderIvrMenuXml,
  validateIvrDefinition,
} from '#services/calls/IvrService.js';
import elevenLabsTTSService from '#services/calls/ElevenLabsTTSService.js';
import {
  createIvrMenu,
  deleteIvrMenu,
  findIvrMenu,
  listIvrMenus,
  publishIvrMenu,
  updateIvrMenu,
} from '#services/calls/IvrRepository.js';

const router = express.Router();
const CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME = 'callReceptionistMode';
const SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME = 'sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled';
const ALLOWED_MODES = new Set(['legacy', 'direct', 'sip_all', 'ivr', 'experimental_ai']);

const plivoClient = (() => {
  try {
    return new PlivoClient(process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_ID, process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_TOKEN);
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('[IVR] Plivo client initialization failed:', error.message);
    return null;
  }
})();

const organizationIdFor = (req) => req.user?.organizationId || req.user?.organization?.id || '';

const getMenu = (organizationId, id) => findIvrMenu({ id, organizationId });

const textHash = (text = '') => crypto.createHash('sha256').update(String(text).trim()).digest('hex');

const synthesizeToIvrFile = async ({ text, organizationId, menuId, label }) => {
  const hash = textHash(text);
  const directory = path.join(process.cwd(), 'uploads', organizationId, 'calls', 'ivr', 'generated');
  const fileName = `${menuId}-${label}-${hash.slice(0, 16)}.mp3`;
  const filePath = path.join(directory, fileName);

  try {
    await fs.access(filePath);
  } catch {
    const result = await elevenLabsTTSService.synthesize(text, {
      outputFormat: 'mp3_44100_128',
      metadata: { feature: 'ivr', organizationId, menuId, label },
    });
    await fs.mkdir(directory, { recursive: true });
    await fs.writeFile(filePath, result.audioBuffer);
  }

  return {
    hash,
    url: `/uploads/${organizationId}/calls/ivr/generated/${fileName}`,
  };
};

const synthesizeDefinitionAudio = async ({ definition, organizationId, menuId }) => {
  const next = normalizeIvrDefinition(definition);
  next.nodes = await Promise.all(next.nodes.map(async (node) => {
    if (node.prompt.type !== 'tts') return node;
    const hash = textHash(node.prompt.text);
    if (node.prompt.generatedAudioUrl && node.prompt.generatedTextHash === hash) return node;
    const generated = await synthesizeToIvrFile({
      text: node.prompt.text,
      organizationId,
      menuId,
      label: node.id.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, '-'),
    });
    return {
      ...node,
      prompt: {
        ...node.prompt,
        generatedAudioUrl: generated.url,
        generatedTextHash: generated.hash,
      },
    };
  }));

  const voicemailHash = textHash(next.voicemailGreeting);
  if (!next.voicemailAudioUrl || next.voicemailTextHash !== voicemailHash) {
    const generated = await synthesizeToIvrFile({
      text: next.voicemailGreeting,
      organizationId,
      menuId,
      label: 'voicemail',
    });
    next.voicemailAudioUrl = generated.url;
    next.voicemailTextHash = generated.hash;
  }
  return next;
};

const listMenusHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const [menus, settings] = await Promise.all([
    listIvrMenus(organizationId),
    prisma.settings.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        settingName: { in: [CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME, ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME, SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME] },
      },
    }),
  ]);

  const settingMap = Object.fromEntries(settings.map((setting) => [setting.settingName, setting.settingValue]));
  return res.json({
    menus,
    activeMenuId: settingMap[ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME] || '',
    handlingMode: ALLOWED_MODES.has(settingMap[CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME])
      ? settingMap[CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME]
      : 'direct',
    sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled: settingMap[SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME] !== 'false',
  });
};

const createMenuHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const name = String(req.body?.name || '').trim().slice(0, 120);
  if (!name) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Menu name is required.' });

  const definition = normalizeIvrDefinition(req.body?.definition || createDefaultIvrDefinition());
  const menu = await createIvrMenu({
    organizationId,
    name,
    description: String(req.body?.description || '').trim().slice(0, 500) || null,
    draftDefinition: definition,
  });
  return res.status(201).json({ menu });
};

const getMenuHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const menu = await getMenu(organizationIdFor(req), req.params.id);
  if (!menu) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'IVR menu not found.' });
  return res.json({ menu });
};

const updateMenuHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const existing = await getMenu(organizationId, req.params.id);
  if (!existing) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'IVR menu not found.' });

  const name = typeof req.body?.name === 'undefined'
    ? existing.name
    : String(req.body.name || '').trim().slice(0, 120);
  if (!name) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Menu name is required.' });

  const menu = await updateIvrMenu({
    organizationId,
    id: existing.id,
    name,
    description: typeof req.body?.description === 'undefined'
      ? existing.description
      : String(req.body.description || '').trim().slice(0, 500) || null,
    draftDefinition: typeof req.body?.definition === 'undefined'
      ? existing.draftDefinition
      : normalizeIvrDefinition(req.body.definition),
  });
  return res.json({ menu });
};

const validateMenuForOrganization = async (organizationId, definition) => {
  const result = validateIvrDefinition(definition);
  if (!result.valid) return result;

  const referencedUserIds = [...new Set(result.definition.nodes.flatMap((node) => (
    [...node.options.map((option) => option.action), node.invalidAction, node.noInputAction]
      .filter((action) => action.type === 'transfer_user')
      .map((action) => action.userId)
  )))];
  if (!referencedUserIds.length) return result;

  const users = await prisma.user.findMany({
    where: { organizationId, id: { in: referencedUserIds } },
    select: { id: true, phoneNumber: true },
  });
  const found = new Map(users.map((user) => [user.id, user]));
  referencedUserIds.forEach((userId) => {
    if (!found.has(userId)) result.errors.push('A transfer option references a user outside this organization.');
    else if (!found.get(userId).phoneNumber) result.errors.push('A selected transfer user does not have a phone number.');
  });
  result.valid = result.errors.length === 0;
  return result;
};

const validateMenuHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const menu = await getMenu(organizationId, req.params.id);
  if (!menu) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'IVR menu not found.' });

  const result = await validateMenuForOrganization(organizationId, req.body?.definition || menu.draftDefinition);
  return res.status(result.valid ? 200 : 422).json(result);
};

const publishMenuHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const menu = await getMenu(organizationId, req.params.id);
  if (!menu) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'IVR menu not found.' });

  const validation = await validateMenuForOrganization(organizationId, menu.draftDefinition);
  if (!validation.valid) return res.status(422).json(validation);

  const synthesizedDefinition = await synthesizeDefinitionAudio({
    definition: validation.definition,
    organizationId,
    menuId: menu.id,
  });

  const updated = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    const published = await publishIvrMenu({ organizationId, id: menu.id, definition: synthesizedDefinition }, tx);

    if (req.body?.activate !== false) {
      await tx.settings.upsert({
        where: { orgSetting_unique: { organizationId, settingName: ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME } },
        update: { settingValue: menu.id },
        create: { organizationId, settingName: ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME, settingValue: menu.id, description: 'Published IVR menu used for inbound calls.' },
      });
    }
    return published;
  });

  return res.json({ menu: updated, active: req.body?.activate !== false });
};

const deleteMenuHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const settings = await prisma.settings.findMany({
    where: { organizationId, settingName: { in: [ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME, CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME] } },
  });
  const settingMap = Object.fromEntries(settings.map((setting) => [setting.settingName, setting.settingValue]));
  const isActive = settingMap[ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME] === req.params.id;
  if (isActive && settingMap[CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME] === 'ivr') {
    return res.status(409).json({ error: 'Select another active IVR menu before deleting this one.' });
  }
  const count = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
    const deleted = await deleteIvrMenu({ id: req.params.id, organizationId }, tx);
    if (deleted && isActive) {
      await tx.settings.deleteMany({ where: { organizationId, settingName: ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME } });
    }
    return deleted;
  });
  if (!count) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'IVR menu not found.' });
  return res.json({ success: true });
};

const updateHandlingSettingsHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const mode = String(req.body?.mode || '').trim();
  const activeMenuId = String(req.body?.activeMenuId || '').trim();
  const sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled = req.body?.sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled !== false;
  if (!ALLOWED_MODES.has(mode)) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Unsupported call handling mode.' });

  if (mode === 'ivr') {
    const menu = await findIvrMenu({ id: activeMenuId, organizationId });
    if (!menu?.publishedDefinition) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Select and publish an IVR menu before enabling IVR mode.' });
  }

  const updates = [
    prisma.settings.upsert({
      where: { orgSetting_unique: { organizationId, settingName: CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME } },
      update: { settingValue: mode },
      create: { organizationId, settingName: CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME, settingValue: mode, description: 'Controls inbound call handling mode.' },
    }),
  ];
  updates.push(prisma.settings.upsert({
    where: { orgSetting_unique: { organizationId, settingName: SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME } },
    update: { settingValue: String(sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled) },
    create: {
      organizationId,
      settingName: SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME,
      settingValue: String(sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled),
      description: 'Send unanswered calls from the all-permitted-users SIP route to voicemail.',
    },
  }));
  if (activeMenuId) {
    updates.push(prisma.settings.upsert({
      where: { orgSetting_unique: { organizationId, settingName: ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME } },
      update: { settingValue: activeMenuId },
      create: { organizationId, settingName: ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME, settingValue: activeMenuId, description: 'Published IVR menu used for inbound calls.' },
    }));
  }
  await prisma.$transaction(updates);
  return res.json({ mode, activeMenuId, sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled });
};

const ivrAudioStorage = multer.diskStorage({
  destination: async (req, file, callback) => {
    try {
      const directory = path.join(process.cwd(), 'uploads', organizationIdFor(req), 'calls', 'ivr');
      await fs.mkdir(directory, { recursive: true });
      callback(null, directory);
    } catch (error) {
      callback(error);
    }
  },
  filename: (req, file, callback) => {
    const extension = path.extname(file.originalname || '').toLowerCase();
    callback(null, `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}${extension}`);
  },
});

const ivrAudioUpload = multer({
  storage: ivrAudioStorage,
  limits: { fileSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024, files: 1 },
  fileFilter: (req, file, callback) => {
    const extension = path.extname(file.originalname || '').toLowerCase();
    const allowed = ['.mp3', '.wav'].includes(extension) && ['audio/mpeg', 'audio/mp3', 'audio/wav', 'audio/x-wav', 'audio/wave'].includes(file.mimetype);
    callback(allowed ? null : new Error('Only MP3 and WAV audio files are supported.'), allowed);
  },
}).single('audio');

const uploadAudioHandler = async (req, res) => {
  await new Promise((resolve, reject) => ivrAudioUpload(req, res, (error) => (error ? reject(error) : resolve())));
  if (!req.file) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Audio file is required.' });
  const url = `/uploads/${organizationIdFor(req)}/calls/ivr/${req.file.filename}`;
  return res.status(201).json({ url, fileName: req.file.filename });
};

const previewTtsHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const text = String(req.body?.text || '').trim().slice(0, 3000);
  if (!text) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Prompt text is required.' });
  const result = await elevenLabsTTSService.synthesize(text, {
    outputFormat: 'mp3_44100_128',
    metadata: { feature: 'ivr-preview', organizationId: organizationIdFor(req) },
  });
  res.set({
    'Content-Type': result.mimeType,
    'Content-Length': String(result.audioBuffer.length),
    'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
  });
  return res.send(result.audioBuffer);
};

const generateVoicemailAudioHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const menu = await getMenu(organizationId, req.params.id);
  if (!menu) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'IVR menu not found.' });

  const text = String(req.body?.text || menu.draftDefinition?.voicemailGreeting || '')
    .trim()
    .slice(0, 1000);
  if (!text) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Voicemail greeting text is required.' });

  const generated = await synthesizeToIvrFile({
    text,
    organizationId,
    menuId: menu.id,
    label: 'voicemail',
  });
  const definition = normalizeIvrDefinition({
    ...menu.draftDefinition,
    voicemailGreeting: text,
    voicemailAudioUrl: generated.url,
    voicemailTextHash: generated.hash,
  });
  const updated = await updateIvrMenu({
    organizationId,
    id: menu.id,
    name: menu.name,
    description: menu.description,
    draftDefinition: definition,
  });

  return res.json({
    url: generated.url,
    hash: generated.hash,
    definition: updated.draftDefinition,
  });
};

const testAnswerHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = String(req.query.organizationId || '');
  const menu = await getMenu(organizationId, req.params.id);
  if (!menu) return res.status(404).type('text/xml').send('<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Speak>This test menu is unavailable.</Speak><Hangup/></Response>');
  res.type('text/xml');
  return res.send(renderIvrMenuXml({
    menu: { ...menu, publishedDefinition: menu.draftDefinition, isTestDraft: true },
    nodeId: menu.draftDefinition?.rootNodeId,
  }));
};

const testCallHandler = async (req, res) => {
  if (!plivoClient) return res.status(503).json({ error: 'Plivo is not configured.' });
  const organizationId = organizationIdFor(req);
  const menu = await getMenu(organizationId, req.params.id);
  if (!menu) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'IVR menu not found.' });

  const destination = callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(req.body?.phoneNumber || '');
  if (!destination) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Enter a valid phone number for the test call.' });
  const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
    where: { id: organizationId },
    select: { phoneNumber: true, phoneNumbers: { take: 1, orderBy: { createdAt: 'asc' } } },
  });
  const source = callService.formatPhoneNumberE164(
    organization?.phoneNumbers?.[0]?.phoneNumber || organization?.phoneNumber || ''
  );
  if (!source) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Add an organization phone number before testing the IVR.' });

  const baseUrl = String(process.env.API_URL || process.env.PUBLIC_API_URL || '').replace(/\/$/, '');
  const answerUrl = `${baseUrl}/calls/ivr/${encodeURIComponent(menu.id)}/test-answer?organizationId=${encodeURIComponent(organizationId)}`;
  const validation = await validateMenuForOrganization(organizationId, menu.draftDefinition);
  if (!validation.valid) return res.status(422).json(validation);
  const synthesizedDefinition = await synthesizeDefinitionAudio({
    definition: validation.definition,
    organizationId,
    menuId: menu.id,
  });
  await updateIvrMenu({
    organizationId,
    id: menu.id,
    name: menu.name,
    description: menu.description,
    draftDefinition: synthesizedDefinition,
  });
  const result = await plivoClient.calls.create(source, destination, answerUrl, { answerMethod: 'POST' });
  return res.json({ success: true, message: `Test call started to ${destination}.`, requestUuid: result?.requestUuid || result?.request_uuid || null });
};

const inputHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const xml = await callService.handleManagedIvrSelection({
    ...req.body,
    menuId: req.query.menuId,
    nodeId: req.query.nodeId,
    event: req.query.event,
    test: req.query.test,
    organizationId: req.query.organizationId,
  });
  res.type('text/xml');
  return res.send(xml);
};

router.post('/input', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: inputHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.get('/', withHandler({ handler: listMenusHandler, allowedMethods: ['GET'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/', withHandler({ handler: createMenuHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.put('/settings', withHandler({ handler: updateHandlingSettingsHandler, allowedMethods: ['PUT'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/audio', withHandler({ handler: uploadAudioHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/tts-preview', withHandler({ handler: previewTtsHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/:id/voicemail-audio', withHandler({ handler: generateVoicemailAudioHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/:id/test-answer', validatePlivoWebhookRequest, withHandler({ handler: testAnswerHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: false }));
router.post('/:id/test-call', withHandler({ handler: testCallHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.get('/:id', withHandler({ handler: getMenuHandler, allowedMethods: ['GET'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.put('/:id', withHandler({ handler: updateMenuHandler, allowedMethods: ['PUT'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.delete('/:id', withHandler({ handler: deleteMenuHandler, allowedMethods: ['DELETE'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/:id/validate', withHandler({ handler: validateMenuHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));
router.post('/:id/publish', withHandler({ handler: publishMenuHandler, allowedMethods: ['POST'], requiresAuth: true }));

export default router;
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/message.js
import express from 'express';
import withHandler from '#shared/utils/withHandler.js';
import { sendErrorResponse } from '#middleware/errorHandler.js';
import callService from '#services/calls/services/CallService.js';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';

const router = express.Router();

const sendSmsMessageHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const { to, text,  type = 'sms', mediaUrls = [] } = req.body;
  const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;;
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

  try {
    const result = await callService.sendSmsMessage({
      to,
      text,
      type,
      mediaUrls,
      userId,
      organizationId,
    });

    return res.status(200).json({
      success: true,
      apiId: result.apiId,
      messageUuid: result.messageUuid,
      message: 'Message sent successfully',
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Send SMS Message Error:', error);
    return sendErrorResponse(res, error);
  }
};

const inboundSmsMessageHandler = async (req, res) => {
  try {

    console.log(req.body)
    // Delegate inbound SMS processing to the call service.
    await callService.handleInboundSms(req.body);

    res.set('Content-Type', 'text/xml');
    return res.send(`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Response>
  <Message>Thank you for your message.</Message>
</Response>`);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Inbound SMS Message Error:', error);
    return sendErrorResponse(res, error);
  }
};

router.post(
  '/send',
  withHandler({
    handler: sendSmsMessageHandler,
    allowedMethods: ['POST'],
    requiresAuth: true,
  })
);

router.post(
  '/inbound',
  withHandler({
    handler: inboundSmsMessageHandler,
    allowedMethods: ['POST'],
    requiresAuth: false,
  })
);

export default router;

```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/calls/sockets.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/sockets.js
import { getNamespace } from '#shared/socket.js';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import cookie from 'cookie';
import { verifyAuthToken } from '#shared/utils/authToken.js';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your_jwt_secret_here';

const setupCallSockets = () => {
  const callNamespace = getNamespace('/calls');

  callNamespace.use(async (socket, next) => {
    try {
      const cookies = socket.handshake.headers.cookie;
      if (!cookies) {
        return next(new Error('Authentication error: No cookies sent'));
      }
      const parsedCookies = cookie.parse(cookies);
      const token = parsedCookies.token;
      if (!token) {
        return next(new Error('Authentication error: No token provided'));
      }
      const decoded = verifyAuthToken(token, JWT_SECRET);
      
      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
        where: { id: decoded.userId },
      });
      if (!user) {
        return next(new Error('Authentication error: User not found'));
      }
      socket.user = user;
      next();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Call Socket auth error:", error);
      next(error);
    }
  });

  callNamespace.on('connection', (socket) => {

    if (socket.user) {
      if (socket.user.id) {
        socket.join(socket.user.id);
      }

      if (socket.user.organizationId) {
        socket.join(socket.user.organizationId);
      }
    }

    socket.on('callStarted', (data) => {
      console.log(`Call started: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);
    });

    socket.on('callEnded', (data) => {
      console.log(`Call ended: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);
    });

    socket.on('audioChunk', (data) => {
      // Process audio chunk
    });

    socket.on('disconnect', () => {
      console.log(`Call client disconnected: ${socket.id}`);
    });
  });
};

export default setupCallSockets;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/tests/messages.test.js
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import { vi, describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';

const prismaMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  phoneMessage: {
    findMany: vi.fn(),
    deleteMany: vi.fn(),
  },
  phoneCall: {
    findMany: vi.fn(),
  },
  organization: {
    findUnique: vi.fn(),
  },
  contact: {
    findMany: vi.fn(),
  },
}));

vi.mock('#shared/database/prismaClient.js', () => ({
  default: prismaMock,
}));

vi.mock('#shared/utils/pushNotifications.js', () => ({
  sendPushNotificationToUser: vi.fn(),
}));

vi.mock('#shared/socket.js', () => ({
  getNamespace: vi.fn(() => ({
    to: vi.fn(() => ({
      emit: vi.fn(),
    })),
    emit: vi.fn(),
  })),
}));

import callsRouter from '../index.js';

const authHeader = (payload) => {
  process.env.JWT_SECRET = 'test-secret';
  return `Bearer ${jwt.sign(payload, 'test-secret')}`;
};

const getMessagesRouteHandler = () =>
  callsRouter.stack.find((layer) => layer.route?.path === '/messages' && layer.route.methods.get).route.stack[0].handle;

const getDeleteConversationRouteHandler = () =>
  callsRouter.stack.find((layer) => layer.route?.path === '/message/conversation' && layer.route.methods.delete).route.stack[0].handle;

const getConversationRouteHandler = () => {
  const routerLayer = callsRouter.stack.find((layer) => layer.name === 'router');
  const route = routerLayer.handle.stack.find(
    (layer) => layer.route?.path === '/conversation' && layer.route.methods.get
  ).route;
  return route.stack[0].handle;
};

const invokeMessagesRoute = async ({ headers = {}, query = {} } = {}) => {
  const req = {
    method: 'GET',
    headers,
    query,
    url: '/messages',
    originalUrl: '/api/calls/messages',
    user: undefined,
  };
  const res = {
    statusCode: 200,
    headers: {},
    body: undefined,
    setHeader(name, value) {
      this.headers[name] = value;
    },
    status(code) {
      this.statusCode = code;
      return this;
    },
    json(payload) {
      this.body = payload;
      return this;
    },
    end(payload) {
      this.body = payload;
      return this;
    },
  };

  await getMessagesRouteHandler()(req, res);
  return res;
};

const invokeConversationRoute = async ({ headers = {}, query = {} } = {}) => {
  const req = {
    method: 'GET',
    headers,
    query,
    url: '/conversation',
    originalUrl: '/api/calls/conversation',
    user: undefined,
  };
  const res = {
    statusCode: 200,
    headers: {},
    body: undefined,
    setHeader(name, value) {
      this.headers[name] = value;
    },
    status(code) {
      this.statusCode = code;
      return this;
    },
    json(payload) {
      this.body = payload;
      return this;
    },
    end(payload) {
      this.body = payload;
      return this;
    },
  };

  await getConversationRouteHandler()(req, res);
  return res;
};

const invokeDeleteConversationRoute = async ({ headers = {}, query = {} } = {}) => {
  const req = {
    method: 'DELETE',
    headers,
    query,
    url: '/message/conversation',
    originalUrl: '/api/calls/message/conversation',
    user: undefined,
  };
  const res = {
    statusCode: 200,
    headers: {},
    body: undefined,
    setHeader(name, value) {
      this.headers[name] = value;
    },
    status(code) {
      this.statusCode = code;
      return this;
    },
    json(payload) {
      this.body = payload;
      return this;
    },
    end(payload) {
      this.body = payload;
      return this;

  await getDeleteConversationRouteHandler()(req, res);
  return res;
};

describe('Calls API - Date/Time Filtering tests', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    vi.clearAllMocks();
  });

  it('GET /messages applies date range filters if provided via startDate/endDate', async () => {
    prismaMock.phoneMessage.findMany.mockResolvedValue([]);

    const response = await invokeMessagesRoute({
      headers: { authorization: authHeader({ id: 'user-1', organizationId: 'org-1' }) },
      query: {
        startDate: '2026-05-01T00:00:00Z',
        endDate: '2026-05-31T23:59:59Z',
      },
    });

    expect(response.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(prismaMock.phoneMessage.findMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      where: {
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        createdAt: {
          gte: new Date('2026-05-01T00:00:00Z'),
          lte: new Date('2026-05-31T23:59:59Z'),
        },
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
    });
  });

  it('GET /messages applies date range filters if provided via timeMin/timeMax', async () => {
    prismaMock.phoneMessage.findMany.mockResolvedValue([]);

    const response = await invokeMessagesRoute({
      headers: { authorization: authHeader({ id: 'user-1', organizationId: 'org-1' }) },
      query: {
        timeMin: '2026-05-10T00:00:00Z',
        timeMax: '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z',
      },
    });

    expect(response.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(prismaMock.phoneMessage.findMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      where: {
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        createdAt: {
          gte: new Date('2026-05-10T00:00:00Z'),
          lte: new Date('2026-05-20T00:00:00Z'),
        },
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
    });
  });

  it('GET /conversation applies date range filters for calls and messages queries', async () => {
    prismaMock.organization.findUnique.mockResolvedValue({ phoneNumber: '+15556667777' });
    prismaMock.phoneCall.findMany.mockResolvedValue([]);
    prismaMock.phoneMessage.findMany.mockResolvedValue([]);

    const response = await invokeConversationRoute({
      headers: { authorization: authHeader({ id: 'user-1', organizationId: 'org-1' }) },
      query: {
        phone: '+14155552671',
        startDate: '2026-05-01T00:00:00Z',
        endDate: '2026-05-31T23:59:59Z',
      },
    });

    expect(response.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(prismaMock.phoneCall.findMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      where: {
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        OR: [
          { from: { in: ['14155552671', '+14155552671', '4155552671', '+4155552671'] } },
          { to: { in: ['14155552671', '+14155552671', '4155552671', '+4155552671'] } },
        ],
        createdAt: {
          gte: new Date('2026-05-01T00:00:00Z'),
          lte: new Date('2026-05-31T23:59:59Z'),
        },
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      select: expect.any(Object),
    });

    expect(prismaMock.phoneMessage.findMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      where: {
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        OR: [
          { from: { in: ['14155552671', '+14155552671', '4155552671', '+4155552671'] } },
          { to: { in: ['14155552671', '+14155552671', '4155552671', '+4155552671'] } },
        ],
        createdAt: {
          gte: new Date('2026-05-01T00:00:00Z'),
          lte: new Date('2026-05-31T23:59:59Z'),
        },
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      select: expect.any(Object),
    });
  });

  it('DELETE /message/conversation deletes SMS messages for the requested phone in the user organization', async () => {
    prismaMock.organization.findUnique.mockResolvedValue({ phoneNumber: '+15556667777' });
    prismaMock.phoneMessage.deleteMany.mockResolvedValue({ count: 3 });

    const response = await invokeDeleteConversationRoute({
      headers: { authorization: authHeader({ id: 'user-1', organizationId: 'org-1' }) },
      query: {
        phone: '+14155552671',
      },
    });

    expect(response.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(response.body).toEqual({ success: true, deletedCount: 3 });
    expect(prismaMock.phoneMessage.deleteMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      where: {
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        OR: [
          { from: { in: ['+14155552671', '14155552671', '4155552671', '+4155552671'] } },
          { to: { in: ['+14155552671', '14155552671', '4155552671', '+4155552671'] } },
        ],
      },
    });
  });
});
```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/calls/transcribe.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/transcribe.js
//--- File: server/src/routes/api/calls/transcribe.js ---
import express from 'express';
import multer from 'multer';
import { getSession } from '#shared/utils/auth.js';
import { sendErrorResponse } from '#middleware/errorHandler.js';
import GoogleApiService from '#integrations/google/services/googleApiService.js'; // Adjust the import path as necessary

const router = express.Router();

// Configure multer for file uploads
const storage = multer.memoryStorage();
const upload = multer({
  storage,
  limits: { fileSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 10 MB limit
  fileFilter: (req, file, cb) => {
    if (
      file.mimetype === 'audio/webm' ||
      file.mimetype === 'audio/ogg' ||
      file.mimetype === 'audio/wav' ||
      file.mimetype === 'audio/mpeg'
    ) {
      cb(null, true);
    } else {
      cb(new Error('Unsupported file type'), false);
    }
  },
});

// POST /api/calls/transcribe
router.post('/', upload.single('audio'), async (req, res) => {
  try {
    // Authenticate the user
    const session = await getSession(req);
    if (!session || !session.user) {
      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized' });
    }

    // Check if file is uploaded
    if (!req.file) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No audio file uploaded.' });
    }

    // Assuming emailAccountId is part of the session.user object
    const emailAccountId = session.user.emailAccountId; // Adjust field name as needed

    if (!emailAccountId) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'User does not have an associated email account.' });
    }

    // Initialize GoogleApiService with the user's emailAccountId
    const googleService = new GoogleApiService(emailAccountId);
    await googleService.initClient(); // Initialize OAuth2 client and tokens
    await googleService.initSpeechClient(); // Initialize SpeechClient

    // Perform transcription using the GoogleApiService
    const transcription = await googleService.performSpeechToText(req.file.buffer);

    return res.status(200).json({ transcription });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Transcription Error:', error);
    return sendErrorResponse(res, error);
  }
});

export default router;

```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/calls/transcribe/[id].js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/transcribe/[id].js
// server/src/routes/api/calls/transcribe/[id].js

import express from 'express';
import withHandler from '#shared/utils/withHandler.js';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import GoogleApiService from '#integrations/google/services/googleApiService.js';
import { sendErrorResponse } from '#middleware/errorHandler.js';

const router = express.Router();

const transcribeCallHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const callId = req.params.id;
  const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;;

  try {
    const call = await prisma.PhoneMessage.findUnique({
      where: { id: callId },
    });

    if (!call) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Call not found' });
    }

    if (call.userId !== userId) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Forbidden' });
    }

    if (!call.mediaUrls || !call.mediaUrls.audio) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No audio file associated with this call' });
    }

    const audioUrl = call.mediaUrls.audio;

    // Fetch the audio file
    const response = await fetch(audioUrl);
    const audioBuffer = await response.buffer();

    // Initialize GoogleApiService
    const googleService = new GoogleApiService(call.emailAccountId);
    await googleService.initSpeechClient();

    const transcription = await googleService.performSpeechToText(audioBuffer);

    // Update the call record with transcription
    await prisma.PhoneMessage.update({
      where: { id: callId },
      data: { transcription },
    });

    return res.status(200).json({ transcription });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Transcribe Call Error:', error);
    return sendErrorResponse(res, error);
  }
};

router.post(
  '/:id',
  withHandler({
    handler: transcribeCallHandler,
    allowedMethods: ['POST'],
    requiresAuth: true,
  })
);

export default router;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/routes/api/calls/transcribeAndSummarize.js
import express from 'express';
import withHandler from '#shared/utils/withHandler.js';
import callLLMService from '#services/calls/LLMService.js';

const router = express.Router();

const transcribeAndSummarizeHandler = async (req, res) => {
  const { callId } = req.body;
  const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;;
  if (!callId) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Missing callId' });
  }
  try {
    const result = await callLLMService.transcribeAndSummarize(callId, userId);
    return res.status(200).json({
      transcription: result.transcription,
      summary: result.summary,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error in transcribeAndSummarizeHandler:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message });
  }
};

router.post(
  '/',
  withHandler({
    handler: transcribeAndSummarizeHandler,
    allowedMethods: ['POST'],
    requiresAuth: true,
  })
);

export default router;
```

FILE: server/src/services/calls/CallConversationLogService.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/CallConversationLogService.js
import fs from 'fs/promises';
import path from 'path';

const LOG_FILE_NAME = 'call-transcripts.log';
const DEBUG_LOG_FILE_NAME = 'receptionist-debug.log';

function resolveServerLogsDir() {
  const cwd = process.cwd();
  const baseName = path.basename(cwd);

  if (baseName === 'server') {
    return path.join(cwd, 'logs');
  }

  return path.join(cwd, 'server', 'logs');
}

function normalizeLogText(value = '') {
  return String(value || '')
    .replace(/\r\n/g, '\n')
    .replace(/\r/g, '\n')
    .trim();
}

function formatMetaValue(value = '') {
  return String(value || '')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim() || '-';
}

function stringifyPayload(payload = {}) {
  try {
    return JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
  } catch (error) {
    return JSON.stringify({
      serializationError: error?.message || String(error),
    }, null, 2);
  }
}

class CallConversationLogService {
  constructor() {
    this.writeQueue = Promise.resolve();
  }

  getLogFilePath() {
    return path.join(resolveServerLogsDir(), LOG_FILE_NAME);
  }

  getDebugLogFilePath() {
    return path.join(resolveServerLogsDir(), DEBUG_LOG_FILE_NAME);
  }

  formatEntry({
    callId = '',
    organizationId = '',
    callerPhone = '',
    role = '',
    turn = '',
    text = '',
    source = '',
    sttProvider = '',
    speechProvider = '',
    createdAt = new Date(),
  } = {}) {
    const normalizedRole = role === 'assistant'
      ? 'AI'
      : role === 'thinking'
        ? 'THINKING'
        : 'CALLER';
    const normalizedText = normalizeLogText(text);
    const timestamp = createdAt instanceof Date
      ? createdAt.toISOString()
      : new Date(createdAt || Date.now()).toISOString();

    return [
      `[${timestamp}] ${normalizedRole}`,
      `callId=${formatMetaValue(callId)} orgId=${formatMetaValue(organizationId)} caller=${formatMetaValue(callerPhone)} turn=${formatMetaValue(turn)} source=${formatMetaValue(source)} stt=${formatMetaValue(sttProvider)} speech=${formatMetaValue(speechProvider)}`,
      normalizedText || '(empty)',
      '',
    ].join('\n');
  }

  async appendEntry(entry = {}) {
    const logFile = this.getLogFilePath();
    const write = async () => {
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(logFile), { recursive: true });
      await fs.appendFile(logFile, `${this.formatEntry(entry)}\n`, 'utf8');
      return logFile;
    };

    this.writeQueue = this.writeQueue.then(write, write);
    return this.writeQueue;
  }

  async appendThinkingStep({
    callId = '',
    organizationId = '',
    callerPhone = '',
    turn = '',
    step = '',
    payload = {},
    source = 'experimental_receptionist',
    sttProvider = '',
    speechProvider = '',
    createdAt = new Date(),
  } = {}) {
    const payloadWithoutStep = { ...payload };
    delete payloadWithoutStep.step;

    const text = [
      `step=${formatMetaValue(step)}`,
      stringifyPayload(payloadWithoutStep),
    ].join('\n');

    return this.appendEntry({
      callId,
      organizationId,
      callerPhone,
      role: 'thinking',
      turn,
      text,
      source,
      sttProvider,
      speechProvider,
      createdAt,
    });
  }

  async appendDebugEvent({
    callId = '',
    organizationId = '',
    turn = '',
    event = '',
    payload = {},
    createdAt = new Date(),
  } = {}) {
    const logFile = this.getDebugLogFilePath();
    const timestamp = createdAt instanceof Date
      ? createdAt.toISOString()
      : new Date(createdAt || Date.now()).toISOString();

    const entry = [
      `[${timestamp}] ${formatMetaValue(event)}`,
      `callId=${formatMetaValue(callId)} orgId=${formatMetaValue(organizationId)} turn=${formatMetaValue(turn)}`,
      stringifyPayload(payload),
      '',
    ].join('\n');

    const write = async () => {
      await fs.mkdir(path.dirname(logFile), { recursive: true });
      await fs.appendFile(logFile, `${entry}\n`, 'utf8');
      return logFile;
    };

    this.writeQueue = this.writeQueue.then(write, write);
    return this.writeQueue;
  }
}

export default new CallConversationLogService();

```

FILE: server/src/services/calls/ElevenLabsTTSService.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/ElevenLabsTTSService.js
const ELEVENLABS_API_KEY = process.env.ELEVENLABS_API_KEY || '';
const ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID = process.env.ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID || '';
const ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID = process.env.ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID || 'eleven_multilingual_v2';
const ELEVENLABS_OUTPUT_FORMAT = process.env.ELEVENLABS_OUTPUT_FORMAT || 'mp3_44100_128';

class ElevenLabsTTSService {
  log(label, data = {}) {
    const stamp = new Date().toISOString();
    console.log(`[ElevenLabsTTS][${stamp}] ${label}`, data);
  }

  ensureConfigured() {
    if (!ELEVENLABS_API_KEY) {
      throw new Error('Missing ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.');
    }

    if (!ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID) {
      throw new Error('Missing ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.');
    }
  }

  async synthesize(text, options = {}) {
    this.ensureConfigured();

    const cleanText = String(text || '').trim();
    if (!cleanText) {
      throw new Error('Cannot synthesize empty text.');
    }

    const voiceId = options.voiceId || ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID;
    const modelId = options.modelId || ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID;
    const outputFormat = options.outputFormat || ELEVENLABS_OUTPUT_FORMAT;
    const url = new URL(`https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/${voiceId}`);
    url.searchParams.set('output_format', outputFormat);

    const startedAt = Date.now();
    this.log('starting synthesis', {
      voiceId,
      modelId,
      outputFormat,
      charCount: cleanText.length,
      metadata: options.metadata || null,
    });

    const response = await fetch(url.toString(), {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'xi-api-key': ELEVENLABS_API_KEY,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        text: cleanText,
        model_id: modelId,
      }),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorText = await response.text().catch(() => '');
      this.log('synthesis failed', {
        status: response.status,
        errorText,
      });
      throw new Error(`ElevenLabs TTS failed: ${response.status} ${errorText}`);
    }

    const arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();
    const latencyMs = Date.now() - startedAt;

    this.log('synthesis complete', {
      latencyMs,
      bytes: arrayBuffer.byteLength,
      requestId: response.headers.get('request-id') || '',
    });

    return {
      audioBuffer: Buffer.from(arrayBuffer),
      mimeType: outputFormat.startsWith('mp3') ? 'audio/mpeg' : 'audio/wav',
      outputFormat,
      requestId: response.headers.get('request-id') || '',
      latencyMs,
    };
  }
}

export default new ElevenLabsTTSService();

```

```js
const AVAILABILITY_REASONING_SCHEMA = z.object({
  result: z.enum(["available", "conflict", "needs_specific_time", "unknown"]).default("unknown"),
  summaryHint: z.string().default(""),
  recommendedReply: z.string().default(""),
});

const RESPONSE_SYNTHESIS_SCHEMA = z.object({
  replyText: z.string().default(""),
  action: z.string().default("respond_only"),
  disposition: z.enum(["in_progress", "ready_for_follow_up", "needs_human", "completed"]).default("ready_for_follow_up"),
  needsHuman: z.boolean().default(false),
  shouldCreateCallback: z.boolean().default(false),
  shouldCreateReservation: z.boolean().default(false),
  summary: z.string().default(""),

const BUSINESS_CONTEXT_SIGNAL_RE = /\b(price|pricing|cost|quote|rate|rates|rental|rent|package|packages|catering|buffet|appetizers|minimum spend|min spend|deposit|capacity|policy|policies|menu|food|drink|bar|room|rooms|space|spaces|lounge|patio|dining room|buyout|private event|event package)\b/i;
const RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_PROMPT_KEY = "calls_experimentalReceptionistResponse_system";
const RECEPTIONIST_DECISION_USAGE_KEY = "CALLS_RECEPTIONIST_DECISION";
const RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_USAGE_KEY = "CALLS_RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE";
const EVENT_OR_CATERING_INQUIRY_RE = /\b(?:private event|event booking|event inquiry|birthday party|corporate party|private party|buyout|partial buyout|room rental|lounge rental|dining room rental|event package|minimum spend|catering|catered|cater|offsite catering|external catering|food package|buffet)\b/i;
const CATERING_INQUIRY_RE = /\b(?:catering|catered|cater|offsite catering|external catering|food package|buffet)\b/i;
const EVENT_INTAKE_CONTEXT_RE = /\b(?:event|events|private event|party|birthday|corporate|buyout|room rental|lounge rental|dining room rental|catering|catered|cater)\b/i;
const HUMAN_EVENT_PURPOSE_RE = /\b(?:venue|package|packages|catering|event|party|booking|reservation|lunch|dinner|moonlight|lounge|patio|dining room|buyout|minimum spend|deposit|dj|audio|av|tour)\b/i;
const GUEST_COUNT_WITH_COLON_RE = /\b(\d{1,3})[:.](\d{2})\s*(?:people|guests|persons|ppl)\b/i;
const GUEST_COUNT_RE = /\b(?:for|about|around|approximately)?\s*(\d{1,4})\s*(?:people|guests|persons|ppl)\b/i;
const SPOKEN_TIME_RE = /\b(?:at\s+)?((?:1[0-2]|0?[1-9])(?::[0-5]\d)?\s*(?:a\.?m\.?|p\.?m\.?))\b/i;
const MONTH_DATE_RE = /\b(?:jan(?:uary)?|feb(?:ruary)?|mar(?:ch)?|apr(?:il)?|may|jun(?:e)?|jul(?:y)?|aug(?:ust)?|sep(?:t(?:ember)?)?|oct(?:ober)?|nov(?:ember)?|dec(?:ember)?)\.?\s+\d{1,2}(?:st|nd|rd|th)?(?:,?\s+\d{4})?\b/i;
const GREETING_AUDIO_EXTENSIONS = ["mp3", "wav", "ulaw"];

const HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_RE = /\b(?:speak to (?:a )?human|transfer me to (?:a )?human|let me speak to (?:a )?human|connect me to (?:a )?human)\b/gi;
const PURE_HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_RE = /^\s*(?:please\s*)?(?:but especially human[.!?]?\s*)?(?:speak to (?:a )?human|transfer me to (?:a )?human|let me speak to (?:a )?human|connect me to (?:a )?human|human)\.?\s*$/i;
const HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_FRAGMENT_RE = /\b(?:speak to (?:a )?human|transfer me to (?:a )?human|let me speak to (?:a )?human|connect me to (?:a )?human|human)\b/gi;
const HUMAN_TRANSFER_UNAVAILABLE_RE = /\b(?:closed|not open|after hours|no one|nobody|not answering|no answer|won't pick up|will not pick up|not going to pick up|can't pick up|cannot pick up)\b/i;
const HUMAN_HANDOFF_ACTIONS = new Set([
  "handoff_to_human",
  "handoff_to_human_intake",
  "transfer_to_human",
  "transfer_to_human_events_intake",
  "transfer_to_events_human",
  "transfer_to_human_request_reason",
]);

function getReceptionistGuardrailState(knownState = {}) {
  return knownState?.receptionistGuardrail && typeof knownState.receptionistGuardrail === "object"
    ? knownState.receptionistGuardrail
    : {};
}

class ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore {
  constructor() {
    this.businessContextCache = new Map();
    this.productCatalogCache = new Map();
    this.promptCache = new Map();
  }

  getMode(modeOverride = null) {
    return normalizeReceptionistMode(modeOverride ?? process.env.CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE);
  }

  isEnabled(modeOverride = null) {
    return this.getMode(modeOverride) === RECEPTIONIST_MODE_EXPERIMENTAL;
  }

  getModelName() {
    return process.env.EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODEL || "openai/gpt-5.4-nano";
  }

  getDefaultMaxTokens() {
    const configured = Number(process.env.EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MAX_TOKENS);
    if (Number.isFinite(configured) && configured > 0) {
      return Math.floor(configured);
    }
    return DEFAULT_RECEPTIONIST_MAX_TOKENS;
  }

  resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens = null) {
    const parsed = Number(maxTokens);
    if (Number.isFinite(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
      return Math.floor(parsed);
    }
    return this.getDefaultMaxTokens();
  }

  getReasoningEffort() {
    return "medium";
  }

  async emitStep(onStep, step, meta = {}) {
    if (typeof onStep !== "function") {
      return;
    }

    try {
      await onStep({ step, ...meta });
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn(`[ExperimentalReceptionist] Failed to emit step ${step}:`, error.message);
    }
  }

  shouldUseBusinessContext(decision = {}, latestTurn = "", transcript = "") {
    if (!decision) {
      return false;
    }

    if (decision.requestType === "business_information") {
      return true;
    }

    if (decision.bookingCategory === "private_event") {
      return true;
    }

    const searchText = [latestTurn, transcript].filter(Boolean).join("\n");
    if (decision.intent === "speak_to_human") {
      return BUSINESS_CONTEXT_SIGNAL_RE.test(String(searchText || "")) ||
        EVENT_OR_CATERING_INQUIRY_RE.test(String(searchText || ""));
    }

    return BUSINESS_CONTEXT_SIGNAL_RE.test(String(searchText || ""));
  }

  resolveOrganizationTimezone(organization = null) {
    const raw = String(
      organization?.timezone ||
```
