      organization?.organizationTimezone ||
      organization?.settings?.timezone ||
      TORONTO_TZ
    ).trim();

    return raw || TORONTO_TZ;
  }

  buildCurrentDateContext(timezone = TORONTO_TZ) {
    const now = moment().tz(timezone);
    return `Today in ${timezone} is ${now.format("dddd, MMMM D, YYYY")}. The current year is ${now.format("YYYY")}. Resolve relative dates like "today", "tomorrow", "this Saturday", and "next Friday" using this ${timezone} date.`;
  }

  normalizeRequestedDateForTimezone(requestedDate = "", timezone = TORONTO_TZ) {
    const raw = String(requestedDate || "").trim();
    if (!raw) {
      return "";
    }

    if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(raw)) {
      return raw;
    }

    const lowered = raw.toLowerCase();
    const today = moment().tz(timezone).startOf("day");

    if (lowered === "today") {
      return today.format("YYYY-MM-DD");
    }

    if (lowered === "tomorrow") {
      return today.clone().add(1, "day").format("YYYY-MM-DD");
    }

    if (lowered === "day after tomorrow") {
      return today.clone().add(2, "day").format("YYYY-MM-DD");
    }

    const weekdayMatch = lowered.match(/^(?:(this|next)\s+)?(sunday|monday|tuesday|wednesday|thursday|friday|saturday)$/i);
    if (weekdayMatch) {
      const qualifier = weekdayMatch[1] || "";
      const weekday = WEEKDAY_INDEX[weekdayMatch[2]];
      if (Number.isInteger(weekday)) {
        let delta = (weekday - today.day() + 7) % 7;
        if (qualifier === "next") {
          delta = (delta || 7) + 7;
        }
        return today.clone().add(delta, "day").format("YYYY-MM-DD");
      }
    }

    const guessed = moment.tz(raw, timezone);
    if (guessed.isValid()) {
      return guessed.format("YYYY-MM-DD");
    }

    return normalizeRequestedDateValue(raw);
  }

  replaceWordNumbers(value = "") {
    const map = {
      zero: "0",
      one: "1",
      two: "2",
      three: "3",
      four: "4",
      five: "5",
      six: "6",
      seven: "7",
      eight: "8",
      nine: "9",
      ten: "10",
      eleven: "11",
      twelve: "12",
    };

    let result = String(value || "");
    for (const [word, digit] of Object.entries(map)) {
      result = result.replace(new RegExp(`\\b${word}\\b`, "gi"), digit);
    }
    return result;
  }

  normalizeTimeExpressionForParsing(requestedTime = "") {
    const raw = String(requestedTime || "").trim();
    if (!raw) {
      return "";
    }

    return this.replaceWordNumbers(
      raw
        .toLowerCase()
        .replace(/\./g, "")
        .replace(/\bnoon\b/g, "12:00 pm")
        .replace(/\bmidnight\b/g, "12:00 am")
        .replace(/\b(after|starting at|starting|start at|start|around|about|from|at)\b\s*/g, "")
        .replace(/\b([0-9]{1,2})(am|pm)\b/g, "$1 $2")
        .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
        .trim()
    );
  }

  parseRequestedMomentForTimezone(requestedDate = "", requestedTime = "", timezone = TORONTO_TZ) {
    const normalizedDate = this.normalizeRequestedDateForTimezone(requestedDate, timezone);
    const normalizedTime = this.normalizeTimeExpressionForParsing(requestedTime);

    if (!normalizedDate) {
      return null;
    }

    if (!normalizedTime) {
      const dateOnly = moment.tz(normalizedDate, "YYYY-MM-DD", true, timezone);
      return dateOnly.isValid() ? dateOnly : null;
    }

    const formats = [
      "YYYY-MM-DD h:mm A",
      "YYYY-MM-DD h:mm a",
      "YYYY-MM-DD h A",
      "YYYY-MM-DD h a",
      "YYYY-MM-DD H:mm",
      "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm",
      "YYYY-MM-DD h:mma",
      "YYYY-MM-DD h:mm a",
      "YYYY-MM-DD ha",
    ];

    for (const format of formats) {
      const parsed = moment.tz(`${normalizedDate} ${normalizedTime}`, format, true, timezone);
      if (parsed.isValid()) {
        return parsed;
      }
    }

    return null;
  }

  bookingMatchesRequestedSlotInTimezone(booking, requestedMoment, timezone = TORONTO_TZ) {
    if (!requestedMoment || !booking?.eventStartTime) {
      return false;
    }

    const bookingStart = moment(booking.eventStartTime).tz(timezone);
    const bookingEnd = booking?.eventEndTime
      ? moment(booking.eventEndTime).tz(timezone)
      : bookingStart.clone().add(4, "hours");

    if (!bookingStart.isValid() || !bookingEnd.isValid()) {
      return false;
    }

    const requestedEnd = requestedMoment.clone().add(4, "hours");
    return bookingStart.isSameOrBefore(requestedEnd) && bookingEnd.isSameOrAfter(requestedMoment);
  }

  formatIsoDateForSpeechInTimezone(dateIso = "", fallback = "", timezone = TORONTO_TZ) {
    const normalizedDate = String(dateIso || "").trim();
    if (!normalizedDate) {
      return String(fallback || "").trim();
    }

    const parsed = moment.tz(normalizedDate, "YYYY-MM-DD", true, timezone);
    if (!parsed.isValid()) {
      return String(fallback || normalizedDate).trim();
    }

    return parsed.format("MMMM D");
  }

  getAvailabilityReasoningSystemPrompt() {
    return `
You are an availability reasoning assistant for a phone receptionist.
Return structured data only.

Rules:
- Use only the provided date context, requested date, requested time, requested room, latest caller turn, known state, and current bookings.
- Be conservative and factual.
- Do not say the whole venue is available when the room is unspecified and the provided bookings show one or more spaces are already reserved during the requested time.
- If the caller did not provide any time at all, return needs_specific_time.
- Phrases like "after 9 pm", "after nine p.m.", "starting at 9", and similar mean the caller did provide a usable time window. Do not ask again for a start time unless the time is actually missing.
- Overnight bookings only block the overlapping portion of the requested date.
- If the room is unspecified and different spaces have different conflicts, mention which spaces appear booked and ask which space they want.
- If a conflict exists, say so clearly and suggest asking about another time, a later start, another space, or another date when appropriate.
- Keep recommendedReply concise and ready to speak aloud.
`.trim();
  }

  normalizeDecisionPayload(rawDecision = {}) {
    const decision = rawDecision && typeof rawDecision === "object" ? { ...rawDecision } : {};
    const bookingCategory = normalizeDecisionBookingCategory(
      decision.bookingCategory,
      String(decision.intent || "").trim().toLowerCase(),
    );
    const intent = normalizeDecisionIntent(decision.intent, bookingCategory);
    const requestTypeFallback = intent === "availability_check"
      ? "availability_lookup"
      : intent === "hours_location"
        ? "business_information"
        : "general";

    return {
      ...decision,
      bookingCategory,
      intent,
      requestType: normalizeDecisionRequestType(decision.requestType, requestTypeFallback),
      recommendedSpokenReply: trimText(decision.recommendedSpokenReply || "", 217),
    };
  }

  getSpeechProvider() {
    const raw = (process.env.RECEPTIONIST_SPEECH_PROVIDER || "elevenlabs")
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase();
    if (raw === "kokoro" || raw === "kokoro_local" || raw === "kokoro-local") {
      return "kokoro";
    }
    return "elevenlabs";
  }

  getGreetingDayPart(timezone = TORONTO_TZ) {
    const hour = moment.tz(timezone).hour();

    if (hour < 12) {
      return "Good morning";
    }

    if (hour < 18) {
      return "Good afternoon";
    }

    return "Good evening";
  }

  buildGreetingText(organizationName = "our business", callerName = "", configuredTemplate = "") {
    const greetingPrefix = this.getGreetingDayPart();
    const businessName = String(organizationName || "our business").trim() || "our business";
    const cleanCallerName = String(callerName || "").trim();
    const resolvedTemplate = String(configuredTemplate || "").trim();

    if (resolvedTemplate) {
      return resolvedTemplate
        .replace(/\{greeting\}/gi, greetingPrefix)
        .replace(/\{organizationName\}/gi, businessName)
        .replace(/\{callerName\}/gi, cleanCallerName);
    }

    return `${greetingPrefix}${cleanCallerName ? ` ${cleanCallerName}` : ""}, thank you for calling ${businessName}. I can help with event information, catering, reservations, or other questions. How can I help?`;
  }

  getGreetingText(organizationName = "our business", callerName = "") {
    const configuredTemplate = String(process.env.EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_GREETING || "").trim();
    return this.buildGreetingText(organizationName, callerName, configuredTemplate);
  }

  async getOrganizationGreetingText({
    organizationId,
    organizationName = "our business",
    callerName = "",
  } = {}) {
    const configuredTemplate = await this.getOrganizationPrompt(
      RECEPTIONIST_GREETING_PROMPT_KEY,
      organizationId,
      String(process.env.EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_GREETING || "").trim(),
    );

    return this.buildGreetingText(organizationName, callerName, configuredTemplate);
  }

  getDefaultDecisionSystemPrompt() {
    return `
You are an experimental AI receptionist for the organization.
Use the provided current-date context exactly when resolving relative dates such as today, tomorrow, this Saturday, and next Friday.
Return structured data only.

Rules:
- Be conservative and factual. Do not invent hours, policies, products, pricing, availability, booking status, reservation status, or contact details.
- If known state says callerFrustrated=true, forceHumanHandoff=true, unresolvedAssistantTurns is 3 or more, or repeatedQuestionCount is 2 or more, stop collecting details and set intent=speak_to_human, needsHuman=true, disposition=needs_human, shouldCreateCallback=true unless a live transfer is clearly available.
- Detect frustration from impatience, profanity, "you are not helping", "I already said that", "stop asking", "this is frustrating", "forget it", repeated "hello", or repeated requests for a person. When detected, route to a human rather than continuing the script.
- Do not ask the same type of question more than twice. If a needed detail is still missing after two attempts, summarize what is known and route to human follow-up.
- If the conversation has not been resolved after three assistant turns, route to human follow-up instead of continuing to ask questions.
- Answer the caller's direct question first whenever business context or tool results contain the answer, then ask at most one follow-up question.
- Determine what the caller is trying to do from the transcript itself. Do not assume the organization is a restaurant, venue, clinic, salon, or service business unless the transcript or provided business context clearly indicates that.
- Set needsAvailabilityCheck=true when the caller is asking whether a date, time, slot, room, resource, appointment, booking, or service window is available and a real lookup is needed.
- Set shouldCreateReservation=true only when the caller is explicitly asking to place or confirm a reservation or booking now and the transcript clearly supports that workflow.
- Do not ask for reservation-specific fields such as a reservation name unless the caller is actually trying to place a reservation or booking.
- If the caller is only asking an availability question, answer the availability question instead of switching into a booking-creation workflow.
- If follow-up will be needed and no phone number or email is known, ask for a phone number or email.
- If the caller says they are here for a delivery, they are outside with a delivery, or they need to bring a delivery to the business door, treat it as an immediate human handoff: set intent to speak_to_human, needsHuman=true, disposition=needs_human, shouldCreateCallback=false, needsAvailabilityCheck=false, and recommendedSpokenReply to a concise handoff message.
- If the caller asks for a human but has not said what they are calling about, ask one brief question to capture the purpose before transferring.
- If the caller asks for a human and the transcript already contains the purpose, make summary clearly state the caller's purpose for staff. If the purpose is an event, catering, pricing, package, room, policy, or availability question, still classify the underlying task and answer or collect the next useful detail before handoff unless the caller repeats the human request.
- For private event calls, collect only the next missing operational detail in this order: event type, date, start time, end time, guest count, preferred space, food or catering interest, DJ or audio needs, then phone or email.
- For catering calls, collect only the next missing catering detail in this order: date, needed time, guest count, pickup or delivery, delivery address if delivery, menu preference or dietary restrictions, budget if relevant, then phone or email.
- For availability questions, if date and guest count are known but time is missing, ask only for the start time. If the start time has already been asked for, route to human follow-up.
- For pricing, package, menu, deposit, hours, policy, or location questions, answer with the best factual information from business context first. If exact pricing depends on missing details, give the known range or rule first, then ask for the one missing detail that changes the answer.
- If the caller says staff are closed, unavailable, not answering, or not going to pick up after a handoff was discussed, switch to callback_request/create_callback. Do not repeat the same transfer line.
- Treat "confirming a reservation", "checking a reservation", or "I have a reservation" as a lookup or staff-follow-up request unless the caller clearly asks to create a new reservation.
- Do not say "let me check" unless the request genuinely requires an availability check or another human follow-up.
- Do not say "please hold", "one moment", or "I will connect you" unless the selected action is an immediate live transfer/escalate_to_human. For later follow-up say "I'll pass this to our team" or "our team will follow up."
- For date-only availability questions with no specific time, do not treat bookings touching that calendar date as a full-day conflict. Overnight bookings only block their overlapping time.
- Keep recommendedSpokenReply concise, natural, complete, and under 180 characters. Never end with an ellipsis.
`.trim();
  }

  getResponseSynthesisSystemPrompt() {
    return `
You are the reply composer for an AI receptionist.
Return structured data only.

Rules:
- Base the reply on the transcript, the decision analysis, and any tool results that were provided.
- Answer the caller's actual question directly before asking for anything else.
- If known state says callerFrustrated=true, forceHumanHandoff=true, unresolvedAssistantTurns is 3 or more, or repeatedQuestionCount is 2 or more, apologize briefly and route to a human. Do not ask another intake question unless no contact method is known.
- If the caller sounds frustrated, repeats that the assistant is not helping, repeats "hello", uses profanity, says "I already said that", or repeats a human request, stop the loop and route to human.
- Never ask the same kind of question more than twice. If the same missing detail is still unresolved, say you do not want to keep them going in circles and pass it to the team.
- If the call is still unresolved after three assistant turns, summarize what is known and route to the team.
- Do not assume the organization uses restaurant, venue, event, or reservation workflows unless that is shown in the transcript or business context.
- If availability results were provided, use them as the source of truth.
- If availability shows a conflict, say the date or time is already booked or unavailable and offer to check another date or time.
- If availability shows availability, say it looks available and ask only the next most relevant question if one is truly needed.
- Do not ask for reservation details unless the caller is actually trying to place a reservation or booking now.
- If business context was provided, use it only for facts that appear in that context.
- If the caller asks about pricing, packages, room rental rates, minimum spend, catering options, or similar business information and the facts are present in business context, answer that question directly from business context before asking a follow-up.
- If business context includes pricing rules that depend on room, day, start time, end time, or package details, use the transcript and known state together to infer the applicable pricing as carefully as possible.
- If exact pricing depends on missing details, give the known range, minimum, or dependency rule first, then ask for one missing detail.
- For private event calls, answer the immediate question first, then ask only the next missing operational detail: event type, date, start time, end time, guest count, preferred space, food or catering interest, DJ or audio needs, then phone or email.
- For catering calls, ask only the next missing catering detail: date, needed time, guest count, pickup or delivery, delivery address if delivery, menu preference or dietary restrictions, budget if relevant, then phone or email.
- For availability calls, if date and guest count are known but start time is missing, ask only for start time. If start time was already requested, route to human follow-up.
- If the caller asks for a human about an event, catering, venue, package, price, policy, room, deposit, minimum spend, DJ, audio, or tour, give the useful answer or ask the next intake question before live transfer unless the caller repeats the request for a human.
- Prefer concise spoken replies.
- Keep replyText complete and under 180 characters when possible. Never output a trailing ellipsis.
- Keep internal action labels practical.
- Before a live human transfer, make summary a staff-facing handoff note that states what the caller wants, any key details already collected, and what the human should be ready to handle.
- If staff handoff should happen now, set action to escalate_to_human.
- If staff follow-up should happen later without an immediate live transfer, set action to create_callback.
- Do not say "please hold", "one moment", or "I will connect you" unless action is escalate_to_human or a true live transfer. For create_callback or later follow-up, say the team will follow up.
- If the caller says staff are closed, unavailable, not answering, or not going to pick up after a handoff was discussed, acknowledge it and create a callback instead of repeating a live-transfer message.
- If the caller is confirming, checking, changing, or asking about an existing reservation, do not say you can book it. Ask for the reservation name plus date or phone number, or offer staff follow-up when lookup is not available.
- Use respond_only only when no immediate transfer or callback action is needed.
`.trim();
  }

  isEventOrCateringInquiry(decision = {}, latestTurn = "", transcript = "") {
    if (decision?.bookingCategory === "table_reservation") {
      return false;
    }

    if (decision?.bookingCategory === "private_event") {
      return true;
    }

    const searchText = [latestTurn, transcript].filter(Boolean).join("\n");
    return EVENT_OR_CATERING_INQUIRY_RE.test(String(searchText || ""));
  }

  isCateringInquiry(latestTurn = "", transcript = "") {
    const searchText = [latestTurn, transcript].filter(Boolean).join("\n");
    return CATERING_INQUIRY_RE.test(String(searchText || ""));
  }

  buildEventManagerCallbackReply({
    isCatering = false,
    requestedDate = "",
    requestedTime = "",
    requestedPartySize = "",
  } = {}) {
    const hasDate = Boolean(String(requestedDate || "").trim());
    const hasTime = Boolean(String(requestedTime || "").trim());
    const hasPartySize = Boolean(String(requestedPartySize || "").trim());
    const requestLabel = isCatering ? "catering request" : "event request";
    const callbackText = `our event manager will call you back about the ${requestLabel}.`;
    const missing = [
      !hasDate ? "What date" : "",
      !hasTime ? "what time" : "",
      !hasPartySize ? "for how many people" : "",
    ].filter(Boolean);
    const missingQuestion =
      missing.length === 3
        ? `${missing[0]}, ${missing[1]}, and ${missing[2]}`
        : missing.join(" and ");

    if (missing.length >= 2) {
      return `Thanks, I can pass that along. ${missingQuestion}? Once I have that, ${callbackText}`;
    }

    if (missing.length === 1) {
      return `Thanks, I can pass that along. ${missing[0]}? Once I have that, ${callbackText}`;
    }

    return `Thanks, I have the date, time, and guest count. Our event manager will call you back about the ${requestLabel}.`;
  }

  extractEventIntakeFieldsFromText(text = "") {
    const normalizedText = String(text || "").trim();
    if (!normalizedText) {
      return {};
    }

    const extracted = {};
    const guestColonMatch = normalizedText.match(GUEST_COUNT_WITH_COLON_RE);
    if (guestColonMatch) {
      extracted.requestedPartySize = `${guestColonMatch[1]}${guestColonMatch[2]}`;
    } else {
      const guestMatch = normalizedText.match(GUEST_COUNT_RE);
      if (guestMatch) {
        extracted.requestedPartySize = guestMatch[1];
      }
    }

    const timeMatch = normalizedText.match(SPOKEN_TIME_RE);
    if (timeMatch) {
      extracted.requestedTime = normalizeRequestedTimeValue(timeMatch[1]);
    }

    const dateMatch = normalizedText.match(MONTH_DATE_RE);
    if (dateMatch) {
      extracted.requestedDate = normalizeRequestedDateValue(
        dateMatch[0].replace(/\b(\d{1,2})(st|nd|rd|th)\b/i, "$1"),
      );
    }

    return extracted;
  }

  mergeEventIntakeHeuristics({
    decision = {},
    knownState = {},
    mergedState = {},
    resolvedRequestedDate = "",
    extracted = {},
    latestTurn = "",
    transcript = "",
    callerNumber = "",
  } = {}) {
    const hasEventContext =
      decision?.bookingCategory === "private_event" ||
      knownState?.lastIntent === "private_event_inquiry" ||
      EVENT_INTAKE_CONTEXT_RE.test(String(transcript || "")) ||
      EVENT_INTAKE_CONTEXT_RE.test(String(latestTurn || ""));

    if (!hasEventContext) {
      return { mergedState, resolvedRequestedDate, extracted };
    }

    const latestFields = this.extractEventIntakeFieldsFromText(latestTurn);
    const transcriptFields = this.extractEventIntakeFieldsFromText(transcript);
    const nextDate =
      latestFields.requestedDate ||
      mergedState.requestedDate ||
      knownState?.requestedDate ||
      transcriptFields.requestedDate ||
      "";
    const nextTime =
      latestFields.requestedTime ||
      mergedState.requestedTime ||
      knownState?.requestedTime ||
      transcriptFields.requestedTime ||
      "";
    const nextPartySize =
      latestFields.requestedPartySize ||
      mergedState.requestedPartySize ||
      knownState?.requestedPartySize ||
      transcriptFields.requestedPartySize ||
      "";

    const nextMergedState = {
      ...mergedState,
      requestedDate: normalizeRequestedDateValue(nextDate),
      requestedTime: normalizeRequestedTimeValue(nextTime),
      requestedPartySize: String(nextPartySize || "").trim(),
      lastIntent: decision?.intent || mergedState.lastIntent || knownState?.lastIntent || "",
    };

    const nextResolvedRequestedDate = nextMergedState.requestedDate || resolvedRequestedDate || "";

    return {
      mergedState: nextMergedState,
      resolvedRequestedDate: nextResolvedRequestedDate,
      extracted: {
        ...extracted,
        callerPhone: callerNumber || extracted?.callerPhone || "",
        requestedDate: nextResolvedRequestedDate,
        requestedTime: nextMergedState.requestedTime || "",
        partySize: nextMergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
      },
    };
  }

  stripHumanTransferRequestText(text = "") {
    return String(text || "")
      .replace(HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_FRAGMENT_RE, " ")
      .replace(/\b(?:please|just|can i|could i|would like to|i want to|i need to|talk to|talk with)\b/gi, " ")
      .replace(/[^\w\s]/g, " ")
      .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
      .trim();
  }

  extractCallerTranscriptTurns(transcript = "") {
    return String(transcript || "")
      .split(/\r?\n/)
      .map((line) => String(line || "").trim())
      .filter((line) => /^Caller:/i.test(line))
      .map((line) => line.replace(/^Caller:\s*/i, "").trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
  }

  hasSufficientHumanTransferPurpose({ latestTurn = "", transcript = "", knownState = {}, decision = {} } = {}) {
    const latestPurpose = this.stripHumanTransferRequestText(latestTurn);
    if (latestPurpose.length >= 8) {
      return true;
    }

    if (
      decision?.bookingCategory ||
      (decision?.intent && decision.intent !== "speak_to_human" && decision.intent !== "unknown") ||
      knownState?.lastIntent ||
      knownState?.requestedDate ||
      knownState?.requestedTime ||
      knownState?.requestedPartySize ||
      knownState?.requestedRoom
    ) {
      return true;
    }

    const callerTurns = this.extractCallerTranscriptTurns(transcript);
    return callerTurns.some((turn) => {
      if (PURE_HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_RE.test(turn)) {
        return false;
      }
      return this.stripHumanTransferRequestText(turn).length >= 8;
    });
  }

  buildHumanTransferPurposeReply() {
    return "Of course. What can I tell the team you're calling about?";
  }

  buildHumanTransferUnavailableReply() {
    return "Understood. I'll pass this along so the team can call you back as soon as they can.";
  }

  buildGuardrailHumanHandoffReply(reason = "") {
    const normalizedReason = String(reason || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (normalizedReason.includes("frustrat")) {
      return "I'm sorry, I don't want to make this frustrating. I'll pass this to our team so a person can help.";
    }
    if (normalizedReason.includes("repeat") || normalizedReason.includes("loop")) {
      return "I'm sorry, I don't want to keep you going in circles. I'll pass this to our team with what I have so far.";
    }
    return "I'll pass this to our team with what I have so far so a person can help.";
  }

  buildGuardrailHumanHandoffResult({
    reason = "",
    decision = {},
    mergedState = {},
    resolvedRequestedDate = "",
    callerNumber = "",
    callerEmail = "",
    availability = null,
    backgroundInfo = "",
    maxTokens = null,
  } = {}) {
    return {
      replyText: this.buildGuardrailHumanHandoffReply(reason),
      intent: decision?.intent || "speak_to_human",
      action: "escalate_to_human",
      summary: [
        decision?.summary || "Receptionist guardrail routed the caller to a human.",
        reason ? `Guardrail reason: ${reason}.` : "",
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" "),
      smsPreview: "",
      extracted: {
        callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
        callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
        callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || callerEmail || "",
        requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || mergedState.requestedDate || "",
        requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
        partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
        requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
        callbackRequested: true,
      },
      meta: {
        confidence: decision?.confidence || 1,
        disposition: "needs_human",
        needsHuman: true,
        needsAvailabilityCheck: false,
        availability: availability || {
          checked: false,
          available: null,
          requiresSpecificTime: false,
          summaryHint: "",
          conflictingBookings: [],
          allDayBookings: [],
        },
        businessContextUsed: Boolean(backgroundInfo),
        requestType: decision?.requestType || "general",
        maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
        guardrailReason: reason || "",
        reservation: {
          attempted: false,
          created: false,
          existing: false,
          bookingId: "",
        },
      },
    };
  }

  async synthesizeReply({
    callId,
    organizationId,
    transcript,
    latestTurn = "",
    decision = {},
    availability = null,
    backgroundInfo = "",
    knownState = {},
    extracted = {},
    maxTokens = null,
    onStep = null,
  }) {
    await this.emitStep(onStep, "llm_response_started", {
      hasAvailability: Boolean(availability?.checked),
      hasBusinessContext: Boolean(String(backgroundInfo || "").trim()),
    });
    console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] response synthesis request started", {
      callId,
      organizationId,
      usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_USAGE_KEY,
      hasAvailability: Boolean(availability?.checked),
      hasBusinessContext: Boolean(String(backgroundInfo || "").trim()),
      decisionIntent: decision?.intent || "",
      decisionAction: decision?.action || "",
      latestTurnPreview: trimText(latestTurn, 220),
    });

    const organization = await this.getOrganizationContext(organizationId);
    const organizationName = organization?.name || "the business";
    const organizationTimezone = this.resolveOrganizationTimezone(organization);
    const compactTranscript = compactTranscriptTail(transcript, 12, 1800);
    const compactLatestTurn = trimText(latestTurn, 220);
    const compactKnownState = summarizeKnownState(knownState);
    const compactBusinessInfo = trimText(backgroundInfo || "", 4000);
    const systemPrompt = await this.getOrganizationPrompt(
      RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_PROMPT_KEY,
      organizationId,
      this.getResponseSynthesisSystemPrompt(),
    );

    const promptSections = [
      `Organization: ${organizationName}`,
      `Current date context:
${this.buildCurrentDateContext(organizationTimezone)}`,
      `Latest caller turn:
${compactLatestTurn || "(empty)"}`,
      `Recent transcript tail:
${compactTranscript || "(empty)"}`,
      `Decision analysis:
${JSON.stringify(decision || {})}`,
      `Extracted state:
${JSON.stringify(extracted || {})}`,
      `Known state:
${compactKnownState || "(empty)"}`,
    ];

    if (availability?.checked) {
      promptSections.push(`Availability tool result:
${JSON.stringify(availability || {})}`);
    }

    if (compactBusinessInfo) {
      promptSections.push(`Business context:
${compactBusinessInfo}`);
    }

    const rawResponse = await llmClient.generateResponse(
      promptSections.join("\n"),
      null,
      `experimental-call-response-${callId}`,
      "STRUCTURED_OUTPUT",
      null,
      RESPONSE_SYNTHESIS_SCHEMA,
      "ExperimentalReceptionistResponseSynthesis",
      systemPrompt,
      {
        includeConversationHistory: false,
        storeConversation: false,
        organizationId,
        context: "CALLS",
        usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_USAGE_KEY,
        maxTokens: Math.min(this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens), 1400),
        reasoningLevel: this.getReasoningEffort(),
      },
    );

    const response = RESPONSE_SYNTHESIS_SCHEMA.parse(rawResponse || {});
    console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] response synthesis parsed", {
      callId,
      organizationId,
      usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_USAGE_KEY,
      action: response.action,
      disposition: response.disposition,
      needsHuman: response.needsHuman,
      shouldCreateCallback: response.shouldCreateCallback,
      shouldCreateReservation: response.shouldCreateReservation,
      replyPreview: trimText(response.replyText || "", 220),
    });

    await this.emitStep(onStep, "llm_response_completed", {
      action: response.action,
      disposition: response.disposition,
      needsHuman: response.needsHuman,
      shouldCreateReservation: response.shouldCreateReservation,
    });

    return response;
  }

  getDefaultFinalSummarySystemPrompt() {
    return `
Summarize the completed call for the business team.
Capture the caller's name or email only when actually known from the transcript.
If the caller needed a human or callback, make that clear in the summary and suggested next step.
Return structured data only.
`.trim();
  }

  getPromptCacheKey(organizationId, promptName) {
    return `${organizationId || "default"}:${promptName}`;
  }

  async getOrganizationPrompt(promptName, organizationId, fallback = "") {
    const defaultValue = defaultPrompts[promptName] || fallback || "";

    if (!promptName || !organizationId) {
      return defaultValue;
    }

    const cacheKey = this.getPromptCacheKey(organizationId, promptName);
    const now = Date.now();
    const cached = this.promptCache.get(cacheKey);

    if (cached && cached.expiresAt > now) {
      return cached.value;
    }

    try {
      const setting = await prisma.settings.findUnique({
        where: {
          orgSetting_unique: {
            organizationId,
            settingName: promptName,
          },
        },
        select: {
          settingValue: true,
        },
      });

      const value = typeof setting?.settingValue === "string"
        ? setting.settingValue
        : defaultValue;

      this.promptCache.set(cacheKey, {
        value,
        expiresAt: now + PROMPT_CACHE_TTL_MS,
      });

      return value;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(
        `[ExperimentalReceptionist] Failed to fetch prompt ${promptName}:`,
        error.message,
      );
      return defaultValue;
    }
  }

  async getOrganizationContext(organizationId) {
    if (!organizationId) {
      return null;
    }

    return prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: organizationId },
      select: {
        id: true,
        name: true,
        phoneNumber: true,
        mainReceiverId: true,
        timezone: true,
      },
    });
  }

  async getCompactBusinessContext(organizationId) {
    if (!organizationId) {
      return "";
    }

    const cacheEntry = this.businessContextCache.get(organizationId);
    const now = Date.now();

    if (cacheEntry && cacheEntry.expiresAt > now) {
      return cacheEntry.value;
    }

    try {
      const contextResult = await OrganizationAIContextService.resolveAIContext({
        organizationId,
        useCase: "experimental_receptionist",
      });
      const context = String(contextResult.backgroundInfo || "").trim();

      this.businessContextCache.set(organizationId, {
        value: context,
        expiresAt: now + 5 * 60 * 1000,
      });

      return context;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] Failed to fetch business context:", error.message);
      return "";
    }
  }

  async getProductCatalog(organizationId) {
    if (!organizationId) {
      return [];
    }

    const cacheEntry = this.productCatalogCache.get(organizationId);
    const now = Date.now();

    if (cacheEntry && cacheEntry.expiresAt > now) {
      return cacheEntry.value;
    }

    try {
      const products = await prisma.product.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          active: true,
        },
        select: {
          id: true,
          name: true,
          description: true,
          price: true,
          inStock: true,
          category: {
            select: { name: true },
          },
          variants: {
            where: { active: true },
            select: {
              name: true,
              description: true,
              additionalPrice: true,
              inStock: true,
            },
            orderBy: { name: "asc" },
          },
        },
        orderBy: { name: "asc" },
        take: 300,
      });

      this.productCatalogCache.set(organizationId, {
        value: products,
        expiresAt: now + 5 * 60 * 1000,
      });

      return products;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] Failed to fetch product catalog:", error.message);
      return [];
    }
  }

  async getRelevantProductContext(organizationId, latestTurn = "", transcript = "") {
    if (!organizationId) {
      return "";
    }

    const catalog = await this.getProductCatalog(organizationId);
    if (!Array.isArray(catalog) || catalog.length === 0) {
      return "";
    }

    const searchText = [latestTurn, transcript].filter(Boolean).join("\n").trim();
    if (!searchText) {
      return "";
    }

    const normalizedSearchText = normalizeSearchText(searchText);
    const queryTokens = tokenizeProductSearchText(searchText);

    const scoredProducts = catalog
      .map((product) => ({
        product,
        score: scoreProductMatch(product, normalizedSearchText, queryTokens),
      }))
      .filter(({ score }) => score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);

    if (scoredProducts.length === 0) {
      return "";
    }

    return buildProductContext(
      scoredProducts.slice(0, 12).map(({ product }) => simplifyProductForPrompt(product)),
      latestTurn,
    );
  }


  getGreetingAudioPublicDir() {
    return path.resolve(process.cwd(), "public", GREETING_AUDIO_RELATIVE_DIR);
  }

  getGreetingAudioPublicUrl(fileName) {
    const baseUrl = String(process.env.API_URL || "").replace(/\/$/, "");
    if (!baseUrl) {
      return `${GREETING_AUDIO_ROUTE_BASE}/${fileName}`;
    }
    return `${baseUrl}${GREETING_AUDIO_ROUTE_BASE}/${fileName}`;
  }

  resolveAudioExtension({ outputFormat = "", mimeType = "" } = {}) {
    const normalizedFormat = String(outputFormat || "").toLowerCase();
    const normalizedMime = String(mimeType || "").toLowerCase();

    if (normalizedFormat.includes("mulaw") || normalizedMime.includes("mulaw")) {
      return "ulaw";
    }
    if (normalizedFormat.includes("wav") || normalizedMime.includes("wav")) {
      return "wav";
    }
    if (normalizedFormat.includes("mpeg") || normalizedFormat.includes("mp3") || normalizedMime.includes("mpeg") || normalizedMime.includes("mp3")) {
      return "mp3";
    }
    return "mp3";
  }

  async persistGeneratedGreetingAudio({ organizationId, text, audioBuffer, outputFormat = "", mimeType = "" }) {
    const extension = this.resolveAudioExtension({ outputFormat, mimeType });
    const hash = crypto
      .createHash("sha1")
      .update(`${organizationId || "default"}:${text}:${extension}`)
      .digest("hex")
      .slice(0, 16);
    const safeOrganizationId = String(organizationId || "default").replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "_");
    const fileName = `${safeOrganizationId}-${hash}.${extension}`;
    const targetDir = this.getGreetingAudioPublicDir();
    const targetPath = path.join(targetDir, fileName);

    await fs.mkdir(targetDir, { recursive: true });
    await fs.writeFile(targetPath, audioBuffer);

    return {
      fileName,
      filePath: targetPath,
      publicUrl: this.getGreetingAudioPublicUrl(fileName),
      mimeType,
      outputFormat,
    };
  }

  buildGreetingAudioFileName({ organizationId, text, extension = "mp3" } = {}) {
    const normalizedExtension = String(extension || "mp3").replace(/^\./, "") || "mp3";
    const hash = crypto
      .createHash("sha1")
      .update(`${organizationId || "default"}:${text}:${normalizedExtension}`)
      .digest("hex")
      .slice(0, 16);
    const safeOrganizationId = String(organizationId || "default").replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "_");
    return `${safeOrganizationId}-${hash}.${normalizedExtension}`;
  }

  async findExistingGreetingAudio({ organizationId, text }) {
    const targetDir = this.getGreetingAudioPublicDir();

    for (const extension of GREETING_AUDIO_EXTENSIONS) {
      const fileName = this.buildGreetingAudioFileName({ organizationId, text, extension });
      const filePath = path.join(targetDir, fileName);

      try {
        await fs.access(filePath);
        return {
          fileName,
          filePath,
          publicUrl: this.getGreetingAudioPublicUrl(fileName),
        };
      } catch {
        // Try the next known output extension.
      }
    }

    return null;
  }

  async generateGreetingAudio({ organizationId, text }) {
    const existingAudio = await this.findExistingGreetingAudio({ organizationId, text });
    if (existingAudio) {
      return existingAudio;
    }

    if (typeof elevenLabsTTSService?.ensureGreetingAudio === "function") {
      return elevenLabsTTSService.ensureGreetingAudio({
        organizationId,
        text,
      });
    }

    const result = await SpeechSynthesisService.synthesize(text, {
      provider: "elevenlabs",
      metadata: {
        organizationId,
        source: "experimental_receptionist_greeting",
      },
    });

    if (!result?.audioBuffer) {
      throw new Error("SpeechSynthesisService did not return an audio buffer for the greeting.");
    }

    return this.persistGeneratedGreetingAudio({
      organizationId,
      text,
      audioBuffer: result.audioBuffer,
      outputFormat: result.outputFormat,
      mimeType: result.mimeType,
    });
  }

  async ensureGreetingPlayback({ organizationId, organizationName, callerName = "", enabledOverride = null }) {
    const greetingText = await this.getOrganizationGreetingText({
      organizationId,
      organizationName,
      callerName,
    });
    if (enabledOverride === false || (enabledOverride === null && !this.isEnabled())) {
      return {
        greetingText,
        playbackUrl: null,
      };
    }

    try {
      const audio = await this.generateGreetingAudio({
        organizationId,
        text: greetingText,
      });

      return {
        greetingText,
        playbackUrl: audio?.publicUrl || null,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(
        `[ExperimentalReceptionist] Failed to generate ElevenLabs greeting:`,
        error.message,
      );
      return {
        greetingText,
        playbackUrl: null,
      };
    }
  }

  async resolveBackgroundInfo({
    organizationId,
    backgroundInfo = "",
    latestTurn = "",
    transcript = "",
  } = {}) {
    const existing = String(backgroundInfo || "").trim();
    const baseContext = existing || (await this.getCompactBusinessContext(organizationId));
    const productContext = await this.getRelevantProductContext(
      organizationId,
      latestTurn,
      transcript,
    );

    return [baseContext, productContext].filter(Boolean).join("\n\n");
  }

  buildAvailabilityContext(requestedDate, requestedTime, allDayBookings, timezone = TORONTO_TZ) {
    return [
      "Real-Time Availability Context:",
      this.buildCurrentDateContext(timezone),
      `Requested date: ${requestedDate}`,
      `Requested time: ${requestedTime || "(not provided)"}`,
      `Current bookings touching this date: ${JSON.stringify(allDayBookings || [])}`,
      `Instruction: Use these current bookings to answer the caller's availability or booking question. Bookings touching this date can include overnight events that began the previous evening and ended after midnight in ${timezone}. Do not treat an overnight booking that ends in the early morning as making the entire requested date unavailable. If the caller did not provide a specific start time, ask for the start time instead of declaring a full-day conflict.`,
    ].join("\n");
  }

  async analyzeTranscript({
    callId,
    organizationId,
    callerNumber,
    callerEmail = "",
    transcript,
    latestTurn = "",
    backgroundInfo = "",
    availabilityContext = "",
    knownState = {},
    maxTokens = null,
    includeBusinessContext = false,
    onStep = null,
  }) {
    await this.emitStep(onStep, "llm_decision_started", {
      includeBusinessContext,
      hasAvailabilityContext: Boolean(availabilityContext),
    });
    console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] decision request started", {
      callId,
      organizationId,
      usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_DECISION_USAGE_KEY,
      includeBusinessContext,
      hasAvailabilityContext: Boolean(availabilityContext),
      latestTurnPreview: trimText(latestTurn, 220),
      knownState: summarizeKnownState(knownState),
    });

    const organization = await this.getOrganizationContext(organizationId);
    const organizationName = organization?.name || "the business";
    const organizationTimezone = this.resolveOrganizationTimezone(organization);
    const compactTranscript = compactTranscriptTail(transcript, 10, 1400);
    const compactLatestTurn = trimText(latestTurn, 220);
    const compactBusinessInfo = includeBusinessContext
      ? String(backgroundInfo || "").trim()
      : "";
    const compactKnownState = summarizeKnownState(knownState);
    const resolvedMaxTokens = this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens);
    const systemPrompt = await this.getOrganizationPrompt(
      RECEPTIONIST_DECISION_PROMPT_KEY,
      organizationId,
      this.getDefaultDecisionSystemPrompt(),
    );

    const promptSections = [
      `Organization: ${organizationName}`,
      `Caller number: ${callerNumber || "unknown"}`,
      `Caller email: ${callerEmail || "unknown"}`,
      `Call ID: ${callId}`,
      `Current date context:
${this.buildCurrentDateContext(organizationTimezone)}`,
      `Latest caller turn:
${compactLatestTurn || "(empty)"}`,
      `Recent transcript tail:
${compactTranscript || "(empty)"}`,
    ];

    if (compactKnownState) {
      promptSections.push(`Known extracted state:
${compactKnownState}`);
    }
    if (compactBusinessInfo) {
      promptSections.push(`Business context:
${compactBusinessInfo}`);
    }
    if (availabilityContext) {
      promptSections.push(availabilityContext);
    }

    const rawDecision = await llmClient.generateResponse(
      promptSections.join("\n"),
      null,
      `experimental-call-${callId}`,
      "STRUCTURED_OUTPUT",
      null,
      receptionistDecisionSchema,
      "ExperimentalReceptionistDecision",
      systemPrompt,
      {
        includeConversationHistory: false,
        storeConversation: false,
        organizationId,
        context: "CALLS",
        usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_DECISION_USAGE_KEY,
        maxTokens: resolvedMaxTokens,
        reasoningLevel: this.getReasoningEffort(),
      },
    );

    const normalizedDecision = this.normalizeDecisionPayload(rawDecision);
    const parsedDecision = receptionistDecisionSchema.parse(normalizedDecision);
    console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] decision parsed", {
      callId,
      organizationId,
      usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_DECISION_USAGE_KEY,
      intent: parsedDecision.intent,
      requestType: parsedDecision.requestType,
      bookingCategory: parsedDecision.bookingCategory,
      disposition: parsedDecision.disposition,
      needsHuman: parsedDecision.needsHuman,
      needsAvailabilityCheck: parsedDecision.needsAvailabilityCheck,
      shouldCreateCallback: parsedDecision.shouldCreateCallback,
      shouldCreateReservation: parsedDecision.shouldCreateReservation,
      replyPreview: trimText(parsedDecision.recommendedSpokenReply || "", 220),
    });

    await this.emitStep(onStep, "llm_decision_completed", {
      intent: parsedDecision.intent,
      requestType: parsedDecision.requestType,
      needsAvailabilityCheck: Boolean(parsedDecision.needsAvailabilityCheck),
      includeBusinessContext,
    });

    return parsedDecision;
  }

  async reasonAboutAvailability({
    callId,
    organizationId,
    latestTurn = "",
    knownState = {},
    requestedDate = "",
    requestedTime = "",
    requestedRoom = "",
    allDayBookings = [],
    exactConflicts = [],
    maxTokens = null,
    onStep = null,
  }) {
    await this.emitStep(onStep, "availability_reasoning_started", {
      requestedDate,
      requestedTime,
      requestedRoom,
      bookingsTouchingDate: Array.isArray(allDayBookings) ? allDayBookings.length : 0,
    });
    console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] availability reasoning request started", {
      callId,
      organizationId,
      usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_USAGE_KEY,
      requestedDate,
      requestedTime,
      requestedRoom,
      allDayBookings: Array.isArray(allDayBookings) ? allDayBookings.length : 0,
      exactConflicts: Array.isArray(exactConflicts) ? exactConflicts.length : 0,
    });

    const organization = await this.getOrganizationContext(organizationId);
    const organizationName = organization?.name || "the business";
    const organizationTimezone = this.resolveOrganizationTimezone(organization);
    const compactKnownState = summarizeKnownState(knownState);

    const promptSections = [
      `Organization: ${organizationName}`,
      `Current date context:
${this.buildCurrentDateContext(organizationTimezone)}`,
      `Latest caller turn:
${trimText(latestTurn, 220) || "(empty)"}`,
      `Requested date: ${requestedDate || "(not provided)"}`,
      `Requested time: ${String(requestedTime || "").trim() || "(not provided)"}`,
      `Requested room: ${requestedRoom || "(not provided)"}`,
      `Known extracted state:
${compactKnownState || "(empty)"}`,
      `Bookings touching the requested date:
${JSON.stringify(allDayBookings || [])}`,
      `Deterministically detected exact overlaps:
${JSON.stringify(exactConflicts || [])}`,
    ];

    const rawAssessment = await llmClient.generateResponse(
      promptSections.join("\n"),
      null,
      `experimental-call-availability-${callId}`,
      "STRUCTURED_OUTPUT",
      null,
      AVAILABILITY_REASONING_SCHEMA,
      "ExperimentalReceptionistAvailabilityReasoning",
      this.getAvailabilityReasoningSystemPrompt(),
      {
        includeConversationHistory: false,
        storeConversation: false,
        organizationId,
        context: "CALLS",
        usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_USAGE_KEY,
        maxTokens: Math.min(this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens), 1200),
        reasoningLevel: this.getReasoningEffort(),
      },
    );

    const assessment = AVAILABILITY_REASONING_SCHEMA.parse(rawAssessment || {});
    console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] availability reasoning parsed", {
      callId,
      organizationId,
      usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE_USAGE_KEY,
      result: assessment.result,
      summaryHint: trimText(assessment.summaryHint || "", 220),
      recommendedReply: trimText(assessment.recommendedReply || "", 220),
    });

    await this.emitStep(onStep, "availability_reasoning_completed", {
      result: assessment.result,
    });

    return assessment;
  }

  async findAvailability({ organizationId, requestedDate, requestedTime, requestedRoom, callId = "", latestTurn = "", knownState = {}, maxTokens = null, onStep = null }) {
    const organization = organizationId ? await this.getOrganizationContext(organizationId) : null;
    const organizationTimezone = this.resolveOrganizationTimezone(organization);
    const normalizedDate = this.normalizeRequestedDateForTimezone(requestedDate, organizationTimezone);
    const rawRequestedTime = String(requestedTime || "").trim();
    const requestedTimeProvided = Boolean(rawRequestedTime);

    if (!organizationId || !normalizedDate) {
      return {
        checked: false,
        available: null,
        requiresSpecificTime: !requestedTimeProvided,
        summaryHint: "",
        conflictingBookings: [],
        allDayBookings: [],
        replyText: "",
      };
    }

    try {
      await this.emitStep(onStep, "availability_lookup_started", {
        requestedDate: normalizedDate,
        requestedTime: rawRequestedTime,
        requestedRoom,
      });

      const requestedMoment = requestedTimeProvided
        ? this.parseRequestedMomentForTimezone(normalizedDate, requestedTime, organizationTimezone)
        : null;
      const dayStart = moment
        .tz(normalizedDate, "YYYY-MM-DD", true, organizationTimezone)
        .startOf("day")
        .toDate();
      const dayEnd = moment
        .tz(normalizedDate, "YYYY-MM-DD", true, organizationTimezone)
        .endOf("day")
        .toDate();

      const bookings = await BookingService.getBookingsInRange(
        organizationId,
        dayStart,
        dayEnd,
      );

      const normalizedRequestedRoom = normalizeRoomName(requestedRoom);

      const blockingBookings = (bookings || [])
        .filter((booking) => bookingBlocksAvailability(booking))
        .filter((booking) => {
          if (!normalizedRequestedRoom) {
            return true;
          }

          const roomNames = extractRoomNames(booking?.room);
          if (roomNames.length === 0) {
            return true;
          }

          return roomNames.some(
            (roomName) => normalizeRoomName(roomName) === normalizedRequestedRoom,
          );
        });

      const exactConflicts = requestedMoment
        ? blockingBookings.filter((booking) =>
            this.bookingMatchesRequestedSlotInTimezone(booking, requestedMoment, organizationTimezone),
          )
        : [];

      const exactConflictingBookings = exactConflicts.map(simplifyBookingForPrompt);
      const allDayBookings = blockingBookings.map(simplifyBookingForPrompt);
      const spokenDate = this.formatIsoDateForSpeechInTimezone(normalizedDate, requestedDate, organizationTimezone);

      let available = null;
      let requiresSpecificTime = !requestedTimeProvided;
      let summaryHint = "";
      let replyText = "";
      let conflictingBookings = exactConflictingBookings;

      const availabilityAssessment = await this.reasonAboutAvailability({
        callId,
        organizationId,
        latestTurn,
        knownState,
        requestedDate: normalizedDate,
        requestedTime: rawRequestedTime,
        requestedRoom,
        allDayBookings,
        exactConflicts: exactConflictingBookings,
        maxTokens,
        onStep,
      }).catch((error) => {
        console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] reasonAboutAvailability failed:", error.message);
        return null;
      });

      if (availabilityAssessment) {
        if (availabilityAssessment.result === "available") {
          available = true;
          requiresSpecificTime = false;
        } else if (availabilityAssessment.result === "conflict") {
          available = false;
          requiresSpecificTime = false;
          if (conflictingBookings.length === 0 && allDayBookings.length > 0) {
            conflictingBookings = allDayBookings;
          }
        } else if (availabilityAssessment.result === "needs_specific_time") {
          available = null;
          requiresSpecificTime = true;
        }

        summaryHint = trimText(availabilityAssessment.summaryHint || "", 400);
        replyText = trimText(availabilityAssessment.recommendedReply || "", 220);
      }

      if (!summaryHint) {
        if (!requestedTimeProvided) {
          summaryHint = allDayBookings.length === 0
            ? `Availability check: nothing is currently booked on ${spokenDate}, but a specific start time is still needed to confirm availability.`
            : `Availability check: there ${allDayBookings.length === 1 ? "is 1 booking touching" : `are ${allDayBookings.length} bookings touching`} ${spokenDate}, but the exact room or time still needs confirmation.`;
        } else if (available === false) {
          summaryHint = `Availability check: there ${conflictingBookings.length === 1 ? "is 1 conflicting booking" : `are ${conflictingBookings.length} conflicting bookings`} for ${spokenDate}.`;
        } else if (available === true) {
          summaryHint = `Availability check: no conflicting bookings were found for ${spokenDate}.`;
        } else {
          summaryHint = `Availability check: bookings touching ${spokenDate} were found, but more detail may still be needed to confirm the exact fit.`;
        }
      }

      if (!replyText) {
        replyText = buildAvailabilityReply(
          {
            checked: true,
            available,
            requiresSpecificTime,
            summaryHint,
            conflictingBookings,
            allDayBookings,
          },
          {
            requestedDate: normalizedDate,
            requestedTime: rawRequestedTime,
            requestedRoom,
          },
        );
      }

      await this.emitStep(onStep, "availability_lookup_completed", {
        requestedDate: normalizedDate,
        requestedTime: rawRequestedTime,
        requestedRoom,
        available,
        requiresSpecificTime,
        bookingsTouchingDate: allDayBookings.length,
        conflictingBookings: conflictingBookings.length,
      });

      return {
        checked: true,
        available,
        requiresSpecificTime,
        summaryHint,
        conflictingBookings,
        allDayBookings,
        replyText,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] findAvailability failed:", error.message);
      return {
        checked: false,
        available: null,
        requiresSpecificTime: !requestedTimeProvided,
        summaryHint: "",
        conflictingBookings: [],
        allDayBookings: [],
        replyText: "",
      };
    }
  }

  mergeDecisionWithState(decision, knownState = {}, callerNumber = "", callerEmail = "") {
    const callerName = trimText(
      decision?.callerName || knownState?.callerName || "",
      80,
    );
    const resolvedCallerEmail = trimText(
      decision?.callerEmail || callerEmail || knownState?.callerEmail || "",
      160,
    );
    const requestedDate = normalizeRequestedDateValue(
      decision?.requestedDate || knownState?.requestedDate || "",
    );
    const requestedTime = normalizeRequestedTimeValue(
      decision?.requestedTime || knownState?.requestedTime || "",
    );
    const requestedPartySize = String(
      decision?.requestedPartySize || knownState?.requestedPartySize || "",
    ).trim();
    const requestedRoom = trimText(
      decision?.requestedRoom || knownState?.requestedRoom || "",
      80,
    );

    const mergedState = {
      callerName,
      callerEmail: resolvedCallerEmail,
      requestedDate,
      requestedTime,
      requestedPartySize,
      requestedRoom,
      lastIntent: decision?.intent || knownState?.lastIntent || "",
    };

    return {
      mergedState,
      resolvedRequestedDate: requestedDate,
      extracted: {
        callerName,
        callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
        callerEmail: resolvedCallerEmail,
        requestedDate,
        requestedTime,
        partySize: requestedPartySize,
        requestedRoom,
      },
    };
  }

  deriveAction(decision, availability, reservation = null) {
    if (reservation?.created) {
      return "reservation_created";
    }
    if (reservation?.existing) {
      return "reservation_already_exists";
    }
    if (decision?.needsHuman) {
      return "escalate_to_human";
    }
    if (decision?.shouldCreateCallback) {
      return "create_callback";
    }
    if (decision?.shouldCreateReservation || decision?.intent === "reservation_create") {
      if (availability?.checked) {
        if (availability.available === true) {
          return "reservation_ready";
        }
        if (availability.available === false) {
          return "reservation_conflict";
        }
        return "reservation_pending_details";
      }
      return "reservation_pending_details";
    }
    if (decision?.needsAvailabilityCheck || availability?.checked) {
      if (availability?.checked) {
        if (availability.available === true) {
          return "availability_available";
        }
        if (availability.available === false) {
          return "availability_conflict";
        }
        return "availability_pending_details";
      }
      return "availability_pending";
    }
    return "respond_only";
  }

  buildFallbackReply(decision, availability, extracted = {}) {
    if (availability?.replyText) {
      return availability.replyText;
    }

    if (availability?.checked || decision?.needsAvailabilityCheck) {
      return buildAvailabilityReply(availability, extracted);
    }

    const spokenReply = trimText(decision?.recommendedSpokenReply || "", 220);
    if (spokenReply) {
      return spokenReply;
    }

    return "Thanks, I’ve noted that and someone from our team will follow up if needed.";
  }

  async createReservationFromCall({
    callId,
    organizationId,
    callerNumber,
    callerEmail = "",
    transcript,
    extracted,
  }) {
    const missingContactFields = getMissingReservationContactFields({
      extracted,
      callerNumber,
      callerEmail,
    });

    if (missingContactFields.length > 0) {
      return {
        created: false,
        existing: false,
        reason: "missing_contact_details",
        booking: null,
      };
    }

    const requestedMoment = parseRequestedMoment(
      extracted.requestedDate,
      extracted.requestedTime,
    );

    if (!requestedMoment || !requestedMoment.isValid()) {
      return {
        created: false,
        existing: false,
        reason: "missing_or_invalid_datetime",
        booking: null,
      };
    }

    try {
      const reservationName = resolveReservationContactName(extracted, callerNumber);
      const result = await BookingService.createReservation({
        organizationId,
        name: reservationName,
        email: callerEmail || extracted.callerEmail || "",
        phone: callerNumber || "",
        dateTime: requestedMoment.toDate(),
        guests: extracted.partySize || "1",
        room: extracted.requestedRoom ? [extracted.requestedRoom] : [],
        notes: [
          "Reservation created by experimental receptionist.",
          !String(extracted?.callerName || "").trim()
            ? "Caller name was not captured during the call."
            : "",
          callId ? `Call ID: ${callId}` : "",
          callerNumber ? `Caller phone: ${callerNumber}` : "",
          callerEmail ? `Caller email: ${callerEmail}` : "",
          transcript
            ? `Transcript: ${compactTranscriptTail(transcript, 12, 800)}`
            : "",
        ]
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join("\n"),
        customFields: {
          source: "experimental_receptionist",
          callId: callId || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: callerEmail || extracted.callerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: extracted.requestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: extracted.requestedTime || "",
          requestedPartySize: extracted.partySize || "",
          requestedRoom: extracted.requestedRoom || "",
          callerNameCaptured: Boolean(String(extracted?.callerName || "").trim()),
        },
        dedupeExistingReservation: true,
        sendNotification: true,
      });

      return {
        created: Boolean(result?.created),
        existing: Boolean(result?.existing),
        reason: result?.existing ? "already_exists" : "",
        booking: result?.booking || null,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] createReservationFromCall failed:", error.message);
      return {
        created: false,
        existing: false,
        reason: "create_failed",
        booking: null,
      };
    }
  }

  async processTranscript({
    callId,
    organizationId,
    callerNumber,
    callerEmail = "",
    transcript,
    latestTurn = "",
    backgroundInfo = "",
    knownState = {},
    maxTokens = null,
    onStep = null,
  }) {
    let resolvedBackgroundInfo = String(backgroundInfo || "").trim();

    const resolvedCallerEmail =
      extractEmailAddress(latestTurn) ||
      extractEmailAddress(transcript) ||
      trimText(callerEmail || knownState?.callerEmail || "", 160);

    if (looksLikeDeliveryArrival(latestTurn) || looksLikeDeliveryArrival(transcript)) {
      return {
        replyText: buildDeliveryArrivalReply(),
        intent: "speak_to_human",
        action: "escalate_to_human",
        summary: "Caller is at the business with a delivery and needs a team member.",
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: trimText(knownState?.callerName || "", 80),
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: resolvedCallerEmail,
          requestedDate: "",
          requestedTime: "",
          partySize: "",
          requestedRoom: "",
          callbackRequested: false,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: 1,
          disposition: "needs_human",
          needsHuman: true,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: false,
          availability: {
            checked: false,
            available: null,
            requiresSpecificTime: false,
            summaryHint: "",
            conflictingBookings: [],
            allDayBookings: [],
          },
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: "general",
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    const receptionistGuardrail = getReceptionistGuardrailState(knownState);
    if (receptionistGuardrail.forceHumanHandoff) {
      const guardrailMerge = this.mergeDecisionWithState(
        { intent: "speak_to_human", requestType: "general", confidence: 1 },
        knownState,
        callerNumber,
        resolvedCallerEmail,
      );

      return this.buildGuardrailHumanHandoffResult({
        reason: receptionistGuardrail.forceHumanReason || "caller frustration or repeated unresolved loop",
        decision: {
          intent: knownState?.lastIntent || "speak_to_human",
          requestType: "general",
          confidence: 1,
          summary: "Caller should be routed to a human due to receptionist guardrails.",
        },
        mergedState: guardrailMerge.mergedState,
        resolvedRequestedDate: guardrailMerge.resolvedRequestedDate,
        callerNumber,
        callerEmail: resolvedCallerEmail,
        backgroundInfo: resolvedBackgroundInfo,
        maxTokens,
      });
    }

    let decision = await this.analyzeTranscript({
      callId,
      organizationId,
      callerNumber,
      callerEmail: resolvedCallerEmail,
      transcript,
      latestTurn,
      backgroundInfo: "",
      availabilityContext: "",
      knownState,
      maxTokens,
      includeBusinessContext: false,
      onStep,
    });

    let { mergedState, resolvedRequestedDate, extracted } = this.mergeDecisionWithState(
      decision,
      knownState,
      callerNumber,
      resolvedCallerEmail,
    );

    ({ mergedState, resolvedRequestedDate, extracted } = this.mergeEventIntakeHeuristics({
      decision,
      knownState,
      mergedState,
      resolvedRequestedDate,
      extracted,
      latestTurn,
      transcript,
      callerNumber,
    }));

    const preservePriorReservationState =
      knownState?.lastIntent === "reservation_create" &&
      isQuestionLikeTurn(latestTurn) &&
      !looksLikeReservationRequest(latestTurn) &&
      !looksLikeReservationConfirmation(latestTurn);

    if (preservePriorReservationState) {
      const preserved = preserveKnownReservationState(mergedState, extracted, knownState);
      mergedState = preserved.mergedState;
      resolvedRequestedDate = preserved.resolvedRequestedDate;
      extracted = preserved.extracted;
    }

    let availability = {
      checked: false,
      available: null,
      requiresSpecificTime: false,
      summaryHint: "",
      conflictingBookings: [],
      allDayBookings: [],
    };

    const organization = await this.getOrganizationContext(organizationId);
    const organizationTimezone = this.resolveOrganizationTimezone(organization);
    const isPrivateEventInquiry = decision.bookingCategory === "private_event";
    const normalizedLatestTurnForHumanTransfer = String(latestTurn || "").trim();
    const normalizedTranscriptForHumanTransfer = String(transcript || "").trim();
    const humanTransferRequestCount =
      (normalizedTranscriptForHumanTransfer.match(HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_RE) || []).length;
    const latestHumanTransferRequestCount =
      (normalizedLatestTurnForHumanTransfer.match(HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_RE) || []).length;
    const latestTurnIsPureHumanTransferRequest =
      PURE_HUMAN_TRANSFER_REQUEST_RE.test(normalizedLatestTurnForHumanTransfer);
    const explicitHumanTransferRequested =
      latestHumanTransferRequestCount > 0 ||
      latestTurnIsPureHumanTransferRequest ||
      decision?.intent === "speak_to_human";
    const shouldFetchBusinessContext = this.shouldUseBusinessContext(decision, latestTurn, transcript);
    const humanTransferHasEventOrBusinessPurpose =
      HUMAN_EVENT_PURPOSE_RE.test(normalizedLatestTurnForHumanTransfer) ||
      HUMAN_EVENT_PURPOSE_RE.test(normalizedTranscriptForHumanTransfer) ||
      this.isEventOrCateringInquiry(decision, latestTurn, transcript) ||
      shouldFetchBusinessContext;
    const shouldAnswerBeforeHumanTransfer =
      explicitHumanTransferRequested &&
      humanTransferHasEventOrBusinessPurpose &&
      humanTransferRequestCount < 2 &&
      !latestTurnIsPureHumanTransferRequest;
    const hasHumanTransferPurpose = this.hasSufficientHumanTransferPurpose({
      latestTurn,
      transcript,
      knownState,
      decision,
    });
    const transferLooksUnavailable =
      HUMAN_TRANSFER_UNAVAILABLE_RE.test(normalizedLatestTurnForHumanTransfer) &&
      (
        knownState?.lastIntent === "speak_to_human" ||
        latestHumanTransferRequestCount > 0 ||
        decision?.intent === "callback_request"
      );

    if (transferLooksUnavailable) {
      return {
        replyText: this.buildHumanTransferUnavailableReply(),
        intent: "callback_request",
        action: "create_callback",
        summary: decision.summary || "Caller said a live transfer is unlikely to be answered and needs staff follow-up.",
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: true,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: "needs_human",
          needsHuman: true,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: false,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    if (explicitHumanTransferRequested && !hasHumanTransferPurpose) {
      return {
        replyText: this.buildHumanTransferPurposeReply(),
        intent: "speak_to_human",
        action: "human_transfer_needs_purpose",
        summary: "Caller asked for a human but did not provide the purpose of the call yet.",
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: false,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: "in_progress",
          needsHuman: false,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: false,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    if (explicitHumanTransferRequested && hasHumanTransferPurpose && !shouldAnswerBeforeHumanTransfer) {
      return {
        replyText: "Of course, I'll connect you now. One moment, please.",
        intent: "speak_to_human",
        action: "escalate_to_human",
        summary: decision.summary || "Caller asked to speak with a human.",
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: true,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: "needs_human",
          needsHuman: true,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: false,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    const reservationRequested = !isPrivateEventInquiry && shouldTreatAsReservationRequest({
      decision,
      knownState,
      latestTurn,
      transcript,
    });
    const conflictEndTimeFollowUp =
      looksLikeConflictEndTimeQuestion(latestTurn) &&
      Boolean(mergedState.requestedDate || knownState?.requestedDate || decision?.requestedDate);

    if (this.isEventOrCateringInquiry(decision, latestTurn, transcript) && !shouldFetchBusinessContext) {
      const isCatering = this.isCateringInquiry(latestTurn, transcript);
      const eventReply = this.buildEventManagerCallbackReply({
        isCatering,
        requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || mergedState.requestedDate,
        requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime,
        requestedPartySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize,
      });

      return {
        replyText: eventReply,
        intent: decision.intent || "private_event_inquiry",
        action: "create_callback",
        summary:
          decision.summary ||
          (isCatering
            ? "Caller is asking about catering and needs event manager follow-up."
            : "Caller is asking about an event and needs event manager follow-up."),
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: true,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: "needs_human",
          needsHuman: true,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: false,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    const shouldRunAvailability =
      Boolean(decision.needsAvailabilityCheck) || reservationRequested || conflictEndTimeFollowUp;

    if (shouldRunAvailability && resolvedRequestedDate && organizationId) {
      availability = await this.findAvailability({
        organizationId,
        requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate,
        requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime,
        requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom,
        callId,
        latestTurn,
        knownState: {
          ...(knownState || {}),
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || knownState?.callerName || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || knownState?.callerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: mergedState.requestedDate || knownState?.requestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || knownState?.requestedTime || "",
          requestedPartySize:
            mergedState.requestedPartySize || knownState?.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || knownState?.requestedRoom || "",
          lastIntent: decision.intent || knownState?.lastIntent || "",
        },
        maxTokens,
        onStep,
      });
    }

    if (shouldFetchBusinessContext) {
      resolvedBackgroundInfo = await this.resolveBackgroundInfo({
        organizationId,
        backgroundInfo: resolvedBackgroundInfo,
        latestTurn,
        transcript,
      });

      if (resolvedBackgroundInfo) {
        await this.emitStep(onStep, "business_context_loaded", {
          usedForResponseSynthesisOnly: true,
        });
      }
    }

    const synthesizedResponse = await this.synthesizeReply({
      callId,
      organizationId,
      transcript,
      latestTurn,
      decision,
      availability,
      backgroundInfo: resolvedBackgroundInfo,
      knownState: {
        ...(knownState || {}),
        callerName: mergedState.callerName || knownState?.callerName || "",
        callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || knownState?.callerEmail || "",
        requestedDate: mergedState.requestedDate || knownState?.requestedDate || "",
        requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || knownState?.requestedTime || "",
        requestedPartySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || knownState?.requestedPartySize || "",
        requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || knownState?.requestedRoom || "",
        lastIntent: decision.intent || knownState?.lastIntent || "",
      },
      extracted,
      maxTokens,
      onStep,
    }).catch((error) => {
      console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] synthesizeReply failed:", error.message);
      return null;
    });

    const shouldAttemptReservationCreation = Boolean(
      synthesizedResponse?.shouldCreateReservation || reservationRequested || decision.shouldCreateReservation
    );

    const hasMinimumReservationDetails =
      Boolean(String(extracted.requestedDate || "").trim()) &&
      Boolean(String(extracted.requestedTime || "").trim());
    const missingReservationContactFields = getMissingReservationContactFields({
      extracted,
      callerNumber,
      callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
    });

    if (
      conflictEndTimeFollowUp &&
      availability.checked &&
      availability.available === false
    ) {
      return {
        replyText: buildConflictEndTimeReply(availability, extracted),
        intent: knownState?.lastIntent || decision.intent || "availability_check",
        action: "reservation_conflict",
        summary: [decision.summary, availability.summaryHint].filter(Boolean).join(" "),
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: false,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: "ready_for_follow_up",
          needsHuman: false,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: true,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
