            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    if (shouldAttemptReservationCreation && !hasMinimumReservationDetails) {
      return {
        replyText: buildReservationMissingDetailsReply(extracted),
        intent: decision.intent || "reservation_create",
        action: "reservation_missing_details",
        summary:
          decision.summary ||
          "Caller wants to make a reservation but some required details are missing.",
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: false,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: "in_progress",
          needsHuman: false,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: true,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    let reservationResult = null;

    if (shouldAttemptReservationCreation && hasMinimumReservationDetails && missingReservationContactFields.length > 0) {
      return {
        replyText: buildReservationContactDetailsReply({
          callerName: extracted.callerName || mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerNumber,
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
        }),
        intent: decision.intent || "reservation_create",
        action: "contact_details_needed",
        summary: [decision.summary, "Reservation is missing required contact details before creation."]
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join(" "),
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: false,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: "ready_for_follow_up",
          needsHuman: false,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: Boolean(availability.checked),
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    if (
      shouldAttemptReservationCreation &&
      hasMinimumReservationDetails &&
      availability.checked &&
      availability.available !== false
    ) {
      reservationResult = await this.createReservationFromCall({
        callId,
        organizationId,
        callerNumber,
        callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
        transcript,
        extracted,
      });

      const reservationSummary = buildReservationSpeechSummary(extracted);

      if (reservationResult.created) {
        return {
          replyText: `You're all set — I've created your reservation for ${reservationSummary}.`,
          intent: decision.intent || "reservation_create",
          action: "reservation_created",
          summary: [
            decision.summary,
            `Reservation created for ${reservationSummary}.`,
          ]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join(" "),
          smsPreview: "",
          extracted: {
            callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
            callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
            callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
            requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
            requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
            partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
            requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
            callbackRequested: false,
          },
          meta: {
            confidence: decision.confidence,
            disposition: "completed",
            needsHuman: false,
            needsAvailabilityCheck: true,
            availability,
            businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
            requestType: decision.requestType,
            maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
            reservation: {
              attempted: true,
              created: true,
              existing: false,
              bookingId: reservationResult.booking?.id || "",
            },
          },
        };
      }

      if (reservationResult.existing) {
        return {
          replyText: `I already have that reservation on file for ${reservationSummary}.`,
          intent: decision.intent || "reservation_create",
          action: "reservation_already_exists",
          summary: [
            decision.summary,
            `Matching reservation already existed for ${reservationSummary}.`,
          ]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join(" "),
          smsPreview: "",
          extracted: {
            callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
            callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
            callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
            requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
            requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
            partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
            requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
            callbackRequested: false,
          },
          meta: {
            confidence: decision.confidence,
            disposition: "completed",
            needsHuman: false,
            needsAvailabilityCheck: true,
            availability,
            businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
            requestType: decision.requestType,
            maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
            reservation: {
              attempted: true,
              created: false,
              existing: true,
              bookingId: reservationResult.booking?.id || "",
            },
          },
        };
      }

      const needsFollowUpContact = shouldAskForFollowUpContact({
        action: "reservation_create_failed",
        callerNumber,
        callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
      });

      return {
        replyText: needsFollowUpContact
          ? buildFollowUpContactReply()
          : `It looks like that time is available, but I ran into an issue creating the reservation. A team member should confirm it shortly.`,
        intent: decision.intent || "reservation_create",
        action: needsFollowUpContact ? "contact_details_needed" : "reservation_create_failed",
        summary: [decision.summary, `Reservation creation failed for ${reservationSummary}.`]
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join(" "),
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: true,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: needsFollowUpContact ? "ready_for_follow_up" : "needs_human",
          needsHuman: !needsFollowUpContact,
          needsAvailabilityCheck: true,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: true,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    if (
      shouldAttemptReservationCreation &&
      hasMinimumReservationDetails &&
      availability.checked &&
      availability.available === false
    ) {
      return {
        replyText: trimText(synthesizedResponse?.replyText || "", 220) || this.buildFallbackReply(decision, availability, extracted),
        intent: decision.intent || "reservation_create",
        action: "reservation_conflict",
        summary: [decision.summary, availability.summaryHint].filter(Boolean).join(" "),
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: false,
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: decision.needsHuman ? "needs_human" : "ready_for_follow_up",
          needsHuman: Boolean(decision.needsHuman),
          needsAvailabilityCheck: true,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: true,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    if (isPrivateEventInquiry && availability.checked) {
      const privateEventReply = trimText(synthesizedResponse?.replyText || "", 220) || this.buildFallbackReply(decision, availability, extracted);

      return {
        replyText: privateEventReply,
        intent: decision.intent,
        action:
          trimText(synthesizedResponse?.action || "", 80) ||
          (availability.available === false
            ? "availability_conflict"
            : availability.available === true
              ? "availability_available"
              : "availability_pending_details"),
        summary: trimText(synthesizedResponse?.summary || "", 300) || [decision.summary, availability.summaryHint].filter(Boolean).join(" ").trim(),
        smsPreview: "",
        extracted: {
          callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
          callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
          callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
          requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
          requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
          partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
          requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
          callbackRequested: Boolean(synthesizedResponse?.shouldCreateCallback),
        },
        meta: {
          confidence: decision.confidence,
          disposition: synthesizedResponse?.disposition === "completed" ? "completed" : (synthesizedResponse?.disposition || "ready_for_follow_up"),
          needsHuman: Boolean(synthesizedResponse?.needsHuman),
          needsAvailabilityCheck: true,
          availability,
          businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
          requestType: decision.requestType,
          maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
          reservation: {
            attempted: false,
            created: false,
            existing: false,
            bookingId: "",
          },
        },
      };
    }

    let replyText = trimText(synthesizedResponse?.replyText || "", 220) || this.buildFallbackReply(decision, availability, extracted);
    let action = trimText(synthesizedResponse?.action || "", 80) || this.deriveAction(
      {
        ...decision,
        shouldCreateReservation: shouldAttemptReservationCreation,
      },
      availability,
      reservationResult,
    );

    const callerAlreadyProvidedHumanTransferContext = Boolean(
      normalizedLatestTurnForHumanTransfer && !latestTurnIsPureHumanTransferRequest
    );
    const shouldEscalateHumanTransferNow =
      decision?.intent === "speak_to_human" &&
      !shouldAnswerBeforeHumanTransfer &&
      (
        humanTransferRequestCount >= 2 ||
        (latestHumanTransferRequestCount > 0 && callerAlreadyProvidedHumanTransferContext)
      );

    if (HUMAN_HANDOFF_ACTIONS.has(action) && shouldEscalateHumanTransferNow) {
      action = "escalate_to_human";
    }

    if (shouldAnswerBeforeHumanTransfer && HUMAN_HANDOFF_ACTIONS.has(action)) {
      action = "create_callback";
    }

    if (shouldAnswerBeforeHumanTransfer && (!action || action === "respond_only") && decision?.needsHuman) {
      action = "create_callback";
    }

    if (
      (!action || action === "respond_only") &&
      (
        synthesizedResponse?.disposition === "needs_human" ||
        synthesizedResponse?.needsHuman === true ||
        decision?.disposition === "needs_human" ||
        decision?.needsHuman === true ||
        (decision?.intent === "speak_to_human" && !shouldAnswerBeforeHumanTransfer)
      )
    ) {
      action = "escalate_to_human";
    } else if (
      (!action || action === "respond_only") &&
      (
        synthesizedResponse?.shouldCreateCallback === true ||
        decision?.shouldCreateCallback === true
      )
    ) {
      action = "create_callback";
    }

    if (shouldEscalateHumanTransferNow && action === "escalate_to_human") {
      replyText = "Of course, I'll connect you now. One moment, please.";
    }

    if (
      shouldAskForFollowUpContact({
        action,
        callerNumber,
        callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
      })
    ) {
      replyText = buildFollowUpContactReply();
      action = "contact_details_needed";
    }

    const summaryParts = [decision.summary];

    if (availability?.summaryHint) {
      summaryParts.push(availability.summaryHint);
    }

    return {
      replyText,
      intent: decision.intent,
      action,
      summary: trimText(synthesizedResponse?.summary || "", 300) || summaryParts.filter(Boolean).join(" ").trim(),
      smsPreview: decision.shouldSendSms ? decision.smsText : "",
      extracted: {
        callerName: mergedState.callerName || "",
        callerPhone: callerNumber || "",
        callerEmail: mergedState.callerEmail || resolvedCallerEmail || "",
        requestedDate: resolvedRequestedDate || "",
        requestedTime: mergedState.requestedTime || "",
        partySize: mergedState.requestedPartySize || "",
        requestedRoom: mergedState.requestedRoom || "",
        callbackRequested:
          Boolean(synthesizedResponse?.shouldCreateCallback) ||
          Boolean(decision.shouldCreateCallback) ||
          Boolean(synthesizedResponse?.needsHuman) ||
          Boolean(decision.needsHuman) ||
          action === "create_callback" ||
          action === "escalate_to_human",
      },
      meta: {
        confidence: decision.confidence,
        disposition:
          synthesizedResponse?.disposition ||
          (availability?.checked && !decision.needsHuman
            ? "ready_for_follow_up"
            : decision.disposition),
        needsHuman:
          typeof synthesizedResponse?.needsHuman === "boolean"
            ? synthesizedResponse.needsHuman
            : availability?.checked && !decision.needsHuman
              ? false
              : decision.needsHuman,
        needsAvailabilityCheck:
          Boolean(decision.needsAvailabilityCheck) || shouldAttemptReservationCreation,
        availability,
        businessContextUsed: Boolean(resolvedBackgroundInfo),
        requestType: decision.requestType,
        maxTokens: this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens),
        reservation: {
          attempted: shouldAttemptReservationCreation,
          created: false,
          existing: false,
          bookingId: "",
        },
      },
    };
  }

  buildConversationTranscript(messages = []) {
    return (Array.isArray(messages) ? messages : [])
      .map((entry) => {
        const role = entry?.role === "assistant" ? "Assistant" : "Caller";
        const text = String(entry?.text || "").trim();
        if (!text) {
          return "";
        }
        return `${role}: ${text}`;
      })
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join("\n");
  }

}

export default ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore;

```

FILE: server/src/services/calls/ExperimentalReceptionistService.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/ExperimentalReceptionistService.js
import shared from "./ExperimentalReceptionistService.shared.js";
import ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore from "./ExperimentalReceptionistService.core.js";

const {
  z,
  moment,
  fs,
  path,
  crypto,
  prisma,
  llmClient,
  elevenLabsTTSService,
  kokoroLocalTTSService,
  SpeechSynthesisService,
  BookingService,
  defaultPrompts,
  sendPushNotificationToUser,
  getNamespace,
  TORONTO_TZ,
  DEFAULT_RECEPTIONIST_MAX_TOKENS,
  PROMPT_CACHE_TTL_MS,
  RECEPTIONIST_DECISION_PROMPT_KEY,
  RECEPTIONIST_FINAL_SUMMARY_PROMPT_KEY,
  RECEPTIONIST_GREETING_PROMPT_KEY,
  RECEPTIONIST_MODE_LEGACY,
  RECEPTIONIST_MODE_EXPERIMENTAL,
  CALL_RECEIVER_SETTING_NAME,
  GREETING_AUDIO_RELATIVE_DIR,
  GREETING_AUDIO_ROUTE_BASE,
  callTranscriptFileLockQueues,
  withCallTranscriptFileLock,
  normalizeReceptionistMode,
  WEEKDAY_INDEX,
  receptionistDecisionSchema,
  finalSummarySchema,
  PRODUCT_SEARCH_STOP_WORDS,
  RESERVATION_REQUEST_RE,
  RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_RE,
  QUESTION_LIKE_RE,
  CONFLICT_END_TIME_RE,
  TIME_RANGE_SPLIT_RE,
  ALTERNATIVE_BUFFER_MINUTES,
  DELIVERY_ARRIVAL_RE,
  DELIVERY_TO_DOOR_RE,
  EMAIL_RE,
  VALID_RECEPTIONIST_REQUEST_TYPES,
  VALID_RECEPTIONIST_INTENTS,
  VALID_RECEPTIONIST_BOOKING_CATEGORIES,
  normalizeDecisionRequestType,
  normalizeDecisionIntent,
  normalizeDecisionBookingCategory,
  normalizeText,
  trimText,
  compactTranscriptTail,
  tryParseJson,
  normalizeStatusArray,
  bookingBlocksAvailability,
  extractRoomNames,
  normalizeRoomName,
  extractEmailAddress,
  hasFollowUpContact,
  looksLikeDeliveryArrival,
  buildDeliveryArrivalReply,
  buildFollowUpContactReply,
  shouldAskForFollowUpContact,
  simplifyBookingForPrompt,
  normalizeSearchText,
  tokenizeProductSearchText,
  scoreProductMatch,
  simplifyProductForPrompt,
  buildProductContext,
  getTorontoNow,
  getCurrentDateContext,
  formatIsoDateForSpeech,
  normalizeRequestedDateValue,
  normalizeRequestedTimeValue,
  parseRequestedMoment,
  hasSpecificRequestedTime,
  bookingMatchesRequestedSlot,
  summarizeKnownState,
  buildAvailabilityFollowUpReply,
  isQuestionLikeTurn,
  looksLikeConflictEndTimeQuestion,
  looksLikeReservationDetailFollowUp,
  buildReservationContactDetailsReply,
  getMissingReservationContactFields,
  getLatestConflictingBooking,
  buildConflictAlternativeSuggestion,
  buildConflictEndTimeReply,
  buildDateOnlyAvailabilityReply,
  buildAvailabilityReply,
  buildReservationSpeechSummary,
  buildReservationMissingDetailsReply,
  looksLikeReservationRequest,
  looksLikeReservationConfirmation,
  shouldTreatAsReservationRequest,
  preserveKnownReservationState,
  resolveReservationContactName
} = shared;

const RECEPTIONIST_SUMMARY_USAGE_KEY = "CALLS_RECEPTIONIST_SUMMARY";

class ExperimentalReceptionistService extends ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore {
getCallTranscriptLogPathsForOrganization(organizationId) {
  const safeOrganizationId = String(organizationId || "").trim();
  const logDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), "uploads", safeOrganizationId, "ai_logs");
  const logFile = path.join(logDir, "call_transcript.md");

  return {
    logDir,
    logFile,
  };
}

formatTranscriptConversationMarkdown(transcript = "") {
  const lines = String(transcript || "")
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => line.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (!lines.length) {
    return ["- **Conversation:** (empty transcript)"];
  }

  return lines.map((line) => {
    const callerMatch = line.match(/^Caller:\s*(.*)$/i);
    if (callerMatch) {
      return `- **Caller:** ${callerMatch[1] || "(empty)"}`;
    }

    const assistantMatch = line.match(/^(?:Assistant|AI):\s*(.*)$/i);
    if (assistantMatch) {
      return `- **AI receptionist:** ${assistantMatch[1] || "(empty)"}`;
    }

    return `- ${line}`;
  });
}

formatCallLogScalar(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) {
    return "";
  }

  if (typeof value === "boolean") {
    return value ? "Yes" : "No";
  }

  if (typeof value === "number") {
    if (Number.isFinite(value)) {
      return String(value);
    }
    return "";
  }

  return String(value).replace(/```/g, "'''").trim();
}

appendNestedCallLogMarkdown(lines = [], label = "", value = undefined, indentLevel = 0) {
  const indent = "  ".repeat(Math.max(0, indentLevel));
  const safeLabel = this.formatCallLogScalar(label);

  if (value === null || value === undefined) {
    if (safeLabel) {
      lines.push(`${indent}- **${safeLabel}:**`);
    }
    return lines;
  }

  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    const filtered = value
      .map((item) => {
        if (item === null || item === undefined) return null;
        if (typeof item === "string") {
          const normalized = this.formatCallLogScalar(item);
          return normalized || null;
        }
        return item;
      })
      .filter((item) => item !== null && item !== undefined && item !== "");

    if (!filtered.length) {
      return lines;
    }

    if (safeLabel) {
      lines.push(`${indent}- **${safeLabel}:**`);
    }

    for (const item of filtered) {
      if (Array.isArray(item) || (item && typeof item === "object")) {
        this.appendNestedCallLogMarkdown(lines, "", item, indentLevel + 1);
      } else {
        lines.push(`${indent}  - ${this.formatCallLogScalar(item)}`);
      }
    }

    return lines;
  }

  if (typeof value === "object") {
    const entries = Object.entries(value).filter(([, entryValue]) => {
      if (entryValue === null || entryValue === undefined) return false;
      if (typeof entryValue === "string") return Boolean(this.formatCallLogScalar(entryValue));
      if (Array.isArray(entryValue)) return entryValue.length > 0;
      return true;
    });

    if (!entries.length) {
      return lines;
    }

    if (safeLabel) {
      lines.push(`${indent}- **${safeLabel}:**`);
    }

    for (const [entryKey, entryValue] of entries) {
      const normalizedKey = String(entryKey || "")
        .replace(/([a-z0-9])([A-Z])/g, "$1 $2")
        .replace(/[_-]+/g, " ")
        .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
        .trim()
        .replace(/\b\w/g, (character) => character.toUpperCase());

      if (Array.isArray(entryValue) || (entryValue && typeof entryValue === "object")) {
        this.appendNestedCallLogMarkdown(lines, normalizedKey, entryValue, indentLevel + 1);
      } else {
        const scalarValue = this.formatCallLogScalar(entryValue);
        if (scalarValue) {
          lines.push(`${indent}  - **${normalizedKey}:** ${scalarValue}`);
        }
      }
    }

    return lines;
  }

  const scalarValue = this.formatCallLogScalar(value);
  if (!scalarValue) {
    return lines;
  }

  if (safeLabel) {
    lines.push(`${indent}- **${safeLabel}:** ${scalarValue}`);
  } else {
    lines.push(`${indent}- ${scalarValue}`);
  }

  return lines;
}

buildConversationMarkdownFromMessages(messages = [], fallbackTranscript = "") {
  const normalizedMessages = Array.isArray(messages)
    ? messages
        .filter((entry) => entry && (String(entry?.text || "").trim() || entry?.role))
        .map((entry) => ({
          ...entry,
          role: entry?.role === "assistant" ? "assistant" : "caller",
          text: this.formatCallLogScalar(entry?.text || "") || "",
          turn: Number.isFinite(Number(entry?.turn)) ? Number(entry.turn) : null,
        }))
    : [];

  if (!normalizedMessages.length) {
    return this.formatTranscriptConversationMarkdown(fallbackTranscript);
  }

  const deduped = [];
  for (const entry of normalizedMessages) {
    const previous = deduped[deduped.length - 1];
    if (
      previous &&
      previous.role === entry.role &&
      previous.turn === entry.turn &&
      previous.text === entry.text
    ) {
      continue;
    }
    deduped.push(entry);
  }

  const lines = [];

  for (const entry of deduped) {
    const turnLabel = entry?.turn ? ` — Turn ${entry.turn}` : "";
    const isAssistant = entry?.role === "assistant";
    const heading = isAssistant ? "AI receptionist" : "Caller";
    const text = entry?.text || "(empty)";

    lines.push(`#### ${heading}${turnLabel}`);
    lines.push("");

    if (!isAssistant) {
      lines.push(`- **Source:** ${this.formatCallLogScalar(entry?.source || entry?.sttProvider || "assemblyai") || "assemblyai"}`);
      lines.push(`- **Said:** ${text}`);
      lines.push("");
      continue;
    }

    lines.push(`- **Said:** ${text}`);

    const llmDetails = entry?.llm && typeof entry.llm === "object" ? entry.llm : null;
    if (llmDetails) {
      this.appendNestedCallLogMarkdown(lines, "LLM details", llmDetails, 0);
    }

    lines.push("");
  }

  return lines.filter((line, index, array) => {
    if (line !== "") return true;
    const previous = array[index - 1];
    return previous !== "";
  });
}

normalizeCallTranscriptEntry(entry = "") {
  const normalized = String(entry || "")
    .replace(/\r\n/g, "\n")
    .replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n")
    .trim();

  if (!normalized) {
    return "";
  }

  const withoutTrailingDivider = normalized.replace(/(?:\n\s*)?---\s*$/m, "").trim();
  return `${withoutTrailingDivider}\n\n---\n\n`;
}

normalizeCallTranscriptLogContent(content = "") {
  let normalized = String(content || "").replace(/\r\n/g, "\n");

  if (!normalized) {
    return "";
  }

  normalized = normalized.replace(/---(?=##\s+Call Conversation\s+—)/g, "---\n\n");
  normalized = normalized.replace(/---\s*##(?=\s+Call Conversation\s+—)/g, "---\n\n##");
  normalized = normalized.replace(/([^\n])##(?=\s+Call Conversation\s+—)/g, "$1\n\n##");

  const parts = normalized
    .split(/\n(?=##\s+Call Conversation\s+—)/g)
    .map((entry) => this.normalizeCallTranscriptEntry(entry))
    .filter(Boolean);

  return parts.join("");
}

parseLoggedCallIdsFromTranscriptLog(content = "") {
  const ids = new Set();
  const normalizedContent = this.normalizeCallTranscriptLogContent(content);
  const matches = normalizedContent.matchAll(/^##\s+Call Conversation —\s+([^\s—]+)\s+—/gm);

  for (const match of matches) {
    const callId = String(match?.[1] || "").trim();
    if (callId) {
      ids.add(callId);
    }
  }

  return ids;
}

formatCallTranscriptMarkdownEntry({
  callId,
  callerNumber,
  callerEmail = "",
  transcript,
  messages = [],
  finalSummary = {},
  loggedAt = null,
}) {
  const loggedAtText = loggedAt
    ? new Date(loggedAt).toLocaleString("sv-SE")
    : new Date().toLocaleString("sv-SE");
  const summaryText = String(finalSummary?.summary || "")
    .replace(/```/g, "'''")
    .trim();
  const conversationLines = this.buildConversationMarkdownFromMessages(messages, transcript);
  const titleBits = [callId, callerNumber || callerEmail || "unknown caller"]
    .filter(Boolean)
    .join(" — ");
  const disposition = String(finalSummary?.disposition || "").trim() || (summaryText ? "completed" : "unknown");

  return this.normalizeCallTranscriptEntry([
    `## Call Conversation — ${titleBits}`,
    "",
    `- **Logged:** ${loggedAtText}`,
    `- **Call ID:** \`${callId}\``,
    `- **Caller number:** ${callerNumber || "unknown"}`,
    `- **Caller email:** ${callerEmail || "unknown"}`,
    `- **Disposition:** ${disposition}`,
    "",
    "### Summary",
    "",
    summaryText || "No summary saved for this call yet.",
    "",
    "### Conversation",
    "",
    ...(conversationLines.length ? conversationLines : ["- **Conversation:** (empty transcript)"]),
    "",
    "---",
    ""
  ].join("\n"));
}

buildPhoneCallTranscriptEntry(phoneCall = {}) {
  return this.formatCallTranscriptMarkdownEntry({
    callId: phoneCall.id,
    callerNumber: phoneCall.from || "",
    callerEmail: phoneCall.callerEmail || "",
    transcript: phoneCall.transcription || "",
    finalSummary: {
      summary: phoneCall.summary || "",
      disposition: phoneCall.summary ? "completed" : "needs_human",
    },
    loggedAt: phoneCall.updatedAt || phoneCall.createdAt || null,
  });
}

parseCallTranscriptEntries(content = "") {
  const text = this.normalizeCallTranscriptLogContent(content);
  const entries = new Map();
  const matcher = /(^##\s+Call Conversation\s+—\s+.+?(?=^##\s+Call Conversation\s+—\s+|\Z))/gms;

  for (const match of text.matchAll(matcher)) {
    const entry = this.normalizeCallTranscriptEntry(match?.[1] || "");
    if (!entry) {
      continue;
    }

    const idMatch = entry.match(/- \*\*Call ID:\*\*\s*`([^`]+)`/);
    const callId = String(idMatch?.[1] || "").trim();
    if (callId) {
      entries.set(callId, entry);
    }
  }

  return entries;
}

callTranscriptEntryHasStructuredDetails(entry = "") {
  const value = String(entry || "");
  return /Spoken reply sent to ElevenLabs|LLM details/i.test(value);
}

buildCallTranscriptLogFromPhoneCalls(phoneCalls = [], existingContent = "") {
  const existingEntries = this.parseCallTranscriptEntries(existingContent);
  const usedCallIds = new Set();
  const orderedEntries = [];

  for (const phoneCall of phoneCalls.filter((item) => String(item?.transcription || "").trim())) {
    const callId = String(phoneCall?.id || "").trim();
    if (!callId) {
      continue;
    }

    const freshEntry = this.buildPhoneCallTranscriptEntry(phoneCall);
    const existingEntry = existingEntries.get(callId);
    const entryToUse = this.callTranscriptEntryHasStructuredDetails(existingEntry)
      ? existingEntry
      : freshEntry;

    orderedEntries.push(entryToUse);
    usedCallIds.add(callId);
  }

  for (const [callId, entry] of existingEntries.entries()) {
    if (!usedCallIds.has(callId)) {
      orderedEntries.push(entry);
    }
  }

  return orderedEntries
    .map((entry) => this.normalizeCallTranscriptEntry(entry))
    .filter(Boolean)
    .join("");
}

async rebuildCallTranscriptLogForOrganization(organizationId, { overwrite = false } = {}) {
  const { logDir, logFile } = this.getCallTranscriptLogPathsForOrganization(organizationId);

  return withCallTranscriptFileLock(logFile, async () => {
    let existingContent = "";
    if (!overwrite) {
      try {
        existingContent = this.normalizeCallTranscriptLogContent(await fs.readFile(logFile, "utf8"));
      } catch (error) {
        if (error.code !== "ENOENT") {
          throw error;
        }
      }
    }

    const phoneCalls = await prisma.phoneCall.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        transcription: {
          not: null,
        },
      },
      orderBy: [{ updatedAt: "desc" }, { createdAt: "desc" }],
      select: {
        id: true,
        from: true,
        transcription: true,
        summary: true,
        createdAt: true,
        updatedAt: true,
      },
    });

    const callsWithTranscript = phoneCalls.filter((phoneCall) =>
      String(phoneCall?.transcription || "").trim(),
    );

    if (!callsWithTranscript.length) {
      return {
        exists: false,
        content: "",
        size: 0,
        updatedAt: null,
        rebuilt: false,
        appendedEntries: 0,
      };
    }

    await fs.mkdir(logDir, { recursive: true });

    const nextContent = this.buildCallTranscriptLogFromPhoneCalls(
      callsWithTranscript,
      overwrite ? "" : existingContent,
    );

    if (!String(nextContent || "").trim()) {
      return {
        exists: false,
        content: "",
        size: 0,
        updatedAt: null,
        rebuilt: false,
        appendedEntries: 0,
      };
    }

    await fs.writeFile(logFile, nextContent, "utf8");
    const stats = await fs.stat(logFile);

    return {
      exists: true,
      content: nextContent,
      size: stats.size || Buffer.byteLength(nextContent, "utf8"),
      updatedAt: stats.mtime?.toISOString?.() || null,
      rebuilt: true,
      appendedEntries: callsWithTranscript.length,
    };
  });
}

async readCallTranscriptLogForOrganization(organizationId) {
  const { logDir, logFile } = this.getCallTranscriptLogPathsForOrganization(organizationId);

  await fs.mkdir(logDir, { recursive: true });

  const readResult = await withCallTranscriptFileLock(logFile, async () => {
    let existingContent = "";
    let fileExists = true;
    let stats = null;

    try {
      existingContent = await fs.readFile(logFile, "utf8");
      stats = await fs.stat(logFile).catch(() => null);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error?.code === "ENOENT") {
        fileExists = false;
      } else {
        throw error;
      }
    }

    const normalizedExistingContent = this.normalizeCallTranscriptLogContent(existingContent);
    if (fileExists && normalizedExistingContent !== existingContent) {
      await fs.writeFile(logFile, normalizedExistingContent, "utf8");
      stats = await fs.stat(logFile).catch(() => stats);
    }

    return {
      fileExists,
      exists: Boolean(normalizedExistingContent),
      content: normalizedExistingContent,
      updatedAt: stats?.mtime?.toISOString?.() || null,
      size: stats?.size || Buffer.byteLength(normalizedExistingContent || "", "utf8"),
    };
  });

  if (readResult.fileExists) {
    if (readResult.exists) {
      const loggedCallIds = this.parseLoggedCallIdsFromTranscriptLog(readResult.content);
      const phoneCallsWithTranscript = await prisma.phoneCall.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          transcription: {
            not: null,
          },
        },
        select: {
          id: true,
          transcription: true,
        },
      });

      const hasMissingLoggedCalls = phoneCallsWithTranscript.some((phoneCall) => {
        const callId = String(phoneCall?.id || "").trim();
        const transcript = String(phoneCall?.transcription || "").trim();
        return Boolean(callId && transcript && !loggedCallIds.has(callId));
      });

      if (hasMissingLoggedCalls) {
        return this.rebuildCallTranscriptLogForOrganization(organizationId, { overwrite: false });
      }
    }

    return {
      exists: readResult.exists,
      content: readResult.content,
      updatedAt: readResult.updatedAt,
      size: readResult.size,
    };
  }

  return this.rebuildCallTranscriptLogForOrganization(organizationId, { overwrite: false });
}

async clearCallTranscriptLogForOrganization(organizationId) {
  const { logDir, logFile } = this.getCallTranscriptLogPathsForOrganization(organizationId);
  await fs.mkdir(logDir, { recursive: true });

  return withCallTranscriptFileLock(logFile, async () => {
    await fs.writeFile(logFile, "", "utf8");
    return {
      exists: false,
      content: "",
      updatedAt: null,
      size: 0,
    };
  });
}

async appendCallTranscriptLog({
  organizationId,
  callId,
  callerNumber,
  callerEmail = "",
  transcript,
  messages = [],
  finalSummary = {},
}) {
  const { logDir, logFile } = this.getCallTranscriptLogPathsForOrganization(organizationId);

  await fs.mkdir(logDir, { recursive: true });

  return withCallTranscriptFileLock(logFile, async () => {
    let existingContent = "";
    try {
      existingContent = await fs.readFile(logFile, "utf8");
    } catch (error) {
      if (error?.code !== "ENOENT") {
        throw error;
      }
    }

    const parsedEntries = this.parseCallTranscriptEntries(existingContent);
    const nextEntry = this.formatCallTranscriptMarkdownEntry({
      callId,
      callerNumber,
      callerEmail,
      transcript,
      messages,
      finalSummary,
      loggedAt: new Date(),
    });

    parsedEntries.set(String(callId), nextEntry);

    const orderedContent = Array.from(parsedEntries.values())
      .map((entry) => this.normalizeCallTranscriptEntry(entry))
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join("");

    await fs.writeFile(logFile, orderedContent, "utf8");

    return {
      exists: Boolean(orderedContent),
      content: orderedContent,
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      size: Buffer.byteLength(orderedContent, "utf8"),
    };
  });
}
  async getCallNotificationUserIds(organizationId) {
    if (!organizationId) {
      return [];
    }

    const [organization, roleUsers] = await Promise.all([
      prisma.organization.findUnique({
        where: { id: organizationId },
        select: {
          mainReceiverId: true,
          settings: {
            where: { settingName: CALL_RECEIVER_SETTING_NAME },
            select: { settingValue: true },
            take: 1,
          },
        },
      }),
      prisma.user.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          role: { in: ["ADMIN", "MANAGER"] },
        },
        select: { id: true },
      }),
    ]);

    const userIds = [];

    userIds.push(...roleUsers.map((u) => u.id));

    const callReceiverSetting = organization?.settings?.[0]?.settingValue;

    if (callReceiverSetting) {
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(callReceiverSetting);
        if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
          userIds.push(...parsed.filter(Boolean));
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] Failed to parse callReceiver setting:", error.message);
      }
    }

    if (!userIds.length && organization?.mainReceiverId) {
      userIds.push(organization.mainReceiverId);
    }

    return [...new Set(userIds.filter(Boolean))];
  }

  async sendCompletedCallNotification({
    organizationId,
    callId,
    callerNumber,
    transcript,
    finalSummary,
  }) {
    if (!organizationId || !callId) {
      return;
    }

    const summaryText = String(finalSummary?.summary || "").trim();
    const notificationBody = summaryText || `Completed call from ${callerNumber || "Unknown caller"}`;
    const userIds = await this.getCallNotificationUserIds(organizationId);

    const payload = {
      title: "Call Summary Ready",
      body: notificationBody,
      type: "CALL_SUMMARY_READY",
      callId,
      callerNumber: callerNumber || "",
      summary: summaryText,
      disposition: finalSummary?.disposition || "",
    };

    for (const userId of userIds) {
      await sendPushNotificationToUser(userId, payload);
    }

    const socket = getNamespace("/calls");
    socket.to(organizationId).emit("callSummaryReady", {
      callId,
      organizationId,
      callerNumber: callerNumber || "",
      transcript,
      summary: summaryText,
      disposition: finalSummary?.disposition || "",
      callerName: finalSummary?.callerName || "",
      callerEmail: finalSummary?.callerEmail || "",
      keyDetails: Array.isArray(finalSummary?.keyDetails) ? finalSummary.keyDetails : [],
      suggestedSms: finalSummary?.suggestedSms || "",
      suggestedNextStep: finalSummary?.suggestedNextStep || "",
    });
  }

  async finalizeAndPersistCall({
    callId,
    organizationId,
    callerNumber,
    callerEmail = "",
    transcript,
    messages = [],
    maxTokens = null,
  }) {
    const normalizedTranscript = String(transcript || "").trim() || this.buildConversationTranscript(messages);

    if (!callId || !organizationId || !normalizedTranscript) {
      return null;
    }

    const existingCall = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({
      where: { id: callId },
      select: {
        id: true,
        transcription: true,
        summary: true,
      },
    }).catch(() => null);

    if (!existingCall) {
      return null;
    }

    const finalSummary = await this.finalizeCall({
      callId,
      organizationId,
      callerNumber,
      callerEmail,
      transcript: normalizedTranscript,
      maxTokens,
    });

    const nextSummary = String(finalSummary?.summary || "").trim();
    const nextTranscription = normalizedTranscript;
    const shouldNotify = existingCall.transcription !== nextTranscription || existingCall.summary !== nextSummary;

    await prisma.phoneCall.update({
      where: { id: callId },
      data: {
        transcription: nextTranscription,
        summary: nextSummary,
      },
    });

    try {
      await this.appendCallTranscriptLog({
        organizationId,
        callId,
        callerNumber,
        callerEmail,
        transcript: nextTranscription,
        messages,
        finalSummary,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] Failed to append call transcript log:", error.message);
    }

    if (shouldNotify) {
      await this.sendCompletedCallNotification({
        organizationId,
        callId,
        callerNumber,
        transcript: nextTranscription,
        finalSummary,
      });
    }

    return {
      transcript: nextTranscription,
      finalSummary,
    };
  }

  async finalizeCall({
    callId,
    organizationId,
    callerNumber,
    callerEmail = "",
    transcript,
    maxTokens = null,
  }) {
    const organization = await this.getOrganizationContext(organizationId);
    const organizationName = organization?.name || "the business";
    const resolvedMaxTokens = this.resolveMaxTokens(maxTokens);
    const systemPrompt = await this.getOrganizationPrompt(
      RECEPTIONIST_FINAL_SUMMARY_PROMPT_KEY,
      organizationId,
      this.getDefaultFinalSummarySystemPrompt(),
    );

    const userPrompt = [
      `Organization: ${organizationName}`,
      `Caller number: ${callerNumber || "unknown"}`,
      `Caller email: ${callerEmail || "unknown"}`,
      `Call ID: ${callId}`,
      "Transcript:",
      compactTranscriptTail(transcript || "", 18, 3200) || "(empty)",
    ].join("\n");

    try {
      console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] final summary request started", {
        callId,
        organizationId,
        usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_SUMMARY_USAGE_KEY,
        callerNumber,
        callerEmail: callerEmail || "",
        transcriptPreview: compactTranscriptTail(transcript || "", 4, 500),
      });

      const result = await llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        null,
        `experimental-call-final-${callId}`,
        "STRUCTURED_OUTPUT",
        null,
        finalSummarySchema,
        "ExperimentalReceptionistFinalSummary",
        systemPrompt,
        {
          includeConversationHistory: false,
          storeConversation: false,
          organizationId,
          context: "CALLS",
          usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_SUMMARY_USAGE_KEY,
          maxTokens: resolvedMaxTokens,
        },
      );

      const parsedSummary = finalSummarySchema.parse(result);
      console.info("[ExperimentalReceptionist] final summary parsed", {
        callId,
        organizationId,
        usageKey: RECEPTIONIST_SUMMARY_USAGE_KEY,
        disposition: parsedSummary.disposition,
        summaryPreview: String(parsedSummary.summary || "").slice(0, 240),
        keyDetails: Array.isArray(parsedSummary.keyDetails)
          ? parsedSummary.keyDetails.length
          : 0,
      });
      return parsedSummary;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("[ExperimentalReceptionist] finalizeCall failed:", error.message);
      return {
        summary: transcript || "",
        disposition: "needs_human",
        callerName: "",
        callerEmail: "",
        keyDetails: [],
        suggestedSms: "",
        suggestedNextStep: "Review the call manually and follow up with the caller.",
      };
    }
  }
}

export default new ExperimentalReceptionistService();

```

const TORONTO_TZ = "America/Toronto";
const DEFAULT_RECEPTIONIST_MAX_TOKENS = 8096;
const PROMPT_CACHE_TTL_MS = 60 * 1000;
const RECEPTIONIST_DECISION_PROMPT_KEY = "calls_experimentalReceptionistDecision_system";
const RECEPTIONIST_FINAL_SUMMARY_PROMPT_KEY = "calls_experimentalReceptionistFinalSummary_system";
const RECEPTIONIST_GREETING_PROMPT_KEY = "calls_experimentalReceptionistGreeting";
const RECEPTIONIST_MODE_LEGACY = "legacy";
const RECEPTIONIST_MODE_EXPERIMENTAL = "experimental_ai";
const CALL_RECEIVER_SETTING_NAME = "callReceiver";
const GREETING_AUDIO_RELATIVE_DIR = "generated/receptionist-greetings";
const GREETING_AUDIO_ROUTE_BASE = "/calls/generated/receptionist-greetings";

const callTranscriptFileLockQueues = new Map();

async function withCallTranscriptFileLock(filePath, asyncFn) {
  const previousPromise = callTranscriptFileLockQueues.get(filePath) || Promise.resolve();

  const nextPromise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    previousPromise.finally(() => {
      Promise.resolve(asyncFn()).then(resolve, reject);
    });
  });

  callTranscriptFileLockQueues.set(filePath, nextPromise);

  try {
    return await nextPromise;
  } finally {
    if (callTranscriptFileLockQueues.get(filePath) === nextPromise) {
      callTranscriptFileLockQueues.delete(filePath);
    }
  }
}


function normalizeReceptionistMode(value = "") {
  const normalized = String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (normalized === RECEPTIONIST_MODE_EXPERIMENTAL) {
    return RECEPTIONIST_MODE_EXPERIMENTAL;
  }
  return RECEPTIONIST_MODE_LEGACY;
}

const WEEKDAY_INDEX = {
  sunday: 0,

};

  keyDetails: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  suggestedSms: z.string().default(""),

});

const PRODUCT_SEARCH_STOP_WORDS = new Set([
  "a",
  "an",
  "and",
  "any",
  "are",
  "at",
  "about",
  "can",
  "could",
  "do",
  "for",
  "from",
  "give",
  "have",
  "how",
  "i",
  "is",
  "it",
  "me",
  "my",
  "of",
  "on",
  "our",
  "please",
  "price",
  "prices",
  "product",
  "products",
  "tell",
  "the",
  "their",
  "there",
  "these",
  "those",
  "what",
  "whats",
  "with",
  "you",
  "your",
]);

const RESERVATION_REQUEST_RE = /\b(?:book|booking|reserve|reservation|make a reservation|make reservation|get a table)\b/i;
const RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_RE = /\b(?:yes|yep|yeah|go ahead|do it|book it|reserve it|that works|sounds good|please do|please book|confirm|confirmed)\b/i;
const QUESTION_LIKE_RE = /^(?:what|when|how|where|which|who|why|is|are|do|does|did|can|could|would|will|should)\b/i;
const CONFLICT_END_TIME_RE = /\b(?:(?:what|when)\s+time\s+(?:does|did)\s+(?:it|that|the booking|the reservation|the event)\s+end|when\s+does\s+(?:it|that|the booking|the reservation|the event)\s+end)\b/i;
const TIME_RANGE_SPLIT_RE = /\s*(?:to|until|through|thru|-)\s*/i;
const ALTERNATIVE_BUFFER_MINUTES = Number(process.env.RECEPTIONIST_ALTERNATIVE_BUFFER_MINUTES || 30);
const DELIVERY_ARRIVAL_RE =
  /\b(?:i\s*am|i'm|im|we\s*are|we're|were)?\s*(?:here|outside|at the door|at your door)?\s*(?:for|with)?\s*(?:a|the)?\s*(?:ubereats|uber eats|doordash|door dash|skip|skipthe?dishes|delivery)(?:\s+delivery)?\b/i;
const DELIVERY_TO_DOOR_RE =
  /\b(?:delivery|drop(?:ping)?\s+off)\s+(?:to|at)\s+(?:your|the)\s+door\b/i;
const EMAIL_RE = /\b[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}\b/i;

const VALID_RECEPTIONIST_REQUEST_TYPES = new Set([
  "availability_lookup",
  "business_information",
  "general",
]);

const VALID_RECEPTIONIST_INTENTS = new Set([
  "private_event_inquiry",
  "table_reservation",
  "availability_check",
  "hours_location",
  "callback_request",
  "speak_to_human",
  "general_question",
  "unknown",
]);

const VALID_RECEPTIONIST_BOOKING_CATEGORIES = new Set([
  "private_event",
  "table_reservation",
  "",
]);

function normalizeDecisionRequestType(value = "", fallback = "general") {
  const normalized = String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (VALID_RECEPTIONIST_REQUEST_TYPES.has(normalized)) {
    return normalized;
  }

  if ([
    "availability",
    "availability_check",
    "check_availability",
    "date_availability",
  ].includes(normalized)) {
    return "availability_lookup";
  }

  if ([
    "hours",
    "location",
    "hours_location",
    "pricing",
    "policy",
    "business_info",
    "business_information_request",
  ].includes(normalized)) {
    return "business_information";
  }

  if ([
    "private_event_inquiry",
    "booking_inquiry",
    "event_inquiry",
    "private_event",
    "table_reservation",
    "reservation_create",
  ].includes(normalized)) {
    return fallback || "general";
  }

  return "general";
}

function normalizeDecisionIntent(value = "", bookingCategory = "") {
  const normalized = String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (VALID_RECEPTIONIST_INTENTS.has(normalized)) {
    return normalized;
  }

  if ([
    "booking_inquiry",
    "private_event",
    "event_inquiry",
    "event_booking",
    "private_booking",
  ].includes(normalized)) {
    return "private_event_inquiry";
  }

  if ([
    "reservation",
    "reservation_create",
    "book_table",
    "table_booking",
    "table_book",
  ].includes(normalized)) {
    return "table_reservation";
  }

  if ([
    "availability_lookup",
    "availability",
    "check_availability",
  ].includes(normalized)) {
    return "availability_check";
  }

  if ([
    "hours",
    "location",
    "hours_and_location",
  ].includes(normalized)) {
    return "hours_location";
  }

  if (bookingCategory === "private_event") {
    return "private_event_inquiry";
  }

  if (bookingCategory === "table_reservation") {
    return "table_reservation";
  }

  return "unknown";
}

function normalizeDecisionBookingCategory(value = "", intent = "") {
  const normalized = String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
  if (VALID_RECEPTIONIST_BOOKING_CATEGORIES.has(normalized)) {
    return normalized;
  }

  if ([
    "private_event",
    "private_event_inquiry",
    "booking_inquiry",
    "event_inquiry",
  ].includes(normalized) || intent === "private_event_inquiry") {
    return "private_event";
  }

  if ([
    "table",
    "table_booking",
    "table_reservation",
    "reservation_create",
  ].includes(normalized) || intent === "table_reservation") {
    return "table_reservation";
  }

  return "";
}

function normalizeText(value = "") {
  return String(value || "")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();
}

function trimText(value, max = 1200) {
  const text = String(value || "")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();
  if (!text) return "";
  return text.length > max ? `${text.slice(0, max)}...` : text;
}

function compactTranscriptTail(transcript, maxLines = 10, maxChars = 1400) {
  const lines = String(transcript || "")
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => line.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
  const tail = lines.slice(-maxLines).join("\n");
  if (tail.length <= maxChars) return tail;
  return `...${tail.slice(-maxChars)}`;
}

function tryParseJson(value) {
  if (typeof value !== "string") return value;
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return value;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(trimmed);
  } catch {
    return value;
  }
}

function normalizeStatusArray(status) {
  if (!status) return [];
  if (Array.isArray(status)) {
    return status.map((item) => String(item).trim()).filter(Boolean);
  }
  if (typeof status === "string") {
    const parsed = tryParseJson(status);
    if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
      return parsed.map((item) => String(item).trim()).filter(Boolean);
    }
    return status
      .split(",")
      .map((item) => item.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
  }
  if (typeof status === "object") {
    return Object.values(status)
      .map((item) => String(item).trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
  }
  return [];
}

function bookingBlocksAvailability(booking) {
  const statuses = normalizeStatusArray(booking?.status).map((status) =>
    status.toLowerCase(),
  );
  if (statuses.length === 0) {
    return true;
  }
  const nonBlockingKeywords = [
    "cancelled",
    "canceled",
    "declined",
    "lost",
    "archived",
    "deleted",
    "draft",
    "inquiry",
    "lead",
    "spam",
  ];
  return !statuses.some((status) =>
    nonBlockingKeywords.some((keyword) => status.includes(keyword)),
  );
}

function extractRoomNames(roomValue) {
  const parsed = tryParseJson(roomValue);
  const names = new Set();
  const visited = new Set();

  const visit = (value) => {
    if (value === null || value === undefined) return;
    if (typeof value === "string") {
      const trimmed = value.trim();
      if (trimmed) names.add(trimmed);
      return;
    }
    if (typeof value !== "object") return;
    if (visited.has(value)) return;
    visited.add(value);

    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
      value.forEach(visit);
      return;
    }

    if (typeof value.name === "string" && value.name.trim()) {
      names.add(value.name.trim());
    }
    if (typeof value.label === "string" && value.label.trim()) {
      names.add(value.label.trim());
    }
    if (typeof value.room === "string" && value.room.trim()) {
      names.add(value.room.trim());
    }

    Object.values(value).forEach(visit);
  };

  visit(parsed);
  return Array.from(names);
}

function normalizeRoomName(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, "");
}

function extractEmailAddress(value = "") {
  const match = String(value || "").match(EMAIL_RE);
  return match ? match[0].trim() : "";
}

function hasFollowUpContact({ callerNumber = "", callerEmail = "" } = {}) {
  return Boolean(String(callerNumber || "").trim()) || Boolean(String(callerEmail || "").trim());
}

function looksLikeDeliveryArrival(text = "") {
  const normalized = String(text || "").toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
  if (!normalized) {
    return false;
  }

  if (
    DELIVERY_ARRIVAL_RE.test(normalized) &&
    /\b(?:here|outside|door|delivery|drop off|dropoff)\b/i.test(normalized)
  ) {
    return true;
  }

  return DELIVERY_TO_DOOR_RE.test(normalized);
}

function buildDeliveryArrivalReply() {
  return "Thanks — I’ll get a team member to help with that delivery right now.";
}

function buildFollowUpContactReply() {
  return "What phone number or email should our team use to follow up with you?";
}

function shouldAskForFollowUpContact({ action = "", callerNumber = "", callerEmail = "" } = {}) {
  if (hasFollowUpContact({ callerNumber, callerEmail })) {
    return false;
  }

  return action === "create_callback" || action === "reservation_create_failed";
}

function simplifyBookingForPrompt(booking) {
  const name =
    booking?.contacts && booking.contacts.length > 0
      ? booking.contacts[0].name
      : booking?.eventTitle || "Untitled Event";

  return {
    name,
    roomNames: extractRoomNames(booking?.room),
    eventStartTime: booking?.eventStartTime
      ? moment(booking.eventStartTime).tz(TORONTO_TZ).format()
      : null,
    eventEndTime: booking?.eventEndTime
      ? moment(booking.eventEndTime).tz(TORONTO_TZ).format()
      : null,
    attendance: booking?.attendance ?? null,
    partyType: booking?.partyType ?? null,
    status: normalizeStatusArray(booking?.status),
    notes: booking?.notes ?? null,
  };
}

function normalizeSearchText(value = "") {
  return String(value || "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, " ")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();
}

function tokenizeProductSearchText(value = "", maxTokens = 12) {
  const tokens = normalizeSearchText(value)
    .split(" ")
    .map((token) => token.trim())
    .filter(
      (token) =>
        token &&
        token.length >= 3 &&
        !PRODUCT_SEARCH_STOP_WORDS.has(token),
    );

  return Array.from(new Set(tokens)).slice(0, maxTokens);
}

function scoreProductMatch(product, normalizedQuery = "", queryTokens = []) {
  if (!product) return 0;

  const normalizedProductName = normalizeSearchText(product.name);
  const normalizedCategoryName = normalizeSearchText(product?.category?.name || "");
  const normalizedDescription = normalizeSearchText(product?.description || "");
  const normalizedVariantNames = Array.isArray(product?.variants)
    ? product.variants.map((variant) => normalizeSearchText(variant?.name || ""))
    : [];
  const normalizedVariantDescriptions = Array.isArray(product?.variants)
    ? product.variants.map((variant) => normalizeSearchText(variant?.description || ""))
    : [];

  let score = 0;

  if (normalizedProductName && normalizedQuery.includes(normalizedProductName)) {
    score += 120;
  }

  if (
    normalizedVariantNames.some(
      (variantName) => variantName && normalizedQuery.includes(variantName),
    )
  ) {
    score += 100;
  }

  if (normalizedCategoryName && normalizedQuery.includes(normalizedCategoryName)) {
    score += 25;
  }

  for (const token of queryTokens) {
    if (normalizedProductName.includes(token)) {
      score += 15;
    }
    if (normalizedCategoryName.includes(token)) {
      score += 6;
    }
    if (normalizedDescription.includes(token)) {
      score += 4;
    }
    if (normalizedVariantNames.some((variantName) => variantName.includes(token))) {
      score += 10;
    }
    if (
      normalizedVariantDescriptions.some((variantDescription) =>
        variantDescription.includes(token),
      )
    ) {
      score += 3;
    }
  }

  return score;
}

function simplifyProductForPrompt(product) {
  const basePrice = Number(product?.price);
  const normalizedBasePrice = Number.isFinite(basePrice) ? basePrice : null;
  const variants = Array.isArray(product?.variants)
    ? product.variants.map((variant) => {
        const additionalPrice = Number(variant?.additionalPrice);
        const normalizedAdditionalPrice = Number.isFinite(additionalPrice)
          ? additionalPrice
          : 0;

        return {
          name: variant?.name || null,
          description: variant?.description || null,
          additionalPrice: normalizedAdditionalPrice,
          price:
            normalizedBasePrice !== null
              ? Number((normalizedBasePrice + normalizedAdditionalPrice).toFixed(2))
              : null,
          inStock: variant?.inStock ?? null,
        };
      })
    : [];

  return {
    name: product?.name || null,
    description: product?.description || null,
    category: product?.category?.name || null,
    price: normalizedBasePrice,
    inStock: product?.inStock ?? null,
    variants,
  };
}

function buildProductContext(products = [], latestTurn = "") {
  if (!Array.isArray(products) || products.length === 0) {
    return "";
  }

  return [
    "Product Catalog Context:",
    `Latest caller turn: ${String(latestTurn || "").trim() || "(empty)"}`,
    `Matching products: ${JSON.stringify(products)}`,
    "Instruction: Use this product catalog data to answer product, menu, price, cost, description, and variant questions. Prefer exact product names, variant names, descriptions, and prices from this data. Product price is the base price. Variant price is the full effective price for that variant, while additionalPrice is just the amount added on top of the base product price.",
  ].join("\n");
}

function getTorontoNow() {
  return moment.tz(TORONTO_TZ);
}

function getCurrentDateContext() {
  const now = getTorontoNow();

  return [
    `Today in ${TORONTO_TZ} is ${now.format("dddd, MMMM D, YYYY")}.`,
    `The current year is ${now.format("YYYY")}.`,
    'Resolve relative dates like "today", "tomorrow", "this Saturday", and "next Friday" using this Toronto date.',
  ].join(" ");
}

function formatIsoDateForSpeech(isoDate, fallback = "") {
  const fallbackText = String(fallback || "").trim();
  const parsed = moment.tz(String(isoDate || "").trim(), "YYYY-MM-DD", true, TORONTO_TZ);
  if (!parsed.isValid()) {
    return fallbackText || String(isoDate || "").trim();
  }

  const now = getTorontoNow();
  return parsed.year() === now.year()
    ? parsed.format("MMMM D")
    : parsed.format("MMMM D, YYYY");
}

function normalizeRequestedDateValue(requestedDate = "") {
  const raw = String(requestedDate || "").trim();
  if (!raw) return "";

  const explicitFormats = [
    "YYYY-MM-DD",
    "MMMM D, YYYY",
    "MMMM D YYYY",
    "MMMM D",
    "MMM D, YYYY",
    "MMM D YYYY",
    "MMM D",
    "M/D/YYYY",
    "M/D/YY",
    "M/D",
    "M-D-YYYY",
    "M-D-YY",
    "M-D",
  ];

  for (const format of explicitFormats) {
    const parsed = moment.tz(raw, format, true, TORONTO_TZ);
    if (parsed.isValid()) {
      if (!/[/-]\d{2,4}$/.test(raw) && !/\b\d{4}\b/.test(raw)) {
        const now = getTorontoNow().startOf("day");
        parsed.year(now.year());
        if (parsed.isBefore(now)) {
          parsed.add(1, "year");
        }
      }
      return parsed.format("YYYY-MM-DD");
    }
  }

  const lowered = raw.toLowerCase();
  const today = getTorontoNow().startOf("day");
  if (lowered === "today" || lowered === "tonight") {
    return today.format("YYYY-MM-DD");
  }
  if (lowered === "tomorrow") {
    return today.clone().add(1, "day").format("YYYY-MM-DD");
  }

  const weekdayMatch = lowered.match(/^(?:(this|next)\s+)?(sunday|monday|tuesday|wednesday|thursday|friday|saturday)$/i);
  if (weekdayMatch) {
    const qualifier = weekdayMatch[1] || "";
    const weekday = WEEKDAY_INDEX[weekdayMatch[2]];
    if (Number.isInteger(weekday)) {
      let delta = (weekday - today.day() + 7) % 7;
      if (qualifier === "next") {
        delta = (delta || 7) + 7;
      }
      return today.clone().add(delta, "day").format("YYYY-MM-DD");
    }
  }

  const guessed = moment.tz(raw, TORONTO_TZ);
  if (guessed.isValid()) {
    return guessed.format("YYYY-MM-DD");
  }

  return raw;
}

function normalizeRequestedTimeValue(requestedTime = "") {
  const raw = String(requestedTime || "").trim();
  if (!raw) return "";

  const normalized = raw
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/\./g, "")
    .replace(/\bnoon\b/g, "12:00 pm")
    .replace(/\bmidnight\b/g, "12:00 am")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();

  const timeCandidate = normalized.includes(" to ") || normalized.includes(" until ") || normalized.includes(" through ") || normalized.includes(" thru ")
    ? normalized.split(TIME_RANGE_SPLIT_RE)[0].trim()
    : normalized;

  const formats = ["h:mm a", "h a", "H:mm", "HH:mm", "h:mma", "ha"];
  for (const format of formats) {
    const parsed = moment.tz(timeCandidate, format, true, TORONTO_TZ);
    if (parsed.isValid()) {
      return parsed.format("h:mm A");
    }
  }

  return timeCandidate || raw;
}

function parseRequestedMoment(requestedDate, requestedTime) {
  const normalizedDate = normalizeRequestedDateValue(requestedDate);
  const normalizedTime = normalizeRequestedTimeValue(requestedTime);

  if (!normalizedDate) return null;

  if (!normalizedTime) {
    const dateOnly = moment.tz(normalizedDate, "YYYY-MM-DD", true, TORONTO_TZ);
    return dateOnly.isValid() ? dateOnly : null;
  }

  const formats = [
    "YYYY-MM-DD h:mm A",
    "YYYY-MM-DD h A",
    "YYYY-MM-DD H:mm",
    "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm",
    "YYYY-MM-DD h:mma",
    "YYYY-MM-DD ha",
  ];

  for (const format of formats) {
    const parsed = moment.tz(
      `${normalizedDate} ${normalizedTime}`,
      format,
      true,
      TORONTO_TZ,
    );
    if (parsed.isValid()) {
      return parsed;
    }
  }

  const fallback = moment.tz(`${normalizedDate} ${normalizedTime}`, TORONTO_TZ);
  return fallback.isValid() ? fallback : null;
}

function hasSpecificRequestedTime(requestedTime = "") {
  return Boolean(String(normalizeRequestedTimeValue(requestedTime) || "").trim());
}

function bookingMatchesRequestedSlot(booking, requestedMoment) {
  if (!requestedMoment || !booking?.eventStartTime) return false;

  const bookingStart = moment(booking.eventStartTime).tz(TORONTO_TZ);
  const bookingEnd = booking?.eventEndTime
    ? moment(booking.eventEndTime).tz(TORONTO_TZ)
    : bookingStart.clone().add(4, "hours");

  if (!bookingStart.isValid() || !bookingEnd.isValid()) {
    return false;
  }

  const requestedEnd = requestedMoment.clone().add(4, "hours");
  return bookingStart.isSameOrBefore(requestedEnd) && bookingEnd.isSameOrAfter(requestedMoment);
}

function summarizeKnownState(knownState = {}) {
  const guardrail = knownState?.receptionistGuardrail && typeof knownState.receptionistGuardrail === "object"
    ? knownState.receptionistGuardrail
    : {};
  const state = {
    callerName: trimText(knownState?.callerName || "", 80),
    callerEmail: trimText(knownState?.callerEmail || "", 160),
    requestedDate: trimText(knownState?.requestedDate || "", 32),
    requestedTime: trimText(knownState?.requestedTime || "", 32),
    requestedPartySize: trimText(knownState?.requestedPartySize || "", 16),
    requestedRoom: trimText(knownState?.requestedRoom || "", 80),
    lastIntent: trimText(knownState?.lastIntent || "", 48),
    unresolvedAssistantTurns: trimText(guardrail?.unresolvedAssistantTurns || "", 8),
    repeatedQuestionKey: trimText(guardrail?.repeatedQuestionKey || "", 64),
    repeatedQuestionCount: trimText(guardrail?.repeatedQuestionCount || "", 8),
    callerFrustrated: guardrail?.callerFrustrated ? "true" : "",
    forceHumanHandoff: guardrail?.forceHumanHandoff ? "true" : "",
    forceHumanReason: trimText(guardrail?.forceHumanReason || "", 120),
  };

  return Object.entries(state)
    .filter(([, value]) => value)
    .map(([key, value]) => `${key}: ${value}`)
    .join("\n");
}

function buildAvailabilityFollowUpReply({
  requestedDate = "",
  requestedTime = "",
  requestedPartySize = "",
} = {}) {
  const hasDate = Boolean(String(requestedDate || "").trim());
  const hasTime = Boolean(String(requestedTime || "").trim());
  const hasPartySize = Boolean(String(requestedPartySize || "").trim());
  const displayRequestedDate =
    formatIsoDateForSpeech(normalizeRequestedDateValue(requestedDate), requestedDate) || "";

  if (!hasDate && !hasTime && !hasPartySize) {
    return "Sure — what date, what time, and about how many guests?";
  }
  if (!hasDate && hasTime && hasPartySize) {
    return `Okay, I have ${requestedPartySize} guests at ${requestedTime}. What date were you thinking?`;
  }
  if (!hasDate && hasTime) {
    return `Okay, I have ${requestedTime}. What date were you thinking, and about how many guests?`;
  }
  if (!hasDate && hasPartySize) {
    return `Okay, I have ${requestedPartySize} guests. What date and time were you thinking?`;
  }
  if (hasDate && !hasTime && hasPartySize) {
    return `Okay, I can check ${displayRequestedDate}. What time were you thinking?`;
  }
  if (hasDate && hasTime && !hasPartySize) {
    return `Okay, I can check ${displayRequestedDate} at ${requestedTime}. About how many guests?`;
  }
  if (hasDate && !hasTime && !hasPartySize) {
    return `Okay, I can check ${displayRequestedDate}. What time were you thinking, and about how many guests?`;
  }
  return `Okay, I have ${displayRequestedDate}${hasTime ? ` at ${requestedTime}` : ""}${hasPartySize ? ` for ${requestedPartySize} guests` : ""}. Let me check that.`;
}

function isQuestionLikeTurn(text = "") {
  const normalized = normalizeText(text);
  if (!normalized) {
    return false;
  }

  return normalized.endsWith("?") || QUESTION_LIKE_RE.test(normalized);
}

function looksLikeConflictEndTimeQuestion(text = "") {
  return CONFLICT_END_TIME_RE.test(normalizeText(text));
}

function looksLikeReservationDetailFollowUp(text = "") {
  const normalized = normalizeText(text);
  if (!normalized || isQuestionLikeTurn(normalized)) {
    return false;
  }

  if (looksLikeReservationRequest(normalized) || looksLikeReservationConfirmation(normalized)) {
    return true;
  }

  if (normalized.length <= 40) {
    return true;
  }

  return /(\b\d{1,2}(?::\d{2})?\s*(?:am|pm)\b|\b\d+\s*(?:people|persons|guests|guest|ppl)\b|\b(?:today|tomorrow|tonight|next|this|january|february|march|april|may|june|july|august|september|october|november|december)\b)/i.test(normalized);
}

function buildReservationContactDetailsReply({
  callerName = "",
  callerNumber = "",
  callerEmail = "",
} = {}) {
  const hasName = Boolean(String(callerName || "").trim());
  const hasContact = Boolean(String(callerNumber || "").trim()) || Boolean(String(callerEmail || "").trim());

  if (!hasName && !hasContact) {
    return "Before I book that, I need your name and a phone number or email for the reservation.";
  }

  if (!hasName) {
    return "Before I book that, I need the name for the reservation.";
  }

  return "Before I book that, I need a phone number or email for the reservation.";
}

function getMissingReservationContactFields({
  extracted = {},
  callerNumber = "",
  callerEmail = "",
} = {}) {
  const missing = [];

  if (!String(extracted?.callerName || "").trim()) {
    missing.push("name");
  }

  if (!String(callerNumber || "").trim() && !String(callerEmail || extracted?.callerEmail || "").trim()) {
    missing.push("contact");
  }

  return missing;
}

function getLatestConflictingBooking(availability) {
  const conflicts = Array.isArray(availability?.conflictingBookings)
    ? availability.conflictingBookings
    : [];

  const withEndTime = conflicts
    .map((booking) => ({
      booking,
      endMoment: booking?.eventEndTime ? moment(booking.eventEndTime).tz(TORONTO_TZ) : null,
    }))
    .filter(({ endMoment }) => endMoment?.isValid());

  if (withEndTime.length === 0) {
    return null;
  }

  withEndTime.sort((a, b) => a.endMoment.valueOf() - b.endMoment.valueOf());
  return withEndTime[withEndTime.length - 1];
}

function buildConflictAlternativeSuggestion(availability, extracted = {}) {
  const latestConflict = getLatestConflictingBooking(availability);
  if (latestConflict?.endMoment?.isValid()) {
    const laterStart = latestConflict.endMoment.clone().add(ALTERNATIVE_BUFFER_MINUTES, "minutes");
    return `The current booking looks like it ends around ${latestConflict.endMoment.format("h:mm A")}. I can check a later start after ${laterStart.format("h:mm A")} or another date.`;
  }

  const dateText =
    formatIsoDateForSpeech(extracted.requestedDate, extracted.requestedDate) || "that date";
  return `I can check an earlier time, a later time, or another date around ${dateText}.`;
}

function buildConflictEndTimeReply(availability, extracted = {}) {
  const latestConflict = getLatestConflictingBooking(availability);
  if (latestConflict?.endMoment?.isValid()) {
    const laterStart = latestConflict.endMoment.clone().add(ALTERNATIVE_BUFFER_MINUTES, "minutes");
    return `It looks like that booking ends around ${latestConflict.endMoment.format("h:mm A")}. I can check a later start after ${laterStart.format("h:mm A")} or another date.`;
  }

  return buildAvailabilityReply(availability, extracted);
}

function buildDateOnlyAvailabilityReply(availability, extracted = {}) {
  const roomText = extracted.requestedRoom
    ? ` for the ${extracted.requestedRoom}`
    : " for the venue";
  const dateText =
    formatIsoDateForSpeech(extracted.requestedDate, extracted.requestedDate) || "that date";
  const bookingsOnDate = Array.isArray(availability?.allDayBookings)
    ? availability.allDayBookings.length
    : 0;

  if (bookingsOnDate === 0) {
    return `Nothing is blocking${roomText} on ${dateText} so far, but I still need your start time to check availability properly.`;
  }

  return `I do have bookings touching${roomText} on ${dateText}, but that does not mean the whole date is unavailable. What start time were you thinking?`;
}

function buildAvailabilityReply(availability, extracted = {}) {
  if (!availability?.checked) {
    return buildAvailabilityFollowUpReply({
      requestedDate: extracted.requestedDate,
      requestedTime: extracted.requestedTime,
      requestedPartySize: extracted.partySize,
    });
  }

  if (availability?.requiresSpecificTime && !String(extracted.requestedTime || "").trim()) {
    return buildDateOnlyAvailabilityReply(availability, extracted);
  }

  const roomText = extracted.requestedRoom
    ? ` the ${extracted.requestedRoom}`
    : " the venue";
  const dateText =
    formatIsoDateForSpeech(extracted.requestedDate, extracted.requestedDate) || "that date";
  const timeText = extracted.requestedTime ? ` at ${normalizeRequestedTimeValue(extracted.requestedTime)}` : "";

  if (availability.available === true) {
    return `It looks like${roomText} is available on ${dateText}${timeText}.`;
  }

  if (availability.available === null) {
    return buildDateOnlyAvailabilityReply(availability, extracted);
  }

  return `It looks like there may already be something booked for${roomText} on ${dateText}${timeText}. ${buildConflictAlternativeSuggestion(availability, extracted)}`.trim();
}

function buildReservationSpeechSummary(extracted = {}) {
  const dateText =
    formatIsoDateForSpeech(extracted.requestedDate, extracted.requestedDate) ||
    "that date";
  const timeText = normalizeRequestedTimeValue(extracted.requestedTime || "");
  const partySize = String(extracted.partySize || "").trim();
  const roomText = extracted.requestedRoom
    ? ` in the ${extracted.requestedRoom}`
    : "";
  const guestText = partySize
    ? ` for ${partySize} ${Number(partySize) === 1 ? "guest" : "guests"}`
    : "";

  return `${dateText}${timeText ? ` at ${timeText}` : ""}${guestText}${roomText}`;
}

function buildReservationMissingDetailsReply(extracted = {}) {
  const missing = [];
  if (!String(extracted.requestedDate || "").trim()) missing.push("the date");
  if (!String(extracted.requestedTime || "").trim()) missing.push("the time");

  if (missing.length === 0) {
    return "I can book that for you. I just need a couple more details.";
  }
  if (missing.length === 1) {
    return `I can book that for you. I just need ${missing[0]}.`;
  }
  return `I can book that for you. I just need ${missing[0]} and ${missing[1]}.`;
}

function looksLikeReservationRequest(text = "") {
  return RESERVATION_REQUEST_RE.test(String(text || ""));
}

function looksLikeReservationConfirmation(text = "") {
  return RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_RE.test(String(text || "").trim());
}

function shouldTreatAsReservationRequest({ decision, knownState = {}, latestTurn = "", transcript = "" }) {
  const normalizedLatestTurn = normalizeText(latestTurn);
  const previousReservationIntent = ["reservation_create", "table_reservation"].includes(knownState?.lastIntent);

  if (looksLikeConflictEndTimeQuestion(normalizedLatestTurn)) {
    return false;
  }

  if (looksLikeReservationRequest(normalizedLatestTurn)) {
    return true;
  }

  if (previousReservationIntent) {
    if (!normalizedLatestTurn) {
      return true;
    }

    if (
      looksLikeReservationConfirmation(normalizedLatestTurn) ||
      looksLikeReservationDetailFollowUp(normalizedLatestTurn)
    ) {
      return true;
    }
  }

  if (!normalizedLatestTurn) {
    if (decision?.shouldCreateReservation || decision?.intent === "reservation_create") {
      return true;
    }

    return looksLikeReservationRequest(transcript);
  }

  return false;
}

function preserveKnownReservationState(mergedState = {}, extracted = {}, knownState = {}) {
  const requestedDate = normalizeRequestedDateValue(
    knownState?.requestedDate || mergedState?.requestedDate || "",
  );
  const requestedTime = normalizeRequestedTimeValue(
    knownState?.requestedTime || mergedState?.requestedTime || "",
  );
  const requestedPartySize = String(
    knownState?.requestedPartySize || mergedState?.requestedPartySize || "",
  ).trim();
  const requestedRoom = trimText(
    knownState?.requestedRoom || mergedState?.requestedRoom || "",
    80,
  );

  return {
    mergedState: {
      ...mergedState,
      requestedDate,
      requestedTime,
      requestedPartySize,
      requestedRoom,
    },
    resolvedRequestedDate: requestedDate,
    extracted: {
      ...extracted,
      requestedDate,
      requestedTime,
      partySize: requestedPartySize,
      requestedRoom,
    },
  };
}

function resolveReservationContactName(extracted = {}, callerNumber = "") {
  const explicitName = trimText(extracted?.callerName || "", 80);
  if (explicitName) {
    return explicitName;
  }

  const normalizedCallerNumber = String(callerNumber || "").trim();
  if (normalizedCallerNumber) {
    return `Phone Guest ${normalizedCallerNumber}`;
  }

  return "Phone Guest";
}


const shared = {
