FILE: server/src/services/calls/PlivoWebhookService.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/PlivoWebhookService.js
import plivo from 'plivo';

const shouldValidate = () => (
  process.env.PLIVO_VALIDATE_WEBHOOKS === 'true'
  || (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' && process.env.PLIVO_VALIDATE_WEBHOOKS !== 'false')
);

const webhookUrlFor = (req) => {
  const baseUrl = String(process.env.API_URL || process.env.PUBLIC_API_URL || '').replace(/\/$/, '');
  if (baseUrl) return new URL(req.originalUrl, `${baseUrl}/`).toString();
  return `${req.protocol}://${req.get('host')}${req.originalUrl}`;
};

export const validatePlivoWebhookRequest = (req, res, next) => {
  if (!shouldValidate()) return next();

  const authToken = String(process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_TOKEN || '');
  const signature = String(req.get('X-Plivo-Signature-V3') || '');
  const nonce = String(req.get('X-Plivo-Signature-V3-Nonce') || '');
  if (!authToken) return res.status(503).send('Plivo webhook validation is not configured.');
  if (!signature || !nonce) return res.status(403).send('Invalid Plivo webhook signature.');

  try {
    const valid = plivo.validateV3Signature(
      req.method,
      webhookUrlFor(req),
      nonce,
      authToken,
      signature,
      req.method === 'POST' ? req.body || {} : {},
    );
    if (!valid) return res.status(403).send('Invalid Plivo webhook signature.');
    return next();
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('[PlivoWebhook] Signature validation failed:', error.message);
    return res.status(403).send('Invalid Plivo webhook signature.');
  }
};

export default validatePlivoWebhookRequest;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/services/calls/services/CallService.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/services/CallService.js
import { Client as PlivoClient } from 'plivo';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import { sendPushNotificationToUser } from '#shared/utils/pushNotifications.js';
import { getNamespace } from '#shared/socket.js';
import experimentalReceptionistService from '#services/calls/ExperimentalReceptionistService.js';
import {
  ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME,
  getPublishedIvrMenu,
  handleIvrInput,
  renderIvrMenuXml,
  renderIvrVoicemailPromptXml,
} from '#services/calls/IvrService.js';
import { findIvrMenu } from '#services/calls/IvrRepository.js';

const plivo = (() => {
  try {
    return new PlivoClient(
      process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_ID,
      process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_TOKEN,
    );
  } catch (e) {
    console.warn('[CallService] Plivo client initialization failed:', e.message);
    return null;
  }
})();

const DEFAULT_SIP_ENDPOINT = 'sip:luanngo30547604180780407@phone.plivo.com';
const DEFAULT_STT_PROVIDER = (
  process.env.RECEPTIONIST_STT_PROVIDER ||
  process.env.CALL_RECEPTIONIST_STT_PROVIDER ||
  'assemblyai'
);
const CALL_MODAL_PERMISSION_NAMES = ['calls:view', 'calls:edit', 'calls:receive', 'calls:make'];
const CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME = 'callReceptionistMode';
const LEGACY_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'legacy';
const DIRECT_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'direct';
const SIP_ALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'sip_all';
const IVR_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'ivr';
const EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'experimental_ai';
const SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME = 'sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled';

const normalizePhoneDigits = (phoneNumber) => {
  if (!phoneNumber) return '';

  const raw = String(phoneNumber).trim();

  if (raw.toLowerCase().startsWith('sip:')) return raw;

  const digits = raw.replace(/\D/g, '');
  if (!digits) return '';

  if (digits.length >= 11) {
    const last11 = digits.slice(-11);
    if (last11.startsWith('1')) return last11;
  }

  if (digits.length >= 10) {
    return `1${digits.slice(-10)}`;
  }

  return digits;
};

const normalizeSttProvider = (value = '') => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!normalized) return '';
  if (normalized === 'assembly' || normalized === 'assemblyai') return 'assemblyai';
  if (normalized === 'vosk') return 'vosk';
  return '';
};

const resolveDefaultSttProvider = () => normalizeSttProvider(DEFAULT_STT_PROVIDER) || 'assemblyai';

const escapeXmlText = (value = '') => {
  return String(value ?? '')
    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
};

const escapeXmlAttribute = (value = '') => {
  return escapeXmlText(value)
    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    .replace(/'/g, '&apos;');
};

const formatPhoneNumberE164 = (phoneNumber) => {
  if (!phoneNumber) return phoneNumber;

  const raw = String(phoneNumber).trim();

  if (raw.toLowerCase().startsWith('sip:')) {
    return raw;
  }

  const normalizedDigits = normalizePhoneDigits(raw);

  if (normalizedDigits.length === 11 && normalizedDigits.startsWith('1')) {
    return `+${normalizedDigits}`;
  }

  return raw;
};

const getSipEndpoint = () => process.env.PLIVO_SIP_ENDPOINT || DEFAULT_SIP_ENDPOINT;

const normalizeReceptionistMode = (value = '') => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  if (normalized === EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE) return EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
  if (normalized === IVR_RECEPTIONIST_MODE) return IVR_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
  if (normalized === SIP_ALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE) return SIP_ALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
  if (normalized === DIRECT_RECEPTIONIST_MODE) return DIRECT_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
  return LEGACY_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
};

const getCallReceptionistMode = () => {
  return normalizeReceptionistMode(process.env.CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE || LEGACY_RECEPTIONIST_MODE);
};

const resolveOrganizationReceptionistMode = (settings = []) => {
  const setting = Array.isArray(settings)
    ? settings.find((item) => item?.settingName === CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME)
    : null;

  return normalizeReceptionistMode(setting?.settingValue || getCallReceptionistMode());
};

const getOrganizationCallReceptionistMode = async (organizationId) => {
  if (!organizationId) {
    return getCallReceptionistMode();
  }

  try {
    const setting = await prisma.settings.findUnique({
      where: {
        orgSetting_unique: {
          organizationId,
          settingName: CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME,
        },
      },
      select: {
        settingValue: true,
      },
    });

    return normalizeReceptionistMode(setting?.settingValue || getCallReceptionistMode());
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load receptionist mode for org ${organizationId}:`, error);
    return getCallReceptionistMode();
  }
};

const isExperimentalReceptionistEnabled = (mode = '') => {
  return normalizeReceptionistMode(mode || getCallReceptionistMode()) === EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
};

const isManagedIvrEnabled = (mode = '') => (
  normalizeReceptionistMode(mode || getCallReceptionistMode()) === IVR_RECEPTIONIST_MODE
);

const isSipAllEnabled = (mode = '') => (
  normalizeReceptionistMode(mode || getCallReceptionistMode()) === SIP_ALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE
);

const uniqueNonEmpty = (values) => [...new Set(values.filter(Boolean))];

const normalizeMediaUrlList = (value) => {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value.map((item) => String(item || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
  }

  if (typeof value !== 'string') {
    return [];
  }

  const trimmed = value.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return [];

  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(trimmed);
    if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return normalizeMediaUrlList(parsed);
  } catch {
    // Fall through to comma-separated handling.
  }

  return trimmed.split(',').map((item) => item.trim()).filter(Boolean);
};

const extractInboundMediaUrls = (reqBody = {}) => {
  const mediaUrls = new Set();
  const addUrls = (value) => {
    normalizeMediaUrlList(value).forEach((url) => mediaUrls.add(url));
  };

  addUrls(reqBody.media_urls);
  addUrls(reqBody.mediaUrls);
  addUrls(reqBody.MediaUrls);
  addUrls(reqBody.MediaURLS);
  addUrls(reqBody.MediaURL);
  addUrls(reqBody.MediaUrl);

  const mediaCountNumber = Number(reqBody.MediaCount || reqBody.MediaCnt || 0);
  if (Number.isFinite(mediaCountNumber) && mediaCountNumber > 0) {
    for (let i = 0; i < mediaCountNumber; i += 1) {
      addUrls(reqBody[`Media${i}`]);
      addUrls(reqBody[`MediaUrl${i}`]);
      addUrls(reqBody[`MediaURL${i}`]);
      addUrls(reqBody[`media${i}`]);
      addUrls(reqBody[`mediaUrl${i}`]);
    }
  }

  Object.entries(reqBody).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (/^media(url)?\d+$/i.test(key)) {
      addUrls(value);
    }
  });

  return [...mediaUrls];
};

const phoneVariants = (phoneNumber) => {
  if (!phoneNumber) return [];

  const raw = String(phoneNumber).trim();
  const normalizedDigits = normalizePhoneDigits(raw);
  const e164 = formatPhoneNumberE164(raw);

  const variants = [raw, normalizedDigits, e164];

  if (normalizedDigits.length === 11 && normalizedDigits.startsWith('1')) {
    variants.push(normalizedDigits.slice(1));
  }

  return uniqueNonEmpty(variants);
};

const findOrganizationByPhoneNumber = async (phoneNumber, include = undefined) => {
  const variants = phoneVariants(phoneNumber);

  if (!variants.length) return null;

  const orgPhoneEntry = await prisma.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst({
    where: {
      OR: variants.map((value) => ({ phoneNumber: value })),
    },
    select: { organizationId: true },
  });

  if (orgPhoneEntry) {
    return prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: orgPhoneEntry.organizationId },
      ...(include ? { include } : {}),
    });
  }

  return prisma.organization.findFirst({
    where: {
      OR: variants.map((value) => ({ phoneNumber: value })),
    },
    ...(include ? { include } : {}),
  });
};

const filterEligibleIncomingCallUserIds = async (userIds, organizationId) => {
  const uniqueUserIds = [...new Set((userIds || []).filter(Boolean))];

  const orConditions = [
    { role: { in: ["ADMIN", "MANAGER"] } },
  ];

  if (uniqueUserIds.length > 0) {
    orConditions.push({
      id: { in: uniqueUserIds },
      permissions: {
        some: {
          name: {
            in: CALL_MODAL_PERMISSION_NAMES,
          },
        },
      },
    });
  }

  const eligibleUsers = await prisma.user.findMany({
    where: {
      organizationId,
      active: true,
      OR: orConditions,
    },
    select: {
      id: true,
    },
  });

  return eligibleUsers.map((user) => user.id);
};

const findAllCallPermissionUserIds = async (organizationId) => {
  const users = await prisma.user.findMany({
    where: {
      organizationId,
      active: true,
      permissions: {
        some: {
          name: { startsWith: 'calls:' },
        },
      },
    },
    select: { id: true },
  });
  return users.map((user) => user.id);
};

const parseCallReceiverUserIds = (settingValue = '') => {
  if (!settingValue) return [];

  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(settingValue);
    return Array.isArray(parsed) ? [...new Set(parsed.filter(Boolean))] : [];
  } catch (error) {
    return [];
  }
};

const getEligibleHumanTransferTargets = async ({ organizationId, settings = [], mainReceiverId = '' }) => {
  const callReceiverSetting = Array.isArray(settings)
    ? settings.find((item) => item?.settingName === 'callReceiver')
    : null;

  const receiverUserIds = parseCallReceiverUserIds(callReceiverSetting?.settingValue || '');
  const requestedUserIds = [...new Set([
    ...receiverUserIds,
    mainReceiverId,
  ].filter(Boolean))];

  const eligibleUsers = await prisma.user.findMany({
    where: {
      id: { in: requestedUserIds },
      organizationId,
      active: true,
      permissions: {
        some: {
          name: {
            in: CALL_MODAL_PERMISSION_NAMES,
          },
        },
      },
    },
    select: {
      id: true,
      phoneNumber: true,
    },
  });

  // Always include the main receiver in the transfer targets, even when they
  // are not part of the call modal permission set used for the in-app UI.
  const mainReceiver = mainReceiverId
    ? await prisma.user.findFirst({
      where: {
        id: mainReceiverId,
        organizationId,
        active: true,
      },
      select: {
        id: true,
        phoneNumber: true,
      },
    })
    : null;

  const combinedUsersById = new Map();
  eligibleUsers.forEach((user) => {
    if (user?.id) {
      combinedUsersById.set(user.id, user);
    }
  });

  if (mainReceiver?.id) {
    combinedUsersById.set(mainReceiver.id, mainReceiver);
  }

  const transferUsers = Array.from(combinedUsersById.values());
  const phoneNumbers = [...new Set(
    transferUsers
      .map((user) => formatPhoneNumberE164(user?.phoneNumber || ''))
      .filter((value) => value && !String(value).toLowerCase().startsWith('sip:')),
  )];

  return {
    userIds: transferUsers.map((user) => user.id),
    phoneNumbers,
  };
};

const humanizeIntentLabel = (value = '') => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim();
  if (!normalized) return 'Human handoff';

  return normalized
    .replace(/[_-]+/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim()
    .replace(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase());
};

const trimNotificationText = (value = '', limit = 220) => {
  const text = String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  if (text.length <= limit) return text;
  return `${text.slice(0, Math.max(0, limit - 3)).trim()}...`;
};

const buildHumanTransferIntentSummary = ({ callerNumber = '', intent = '', summary = '', action = '' } = {}) => {
  const intentLabel = humanizeIntentLabel(intent);
  const reason = trimNotificationText(summary || 'Caller asked to speak with a human.', 180);
  const parts = [
    `Caller intent: ${intentLabel}.`,
    reason,
  ];

  if (action && action !== 'escalate_to_human') {
    parts.push(`Action: ${humanizeIntentLabel(action)}.`);
  }

  if (callerNumber) {
    parts.push(`Caller: ${callerNumber}.`);
  }

  return parts.filter(Boolean).join(' ');
};

export const notifyExperimentalHumanTransferRequested = async ({
  callId = '',
  callUUID = '',
  organizationId = '',
  callerNumber = '',
  intent = '',
  action = '',
  summary = '',
} = {}) => {
  if (!callId && !callUUID) {
    return null;
  }

  const callRecord = callId
    ? await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({ where: { id: callId } })
    : await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({ where: { callUUID } });

  if (!callRecord) {
    return null;
  }

  const resolvedOrganizationId = organizationId || callRecord.organizationId;
  const resolvedCallerNumber = callerNumber || callRecord.from || '';
  const handoffSummary = buildHumanTransferIntentSummary({
    callerNumber: resolvedCallerNumber,
    intent,
    action,
    summary,
  });

  await prisma.phoneCall.update({
    where: { id: callRecord.id },
    data: {
      status: 'transferring-to-human',
      summary: handoffSummary,
    },
  }).catch(() => null);

  const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
    where: { id: resolvedOrganizationId },
    include: {
      settings: {
        where: {
          settingName: 'callReceiver',
        },
      },
    },
  });

  const callReceiverSetting = organization?.settings?.[0];
  const requestedUserIds = [
    ...parseCallReceiverUserIds(callReceiverSetting?.settingValue || ''),
    organization?.mainReceiverId || '',
  ];
  const eligibleUserIdsToNotify = await filterEligibleIncomingCallUserIds(requestedUserIds, resolvedOrganizationId);

  const payload = {
    title: 'Human Handoff Requested',
    body: trimNotificationText(handoffSummary, 220),
    type: 'CALL_HUMAN_HANDOFF',
    callerID: resolvedCallerNumber,
    callerNumber: resolvedCallerNumber,
    callUUID: callRecord.callUUID,
    callId: callRecord.id,
    organizationId: resolvedOrganizationId,
    intent: intent || '',
    intentLabel: humanizeIntentLabel(intent),
    action: action || '',
    summary: handoffSummary,
    url: `/calls?phone=${encodeURIComponent(resolvedCallerNumber)}`,
    priority: 'high',
    isHighPriority: true,
  };

  for (const userId of eligibleUserIdsToNotify) {
    await sendPushNotificationToUser(userId, payload);
  }

  return {
    callId: callRecord.id,
    organizationId: resolvedOrganizationId,
    callerNumber: resolvedCallerNumber,
    summary: handoffSummary,
    notifiedUserIds: eligibleUserIdsToNotify,
  };
};

const buildHumanTransferXml = async ({
  callRecord,
  organization,
  callerNumber = '',
  receiverPhoneNumbers = [],
}) => {
  const noAnswerTextSetting = Array.isArray(organization?.settings)
    ? organization.settings.find((item) => item?.settingName === 'callNoAnswerText')
    : null;

  const callerId = formatPhoneNumberE164(callerNumber || callRecord?.from || organization?.phoneNumber || '');
  const uniquePhoneNumbers = [...new Set((receiverPhoneNumbers || [])
    .map((value) => formatPhoneNumberE164(value))
    .filter(Boolean))];

  const dialActionUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/dial-status?callId=${encodeURIComponent(callRecord.id)}`;
  const dialCallbackUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/dial-events?callId=${encodeURIComponent(callRecord.id)}`;
  const voicemailUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/voicemail/complete`;

  let plivoXml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>\n<Response>`;
  plivoXml += `\n  <Dial callerId="${escapeXmlAttribute(callerId)}" timeout="20" action="${escapeXmlAttribute(dialActionUrl)}" method="POST" callbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(dialCallbackUrl)}" callbackMethod="POST" dialMusic="real">`;
  plivoXml += `\n    <User>${escapeXmlText(getSipEndpoint())}</User>`;

  uniquePhoneNumbers.forEach((phoneNumber) => {
    plivoXml += `\n    <Number>${escapeXmlText(phoneNumber)}</Number>`;
  });

  plivoXml += `\n  </Dial>`;

  if (noAnswerTextSetting?.settingValue) {
    plivoXml += `\n  <Message src="${escapeXmlAttribute(formatPhoneNumberE164(organization?.phoneNumber || callRecord?.to || ''))}" dst="${escapeXmlAttribute(callerId)}"><![CDATA[${noAnswerTextSetting.settingValue}]]></Message>`;
  }

  plivoXml += `\n  <Speak>Please leave a message after the beep.</Speak>`;
  plivoXml += `\n  <Record action="${escapeXmlAttribute(voicemailUrl)}" method="POST" maxLength="120" timeout="5" playBeep="true"/>`;
  plivoXml += `\n  <Speak>Thank you. Goodbye.</Speak>`;
  plivoXml += `\n  <Hangup/>`;
  plivoXml += `\n</Response>`;

  return plivoXml;
};

const buildRecordingWsUrl = ({ callId, phone, orgId, sttProvider = '', receptionistMode = '' }) => {
  const resolvedSttProvider = normalizeSttProvider(sttProvider) || resolveDefaultSttProvider();
  const resolvedMode = normalizeReceptionistMode(receptionistMode || getCallReceptionistMode());
  const experimentalMode = resolvedMode === EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE ? 'true' : 'false';
  const extraHeaders = `callId:${callId};phone:${phone};orgId:${orgId};sttProvider:${resolvedSttProvider};mode:${resolvedMode};experimentalMode:${experimentalMode};`;
  const apiUrl = process.env.API_URL.replace(/^https?:/, '');
  const params = new URLSearchParams({
    extra_headers: extraHeaders,
    sttProvider: resolvedSttProvider,
    mode: resolvedMode,
    experimentalMode,
  });
  return `wss:${apiUrl}/recording?${params.toString()}`;
};

const buildExperimentalReceptionistXml = async ({ callRecord, organization, normalizedFrom }) => {
  const wsUrl = buildRecordingWsUrl({
    callId: callRecord.id,
    phone: normalizedFrom,
    orgId: organization.id,
    sttProvider: resolveDefaultSttProvider(),
    receptionistMode: EXPERIMENTAL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE,
  });

  const { greetingText, playbackUrl } = await experimentalReceptionistService.ensureGreetingPlayback({
    organizationId: organization.id,
    organizationName: organization.name,
    callerName: '',
    enabledOverride: true,
  });

  const statusUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/status`;

  let plivoXml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>\n<Response>`;

  if (playbackUrl) {
    plivoXml += `\n  <Play>${escapeXmlText(playbackUrl)}</Play>`;
  } else {
    plivoXml += `\n  <Speak>${escapeXmlText(greetingText)}</Speak>`;
  }

  plivoXml += `
  <Stream
    streamTimeout="3600"
    bidirectional="true"
    contentType="audio/x-mulaw;rate=8000"
    audioTrack="inbound"
    keepCallAlive="true"
    statusCallbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(statusUrl)}"
    statusCallbackMethod="POST">
    ${escapeXmlText(wsUrl)}
  </Stream>
  <Hangup/>`;

  plivoXml += `\n</Response>`;
  return plivoXml;
};

export async function handleInitialCall(reqBody) {
  const { From, To, CallUUID } = reqBody;

  const normalizedFrom = formatPhoneNumberE164(From);
  const normalizedTo = formatPhoneNumberE164(To);

  const organization = await findOrganizationByPhoneNumber(normalizedTo, {
    settings: {
      where: {
        OR: [
          { settingName: 'callReceiver' },
          { settingName: 'ivrIntroAudioPath' },
          { settingName: 'callNoAnswerText' },
          { settingName: CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME },
          { settingName: ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME },
          { settingName: SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME },
        ],
      },
    },
  });

  if (!organization) {
    console.error(`handleInitialCall: No organization found for number: ${normalizedTo}`);
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="rejected"/></Response>`;
  }

  const orgId = organization.id;
  const receptionistMode = resolveOrganizationReceptionistMode(organization.settings);

  const callRecord = await prisma.phoneCall.upsert({
    where: { callUUID: CallUUID },
    update: {
      from: normalizedFrom,
      to: normalizedTo,
      direction: 'inbound',
      status: isExperimentalReceptionistEnabled(receptionistMode) ? 'experimental-ai' : 'in-progress',
      organizationId: orgId,
    },
    create: {
      from: normalizedFrom,
      to: normalizedTo,
      callUUID: CallUUID,
      direction: 'inbound',
      status: isExperimentalReceptionistEnabled(receptionistMode) ? 'experimental-ai' : 'in-progress',
      organizationId: orgId,
    },
  });

  const callReceiverSetting = organization.settings.find((s) => s.settingName === 'callReceiver');

  let userIdsToNotify = [];
  if (callReceiverSetting?.settingValue) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(callReceiverSetting.settingValue);
      if (Array.isArray(parsed)) userIdsToNotify = parsed;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Error parsing callReceiver for org ${orgId}:`, error);
    }
  }

  if (!userIdsToNotify.length && organization.mainReceiverId) {
    userIdsToNotify.push(organization.mainReceiverId);
  }

  const eligibleUserIdsToNotify = isSipAllEnabled(receptionistMode)
    ? await findAllCallPermissionUserIds(orgId)
    : await filterEligibleIncomingCallUserIds(userIdsToNotify, orgId);

  if (eligibleUserIdsToNotify.length) {
    const payload = {
      title: 'Incoming Call',
      body: `From: ${callRecord.from}`,
      type: 'CALL',
      callerID: callRecord.from,
      callerNumber: callRecord.from,
      callUUID: CallUUID,
      callId: callRecord.id,
      organizationId: orgId,
      id: callRecord.id,
      url: `/calls?phone=${encodeURIComponent(callRecord.from)}`,
      priority: 'high',
      isHighPriority: true,
      receptionistMode,
    };

    const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
    eligibleUserIdsToNotify.forEach((uid) => {
      socket.to(uid).emit('incomingCall', {
        ...callRecord,
        callId: callRecord.id,
        organizationId: orgId,
        receptionistMode,
        originalCallUUID: CallUUID,
      });
    });

    Promise.all(
      eligibleUserIdsToNotify.map((uid) => sendPushNotificationToUser(uid, payload))
    ).catch((error) => {
      console.error('handleInitialCall: Failed to send incoming call push notifications:', error);
    });
  } else {
    console.warn(`handleInitialCall: No eligible users with call permissions were found for org ${orgId}.`);
  }

  if (isExperimentalReceptionistEnabled(receptionistMode)) {
    const experimentalXml = await buildExperimentalReceptionistXml({
      callRecord,
      organization,
      normalizedFrom,
    });
    console.log('handleInitialCall EXPERIMENTAL XML:', experimentalXml);
    return experimentalXml;
  }

  if (isManagedIvrEnabled(receptionistMode)) {
    const menu = await getPublishedIvrMenu({
      organizationId: orgId,
      settings: organization.settings,
    });
    if (menu) {
      return renderIvrMenuXml({ menu, nodeId: menu.publishedDefinition?.rootNodeId });
    }
    console.warn(`Managed IVR mode has no published active menu for org ${orgId}; using direct forwarding.`);
  }

  if (isSipAllEnabled(receptionistMode)) {
    const voicemailSetting = organization.settings.find(
      (setting) => setting.settingName === SIP_NO_ANSWER_VOICEMAIL_SETTING_NAME,
    );
    const voicemailEnabled = voicemailSetting?.settingValue !== 'false';
    const noAnswerTextSetting = organization.settings.find((s) => s.settingName === 'callNoAnswerText');
    const voicemailMenu = await getPublishedIvrMenu({
      organizationId: orgId,
      settings: organization.settings,
    });
    const voicemailPrompt = voicemailMenu?.publishedDefinition
      ? renderIvrVoicemailPromptXml(voicemailMenu.publishedDefinition)
      : '<Speak>Nobody is available to answer right now. Please leave a message after the beep.</Speak>';
    const wsUrl = buildRecordingWsUrl({
      callId: callRecord.id,
      phone: normalizedFrom,
      orgId,
      sttProvider: resolveDefaultSttProvider(),
      receptionistMode,
    });

    let sipXml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Response>
  <Stream streamTimeout="3600" bidirectional="false" contentType="audio/x-mulaw;rate=8000" audioTrack="inbound" keepCallAlive="true" statusCallbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/status`)}">
    ${escapeXmlText(wsUrl)}
  </Stream>
  <Dial callerId="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}" timeout="25">
    <User>${escapeXmlText(getSipEndpoint())}</User>
  </Dial>`;

    if (voicemailEnabled) {
      if (noAnswerTextSetting?.settingValue) {
        sipXml += `
  <Message src="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedTo)}" dst="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}"><![CDATA[${noAnswerTextSetting.settingValue}]]></Message>`;
      }
      sipXml += `
  ${voicemailPrompt}
  <Record action="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/voicemail/complete?organizationId=${encodeURIComponent(orgId)}`)}" method="POST" maxLength="120" timeout="5" playBeep="true"/>
  <Speak>Thank you. Goodbye.</Speak>`;
    }

    sipXml += `
  <Hangup/>
</Response>`;
    return sipXml;
  }

  const introAudioSetting = organization.settings.find((s) => s.settingName === 'ivrIntroAudioPath');
  const noAnswerTextSetting = organization.settings.find((s) => s.settingName === 'callNoAnswerText');

  let plivoXml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>\n<Response>`;

  if (introAudioSetting?.settingValue && callReceiverSetting?.settingValue) {
    const audioUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/uploads/${orgId}/${introAudioSetting.settingValue}`;
    const actionUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/handle-ivr`;

    plivoXml += `
  <GetInput action="${escapeXmlAttribute(actionUrl)}" inputType="dtmf" numDigits="1" executionTimeout="10" redirect="true">
    <Play>${escapeXmlText(audioUrl)}</Play>
  </GetInput>
  <Speak>We did not receive any input. Please leave a message after the tone.</Speak>
  <Record action="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/voicemail/complete`)}" method="POST" maxLength="120" timeout="5" playBeep="true"/>
  <Speak>Thank you. Goodbye.</Speak>
  <Hangup/>`;
  } else {
    console.warn(`IVR not configured for org ${orgId}. Forwarding directly.`);

    const transferTargets = await getEligibleHumanTransferTargets({
      organizationId: orgId,
      settings: organization.settings,
      mainReceiverId: organization.mainReceiverId || '',
    });

    if (!transferTargets.phoneNumbers.length) {
      console.warn('handleInitialCall: no configured receiver phone numbers available for direct forwarding', {
        callId: callRecord.id,
        organizationId: orgId,
        receiverUserIds: transferTargets.userIds,
      });
    }

    const wsUrl = buildRecordingWsUrl({
      callId: callRecord.id,
      phone: normalizedFrom,
      orgId,
      sttProvider: resolveDefaultSttProvider(),
      receptionistMode,
    });

    plivoXml += `
  <Stream streamTimeout="3600" bidirectional="false" contentType="audio/x-mulaw;rate=8000" audioTrack="inbound" keepCallAlive="true" statusCallbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/status`)}">
    ${escapeXmlText(wsUrl)}
  </Stream>
  <Dial callerId="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}" timeout="20">
    <User>${escapeXmlText(getSipEndpoint())}</User>
    ${transferTargets.phoneNumbers.map((phoneNumber) => `<Number>${escapeXmlText(phoneNumber)}</Number>`).join('\n    ')}
  </Dial>
  ${noAnswerTextSetting?.settingValue ? `<Message src="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedTo)}" dst="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}"><![CDATA[${noAnswerTextSetting.settingValue}]]></Message>` : ''}
  <Speak>Please leave a message after the beep.</Speak>
  <Record action="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/voicemail/complete`)}" method="POST" maxLength="120" timeout="5" playBeep="true"/>
  <Speak>Thank you. Goodbye.</Speak>
  <Hangup/>`;
  }

  plivoXml += `\n</Response>`;
  console.log('handleInitialCall XML:', plivoXml);
  return plivoXml;
}

export async function handleOutboundAnswer(reqBody) {
  const { CallUUID, callId } = reqBody;

  if (!callId) {
    console.error('handleOutboundAnswer: Missing callId');
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="error"/></Response>`;
  }

  const callRecord = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({
    where: { id: callId },
  });

  if (!callRecord) {
    console.error(`handleOutboundAnswer: No phoneCall found for callId ${callId}`);
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="error"/></Response>`;
  }

  const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
    where: { id: callRecord.organizationId },
    include: {
      settings: {
        where: {
          OR: [{ settingName: 'callNoAnswerText' }],
        },
      },
    },
  });

  if (!organization) {
    console.error(
      `handleOutboundAnswer: No organization found for call ${callRecord.id} / org ${callRecord.organizationId}`,
    );
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="error"/></Response>`;
  }

  const noAnswerTextSetting = organization.settings.find((s) => s.settingName === 'callNoAnswerText');

  const normalizedFrom = formatPhoneNumberE164(callRecord.from);
  const normalizedTo = formatPhoneNumberE164(callRecord.to);

  const updatedCall = await prisma.phoneCall.update({
    where: { id: callRecord.id },
    data: {
      from: normalizedFrom,
      to: normalizedTo,
      callUUID: CallUUID || callRecord.callUUID,
      status: 'dialing-destination',
    },
  });

  const wsUrl = buildRecordingWsUrl({
    callId: updatedCall.id,
    phone: normalizedTo,
    orgId: updatedCall.organizationId,
    sttProvider: resolveDefaultSttProvider(),
  });

  const dialActionUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/dial-status?callId=${encodeURIComponent(updatedCall.id)}`;
  const dialCallbackUrl = `${process.env.API_URL}/calls/dial-events?callId=${encodeURIComponent(updatedCall.id)}`;

  let plivoXml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>\n<Response>`;

  plivoXml += `
  <Stream streamTimeout="3600" bidirectional="false" contentType="audio/x-mulaw;rate=8000" audioTrack="inbound" keepCallAlive="true" statusCallbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/status`)}">
    ${escapeXmlText(wsUrl)}
  </Stream>
  <Dial callerId="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}" timeout="30" action="${escapeXmlAttribute(dialActionUrl)}" method="POST" callbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(dialCallbackUrl)}" callbackMethod="POST" dialMusic="real">
    <Number>${escapeXmlText(normalizedTo)}</Number>
  </Dial>`;

  if (noAnswerTextSetting?.settingValue) {
    plivoXml += `
  <Message src="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}" dst="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedTo)}"><![CDATA[${noAnswerTextSetting.settingValue}]]></Message>`;
  }

  plivoXml += `
  <Hangup/>
</Response>`;

  console.log('handleOutboundAnswer XML:', plivoXml);
  return plivoXml;
}

export async function handleIvrSelection(reqBody) {
  const { Digits, To, From, CallUUID } = reqBody;

  const normalizedTo = formatPhoneNumberE164(To);
  const normalizedFrom = formatPhoneNumberE164(From);

  const organization = await findOrganizationByPhoneNumber(normalizedTo, {
    settings: {
      where: {
        OR: [
          { settingName: 'callReceiver' },
          { settingName: 'callNoAnswerText' },
        ],
      },
    },
  });

  if (!organization) {
    console.error(`IVR handler: Could not find organization for number: ${normalizedTo}`);
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="rejected"/></Response>`;
  }

  const callReceiverSetting = organization.settings.find((s) => s.settingName === 'callReceiver');
  const noAnswerTextSetting = organization.settings.find((s) => s.settingName === 'callNoAnswerText');

  let destinationNumber;
  try {
    const callReceiverUserIds = JSON.parse(callReceiverSetting.settingValue);
    const targetIndex = parseInt(Digits, 10) - 1;

    if (targetIndex >= 0 && targetIndex < callReceiverUserIds.length) {
      const userIdToDial = callReceiverUserIds[targetIndex];
      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
        where: { id: userIdToDial },
        select: { phoneNumber: true },
      });
      destinationNumber = formatPhoneNumberE164(user?.phoneNumber);
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`IVR handler: Error processing 'callReceiver' setting for org ${organization.id}.`, error);
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Speak>An error occurred. Goodbye.</Speak><Hangup/></Response>`;
  }

  if (!destinationNumber) {
    console.error(`IVR handler: Could not determine destination for digit: ${Digits}`);
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Speak>Invalid option selected. Goodbye.</Speak><Hangup/></Response>`;
  }

  const callRecord = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({
    where: { callUUID: CallUUID },
  });

  if (!callRecord) {
    console.error(`IVR handler: Could not find call record for CallUUID: ${CallUUID}`);
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="error"/></Response>`;
  }

  const wsUrl = buildRecordingWsUrl({
    callId: callRecord.id,
    phone: normalizedFrom,
    orgId: organization.id,
    sttProvider: resolveDefaultSttProvider(),
    receptionistMode: getCallReceptionistMode(),
  });

  let plivoXml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>\n<Response>`;

  plivoXml += `
  <Stream streamTimeout="3600" bidirectional="false" contentType="audio/x-mulaw;rate=8000" audioTrack="inbound" keepCallAlive="true" statusCallbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/status`)}">
    ${escapeXmlText(wsUrl)}
  </Stream>`;

  plivoXml += `
  <Dial callerId="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}" timeout="20">
    <User>${escapeXmlText(getSipEndpoint())}</User>
    <Number>${escapeXmlText(destinationNumber)}</Number>
  </Dial>`;

  if (noAnswerTextSetting?.settingValue) {
    plivoXml += `
  <Message src="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedTo)}" dst="${escapeXmlAttribute(normalizedFrom)}"><![CDATA[${noAnswerTextSetting.settingValue}]]></Message>`;
  }

  plivoXml += `
  <Speak>Hello this is Taco Taco. Sorry I missed your call. Please leave a message after the beep.</Speak>
  <Record action="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/voicemail/complete`)}" method="POST" maxLength="120" timeout="5" playBeep="true"/>
  <Speak>Thank you. Goodbye.</Speak>
  <Hangup/>
</Response>`;

  console.log('handleIvrSelection XML:', plivoXml);
  return plivoXml;
}

export async function handleManagedIvrSelection(reqBody = {}) {
  const { Digits, To, From, CallUUID, menuId, nodeId, event, test, organizationId: testOrganizationId } = reqBody;
  const normalizedTo = formatPhoneNumberE164(To);
  const normalizedFrom = formatPhoneNumberE164(From);

  const organization = test === '1' && testOrganizationId
    ? await prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: testOrganizationId },
      include: {
        settings: {
          where: {
            settingName: { in: [CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME, ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME] },
          },
        },
      },
    })
    : await findOrganizationByPhoneNumber(normalizedTo, {
      settings: {
        where: {
          settingName: { in: [CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE_SETTING_NAME, ACTIVE_IVR_MENU_SETTING_NAME] },
        },
      },
    });
  if (!organization) {
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="rejected"/></Response>`;
  }

  const storedMenu = test === '1'
    ? await findIvrMenu({ organizationId: organization.id, id: menuId })
    : await getPublishedIvrMenu({
      organizationId: organization.id,
      settings: organization.settings,
      menuId,
    });
  const menu = storedMenu && test === '1'
    ? { ...storedMenu, publishedDefinition: storedMenu.draftDefinition, isTestDraft: true }
    : storedMenu;
  if (!menu) {
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Speak>This menu is currently unavailable. Goodbye.</Speak><Hangup/></Response>`;
  }

  const callRecord = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({ where: { callUUID: CallUUID } });
  const wsUrl = callRecord
    ? buildRecordingWsUrl({
      callId: callRecord.id,
      phone: normalizedFrom,
      orgId: organization.id,
      sttProvider: resolveDefaultSttProvider(),
      receptionistMode: IVR_RECEPTIONIST_MODE,
    })
    : '';
  const prefixXml = wsUrl
    ? `<Stream streamTimeout="3600" bidirectional="false" contentType="audio/x-mulaw;rate=8000" audioTrack="inbound" keepCallAlive="true" statusCallbackUrl="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/status`)}">${escapeXmlText(wsUrl)}</Stream>`
    : '';

  return handleIvrInput({
    menu,
    nodeId,
    event,
    digits: Digits,
    organizationId: organization.id,
    normalizedFrom,
    normalizedTo,
    prefixXml,
    onSelection: async (selection) => {
      if (test === '1') return;
      try {
        const eligibleUserIds = await findAllCallPermissionUserIds(organization.id);
        const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
        eligibleUserIds.forEach((userId) => {
          socket.to(userId).emit('ivrSelection', {
            ...selection,
            callUUID: CallUUID,
            callId: callRecord?.id || '',
            organizationId: organization.id,
            callerID: normalizedFrom,
            to: normalizedTo,
          });
        });
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('handleManagedIvrSelection: Failed to broadcast IVR selection:', error);
      }
    },
  });
}

export async function handleExperimentalHumanTransferAnswer(reqBody = {}) {
  const { CallUUID, callId } = reqBody;

  const callRecord = callId
    ? await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({ where: { id: callId } })
    : await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({ where: { callUUID: CallUUID } });

  if (!callRecord) {
    console.error('handleExperimentalHumanTransferAnswer: call record not found', { callId, CallUUID });
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="error"/></Response>`;
  }

  const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
    where: { id: callRecord.organizationId },
    include: {
      settings: {
        where: {
          OR: [
            { settingName: 'callReceiver' },
            { settingName: 'callNoAnswerText' },
          ],
        },
      },
    },
  });

  if (!organization) {
    console.error('handleExperimentalHumanTransferAnswer: organization not found', {
      callId: callRecord.id,
      organizationId: callRecord.organizationId,
    });
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Hangup reason="error"/></Response>`;
  }

  const transferTargets = await getEligibleHumanTransferTargets({
    organizationId: organization.id,
    settings: organization.settings,
    mainReceiverId: organization.mainReceiverId || '',
  });

  if (!transferTargets.phoneNumbers.length && !getSipEndpoint()) {
    console.warn('handleExperimentalHumanTransferAnswer: no human transfer targets available', {
      callId: callRecord.id,
      organizationId: organization.id,
    });
    return `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Speak>I am sorry, no team member is currently available. Please leave a message after the beep.</Speak><Record action="${escapeXmlAttribute(`${process.env.API_URL}/calls/voicemail/complete`)}" method="POST" maxLength="120" timeout="5" playBeep="true"/><Hangup/></Response>`;
  }

  await prisma.phoneCall.update({
    where: { id: callRecord.id },
    data: { status: 'transferring-to-human' },
  }).catch(() => null);

  return buildHumanTransferXml({
    callRecord,
    organization,
    callerNumber: callRecord.from,
    receiverPhoneNumbers: transferTargets.phoneNumbers,
  });
}

export async function transferExperimentalCallToHuman({ callId = '', callUUID = '' } = {}) {
  let resolvedCallUuid = String(callUUID || '').trim();
  let resolvedCallId = String(callId || '').trim();

  if (!resolvedCallUuid && resolvedCallId) {
    const callRecord = await prisma.phoneCall.findUnique({
      where: { id: resolvedCallId },
      select: { callUUID: true },
    });
    resolvedCallUuid = String(callRecord?.callUUID || '').trim();
  }

  if (!resolvedCallUuid) {
    throw new Error('Missing call UUID for experimental human transfer.');
  }

  const apiUrl = String(process.env.API_URL || '').trim();
  const authId = String(process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_ID || '').trim();
  const authToken = String(process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_TOKEN || '').trim();
  if (!apiUrl || !authId || !authToken) {
    throw new Error('Missing API_URL or Plivo credentials for experimental human transfer.');
  }

  const alegUrl = `${apiUrl}/calls/answer/human${resolvedCallId ? `?callId=${encodeURIComponent(resolvedCallId)}` : ''}`;
  const requestUrl = `https://api.plivo.com/v1/Account/${encodeURIComponent(authId)}/Call/${encodeURIComponent(resolvedCallUuid)}/`;
  const body = new URLSearchParams({
    legs: 'aleg',
    aleg_url: alegUrl,
    aleg_method: 'POST',
  });

  const response = await fetch(requestUrl, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Basic ${Buffer.from(`${authId}:${authToken}`).toString('base64')}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
    },
    body,
  });

  const rawText = await response.text();
  let parsedBody = null;
  try {
    parsedBody = rawText ? JSON.parse(rawText) : null;
  } catch {
    parsedBody = rawText || null;
  }

  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(`Plivo transfer failed (${response.status}): ${typeof parsedBody === 'string' ? parsedBody : JSON.stringify(parsedBody)}`);
  }

  if (resolvedCallId) {
    await prisma.phoneCall.update({
      where: { id: resolvedCallId },
      data: { status: 'transferring-to-human' },
    }).catch(() => null);
  }

  return {
    ok: true,
    status: response.status,
    body: parsedBody,
    alegUrl,
    callUUID: resolvedCallUuid,
  };
}

export async function sendSmsMessage({
  to,
  text,
  type = 'sms',
  mediaUrls = [],
  userId,
  organizationId,
  bookingId,
}) {
  const normalizedMediaUrls = Array.isArray(mediaUrls)
    ? mediaUrls.filter((url) => typeof url === 'string' && url.trim())
    : [];
  const messageText = String(text || '').trim();

  if (!to || (!messageText && normalizedMediaUrls.length === 0)) {
    throw new Error('Missing required fields: to and text or media');
  }

  const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
    where: { id: organizationId },
    select: { phoneNumber: true },
  });

  if (!organization || !organization.phoneNumber) {
    throw new Error('Organization not found or missing phone number');
  }

  const formattedFrom = formatPhoneNumberE164(organization.phoneNumber);
  const formattedTo = formatPhoneNumberE164(to);

  const response = await plivo.messages.create(
    formattedFrom,
    formattedTo,
    messageText || ' ',
    { type: normalizedMediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'mms' : type, ...(normalizedMediaUrls.length > 0 && { media_urls: normalizedMediaUrls }) },
  );

  const messageUuid = Array.isArray(response.messageUuid)
    ? response.messageUuid[0]
    : response.messageUuid;

  const savedMessage = await prisma.phoneMessage.create({
    data: {
      from: formattedFrom,
      to: formattedTo,
      text: messageText,
      type: normalizedMediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'mms' : type,
      direction: 'outbound',
      messageUuid,
      mediaUrls: normalizedMediaUrls,
      userId,
      organizationId,
      bookingId,
    },
  });

  const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
  socket.to(organizationId).emit('newSms', savedMessage);

  return { apiId: response.apiId, messageUuid: response.messageUuid, savedMessage };
}

export async function handleInboundSms(reqBody) {
  const { From, To, Text, Body, Type, MessageUUID } = reqBody;
  const messageText = Text || Body || '';

  const normalizedFrom = formatPhoneNumberE164(From);
  const normalizedTo = formatPhoneNumberE164(To);

  const mediaUrls = extractInboundMediaUrls(reqBody);

  const organization = await findOrganizationByPhoneNumber(normalizedTo, {
    settings: { where: { settingName: 'callReceiver' } },
  });

  if (!organization) {
    console.warn(`No organization found for phone number: ${normalizedTo}`);
    return null;
  }

  let messageOwnerUser = null;
  if (organization.mainReceiverId) {
    messageOwnerUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id: organization.mainReceiverId },
    });
  }
  if (!messageOwnerUser) {
    messageOwnerUser = await prisma.user.findFirst({
      where: { organizationId: organization.id },
    });
  }

  if (!messageOwnerUser) {
    console.warn(`No user found for org ${organization.id} to own SMS message.`);
    return null;
  }

  const savedMessage = await prisma.phoneMessage.create({
    data: {
      from: normalizedFrom,
      to: normalizedTo,
      text: messageText,
      type: Type ? Type.toLowerCase() : (mediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'mms' : 'sms'),
      direction: 'inbound',
      messageUuid: MessageUUID,
      mediaUrls,
      userId: messageOwnerUser.id,
      organizationId: organization.id,
    },
  });

  const callReceiverSetting = organization.settings[0];
  let userIdsToNotify = [];
  if (callReceiverSetting?.settingValue) {
    try {
      const parsedUserIds = JSON.parse(callReceiverSetting.settingValue);
      if (Array.isArray(parsedUserIds)) userIdsToNotify = parsedUserIds;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Error parsing 'callReceiver' setting for org ${organization.id}:`, error);
    }
  }

  if (userIdsToNotify.length === 0) {
    userIdsToNotify.push(messageOwnerUser.id);
  }

  const pushPayload = {
    title: mediaUrls.length > 0 ? 'New MMS Received' : 'New SMS Received',
    from: normalizedFrom,
    text: messageText,
    body: `From: ${normalizedFrom}\nMessage: ${messageText || `${mediaUrls.length} image${mediaUrls.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`}`,
    type: 'SMS_RECEIVED',
    messageId: savedMessage.id,
    url: `/calls?phone=${encodeURIComponent(normalizedFrom)}&smsMessageId=${encodeURIComponent(savedMessage.id)}`,
  };

  for (const userId of userIdsToNotify) {
    await sendPushNotificationToUser(userId, pushPayload);
  }

  const socket = getNamespace('/calls');
  socket.to(organization.id).emit('newSms', savedMessage);

  return savedMessage;
}

export default {
  handleInitialCall,
  handleOutboundAnswer,
  handleIvrSelection,
  handleManagedIvrSelection,
  handleExperimentalHumanTransferAnswer,
  transferExperimentalCallToHuman,
  notifyExperimentalHumanTransferRequested,
  sendSmsMessage,
  handleInboundSms,
  formatPhoneNumberE164,
  getSipEndpoint,
  getCallReceptionistMode,
  getOrganizationCallReceptionistMode,
  findOrganizationByPhoneNumber,
};

```

FILE: server/src/services/calls/SpeechSynthesisService.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/SpeechSynthesisService.js
import elevenLabsTTSService from '#services/calls/ElevenLabsTTSService.js';

const VALID_PROVIDERS = new Set(['elevenlabs', 'moshi']);

class SpeechSynthesisService {
  normalizeProvider(value) {
    const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!normalized) return '';
    return VALID_PROVIDERS.has(normalized) ? normalized : '';
  }

  getDefaultProviderName() {
    return this.normalizeProvider(process.env.RECEPTIONIST_SPEECH_PROVIDER) || 'elevenlabs';
  }

  resolveProvider(providerOverride = '') {
    return this.normalizeProvider(providerOverride) || this.getDefaultProviderName();
  }

  getAvailableProviders() {
    return Array.from(VALID_PROVIDERS);
  }

  async synthesize(text, options = {}) {
    const provider = this.resolveProvider(options.provider);



    const result = await elevenLabsTTSService.synthesize(text, options);
    return {
      ...result,
      provider,
    };
  }

  async ensureGreetingAudio({ provider = '', ...options } = {}) {
    const resolvedProvider = this.resolveProvider(provider);

    if (resolvedProvider === 'moshi') {
      const result = await moshiTTSService.ensureGreetingAudio(options);
      return {
        ...result,
        provider: resolvedProvider,
      };
    }

    const result = await elevenLabsTTSService.ensureGreetingAudio(options);
    return {
      ...result,
      provider: resolvedProvider,
    };
  }
}

export default new SpeechSynthesisService();

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/tests/CallService.test.js
const prismaMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  $queryRaw: vi.fn(),
  organizationPhoneNumber: {
    findFirst: vi.fn(),
  },
  organization: {
    findFirst: vi.fn(),
    findUnique: vi.fn(),
  },
  phoneCall: {
    upsert: vi.fn(),
    update: vi.fn(),
    findUnique: vi.fn(),
  },
  phoneMessage: {
    create: vi.fn(),
  },
  user: {
    findMany: vi.fn(),
    findFirst: vi.fn(),
    findUnique: vi.fn(),
  },
  settings: {
    findUnique: vi.fn(),
  },
}));

const socketMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  to: vi.fn(() => ({
    emit: vi.fn(),
  })),
}));

vi.mock('plivo', () => ({
  Client: vi.fn(function Client() {
    return {
      messages: {
        create: vi.fn(),
      },
    };
  }),
}));

vi.mock('#shared/database/prismaClient.js', () => ({
  default: prismaMock,
}));

vi.mock('#shared/utils/pushNotifications.js', () => ({
  sendPushNotificationToUser: vi.fn(),
}));

vi.mock('#shared/socket.js', () => ({
  getNamespace: vi.fn(() => socketMock),
}));

vi.mock('#services/calls/ExperimentalReceptionistService.js', () => ({
  default: {
    ensureGreetingPlayback: vi.fn(),
  },
}));

import { handleInboundSms, handleInitialCall } from '../services/CallService.js';

describe('CallService handleInitialCall', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    vi.clearAllMocks();
    vi.useFakeTimers();
    vi.setSystemTime(new Date('2026-05-15T17:00:00.000Z'));
    process.env.API_URL = 'https://api.example.test';
    process.env.CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE = 'legacy';
    process.env.PLIVO_SIP_ENDPOINT = 'sip:test@example.test';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    vi.useRealTimers();
    delete process.env.API_URL;
    delete process.env.CALL_RECEPTIONIST_MODE;
    delete process.env.PLIVO_SIP_ENDPOINT;
  });

  it('includes the configured main receiver phone number when forwarding directly without IVR', async () => {
    prismaMock.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst.mockResolvedValue(null);
    prismaMock.organization.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'org-1',
      phoneNumber: '+14165550000',
      mainReceiverId: 'user-main',
      settings: [],
    });
    prismaMock.phoneCall.upsert.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'call-1',
      from: '+14165550111',
      to: '+14165550000',
      callUUID: 'call-uuid-1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
    });
    prismaMock.user.findMany
      .mockResolvedValueOnce([])
      .mockResolvedValueOnce([]);
    prismaMock.user.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'user-main',
      phoneNumber: '(416) 555-2222',
    });

    const xml = await handleInitialCall({
      From: '+14165550111',
      To: '+14165550000',
      CallUUID: 'call-uuid-1',
    });

    expect(xml).toContain('<Dial callerId="+14165550111" timeout="20">');
    expect(xml).toContain('<User>sip:test@example.test</User>');
    expect(xml).toContain('<Number>+14165552222</Number>');
  });

  it('renders the published managed IVR when the organization selects IVR mode', async () => {
    prismaMock.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst.mockResolvedValue(null);
    prismaMock.organization.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'org-1',
      phoneNumber: '+14165550000',
      mainReceiverId: null,
      settings: [
        { settingName: 'callReceptionistMode', settingValue: 'ivr' },
        { settingName: 'activeIvrMenuId', settingValue: 'menu-1' },
      ],
    });
    prismaMock.phoneCall.upsert.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'call-ivr-1',
      from: '+14165550111',
      to: '+14165550000',
      callUUID: 'call-uuid-ivr-1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
    });
    prismaMock.user.findMany.mockResolvedValue([]);
    prismaMock.$queryRaw.mockResolvedValue([{
      id: 'menu-1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      name: 'Main IVR',
      description: null,
      draftDefinition: JSON.stringify({}),
      publishedDefinition: JSON.stringify({
        version: 1,
        rootNodeId: 'main',
        voicemailGreeting: 'Leave a message.',
        nodes: [{
          id: 'main',
          name: 'Main menu',
          prompt: { type: 'tts', text: 'Press 1 for sales.', audioUrl: '' },
          input: { timeout: 10, retries: 1 },
          options: [{ digit: '1', label: 'Sales', action: { type: 'voicemail' } }],
          invalidAction: { type: 'repeat' },
          noInputAction: { type: 'voicemail' },
        }],
      }),
      version: 1,
      publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    }]);

    const xml = await handleInitialCall({
      From: '+14165550111',
      To: '+14165550000',
      CallUUID: 'call-uuid-ivr-1',
    });

    expect(xml).toContain('<GetInput');
    expect(xml).toContain('menuId=menu-1');
    expect(xml).toContain('Press 1 for sales.');
  });

  it('rings the shared SIP endpoint for every user with a Calls permission and falls back to voicemail', async () => {
    prismaMock.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst.mockResolvedValue(null);
    prismaMock.organization.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'org-1',
      phoneNumber: '+14165550000',
      mainReceiverId: null,
      settings: [
        { settingName: 'callReceptionistMode', settingValue: 'sip_all' },
        { settingName: 'sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled', settingValue: 'true' },
      ],
    });
    prismaMock.phoneCall.upsert.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'call-sip-1',
      from: '+14165550111',
      to: '+14165550000',
      callUUID: 'call-uuid-sip-1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
    });
    prismaMock.user.findMany.mockResolvedValue([{ id: 'user-1' }, { id: 'user-2' }]);

    const xml = await handleInitialCall({
      From: '+14165550111',
      To: '+14165550000',
      CallUUID: 'call-uuid-sip-1',
    });

    expect(prismaMock.user.findMany).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.objectContaining({
      where: expect.objectContaining({
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        active: true,
        permissions: { some: { name: { startsWith: 'calls:' } } },
      }),
    }));
    expect(xml).toContain('<User>sip:test@example.test</User>');
    expect(xml).not.toContain('<Number>');
    expect(xml).toContain('Nobody is available to answer right now.');
    expect(xml).toContain('/calls/voicemail/complete?organizationId=org-1');
  });

  it('routes calls outside the former business-hours window', async () => {
    vi.setSystemTime(new Date('2026-05-16T07:00:00.000Z'));
    prismaMock.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst.mockResolvedValue(null);
    prismaMock.organization.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'org-1',
      phoneNumber: '+14165550000',
      mainReceiverId: null,
      settings: [
        { settingName: 'callReceptionistMode', settingValue: 'sip_all' },
        { settingName: 'sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled', settingValue: 'true' },
      ],
    });
    prismaMock.phoneCall.upsert.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'call-after-hours',
      from: '+14165550111',
      to: '+14165550000',
      callUUID: 'call-uuid-after-hours',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
    });
    prismaMock.user.findMany.mockResolvedValue([{ id: 'user-1' }]);

    const xml = await handleInitialCall({
      From: '+14165550111',
      To: '+14165550000',
      CallUUID: 'call-uuid-after-hours',
    });

    expect(prismaMock.phoneCall.upsert).toHaveBeenCalled();
    expect(xml).toContain('<User>sip:test@example.test</User>');
    expect(xml).not.toContain('outside our business hours');
  });

  it('hangs up after an unanswered all-users SIP call when voicemail fallback is disabled', async () => {
    prismaMock.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst.mockResolvedValue(null);
    prismaMock.organization.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'org-1',
      phoneNumber: '+14165550000',
      mainReceiverId: null,
      settings: [
        { settingName: 'callReceptionistMode', settingValue: 'sip_all' },
        { settingName: 'sipNoAnswerVoicemailEnabled', settingValue: 'false' },
      ],
    });
    prismaMock.phoneCall.upsert.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'call-sip-2', from: '+14165550111', to: '+14165550000',
      callUUID: 'call-uuid-sip-2', organizationId: 'org-1',
    });
    prismaMock.user.findMany.mockResolvedValue([{ id: 'user-1' }]);

    const xml = await handleInitialCall({
      From: '+14165550111', To: '+14165550000', CallUUID: 'call-uuid-sip-2',
    });

    expect(xml).toContain('<User>sip:test@example.test</User>');
    expect(xml).not.toContain('<Record');
    expect(xml).toContain('<Hangup/>');
  });

  it('stores inbound MMS images from Plivo Media0 fields', async () => {
    prismaMock.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({ organizationId: 'org-1' });
    prismaMock.organization.findUnique.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'org-1',
      mainReceiverId: 'user-main',
      settings: [],
    });
    prismaMock.user.findUnique.mockResolvedValue({ id: 'user-main' });
    prismaMock.phoneMessage.create.mockImplementation(async ({ data }) => ({
      id: 'message-1',
      createdAt: new Date('2026-05-15T17:00:00.000Z'),
      ...data,
    }));

    await handleInboundSms({
      From: '+14165550111',
      To: '+14165550000',
      Text: 'photo',
      Type: 'mms',
      MessageUUID: 'message-uuid-1',
      Media0: 'https://media.example.test/image-1.jpg',
      Media1: 'https://media.example.test/image-2.png',
    });

    expect(prismaMock.phoneMessage.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      data: expect.objectContaining({
        from: '+14165550111',
        to: '+14165550000',
        text: 'photo',
        type: 'mms',
        direction: 'inbound',
        messageUuid: 'message-uuid-1',
        mediaUrls: [
          'https://media.example.test/image-1.jpg',
          'https://media.example.test/image-2.png',
        ],
        userId: 'user-main',
        organizationId: 'org-1',
      }),
    });
  });

  it('still accepts inbound MMS images from MediaUrl indexed fields', async () => {
    prismaMock.organizationPhoneNumber.findFirst.mockResolvedValue({ organizationId: 'org-1' });
    prismaMock.organization.findUnique.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'org-1',
      mainReceiverId: 'user-main',
      settings: [],
    });
    prismaMock.user.findUnique.mockResolvedValue({ id: 'user-main' });
    prismaMock.phoneMessage.create.mockImplementation(async ({ data }) => ({
      id: 'message-2',
      createdAt: new Date('2026-05-15T17:00:00.000Z'),
      ...data,
    }));

    await handleInboundSms({
      From: '+14165550111',
      To: '+14165550000',
      Text: '',
      MediaCount: '1',
      MediaUrl0: 'https://media.example.test/image-legacy.jpg',
    });

    expect(prismaMock.phoneMessage.create).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      data: expect.objectContaining({
        text: '',
        type: 'mms',
        mediaUrls: ['https://media.example.test/image-legacy.jpg'],
      }),
    });
  });
});
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/tests/ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore.test.js
const prismaMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  organization: {
    findUnique: vi.fn(),
  },
}));

const llmClientMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  generateResponse: vi.fn(),
}));

vi.mock('#shared/database/prismaClient.js', () => ({
  default: prismaMock,
}));

vi.mock('#integrations/ai/llm.js', () => ({
  llmClient: llmClientMock,
}));

vi.mock('#services/calls/ElevenLabsTTSService.js', () => ({
  default: {},
}));

vi.mock('#services/calls/KokoroLocalTTSService.js', () => ({
  default: {},
}));

vi.mock('#services/calls/SpeechSynthesisService.js', () => ({
  default: {},
}));

vi.mock('#services/bookings/BookingsService.js', () => ({
  default: {},
}));

vi.mock('#shared/utils/pushNotifications.js', () => ({
  sendPushNotificationToUser: vi.fn(),
}));

vi.mock('#shared/socket.js', () => ({
  getNamespace: vi.fn(),
}));

vi.mock('#services/ai/OrganizationAIContextService.js', () => ({
  default: {},
}));

import ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore from '../ExperimentalReceptionistService.core.js';

class TestReceptionistService extends ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore {
  async getOrganizationContext() {
    return {
      id: 'org-1',
      name: 'Test Venue',
      timezone: 'America/Toronto',
    };
  }

  async getOrganizationPrompt(_promptName, _organizationId, defaultValue) {
    return defaultValue;
  }
}

describe('ExperimentalReceptionistServiceCore model preferences', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    vi.clearAllMocks();
  });

  it('uses the AI settings decision usage key instead of a hardcoded model', async () => {
    llmClientMock.generateResponse.mockResolvedValue({
      summary: 'Caller wants to book an event.',
      requestType: 'general',
      intent: 'private_event_inquiry',
      bookingCategory: 'private_event',
      confidence: 0.9,
      needsHuman: true,
      disposition: 'needs_human',
      recommendedSpokenReply: 'What date is the event?',
    });

    const service = new TestReceptionistService();
    await service.analyzeTranscript({
      callId: 'call-1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      callerNumber: '+14165550111',
      transcript: 'Caller: I want to book an event.',
      latestTurn: 'I want to book an event.',
    });

    expect(llmClientMock.generateResponse).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.any(String),
      null,
      'experimental-call-call-1',
      'STRUCTURED_OUTPUT',
      null,
      expect.any(Object),
      'ExperimentalReceptionistDecision',
      expect.any(String),
      expect.objectContaining({
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        context: 'CALLS',
        usageKey: 'CALLS_RECEPTIONIST_DECISION',
      }),
    );
  });

  it('uses the AI settings response usage key instead of a hardcoded model', async () => {
    llmClientMock.generateResponse.mockResolvedValue({
      replyText: 'What date is the event?',
      action: 'create_callback',
      disposition: 'needs_human',
      needsHuman: true,
      shouldCreateCallback: true,
      shouldCreateReservation: false,
      summary: 'Caller wants to book an event.',
    });

    const service = new TestReceptionistService();
    await service.synthesizeReply({
      callId: 'call-1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      transcript: 'Caller: I want to book an event.',
      latestTurn: 'I want to book an event.',
      decision: {
        summary: 'Caller wants to book an event.',
        intent: 'private_event_inquiry',
        bookingCategory: 'private_event',
      },
    });

    expect(llmClientMock.generateResponse).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.any(String),
      null,
      'experimental-call-response-call-1',
      'STRUCTURED_OUTPUT',
      null,
      expect.any(Object),
      'ExperimentalReceptionistResponseSynthesis',
      expect.any(String),
      expect.objectContaining({
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        context: 'CALLS',
        usageKey: 'CALLS_RECEPTIONIST_RESPONSE',
      }),
    );
  });
});
```

FILE: server/src/services/calls/tests/IvrService.test.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/tests/IvrService.test.js
import { describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import {
  createDefaultIvrDefinition,
  handleIvrInput,
  normalizeIvrDefinition,
  renderIvrMenuXml,
  validateIvrDefinition,
} from '../IvrService.js';

describe('IvrService', () => {
  it('creates a normalized starter menu', () => {
    const definition = createDefaultIvrDefinition();
    expect(definition.rootNodeId).toBe('main-menu');
    expect(definition.nodes[0].options.map((option) => option.digit)).toEqual(['1', '0']);
  });

  it('rejects duplicate digits and missing transfer targets', () => {
    const definition = createDefaultIvrDefinition();
    definition.nodes[0].options = [
      { digit: '1', label: 'Sales', action: { type: 'transfer_user', userId: '' } },
      { digit: '1', label: 'Support', action: { type: 'voicemail' } },
    ];
    const result = validateIvrDefinition(definition);
    expect(result.valid).toBe(false);
    expect(result.errors).toEqual(expect.arrayContaining([
      expect.stringContaining('must select a user'),
      expect.stringContaining('more than once'),
    ]));
  });

  it('renders Plivo GetInput XML with an escaped prompt and no-input redirect', () => {
    process.env.API_URL = 'https://api.example.test';
    const definition = normalizeIvrDefinition(createDefaultIvrDefinition());
    definition.nodes[0].prompt.text = 'Sales & support <today>';
    const xml = renderIvrMenuXml({
      menu: { id: 'menu-1', publishedDefinition: definition },
      nodeId: definition.rootNodeId,
    });
    expect(xml).toContain('<GetInput');
    expect(xml).toContain('inputType="dtmf"');
    expect(xml).toContain('Sales &amp; support &lt;today&gt;');
    expect(xml).toContain('/calls/ivr/input?menuId=menu-1&amp;nodeId=main-menu&amp;event=no-input');
  });

  it('plays generated ElevenLabs audio and keeps draft test callbacks in test mode', () => {
    process.env.API_URL = 'https://api.example.test';
    const definition = normalizeIvrDefinition(createDefaultIvrDefinition());
    definition.nodes[0].prompt.generatedAudioUrl = '/uploads/org-1/calls/ivr/generated/main.mp3';
    definition.nodes[0].prompt.generatedTextHash = 'hash';
    const xml = renderIvrMenuXml({
      menu: {
        id: 'menu-1',
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        publishedDefinition: definition,
        isTestDraft: true,
      },
      nodeId: definition.rootNodeId,
    });
    expect(xml).toContain('<Play>https://api.example.test/uploads/org-1/calls/ivr/generated/main.mp3</Play>');
    expect(xml).toContain('test=1');
    expect(xml).toContain('organizationId=org-1');
  });

  it('routes a selected digit to its configured action', async () => {
    const definition = createDefaultIvrDefinition();
    definition.nodes[0].options[0].action = { type: 'message', message: 'Sales & support are closed.' };
    const xml = await handleIvrInput({
      menu: { id: 'menu-1', publishedDefinition: definition },
      nodeId: 'main-menu',
      digits: '1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      normalizedFrom: '+14165550111',
      normalizedTo: '+14165550000',
    });
    expect(xml).toContain('Sales &amp; support are closed.');
    expect(xml).toContain('<Hangup/>');
  });

  it('reports the IVR option selected before routing it', async () => {
    const definition = createDefaultIvrDefinition();
    definition.nodes[0].options[0].label = 'Sales';
    definition.nodes[0].options[0].action = { type: 'message', message: 'Connecting sales.' };
    const onSelection = vi.fn();

    await handleIvrInput({
      menu: { id: 'menu-1', name: 'Main line', publishedDefinition: definition },
      nodeId: 'main-menu',
      digits: '1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      normalizedFrom: '+14165550111',
      normalizedTo: '+14165550000',
      onSelection,
    });

    expect(onSelection).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.objectContaining({
      menuName: 'Main line',
      nodeName: 'Main menu',
      digit: '1',
      optionLabel: 'Sales',
      actionType: 'message',
    }));
  });

  it('rings the shared SIP endpoint and falls back to IVR voicemail', async () => {
    process.env.API_URL = 'https://api.example.test';
    process.env.PLIVO_SIP_ENDPOINT = 'sip:worksmrt@example.test';
    const definition = createDefaultIvrDefinition();
    definition.nodes[0].options[0].action = { type: 'ring_sip_all' };
    const xml = await handleIvrInput({
      menu: { id: 'menu-1', publishedDefinition: definition },
      nodeId: 'main-menu',
      digits: '1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      normalizedFrom: '+14165550111',
      normalizedTo: '+14165550000',
    });
    expect(xml).toContain('<User>sip:worksmrt@example.test</User>');
    expect(xml).not.toContain('<Number>');
    expect(xml).toContain('<Speak>Please leave a message after the beep.</Speak>');
    expect(xml).toContain('/calls/voicemail/complete?organizationId=org-1');
  });

  it('uses the shared default SIP endpoint when no environment override is configured', async () => {
    process.env.API_URL = 'https://api.example.test';
    delete process.env.PLIVO_SIP_ENDPOINT;
    const definition = createDefaultIvrDefinition();
    definition.nodes[0].options[0].action = { type: 'ring_sip_all' };

    const xml = await handleIvrInput({
      menu: { id: 'menu-1', publishedDefinition: definition },
      nodeId: 'main-menu',
      digits: '1',
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      normalizedFrom: '+14165550111',
      normalizedTo: '+14165550000',
    });

    expect(xml).toContain('<User>sip:luanngo30547604180780407@phone.plivo.com</User>');
    expect(xml).not.toContain('SIP calling is not available');
  });
});
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/tests/LLMService.test.js
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';

const mocks = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  axiosGet: vi.fn(),
  phoneCallFindUnique: vi.fn(),
  phoneCallUpdate: vi.fn(),
  initSpeechClient: vi.fn(),
  performSpeechToText: vi.fn(),
}));

vi.mock('axios', () => ({ default: { get: mocks.axiosGet } }));
vi.mock('#shared/database/prismaClient.js', () => ({
  default: {
    phoneCall: {
      findUnique: mocks.phoneCallFindUnique,
      update: mocks.phoneCallUpdate,
    },
  },
}));
vi.mock('#integrations/google/services/googleApiService.js', () => ({
  default: vi.fn(function GoogleApiService() {
    return {
      initSpeechClient: mocks.initSpeechClient,
      performSpeechToText: mocks.performSpeechToText,
    };
  }),
}));
vi.mock('#integrations/ai/llm.js', () => ({ llmClient: { generateResponse: vi.fn() } }));
vi.mock('#services/settings/SettingsService.js', () => ({ default: { getPrompt: vi.fn() } }));

import callLLMService from '../LLMService.js';

describe('CallLLMService transcribeOnly', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    vi.clearAllMocks();
    process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_ID = 'test-auth-id';
    process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_TOKEN = 'test-auth-token';
  });

  it('downloads, transcribes, and persists a voicemail recording', async () => {
    mocks.phoneCallFindUnique.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'call-1',
      recordingUrl: 'https://media.plivo.com/recording.mp3',
      transcription: null,
    });
    mocks.axiosGet.mockResolvedValue({ data: new Uint8Array([1, 2, 3]) });
    mocks.performSpeechToText.mockResolvedValue('Please call me back tomorrow.');
    mocks.phoneCallUpdate.mockResolvedValue({});

    await expect(callLLMService.transcribeOnly('call-1')).resolves.toEqual({
      transcription: 'Please call me back tomorrow.',
    });
    expect(mocks.initSpeechClient).toHaveBeenCalledOnce();
    expect(mocks.axiosGet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      'https://media.plivo.com/recording.mp3',
      expect.objectContaining({
        responseType: 'arraybuffer',
        auth: { username: 'test-auth-id', password: 'test-auth-token' },
      })
    );
    expect(mocks.phoneCallUpdate).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      where: { id: 'call-1' },
      data: { transcription: 'Please call me back tomorrow.' },
    });
  });
});
```

FILE: server/src/services/calls/tests/PlivoWebhookService.test.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/services/calls/tests/PlivoWebhookService.test.js
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import { validatePlivoWebhookRequest } from '../PlivoWebhookService.js';

const responseMock = () => {
  const res = { status: vi.fn(), send: vi.fn() };
  res.status.mockReturnValue(res);
  res.send.mockReturnValue(res);
  return res;
};

describe('validatePlivoWebhookRequest', () => {
  afterEach(() => {
    delete process.env.PLIVO_VALIDATE_WEBHOOKS;
    process.env.NODE_ENV = 'test';
  });

  it('allows local/test callbacks when validation is not enabled', () => {
    const next = vi.fn();
    validatePlivoWebhookRequest({}, responseMock(), next);
    expect(next).toHaveBeenCalledOnce();
  });

  it('rejects unsigned callbacks when validation is enabled', () => {
    process.env.PLIVO_VALIDATE_WEBHOOKS = 'true';
    process.env.PLIVO_AUTH_TOKEN = 'test-auth-token';
    const res = responseMock();
    const req = { get: vi.fn(() => ''), method: 'POST', body: {}, originalUrl: '/calls/answer' };
    validatePlivoWebhookRequest(req, res, vi.fn());
    expect(res.status).toHaveBeenCalledWith(403);
  });
});

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/shared/utils/notificationUtils.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss/server/src/shared/utils/notificationUtils.js
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import { getNamespace } from '#shared/socket.js';
import { sendPushNotificationToUser } from '#shared/utils/pushNotifications.js';

const uniqueIds = (ids = []) => [...new Set(ids.filter(Boolean))];

const buildSkipSet = ({ excludeUserId = null, skipUserIds = [] } = {}) => {
  const skipSet = new Set((skipUserIds || []).filter(Boolean));
  if (excludeUserId) {
    skipSet.add(excludeUserId);
  }
  return skipSet;
};

export const emitToOrg = (
  namespaceName,
  organizationId,
  event,
  payload,
  { roomPrefix = 'org_' } = {}
) => {
  if (!organizationId) {
    return false;
  }

  const namespace = getNamespace(namespaceName);
  if (!namespace) {
    return false;
  }

  namespace.to(`${roomPrefix}${organizationId}`).emit(event, payload);
  return true;
};

export const emitToRoom = (namespaceName, roomId, event, payload) => {
  if (!roomId) {
    return false;
  }

  const namespace = getNamespace(namespaceName);
  if (!namespace) {
    return false;
  }

  namespace.to(roomId).emit(event, payload);
  return true;
};

export const emitToUsers = ({
  namespaceName,
  userIds,
  event,
  payload,
  excludeUserId = null,
  skipUserIds = [],
}) => {
  const namespace = getNamespace(namespaceName);
  if (!namespace) {
    return [];
  }

  const skipSet = buildSkipSet({ excludeUserId, skipUserIds });
  const targetUserIds = uniqueIds(userIds).filter((userId) => !skipSet.has(userId));

  for (const userId of targetUserIds) {
    namespace.to(userId).emit(event, payload);
  }

  return targetUserIds;
};

export const emitToThreadParticipants = ({
  namespaceName = '/chat',
  threadId,
  participantIds,
  event,
  payload,
  excludeUserId = null,
  skipUserIds = [],
}) => {
  emitToRoom(namespaceName, threadId, event, payload);

  return emitToUsers({
    namespaceName,
    userIds: participantIds,
    event,
    payload,
    excludeUserId,
    skipUserIds,
  });
};

export const getMutedUserIdSetForChatRoom = async (chatRoomId) => {
  if (!chatRoomId) {
    return new Set();
  }

  const mutedUsers = await prisma.userMutedChatRoom.findMany({
    where: { chatRoomId },
    select: { userId: true },
  });

  return new Set(mutedUsers.map((item) => item.userId));
};

export const sendPushNotificationsToUsers = async ({
  userIds,
  excludeUserId = null,
  skipUserIds = [],
  pushPayloadByUser,
  onPushError = null,
}) => {
  if (typeof pushPayloadByUser !== 'function') {
    return [];
  }

  const skipSet = buildSkipSet({ excludeUserId, skipUserIds });
  const targetUserIds = uniqueIds(userIds).filter((userId) => !skipSet.has(userId));

  for (const userId of targetUserIds) {
    try {
      const payload = await pushPayloadByUser(userId);
      if (!payload) {
        continue;
      }

      await sendPushNotificationToUser(userId, payload);
    } catch (error) {
      if (typeof onPushError === 'function') {
        onPushError(error, userId);
      }
    }
  }

  return targetUserIds;
};

export const notifyAndEmitToUsers = async ({
  namespaceName,
  userIds,
  event,
  payload,
  excludeUserId = null,
  skipUserIds = [],
  pushPayloadByUser = null,
  onPushError = null,
}) => {
  const emittedUserIds = emitToUsers({
    namespaceName,
    userIds,
    event,
    payload,
    excludeUserId,
    skipUserIds,
  });

  if (typeof pushPayloadByUser === 'function') {
    await sendPushNotificationsToUsers({
      userIds: emittedUserIds,
      pushPayloadByUser,
      onPushError,
    });
  }

  return emittedUserIds;
};
```
